somethings-wedding-band-florence-tuscany.intro_html:
The Somethings – An exquisite, bespoke wedding band ensemble, based in the heart of Florence, Tuscany.

Esteemed for their impeccable artistry, The Somethings are the premier choice for discerning hosts seeking refined musical accompaniment for weddings, exclusive corporate events, and sophisticated private celebrations across Tuscany and throughout Italy.

The ensemble comprises five virtuoso musicians, each possessing exceptional skill, polished decorum, and an elegant stage presence. Their extensive experience with an international clientele is complemented by advanced fluency in English, ensuring seamless and effortless communication.

Their extraordinary standard of performance has earned them a coveted place on FixTheMusic’s curated compendium of the 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy.

Discerning clients who have secured The Somethings have also explored the services of these similarly refined ensembles:

  1. Traffic Lights
  2. The Puppets
  3. The Sonics
  4. The Florence Acoustic Duo
  5. The Tuscany Wedding Band

To preview their refined aesthetic, follow The Somethings on Facebook and Instagram.

View our curated selection of Italy's best wedding bands ➡️

The Somethings are consistently engaged to perform at some of Italy’s most illustrious estates, including Villa Eva in Ravello, Borgo Corsignano in Poppi, and Castello Vicchiomaggio in Florence.

Contact The Somethings
somethings-wedding-band-florence-tuscany.description_html:
The Somethings present a refined ensemble of five virtuoso musicians, with the option to include an exquisite saxophonist upon request, covering an impeccably curated selection of the world’s most celebrated international hits across pop, rock, blues, funk, and soul.

The performance is characterized by the magnetic energy of a live band, anchored by charismatic and polished vocals that captivate every guest.

Their expansive repertoire is artfully organized to complement the distinct moments of your reception:

  • Ceremony: An intimate, bespoke duo of vocals and acoustic guitar, delivering soulful and elegant serenades.
  • Aperitivo: A refined selection of jazz standards from The Great American Songbook, presented as a sophisticated instrumental backdrop. Vocal performances can be seamlessly integrated upon request.
  • Dinner: To preserve the intimacy and tranquility of the dining experience, the ensemble typically provides a curated ambient playlist from a high-fidelity device. A live, acoustic performance during dinner can be artfully arranged upon special request.
  • Party: The zenith of the evening, where the band fully unfurls its vibrant energy and dynamic repertoire, transforming the atmosphere into an unforgettable dance celebration.

Examples of the iconic artists within their expansive repertoire include (chosen at random): Norah Jones, Prince, The Beatles, The Police, Aretha Franklin, Otis Redding, Adele, Bruno Mars, Alanis Morissette, The Fugees, Cyndi Lauper, Bill Whiters, Mr. Big, Donna Summer, Anastacia, Stevie Wonder, Tracy Chapman, Bruno Mars, Tina Turner, Aretha Franklin, Dusty Springfield, Diana Ross, Patti Labelle, Michael Jackson, Gloria Gaynor, James Brown, Sister Sledge, Thelma Houston, Kt Tunstall, Nancy Sinatra, Amy Winehouse, The Blues Brothers.

This high standard of artistry has earned them a premier position on FixTheMusic's 20 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany.

Bespoke Arrangements

  • First Dance: Your selected first dance can be arranged with bespoke precision, provided it is communicated at least 60 days prior to your event.
  • Requested Songs: A maximum of three special requests may be accommodated, kindly requiring 60 days' advance notice.
  • Change of Position: Should the celebration shift between distinct settings, a supplementary sound system may be required. This must be communicated in advance and will incur an additional, bespoke cost.

Their recent engagements have included an illustrious 50th birthday celebration at the Castello di Ugento in Puglia, alongside exclusive weddings at Villa Palagione, Zia Cathy's Country House, and Castello di Spessa.

View our curated selection of Italy's best wedding bands ➡️

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram.

Please explore our website for further details.

fede-strings-collective-brescia-italy.intro_html:
About Fede Strings Collective – An Exquisite String Ensemble from Brescia, Italy

Fede Strings Collective represents a curated assembly of impeccably trained musicians, based in the refined city of Brescia, Italy.

With years of experience gracing the most exclusive weddings and illustrious events, their performances have been set against the breathtaking backdrops of Lake Como, Tuscany, the French Riviera, London, Liguria, Milan, Venice, and Barcelona.

Under the direction of a violinist who has held the distinguished position of principal violin for the celebrated concert Il Volo since 2023, the collective offers bespoke solo violin performances—acoustic or electric—along with sophisticated live improvisation alongside DJs specializing in afro house and lounge music.

Their artistry is regularly commissioned for weddings and events at the prestigious Hotel Villa Cipressi in Lecco and the enchanting Aura Villa del Lago in Italy.

Contact Fede Strings Collective

The ensemble’s string quartet delivers an unforgettable touch with a Bridgerton-inspired aesthetic, performing beloved pop songs and cinematic soundtracks while adorned in elegant costumes selected from a refined collection of fifteen distinct outfits.

Fede Strings Collective is the impeccable choice to craft an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance during guest arrivals, ceremonies, and aperitifs.

Performances are delivered acoustically, eliminating any need for speaker setup. Should a sound system be desired, arrangements can be discussed with the client in advance, or a DJ’s sound system can elevate the after-party celebration.

With a setup requiring only thirty minutes, the quartet arrives at the venue at least one hour before the performance begins, ensuring every detail is perfectly poised.

For those seeking an utterly bespoke experience, Fede String Quartet is delighted to learn a special request song, provided sufficient notice is given.

dusk-roamers-band-verona.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- The length of our sets depends on the type of event. For a wedding, we can play during the ceremony, the aperitif, and around the tables during dinner.

- Usually, during the aperitif, we play for about 1.5 to 2 hours continuously. We can perform both from a fixed spot and moving among the guests. If we do take a short break, we always leave background music playing from a playlist.

- For dinner, we typically play two sets of about 15 minutes each, moving around the tables during breaks between courses.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- For the party, I usually suggest contacting a DJ or I (the band's singer) can offer to do a DJ set.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Usually, if the venue is close to where we live (within an hour from our home), we arrive at least two hours beforehand to set up. If it's further away, we plan to arrive at least three to four hours in advance, accounting for potential traffic. We typically take about an hour for setup and soundcheck.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- If necessary, we can learn some song requests, unless it's a song that the singer cannot perform well. In that case, we recommend playing the MP3.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- When we perform at a fixed location, we typically occupy about 4 meters x 3 meters of space.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- We can perform without problems in unusual settings.</details>

hyped-up-florence-italy.intro_html:
Hyped Up – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

Set within the refined heart of Florence, Hyped Up transcends the notion of a mere wedding and party band. They are the architects of unforgettable moments, the purveyors of harmonious celebrations, curating sonic experiences of the highest calibre.

With a contemporary sensibility and a meticulously international repertoire, Hyped Up has established itself as the pinnacle of musical distinction in Tuscany.

Guiding this exceptional journey is Dizy, a luminary in the world of professional musicianship.

We are proudly listed among the 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy on FixTheMusic 🏆

Her artistic path is adorned with melodies and harmonies that resonate deeply with the soul.

Our calendar is consistently graced by weddings and events at the most prestigious venues: La Pescaia Resort in Grosseto, Abbazia di San Galgano in Siena, and Castello il Palagio Ricevimenti in Florence, Italy.

Inquire About Hyped Up

With a refined penchant for bespoke musical curation, Dizy ensures every performance is impeccably tailored to the unique desires of each client.

Drawing exclusively from Tuscany’s finest roster of professional musicians, Hyped Up crafts sonic tapestries that transcend the ordinary, elevating every occasion they grace with an air of effortless sophistication.

From intimate duos to dynamic six-piece ensembles—complete with the sultry allure of a saxophone—their versatility is boundless.

Hyped Up does not merely perform; they orchestrate an entire experience, guiding clients through every nuance of musical entertainment—from the ceremonial elegance of the first dance to the pulsating rhythms of the evening’s celebration.

Renowned for redefining wedding music in Italy, they bring an exquisite blend of refinement and vibrant energy to every event.

Their unwavering dedication to quality musical repertoires ensures that every note resonates with perfection.

Their stage has been illuminated by applause in iconic Tuscan locations: the timeless elegance of Caffé Paszkowski, the opulent grandeur of Castelfalfi Resort, and the prestigious halls of Hotel Helvetia & Bristol. Hyped Up leaves an indelible mark wherever they perform.

But Dizy’s musical prowess extends far beyond the stage. As a seasoned session musician, her melodies have travelled abroad, gracing studios and stages worldwide, leaving audiences captivated by her ethereal voice and magnetic presence.

With Hyped Up, every event becomes a symphony of jubilation—a testament to the power of music to transcend boundaries and unite hearts. In Florence, where artistry flows like the Arno, Hyped Up stands as a beacon of musical excellence, ready to serenade the soul and ignite the spirit of celebration.

Discover this top wedding band in Tuscany for your next extraordinary event.

What discerning clients praise most: an electrifying energy that reads the room with effortless intuition, a dance floor perpetually alive, seamless transitions and custom edits, impeccable communication and planning, a polished and approachable presence, a meticulously curated repertoire spanning eras and cultures, and an atmosphere of pure celebration. Unreservedly recommended.

Fluent in Italian, English, and Spanish, he commands a vast and nuanced repertoire that traverses every era and genre, orchestrating a seamless soundscape that resonates across generations and cultures.

saxophone-dj-tuscany-double.faq_html:
<details><summary>What does the wedding package include?</summary>Our wedding pack includes totally personalized musical services for all phases of the event (ceremony, reception and aperitif, dinner, cake cutting, first dance, party, etc.)



</details><details><summary>How far in advance do I have to contact you?</summary>At least 6 months is ideal.



</details><details><summary>Size of the group?</summary>Small (2-3 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>The repertoire is not fixed but agreed with the client to guarantee a musical service perfectly in keeping with the tastes of the guests.



</details><details><summary>Can I ask for pieces not included in the repertoire?</summary>We gladly accept the request for pieces not covered by our usual repertoire, especially when it comes to the key moments of the event such as the ceremony or the cutting of the cake.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>Almost twenty years of live music in the most diverse situations such as orchestras, street bands, radio, TV, bands, discos, night clubs, and weddings.



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you need particular material or specific conditions to be able to offer the service?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform at events outside Tuscany?</summary>Yes, we do.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travelling?</summary>Yes, the price depends on the distance.



</details><details><summary>Do you work for more than one wedding per day?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Do you work alone or with a team of professionals?</summary>Alone.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>Our services do not have a standard duration and widely cover all phases of the event from the very first reception until late at night.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare for the performance?</summary>The technical preparation time depends on the client's requests and the amount of equipment needed. We are always in line with the normal timings of the venue.



</details><details><summary>Do you do outdoor performances?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Il nostro pack matrimonio include servizi musicali totalmente personalizzati per tutte le fasi dell'evento (cerimonia, accoglienza e aperitivo, cena, taglio torta, primo ballo, party, ecc.)



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Almeno 6 mesi.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Il repertorio non è fisso ma accordato a priori con il committente per garantire un servizio musicale perfettamente in target con i gusti dei presenti e dei festeggiati.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Accettiamo di buon grado la richiesta di brani non contemplati dal nostro repertorio abituale, soprattutto quando si tratta dei momenti salienti dell'evento come la cerimonia o il taglio della torta.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Quasi vent'anni di musica dal vivo nelle situazioni più disparate come orchestre, streetband, radio, tv, gruppi musicali, discoteche, locali notturni, e matrimoni.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, sì, accettiamo incarichi con trasferta.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, sì, il prezzo dipende dalla distanza.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>I nostri servizi non hanno una durata standard e coprono ampiamente tutte le fasi dell'evento dalla primissima accoglienza fino a tarda notte.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il tempo tecnico di preparazione dipende dalle richieste del committente e dalla quantità di attrezzatura necessaria. Siamo sempre in linea con le normali tempistiche delle location.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-folk-band-naples.intro_html:
The Naples Folk Band – An Exquisite Ensemble of Artisan Musicians, Based in Naples, Italy

The Naples Folk Band presents a meticulously curated ensemble of artisan musicians, devoted exclusively to the performance of cherished traditional Italian folk music for a discerning clientele.

The band’s bespoke acoustics are anchored by the refined interplay of guitar, violin, mandolin, flute, and tambourine, elevated by impeccable vocal harmonies. The breadth of their instrumental mastery imbues every performance with a sophisticated, layered dynamism, crafting an auditory journey that is exquisitely unique.

Their impeccable reputation has secured them recurring engagements at Italy’s most distinguished estates, including Masseria Lamacoppa in Ostuni, Villa Eva on the Amalfi Coast in Ravello, Domus Laeta in Giungano, Relais Blu in Naples, and the esteemed Borgo Scopeto Wine & Country Relais in Siena.

Contact The Naples Folk Band 💬
wedding-folk-band-naples.description_html:
Rooted in the soul of Naples, the ensemble draws profound inspiration from the city’s rich cultural tapestry and storied history, infusing every occasion with the unmistakable magic of the Neapolitan tradition.

View our list of Italy's best folk bands ➡️

With years of distinguished experience gracing prestigious events across Italy, The Naples Folk Band exemplifies the highest echelons of professionalism and artistry, ensuring every detail of your occasion is executed with seamless precision. A celebrated and revered name in Italian wedding music, they are renowned for curating an atmosphere of authentic folk vibrancy, warmth, and refined conviviality.

Whether providing the bespoke soundtrack for an intimate matrimonial ceremony, a lavish private soirée, an exclusive corporate function, or a distinguished public concert, The Naples Folk Band delivers an impeccable performance.

For those discerning clients seeking to engage one of Naples’ most exquisite musical ensembles for their most cherished celebrations, we invite you to initiate a conversation. Contact The Naples Folk Band today.

Bespoke DJ sets paired with live saxophone, from aperitivo to afterparty. Impeccable crowd reading, curated playlists, and a seamless flow that ensures a refined, unforgettable atmosphere.

The Milan Saxophonist is a virtuoso musician and DJ, dedicated to delivering an unparalleled musical experience for the most discerning celebrations.

With years of refined industry experience, he is a masterful improviser, effortlessly adapting his performance to the unique rhythm of each occasion.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's most exquisite wedding DJs and saxophonists ➡️

Follow the journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸

He is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at legendary venues such as Castello di Rosciano in Perugia, the NH Collection Grand Hotel Convento di Amalfi, and the Grand Hotel Imperiale Resort & SPA on Lake Como.

Enquire with The Milan Saxophonist 💬
saxophonist-milan-italy.description_html:
Beyond his mastery of the saxophone, The Milan Saxophonist is a remarkably gifted DJ, curating an exquisite repertoire spanning house, chillout, pop, jazz, Latin, and classic Italian melodies.

His eclectic style, traversing decades and genres, combined with a multi-discipline artistry, ensures that every guest—from the youngest to the most seasoned—is captivated.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's most exquisite wedding DJs and saxophonists ➡️

A supremely versatile performer, he frequently collaborates with other artists and DJs, and is celebrated within the wedding music Italy scene for his seamless fusion of live saxophone and impeccably mixed DJ sets.

You may engage The Milan Saxophonist as either a solo saxophonist or a complete DJ experience. His DJ service includes the provision of a state-of-the-art professional audio and lighting system.

When retained as a DJ, his performance features dynamic DJ sets interspersed with live saxophone interventions, using a wireless microphone to move freely and interact intimately with the couple and their guests. For saxophone-only performances, he curates bespoke playlists of three or four songs to accompany. As a DJ, he masterfully mixes tracks using a professional console.

His international acclaim extends across Europe—from the French Riviera (Cannes, Nice, Antibes, Provence) and Monaco to Switzerland (St. Moritz, Lugano, Bern, Zurich, Geneva, Zermatt, Lausanne, Montreux), Spain (Barcelona, Madrid), and even the Maldives—as well as throughout Italy's most refined destinations, including Bologna, Bergamo, Lake Como, Lake Garda, Turin, Genoa, Lecco, Varese, and Venice.

For those seeking the finest saxophonist Italy has to offer, look no further than The Milan Saxophonist. Enquire today to secure an unparalleled experience.

Into The Night – An Exquisite DJ Live Ensemble, Based in Rome, Italy

Into The Night presents an impeccably refined fusion of DJ artistry and live musicianship, honed through years of performance and industry mastery.

This bespoke ensemble orchestrates a seamless marriage between a curated DJ set and a dynamic live band, delivering an atmosphere of unparalleled sophistication for every occasion.

Comprising a captivating female vocalist, a soulful saxophonist, a masterful percussionist, and an expert DJ, this exceptional group elevates the dance floor into an exclusive realm of elegance, ensuring your guests remain enchanted throughout the evening.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's most distinguished wedding bands ➡️

Based in the heart of Rome, Into The Night graces the capital and its environs with their presence, lending their impeccable talents to weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas.

They are frequently entrusted with performances at the esteemed Torre del Parco in Lecce, a testament to their refined reputation.

Inquire About Into The Night
dj-live-rome-into-the-night.description_html:
DJ Live ensembles are the quintessential choice for any prestigious event, and Into The Night’s bespoke approach allows them to tailor every set to your exacting desires.

Their multi-genre repertoire effortlessly transitions from a serene lounge ambiance to an exuberant, celebratory atmosphere—each moment curated with exquisite precision.

If you seek to secure one of Rome’s most coveted DJ Live Acts, look no further than Into The Night. As one of Rome's preeminent wedding bands, they promise an experience of unparalleled refinement.

View our exclusive list of the finest wedding bands across Italy

wedding-dj-tuscany-italy-stefo.intro_html:
About DJ Stefo – an exquisite wedding DJ, based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy

Stefo is an impeccably refined wedding DJ, residing in the enchanting Tuscan region of Italy. His artistry is in constant demand for the most exclusive weddings and events across Italy and throughout Europe.

His repertoire is supremely versatile, masterfully curating an eclectic blend of genres—from House and pop to Garage and hip hop—each transition executed with seamless sophistication.

DJ Stefo is privately mentored and managed by DJ Zano, one of Italy’s most celebrated and sought-after wedding DJs, ensuring an education in excellence.

Should you wish to engage one of the most distinguished wedding DJs Tuscany has to offer, an introduction to Stefo awaits.

My bespoke performances are regularly booked for the most prestigious venues: Borgo Tre Rose Country Hotel in Montepulciano, Tenuta di Monaciano in Siena, and Castello di Montalto in Castelnuovo Berardenga, Italy.

Arrange a private consultation with DJ Stefo 💬
wedding-dj-tuscany-italy-stefo.description_html:
A professional party DJ based in Florence, Italy, Stefo has graced the decks of the most renowned discotheques throughout Tuscany, setting the standard for refined entertainment.

Discover our curated selection of Italy’s finest wedding DJs ➡️

His illustrious journey began in 2013 as a DJ producer, debuting with his first record on Wolfrage Recordings, before joining the esteemed House Park Records—a hallmark of his early dedication to the craft.

Stefo has become an impeccable choice for weddings, corporate events, and private celebrations across Tuscany, celebrated for his effortless versatility and natural, charismatic stage presence.

With many years of refined experience, he ensures the celebration continues until the final exquisite note, captivating every guest with an unforgettable night.

His energy and infectious devotion to music create a perfect, luminous harmony—an experience that elevates any event to the realm of the extraordinary.

string-quartet-sicily-armonia.intro_html:
About Armonia String Quartet – An Exquisite String Quartet Based in Sicily, Italy

Armonia String Quartet presents an impeccably curated ensemble, delivering refined classical renditions for the most discerning occasions. From grand celebrations to intimate gatherings, this distinguished quartet infuses every event with an aura of classical romance, enchanting each audience with unparalleled artistry.

Masterfully versatile, this exceptional quartet commands an expansive repertoire—from pop and rock to folk and classical—ensuring a bespoke musical experience tailored to your vision. Based in Catania, Armonia String Quartet performs regularly across Sicily for destination weddings, exclusive parties, and corporate events, and is delighted to travel to your chosen setting.

We are frequently engaged to perform at the most prestigious venues, including the Grand Hotel Timeo Belmond, Borgo del Carato, and Verdura Resort Rocco Forte Hotel in Sicily, Italy.

Contact Armonia String Quartet 💬
string-quartet-sicily-armonia.description_html:
Always immaculately attired, Armonia String Quartet takes immense pride in every performance, ensuring that every detail is orchestrated with impeccable precision.

View our curated selection of Italy's finest string quartets for hire ➡️

With years of performance experience, the quartet embodies consummate professionalism and skill, guaranteeing a flawless presentation. Their swift and effortless setup affords them the flexibility to perform both indoors and al fresco with equal grace.

Below are but a few of the exquisite locations where clients have commissioned Armonia String Quartet through FixTheMusic for weddings and events...

  • Grand Hotel Timeo Belmond Hotel
  • Verdura Resort Rocco Forte Hotel
  • Commenda di San Calogero
  • La Tonnara di Scopello
  • Torre di Scopello-Doria
  • Torre Garbonogara, Termini Imerese
  • Dimora delle Balze
  • Borgo del Carato, Sicily
  • Ragusa, Sicily
  • Palermo
  • Lentini, Syracuse, Italy

The ensemble is frequently engaged earlier in the day, before one of our Sicily wedding bands assumes the evening’s revelries.

Thus, if you seek to engage one of Sicily’s most refined string quartets, look no further than Armonia String Quartet—do reach out today.

wedding-party-cover-band-italy-fighters.intro_html:
The Fighters — An Exquisite Trio of Wedding & Event Musicians, Based in Lazio, Italy

An impeccably curated ensemble of three virtuoso musicians, The Fighters specialise in delivering electrifying renditions of the most iconic songs ever composed. Their bespoke repertoire spans decades and genres, from the timeless genius of Queen and The Beatles to the contemporary energy of The Black Eyed Peas, ensuring every guest is swept onto the dance floor.

With years of refined experience behind them, this distinguished trio shows no sign of waning—each performance is a masterclass in seamless artistry and unwavering vitality.

Discover our curated selection of Italy’s most distinguished wedding bands ➡️

We are regularly entrusted with weddings and exclusive events at the magnificent Villa Quaranta Tommasi Wine Hotel & SPA in Ospedaletto and the storied Castello di Rossino in Lecco, Italy—venues that demand nothing less than perfection.

Enquire About The Fighters
wedding-party-cover-band-italy-fighters.description_html:
The Fighters are delighted to travel across Italy, lending their exquisite artistry to an array of distinguished functions—from bespoke weddings and intimate private parties to high-profile festivals and exclusive club engagements.

Beloved and championed by a loyal following for over a decade, this ensemble’s enduring appeal is a testament to their unparalleled craftsmanship and charismatic presence. Their vast experience ensures an impeccable performance, with a flawlessly orchestrated setup that allows the evening to unfold with effortless grace.

A selection of the prestigious venues where FixTheMusic clients have reserved The Fighters for their celebrations:

  • Castello di Rossino, Lecco

About DJ Nene – An Exquisite Wedding DJ & Producer, Based in Milan, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most about DJ Nene: an impeccably full dance floor throughout the evening, a perfectly curated atmosphere, seamless transitions, a refined song selection that effortlessly adapts to the audience, exceptional communication, a personable yet professional presence, and an abundance of complimentary praise from guests.

DJ Nene is an Italian electronic music DJ and producer of rare sophistication.

View FixTheMusic's curated list of the finest wedding DJs in Italy

Driven by a profound passion for every facet of electronic music and the latest digital technologies, she has cultivated a distinctive musical identity—composing her own tracks and delivering performances of exceptional artistry.

Her releases unveil cosmopolitan, dreamlike minimal house journeys and delicate electronic gems, each a bespoke auditory escape.

Explore the complete portfolio of exclusive wedding DJs in Italy

DJ Nene’s sets and mixes are at once eclectic and enchanting—a masterful blend of timeless classics and contemporary soundscapes. Her selections in indie dance and melodic techno are distinguished by a uniquely elegant signature, certain to inspire every guest to move.

She is a regular choice for weddings and events at the most prestigious venues, including Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole, Villa Regina Teodolinda on Lake Como, and Villa Lake Relais Gargnano in Navazzo, Italy.

Inquire About DJ Nene’s Bespoke Services

As an accomplished remixer, DJ Nene’s melodic sensibility resonates with remarkable clarity and power.

Discover our selection of Italy’s most sought-after wedding DJs

Her work achieves an impeccable equilibrium between energy and minimalism—a reflection of a refined, eclectic musical philosophy where the principle of quality over quantity reigns supreme.

Each performance weaves a narrative, a harmonious dance across her chosen sonic spectrum—whether a soft house set, a hypnotic club journey, a dreamlike wave of sound, or any bespoke variation in between.

She has collaborated with an illustrious array of high-profile brands and locations, among them: Louis Vuitton, Gio Moretti, Fragiacomo, Liu Jo, Sephora, Martini, Santa Margherita Wines, DS Automobiles, Inter Football Team, CR7 Cristiano Ronaldo, Unopiù, Sky, Pirelli, Me by Melià, and Hilton.

Below is a selection of venues where she has been booked by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events of the highest calibre…

If you seek to engage one of Italy’s most refined female DJs, look no further than DJ Nene—and do not hesitate to make your enquiry today.

wedding-dj-tuscany-charlie.intro_html:
DJ Charlie – An Exquisite Curator of Sound for Refined Celebrations, Based in Tuscany, Italy

For many years, I have dedicated myself to the art of music as a DJ, performing at weddings, private soirées, exclusive parties, après-ski gatherings, and beyond. My journey has taken me across borders—France, Switzerland, and England—enriching my craft and allowing me to connect with discerning audiences worldwide. Having spent considerable time immersed in the club scene, I now collaborate with the impeccably trained DJ Zano, one of Italy’s most revered wedding DJs, to create bespoke musical experiences in the enchanting region of Tuscany, where I reside. Fluency in English, French, and Italian further enables me to cater to a sophisticated, international clientele.

View FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the best wedding DJs in Italy

My transition from the energy of club performances to the intimacy of private events has been profoundly fulfilling. I thrive on orchestrating unforgettable moments through music—each note meticulously chosen to complement the unique atmosphere of every occasion. Whether at the illustrious Villa Valentini Bonaparte in Perugia, the elegant Villa Lena in Pisa, or the charming Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena, I am regularly booked to elevate celebrations with an impeccable soundtrack.

Enquire for DJ Charlie

With an extensive and refined repertoire spanning from the nostalgic allure of the 70s, 80s, and 90s to the contemporary pulse of house, hip-hop, reggaeton, and electronic music, DJ Charlie curates an unforgettable, dynamic musical journey. Seamlessly blending these diverse genres, he crafts an electrifying atmosphere that evolves throughout the event, captivating guests of every taste.

Discover our exclusive list of Italy’s finest wedding DJs ➡️

Beyond being the heartbeat of your celebration, DJ Charlie collaborates with an ensemble of exceptional artists—singers, saxophonists, violinists, trumpeters, and drummers. This infusion of live, bespoke elements into his sets adds a uniquely captivating dimension to the musical narrative. Renowned for uniting guests of all ages and cultural backgrounds, his vibrant, eclectic sounds create an inclusive, engaging, and utterly refined ambience.

wedding-band-bologna-curious-groove.intro_html:
About The Curious Groove Band – An Exquisite Wedding & Event Ensemble, Based in Bologna, Italy

Conceived in March 2013, The Curious Groove Band has devoted itself to delivering an impeccable repertoire of funk and groove masterpieces. This refined ensemble is extraordinarily versatile, weaving an array of styles throughout your celebration to compose a bespoke soundtrack for your entire day. From sophisticated jazz aperitifs and intimate acoustic dinner sets to electrifying party performances, The Curious Groove Band ensures every moment is impeccably curated from the first note to the final crescendo. The ensemble is a preferred choice for weddings and exclusive events at distinguished venues such as Castello di Petrata in Perugia and Glamping Abruzzo in Pescara, Italy.

Inquire About The Curious Groove Band

The ensemble features six principal elements—sublime male and female vocals, guitar, bass, drums, piano, and saxophone—each meticulously adaptable to the unique character of your occasion. For intimate soirees, the band may be refined to a duo or trio, while the full six-piece formation elevates grand celebrations. Drawing on years of collective mastery, The Curious Groove Band attends to every musical detail with impeccable precision, its vast and varied repertoire ensuring an experience that delights every guest. The act operates from a curated pool of uncompromising musicians—the finest in Italy—whose artistry is at its zenith; as such, the live assemblage may not precisely mirror promotional footage.

Discover our selection of Italy’s most distinguished wedding bands ➡️

  • Castello di Petrata, Assisi
  • Glamping Abruzzo, Cappuccini

Thus, should you seek to engage one of Italy’s most supremely groove-driven ensembles, look no further than The Curious Groove Band—and reach out today to begin your journey toward an unforgettable celebration.

beats-cello-perugia-italy.intro_html:
Beats & Cello – An Exquisite Duo of DJ & Cello, Based in Perugia, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most about Beats & Cello: a refined guitar and cello duo, romantic ceremony melodies paired with impeccably curated DJ sets, unparalleled professionalism and adaptability, and an artistry that captivates every guest.

Beats & Cello stands as one of central Italy’s most evocative and sophisticated ensembles, performing across all regions—with a particular presence in Umbria, Tuscany, and Rome.

Explore the full collection of bespoke wedding musicians in Italy.

The cello reigns as the soul of their performance—an instrument that delivers its full splendor during both the ceremony and the subsequent DJ set. They weave an emotionally enveloping atmosphere throughout the ceremony; the cello’s warm resonance tenderly embraces the hearts of the bride and groom during each entrance. A magnificent choice, it bestows an air of refined sophistication upon every event.

They are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive celebrations at Relais La Corte dei Papi in Arezzo, Podere Sant’Antonio in Bolsena, and Villa La Bagatta in Lazise, Italy.

Inquire About Beats & Cello 💬
beats-cello-perugia-italy.description_html:
Beats & Cello possesses an innate ability to elevate an aperitif with their modern duo formula—cellist, guitarist, and vocals—crafting an atmosphere of effortless elegance. Both artists sing, offering a harmonious blend of female and male voices. Their repertoire spans English, Italian, and, upon request, French. Each song is chosen for its distinction, never predictable, always artfully arranged; notably, live performances are delivered without the use of audio backing tracks.

During dinner and lunch, they ensure flawless flow by assisting with speeches via Wi‑Fi microphones and powerful, wireless battery‑powered speakers. Their guiding principle: to remain entirely attuned to the couple and collaborate seamlessly with the wedding planners present.

As the open bar commences, the Beats & Cello cello show unfolds—a curated DJ set where the cello dances over commercial classics and timeless songs from every era. The musical genre is tailored in close consultation with the couple.

They are equipped to mount up to three distinct audio‑light systems within the same venue, ensuring impeccable coverage.

Frequently summoned to perform at prestigious estates across Italy, Beats & Cello also collaborates and may be booked alongside Blue Zone.

Their distinguished roster of venues includes Castello di Petrata in Umbria—renowned worldwide for hosting luxurious weddings—Villa Aurelia and Castello della Spizzichina in Rome, Castello di Rosciano and Posta dei Donini in Umbria, Borgo Lucignanello and Borgo di Pietrafitta in Tuscany, Colcaprile and Forte Sorgnano in Umbria, Villa Le Mura, Villa Montefreddo, and Montenero Castle in Umbria, Villa Pordenovo in Siena, San Galgano Abbey and San Pietro in Assisi in Tuscany, Hotel Bramante in Todi, and Agriturismo San Pietro Aquaeortus, Cantina Antonelli, and Cantina Colsanto in Umbria, among others. These exquisite settings have garnered glowing acclaim from couples hailing from France, America, England, Spain, China, and Italy.

tuscany-wedding-band-italy.intro_html:
About The Tuscany Wedding Band — an ensemble of unparalleled refinement, based in Florence, Tuscany.

What discerning clients cherish most: an exquisite highlight of the event, virtuoso musicians, an atmosphere of effortless elegance, impeccable professionalism, and a warmth that captivates every guest. Unreservedly recommended.

For eleven years, The Tuscany Wedding Band has cultivated a bespoke repertoire for the most exclusive celebrations—weddings, galas, and private soirées where only the finest will suffice.

We are honoured to be featured among FixTheMusic’s Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆

Our vast, curated repertoire renders us the ideal ensemble for any occasion: from intimate cocktail receptions and refined dinner music to grand concert performances and exhilarating dance sets.

Discover more premier Italy wedding bands

We are regularly commissioned for weddings and events at the most prestigious Tuscan estates, including Villa Grabau in Lucca, Casa Cornacchi in Arezzo, and Villa Buonvisi.

Enquire for The Tuscany Wedding Band 💬
tuscany-wedding-band-italy.description_html:
All musicians are native to Tuscany, save for our vocalist—a Canadian who has called Florence home for twenty-five years, infusing each performance with a cosmopolitan allure.

Explore our curated selection of Italy's finest wedding bands ➡️

Our artistry has graced the most illustrious private events: the wedding of Mayor Domenici (former Mayor of Florence), the Guicciardini Spring Ball hosted by a celebrated fashion dynasty, Ben Lewis’s 60th birthday—chief financial advisor at Goldman Sachs—and the wedding of Peter Arnell (founder of Arnell Group) with guests including Tina Turner.

Each member of the ensemble brings decades of individual distinction, having performed at prestigious venues, festivals, and concert halls, and as session musicians for legendary artists such as Raf, Biagio Antonacci, Irene Grandi, Dirotta su Cuba, Noemi, Ana Popovic, Patti Smith, Patty Pravo, Dolce Nera, Adriano Celentano, and Etta James.

Our repertoire is a journey through eras of sublime music: classic jazz standards from the 1920s to the 1950s, interpreted in the spirit of Sinatra, Ella Fitzgerald, and Sarah Vaughan, flowing into contemporary jazz luminaries like Diana Krall, Norah Jones, Amy Winehouse, and Michael Bublé.

For the dance floor, we offer an impeccable selection of Motown, Soul, and the defining sounds of the 1960s through the 1990s, alongside modern icons such as Rihanna, Adele, Beyoncé, Bruno Mars, Pharrell Williams, Meghan Trainor, and Coldplay.

Our musicianship, professionalism, and an unmistakable dash of Tuscan flair have established us as one of the most sought-after bands for both Italian and international occasions.

Should you seek the finest wedding band Tuscany (Italy) has to offer, we invite you to connect with The Tuscany Wedding Band.

wedding-saxophonist-tuscany-spicy-sax.intro_html:
Spicy Sax – An Exquisite Confluence of DJ Mastery and Live Saxophone, Based in Tuscany & Sardinia

What discerning clients cherish most about Spicy Sax: electrifying saxophone & DJ performances that keep the dance floor impeccably full, a refined ability to read the room, seamless improvisation, unwavering professionalism, and an effortless collaboration that is wholeheartedly recommended.

Spicy Sax is a bespoke entertainment virtuoso, hailing from the heart of Tuscany, who curates superlative musical experiences for the most prestigious events. From classical and jazz to pop and Ibiza-inspired alchemy, his repertoire is as vast as it is versatile—each note meticulously crafted to suit the occasion with impeccable elegance.

Follow the journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸

Spicy Sax collaborates with an exclusive ensemble of talented performers—including DJs, string quartets, percussionists, and full bands—ensuring every musical desire is met with refined sophistication. Enquire today to discover our all-inclusive, curated packages that elevate your celebration into a singular masterpiece.

Explore our curated selection of Italy’s most distinguished wedding DJs and saxophonists ➡️

Clients who have engaged Spicy Sax have also sought the following exceptional musicians through FixTheMusic:

  1. Double Sax & DJ

  2. Party Sax & DJ

  3. The Milan Saxophonist

With a passion for refined travel, Spicy Sax regularly performs across the Tuscan region—adorning weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas with an air of exclusivity. During August, the artist often graces weddings and events in Sardinia, adding an unparalleled touch of coastal elegance.

Among the many prestigious venues that have hosted this luminary are Villa Catignano in Siena, Hotel Ollastu Resort in Sassari, and Borgo Sant’Ambrogio Pienza—each a setting worthy of such exquisite talent.

Inquire about Spicy Sax 💬

Spicy Sax frequently performs alongside other elite performers, including distinguished musicians and DJs—reach out below to learn more about our bespoke collaborations.

This impeccable performer captivates audiences at any event, and when paired with a DJ, delivers the perfect Ibiza-style saxophone experience—a symphony of sophistication and energy. swinging-emotions-milan-italy.intro_html:
Swinging Emotions – an exquisite jazz and swing ensemble, impeccably curated and based in the cultural heart of Milan, Italy.

Giulio is a refined Italian composer, arranger, guitarist, and vocalist of the highest caliber.

His interpretations of the American Songbook are nothing short of superb, delivered with a warm, crooner’s timbre reminiscent of Michael Bublé and Frank Sinatra—a voice that exudes timeless elegance.

Commanding a bespoke international repertoire, he reimagines enduring melodies with unparalleled style and grace, captivating both connoisseurs of jazz and discerning guests who delight in the enchanting allure of swing.

An exclusive presence at the most prestigious celebrations, Swinging Emotions is regularly engaged for weddings and bespoke events at Villa Balbiano and Villa Simplicitas E Solferino on the shores of Lake Como—a testament to their refined artistry.

Contact Swinging Emotions

 

Among an elite circle of Italian musicians, Giulio is one of the rare virtuosos of the seven-string semi-acoustic guitar—an instrument mastered by legends such as Bucky Pizzarelli and John Pizzarelli—cementing his status as a swing guitar prodigy of exceptional rarity.

His discography comprises a curated collection of albums, EPs, and singles—featuring original compositions, reimagined global successes, and classic interpretations of legendary crooners. Within months of release, his latest album, Timeless, garnered over 1.8 million streams on Spotify—a profound testament to its resonance.

Giulio has graced the stage alongside luminary figures from both the Italian and international jazz spheres.

Among his most distinguished collaborations is a partnership with the legendary New York pianist John Colianni—whose own illustrious career includes performances with Mel Tormé, Les Paul, Lionel Hampton, and Woody Allen.

Together, they have performed at an impeccable roster of esteemed venues—Spike’s Place Jazz Club, The Boisdale of Belgravia, The Concorde Club, and The Boisdale of Canary Wharf in London—venues that have previously hosted luminaries such as Amy Winehouse, Rod Stewart, and Tom Jones.

Over the course of his distinguished career, Giulio has performed at a selection of exclusive jazz festivals and high-profile events, including the 150th anniversary celebration of Villa d’Este on Lake Como, the prestigious unveiling of the Ferrari 296 GTS, and an array of esteemed weddings at private venues—each occasion a hallmark of luxury.

For his live performances, Giulio curates collaborations with elite musicians across an array of ensembles—from an intimate trio to a refined quartet, or a magnificent eight-piece big band. He further offers bespoke tribute projects honoring legendary artists such as Michael Bublé, Nat King Cole, and Frank Sinatra, as well as a “Swingin’ Christmas” production, exquisitely tailored for the festive season.

The Popinjays – Purveyors of Refined Musical Elegance, based in Puglia, Italy

The Popinjays orchestrate an exquisite roaming jazz and swing experience, curating bespoke musical narratives for the most discerning celebrations.

With years of impeccable industry mastery, their ensemble delivers an unparalleled performance of sophistication and finesse.

The ensemble graces exclusive weddings, private soirées, and distinguished corporate galas across Puglia and the entirety of Italy.

The Popinjays are a fixture at Italy’s most prestigious estates, including Villa Aurelia in Rome, Masseria Mangiamuso in Brindisi, and Tenuta Odegitria in Taranto.

Inquire About The Popinjays Experience

florence-tenors-italy.intro_html:
The Florence Tenors: An Ensemble of Exquisite Vocal Artistry, Based in Florence, Tuscany

Renowned throughout Italy for bestowing impeccably refined live music upon weddings, exclusive celebrations, and distinguished events, The Florence Tenors represent the pinnacle of vocal performance.

Discover the complete collection of curated wedding musicians in Italy

From the soaring majesty of opera and classical masterpieces to the heartfelt resonance of traditional Italian melodies and sophisticated modern pop covers, our bespoke repertoire is meticulously adapted to your every preference.

Explore our selection of Italy's most distinguished opera singers for hire ➡️

For those of discerning taste seeking the finest Three Tenors tribute Italy has to offer for their nuptials or elegant soirée, an inquiry with The Florence Tenors is the essential first step.

Clients who have engaged The Florence Tenors have also sought the refined talents of the following esteemed musicians on FixTheMusic:

  1. Italian String Quartet
  2. Sparkle Strings
  3. Laura Violin
  4. The Florence Jazz Band
  5. The Wedding Tenor

Our calendar is consistently adorned with performances at Italy’s most coveted estates, including Villa Boscarello in Siena, Villa Camilla in Florence, and Castello di Rosciano in Perugia.

Inquire with The Florence Tenors 💬

The following prestigious venues represent a curated selection of exquisite destinations where our ensemble has been engaged by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events...

We present a selection of meticulously curated performance concepts, each designed to elevate your celebration to an unparalleled level of sophistication.

1) The Signature Concert: A Classic Three Tenors Performance

At the culmination of dinner, before the cake is presented, the ensemble—resplendent in refined concert attire—delivers a captivating 20 to 30-minute programme. This exquisite performance is accompanied by the piano, with an optional string quartet to enrich the harmonic tapestry.

2) The Unforeseen Overture: The "Singing Waiters" Experience

Throughout the dinner service, the tenors, impeccably attired as waiters, circulate among your guests. As the first course approaches, one tenor surprises the room with an a cappella aria or a piece accompanied by piano. This delightful revelation continues with the second and third tenors following subsequent courses. Prior to the dessert, the trio, now in concert dress, unites for a grand 20-minute finale with piano and optional string quartet.

3) A Love Revealed: The Ceremony "Guest" Performance

The tenors inconspicuously join your guests before the ceremony, blending in as attendees. At a pre-arranged, poignant moment—signaled by the pianist—the first tenor rises, transforming the atmosphere. One by one, the tenors reveal themselves, moving towards the couple, culminating in a breathtaking shared performance. They will continue with one or two additional pieces during the ceremony.

Concierge of Curiosities: Client Inquiries

Query from Georgina, 30 August 2025: "During the church wedding ceremony, at which specific points does the tenor typically perform?"

Response from Lorenzo: The tenor’s voice is most exquisitely integrated during the Offertory Hymn, at Communion, and during the Signing of the Register. The processional, as the bride enters, is also a profoundly moving moment for a solo performance.

wedding-band-puglia-italy-cosmos.intro_html:
About Cosmos – An Exquisite Wedding Band Based in Puglia, Italy

Cosmos presents a refined musical experience, a professional pop covers ensemble curated in the heart of Puglia. At its soul is the impeccable, bespoke vocal artistry of lead singer Marina, whose luminous delivery elevates every performance.

We are engaged exclusively for weddings and events across the Puglia region and beyond, bringing a sophisticated, high-energy presence to each occasion. Our meticulously crafted setlist weaves modern and classic pop covers, designed to keep your distinguished guests on the dance floor throughout the evening.

We are regularly booked for premier celebrations at such esteemed venues as Masseria Borgo Ritella in Fasano, Relais Villa Cenci in Cisternino, and Lido Bambu Beach Club in Monopoli, Italy.

For those who desire a fuller vocal tapestry, lead singer Marina also performs with Puglia-based wedding band Stardust, offering both refined male and female lead vocals—a truly bespoke touch.

Enquire with Cosmos

Services

myrtle-duo-ravenna-italy.intro_html:
About Myrtle Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble, Based in Ravenna, Italy

Introducing Myrtle Duo—a captivating, globally celebrated musical force that curates a symphony of love, joy, and refined celebration for weddings and exclusive events. With an enchanting fusion of vocals, guitar melodies, loop station wizardry, and percussive rhythms, Myrtle Duo transforms every occasion into an impeccable, unforgettable experience. At the heart of this duo are two seasoned musicians, each possessing over two decades of mastery in live performance and event creation.

View our curated selection of Italy's finest wedding musicians ➡️

Their passion for music is matched only by a devotion to yoga, and they artfully blend these two disciplines to craft a harmonious, bespoke atmosphere. They are regularly engaged for weddings and events at the exquisite Borgo Stomennano in Tuscany and the refined Buccelletti Casali & Cantina in Arezzo, Italy.

Reserve Myrtle Duo
myrtle-duo-ravenna-italy.description_html: Myrtle Duo’s journey has carried them to the world’s most far-flung and exclusive destinations, where they have shared their musical artistry and life experiences. From the vibrant streets of New York to the pristine shores of the Maldives, from the mystical landscapes of India to the serene temples of Thailand, they have left an indelible mark with every note. Their versatility shines through an extensive, thoughtfully curated repertoire and a chameleon-like ability to adapt to any setting—whether an intimate home concert, a chic club, a romantic wedding, or a sophisticated restaurant. What distinguishes Myrtle Duo is the freedom to perform wherever inspiration leads, thanks to their wireless sound system. This allows them to stage their performance in the most picturesque locations without requiring a power source, serenading you amid nature’s pure beauty. From their impeccable vocal harmonies to mesmerising guitar melodies and the enchantment of their loop station, Myrtle Duo ensures your special day becomes an exclusive celebration of music, love, and happiness. Let Myrtle Duo be the soundtrack to life’s most treasured moments, creating lasting memories that echo forever in your hearts.

tuscany-jazz-collective.intro_html:
The Tuscany Jazz Collective – an exquisite ensemble of professional jazz and swing musicians, based in the heart of Tuscany, Italy.

What discerning clients most adore: impeccably elegant jazz performances, consummate professionalism and reliability, effortless communication, gracious flexibility with bespoke requests, virtuosic talent, and the creation of a refined, unforgettable atmosphere.

We are a curated collective of seasoned virtuosi, each with many years of experience gracing weddings and prestigious events across Tuscany and throughout Northern Italy. Our repertoire spans from relaxed, sophisticated jazz and swing to spirited Latin jazz and danceable selections for celebratory receptions and soirées.

Should you wish to engage the most refined jazz and swing ensemble Tuscany has to offer, we invite you to contact us.

Follow our journey on Facebook.

We are honored to be listed on FixTheMusic’s 20 Best Jazz Bands in Italy 🏆.

Our calendar is regularly filled with exclusive performances at distinguished venues such as Borgo Studiati in Pisa, Borgo Stomennano in Monteriggioni, and Masseria Potenti in Taranto, among many others.

Enquire about The Tuscany Jazz Collective 💬

Below is a selection of the illustrious locations where we have been engaged by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events:

venice-jazz-band-italy.intro_html:
The Venice Jazz Band – An Exquisite Ensemble of Refined Musical Artistry, Based in Venice, Italy

The Venice Jazz Band presents a meticulously curated repertoire spanning from 1901 through the timeless classics of the 1950s, interpreted with impeccable elegance and sophisticated charm. What truly distinguishes this ensemble is the profound camaraderie that imbues every performance—a bespoke harmony born of genuine friendship.

Comprising some of northern Italy’s most distinguished jazz musicians, the band’s members have shared an artistic kinship since 2005, when the ensemble was first formed. Their repertoire is an exquisite tapestry of dixieland, ragtime, swing, gypsy jazz, and celebrated American songs from the golden era of 1901–1950. On occasion, the ensemble also presents refined acoustic interpretations of select pop and rock compositions. In collaboration with guest vocalists, they offer a captivating selection of bossa nova, Latin, and bolero pieces—available upon request.

Recognised among the 18 Best Jazz Bands in Italy 🏆 by FixTheMusic, The Venice Jazz Band is a favoured choice for weddings and exclusive events at prestigious venues such as Hotel Belmond Cipriani, Rifugio Pomedes in Belluno, Hotel Palazzo Pianca in Venice, and Castello Rubein in Merano.

Enquire with The Venice Jazz Band 💬

The ensemble accommodates nearly any bespoke repertoire request, within agreed parameters. As a large family of musicians, the band’s configuration is entirely adaptable to the client’s specific desires and budget—from an intimate duo to a full ensemble of six or seven elements.

Despite the variety of instruments employed—clarinet, guitar, banjo, double bass, drums, vocals, violin, and saxophone—one constant remains: the band’s signature acoustic timbre. The Venice Jazz Band performs almost exclusively with acoustic instruments, enabling them to deliver an impeccable performance with or without amplification in any setting.

The band collaborates with premier sound service providers in the region and can seamlessly arrange all necessary instrumentation, including PA systems, to suit any venue. Regular performances across Italy have endowed them with intimate knowledge of Venice’s unique logistical challenges; their network of local collaborators ensures a flawlessly smooth setup and execution on the island.

Explore our selection of Italy’s finest jazz bands ➡️

bologna-swing-band-italy.intro_html:
Bologna Swing Band – An Exquisite Ensemble of Professional Gypsy Jazz & Swing, Based in Bologna, Italy

Founded in 2010 in the illustrious city of Bologna, the Bologna Swing Band brings together four virtuoso musicians, each possessing a distinctive artistic lineage, united by a refined passion for Gypsy Jazz—an art form also known as manouche. Their immediate ascent saw them grace an array of exclusive events, distinguished festivals, and bespoke weddings across Italy, swiftly establishing themselves as one of the nation’s most sought-after ensembles for Gypsy Jazz and Swing.

View the complete range of jazz bands in Italy

Their impeccable artistry is frequently commissioned for weddings and soirees at prestigious venues such as Zunfthaus zur Meisen in Switzerland, Villa Rosa in Montepulciano, and the enchanting Abbazia San Pietro in Valle in Umbria, Italy.

View FixTheMusic's list of the best jazz bands in Italy

Contact Bologna Swing Band 💬
bologna-swing-band-italy.description_html:
The quartet curates a repertoire of exquisite authenticity, meticulously researched and presented in homage to the Manouche tradition, with an enduring reverence for Django Reinhardt—universally celebrated as the supreme exponent of Gypsy music. Enthralled by the narratives of the many musicians who traversed Europe in the last century, the four artists enrich each performance with original compositions, selections from the Standard Jazz canon, and reimagined arrangements of diverse musical traditions, all reinterpreted through the luminous lens of Gypsy Jazz.

Read more in our guide to hiring bands in Bologna.

Their repertoire spans from the soulful elegance of jazz and Italian swing to the vibrant energy of pop and the timeless allure of American blues, offering a truly versatile symphonic experience.

With a refined willingness to travel, Artisan Acoustic Duo graces the most exclusive weddings, private soirées, and corporate occasions across Italy, bringing an air of sophistication to every event.

We invite you to preview their artistry in the video below—a sublime glimpse into their captivating performance.

For further insight, you may also experience our vocalist performing alongside The Popinjays, one of Puglia’s most sought-after wedding bands.

jazz-swing-trio-florence-suits.intro_html:
About The Suits Jazz Band – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble Based in Florence, Italy

What discerning clients cherish about The Suits Jazz Band: Impeccable live jazz, a refined atmosphere, seamless communication, and bespoke flexibility—including roaming sets and curated requests—rendering them an unparalleled choice for weddings and events across Italy.

The Suits Jazz Band is a meticulously curated ensemble, founded in 2017 in the luminous city of Florence, Italy. View the complete collection of jazz bands in Italy.

Specialising in jazz and roaming performances, this refined 4+ piece band is celebrated for crafting captivating musical experiences. At the heart of their melodic tapestry lies an exquisite blend of trumpet, guitar, tuba, and percussion washboard. The trumpet’s elegant charm intertwines with the guitar’s harmonious strumming, while the tuba’s deep resonance provides a solid, sophisticated foundation. We are honoured to be listed on FixTheMusic’s 20 Best Jazz Bands in Italy 🏆.

The band performs throughout Italy, sharing their passion for vintage music across an array of exclusive occasions—from weddings and private soirées to corporate galas and public events. Adding an element of rhythm and groove, the percussion washboard infuses each performance with irresistible energy. The band’s unique sound is further enhanced by captivating vocal harmonies—their voices blend seamlessly, lending an intimate, nostalgic touch. This marriage of instrumental mastery and enchanting vocals creates an unforgettable musical journey for every audience. We are also listed on FixTheMusic’s 22 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆.

Whether a joyous wedding, a lively celebration, or a sophisticated corporate affair, they bring infectious energy and refined talent to every occasion. Beyond exceptional performances, the band provides all necessary equipment, offering a hassle‑free luxury experience for event organisers. View our list of Italy's best jazz bands ➡️. Their professionalism and meticulous attention to detail make them a coveted choice for those seeking top‑tier entertainment.

Based in Florence, Italy, The Suits Jazz Band delivers a unique and captivating musical experience. Adorned in the finest retro attire, they are the quintessential ensemble for a vintage‑inspired event, ready to create a soulful, energetic ambience that delights at weddings, parties, and corporate functions alike.

From their base in Turin, this impeccably appointed quartet brings many years of collective performance experience, offering a level of artistry and professionalism that captivates every audience.

Explore their 2025 Set List — a bespoke repertoire meticulously designed to suit every event, from classical and pop to traditional weddings. The Italian String Quartet delivers it all with seamless elegance. We invite you to preview their audio samples and films for a glimpse of their extraordinary artistry.

Should you seek to engage one of Italy’s most distinguished string quartets, look no further than the Italian String Quartet, based in Turin. We invite you to contact us today.

In Italiano

Il Quartett saprà creare momenti piacevoli ed emozionanti, accompagnando la cerimonia e il ricevimento con un'eleganza esclusiva e raffinata.

Il Quartett è composto da quattro giovani musiciste animate dalla volontà di unire le prerogative del classico quartetto d'archi alla versatilità di un'offerta musicale più ampia e variegata, che spazia tra stili e generi: dalla musica classica al café-concert, fino alla musica da film.

Il gruppo è disponibile a esibirsi anche in formazioni diverse dal quartetto — violino solista, duo o trio — e propone inoltre la collaborazione con una cantante e un dj, offrendovi molteplici alternative per personalizzare ogni singolo momento del vostro matrimonio.

Grazie a un vasto repertorio e alla grande esperienza maturata in anni di attività nella musica classica e moderna, il Quartett allieterà ogni attimo del vostro evento, dalla cerimonia al ricevimento, realizzando un'emozionante e piacevole colonna sonora che accompagnerà con eleganza e prestigio il vostro giorno più importante.

Per completare l'immagine di ogni evento, viene proposta una diversa selezione di abiti eleganti, visibili nella galleria fotografica.

Si riportano alcuni esempi del vasto repertorio offerto:

Musica classica: comprende le più belle pagine del periodo barocco, classico e romantico. J.S. Bach – Aria, Arioso, Jesu Joy of Man's Desiring, Brandenburg Concerto, Largo del Concerto per due violini, Cantata n. 140, Preludio corale; A.M. Bach – Menuet; A. Vivaldi – Le quattro stagioni, ecc.

Musica da film e musical: comprende le più celebri colonne sonore del XX secolo. All I Ask of You (The Phantom of the Opera – Lloyd-Webber), America (West Side Story – Bernstein), Ashokan Farewell (The Civil War – Ungar), As Time Goes By (Hupfeld), Begin the Beguine (Porter), Birthday Variations (variazioni su Happy Birthday), ecc.

Arie d'opera: La Bohème (Puccini), Carmen (Bizet), La Vedova Allegra (Lehár), La forza del destino (Verdi), Traviata, Rigoletto, Madama Butterfly (Puccini), Tosca (Puccini), Manon Lescaut (Puccini), ecc.

Musica per matrimonio in chiesa: Pachelbel – Canon in D, Mendelssohn – Marcia nuziale, Wagner – Marcia nuziale, Ave Maria (Schubert, Gounod, Caccini, Mascagni), Bach – Aria, Bach – Arioso, Mascagni – Intermezzo.

Canzoni famose: The Beatles, My Heart Will Go On (Titanic), La Bamba, Purple Haze (Hendrix), New York New York, Summertime, Love Me Tender, Feelings (Albert), Heaven (Bryan Adams), ecc.

Musica tradizionale internazionale: Rumanian Folk Dances (complete) (Bartók), Congratulations, O sole mio, Funiculì Funiculà, ecc.

Tango e latino: Blue Tango (Anderson), Tango in D (Albéniz), Tico-Tico (Abreu), Por Una Cabeza (da Scent of a Woman – Gardel), El Choclo (Villoldo), Tanguedia III (Piazzolla).

Che si tratti di matrimoni o di eventi speciali — feste private, convention, cerimonie, anniversari, conferenze — il Quartett garantisce, con la propria professionalità, un repertorio curato per ogni occasione.

Copertura territoriale: Il Quartett è disponibile per trasferte in Piemonte, Liguria, Lombardia, Valle d'Aosta, Toscana, Emilia-Romagna e in tutta Italia.

string-quartet-turin-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Musica per la cerimonia, aperitivo e ricevimento, esibizioni come strumento solista o duo, trio, quartetto, con la collaborazione di una cantante e un dj.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Fino a qualche giorno prima, ma per garantire la nostra disponibilità per in Vostro evento è meglio contattarci qualche mese prima.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Solista. Piccola (2-3 musicisti) Media (4-6 musicisti) Grande (più di 6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Il nostro repertorio comprende musica classica, latino, tango, musica da film e musical, musica attuale, musica tradizionale internazionale ecc. Musica per cerimonia in chiesa, aperitivo, ricevimento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Eseguiamo anche trascrizioni e arrangiamenti su richiesta.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Musiciste professioniste laureate in Conservatorio, e con ampia esperienza concertistica alle spalle in vari formazioni camerali ed orchestrali.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>Da solo.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>In base al momento per qui avete scelto la nostra esibizione.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Circa 30 minuti.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-band-florence-party-collective.intro_html:
The Florence Party Collective – An Exquisite Wedding & Event Ensemble Based in Florence, Italy

The Florence Party Collective is a distinguished wedding and event ensemble, rooted in the cultural heart of Florence, dedicated to delivering impeccably curated entertainment for both private and public occasions.

With more than fifteen years of refined expertise, the collective possesses the artistry and sophistication to elevate any celebration into an unforgettable experience.

The group’s bespoke configuration—entirely customisable to your vision—ensures effortless adaptability to the unique rhythms of your event.

The ensemble is delighted to travel, offering its impeccable services to destinations worldwide.

Commanding an expansive repertoire that spans genres and eras, The Florence Party Collective ensures every guest is thoroughly enchanted, moving seamlessly from refined elegance to exuberant revelry.

Regularly engaged for weddings and galas at Renaissance Il Ciocco Resort & Spa in Tuscany and Borgo Di Castelvecchio in Siena, the collective is a hallmark of luxury entertainment in Italy’s most iconic settings.

Inquire with The Florence Party Collective
wedding-band-florence-party-collective.description_html:
The Florence Party Collective presents a fully customisable ensemble, from a majestic eight-piece formation to an intimate duo, offering a curated selection of genres tailored to your personal taste.

Discover our curated selection of Italy’s finest wedding bands ➡️

The collective performs with grace throughout your wedding ceremony, reception, and cocktail hour, providing exquisite musical interludes between moments of celebration.

Should you desire specific compositions, the ensemble is pleased to learn them, offering both instrumental and vocal arrangements, and providing sample recordings in advance of your momentous day.

The group offers an array of refined event enhancements, including a disco ball, fog machine, ambient lighting, premium microphones, a projector, and a sophisticated sound/PA system.

Should you seek to engage one of Florence’s most distinguished wedding and event ensembles, look no further than The Florence Party Collective—contact them today to begin your journey.

In Italiano

Professionalità, eleganza, divertimento. Lasciate che Florence Party Collective trasformi il vostro sogno in una realtà raffinata. Nulla è impossibile per questo wedding team: solo i migliori professionisti per il vostro evento. Oltre venti anni di esperienza nel settore matrimoniale e in live in tutta Italia con celebri artisti pop nazionali.

Siete appassionati di funk e soul con tocchi di dance? Amanti del jazz o del pop? Del gospel o dello swing? Sarà la band pensata appositamente per voi e per il vostro evento nuziale, all’insegna del divertimento, della musica di qualità, dell’eleganza e della raffinatezza.

Emanuela e Luca vi guideranno nella scelta della soluzione più preziosa per Voi. La grande esperienza del team consente di modulare diverse formazioni, garantendo una varietà di atmosfere nel giorno del vostro matrimonio. Non dovrete pensare ad altro che alla musica che desiderate: Emanuela e Luca supervisioneranno ogni dettaglio, assicurando la perfetta riuscita dell’evento.

Si occuperanno di un sopralluogo preliminare, vi assisteranno nelle pratiche burocratiche SIAE e provvederanno a tutti gli impianti, coordinando ogni musicista coinvolto nel vostro evento con cura impeccabile.

Duo, trio, quartetto, quintetto, sestetto, settetto, ottetto, DJ: Florence Party Collective saprà soddisfare ogni vostra richiesta, offrendovi differenti formazioni e un servizio pensato per rendere il vostro matrimonio unico e indimenticabile.

Florence Party Collective vi proporrà un pacchetto completo e perfettamente adatto a ogni esigenza musicale, includendo:

  • Musica per la cerimonia (classica/gospel)
  • Musica per l’aperitivo (jazz, swing italiano & internazionale, lounge, internazionale in sottofondo)
  • Musica live funk, soul, dance, pop hit contemporanee
  • DJ set

Le performance di Florence Party Collective saranno rigorosamente live, per coinvolgere tutti i presenti con un ritmo caldo e un sound profondamente emozionante.

wedding-band-florence-party-collective.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Musica per la cerimonia (classica/gospel), musica aperitivo (jazz, lounge, internazionale sottofondo), Musica live funk soul dance pop. Tutto rigorosamente live. DJ set. No Karaoke.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>I mesi di giugno, luglio e settembre sono ricchi di eventi. Si consiglia la prenotazione anticipata di almeno 6/8 mesi.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>- Solista
- Piccola (2-3 musicisti)
- Media (4-6 musicisti)
- Grande (più di 6 musicisti)



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Classica, Gospel, Pop, Jazz, Swing, Blues, Pop Internazionale, Soul, Funk, Disco.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Due brani extra repertorio. + € 30,00 a brano dal terzo brano in poi.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Il team è composto da musicisti professionisti, di eterogenea formazione e specializzazione, con una oltre decennale esperienza live. Il team stabile garantisce eventi di qualità.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, trasferte in tutta Italia e Europa.



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, costo trasferimento, Vitto e alloggio nel caso occorra il pernottamento.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Lavoriamo in base ai tempi del vostro evento.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Tempo di sistemazione set 2 ore circa.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

tuscany-swing-band-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Swing Band – An Exquisite Ensemble of Refined Swing & Jazz, Based in Tuscany, Italy

The Tuscany Swing Band was conceived through the harmonious union of three distinguished musicians. Each possessing a wealth of impeccable professional experience, they share an unwavering passion for the same musical refinement and a singular purpose: to delight and enchant guests at weddings, private soirées, and corporate celebrations of the highest calibre.

Discover our curated 2026 repertoire: 2026 SET LIST

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic's 18 Best Jazz Bands in Italy 🏆

Discerning clients who have enquired with The Tuscany Swing Band have also expressed interest in these equally exquisite ensembles on FixTheMusic:

  1. The Florence Jazz Band

  2. The Suits Jazz Band

  3. Ponte Vecchio Jazz Band

  4. The Tuscany Jazz Collective

  5. The Italian Riviera Swing Band

We are regularly commissioned for weddings and bespoke events at the most prestigious venues, including Chalet d'Adrien in Verbier (Switzerland), Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole, and Villa il Pozzo Winery & Resort in Certaldo, Italy.

Enquire with The Tuscany Swing Band
tuscany-swing-band-italy.description_html:
Our ensemble comprises conservatory-graduated musicians and accomplished educators, each with over fifteen years of refined experience in live music and entertainment for exclusive private events.

Explore our curated selection of Italy's finest jazz bands ➡️

We offer a selection of bespoke packages, artfully tailored for both ceremony and reception, overseeing the entire musical curation of your day with impeccable attention.

We communicate in English, French, and a touch of German, collaborating exclusively with the most distinguished locations and the most sought-after planning agencies.

Within our profile, you will discover an array of exquisite videos, live audio captures, photographs, and testimonials from our international clientele.

We are proud to be listed on FixTheMusic's 20 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆

Our full, refined line-up features Elena (female voice and snare drum), Stefano (guitar), Mirco (double bass), and Alberto (wind instruments). For more intimate occasions, we also offer a Trio version or can adapt with alternative instrumentation.

The essence of The Tuscany Swing Band is to deliver a supremely elegant musical performance, entirely live and impeccably executed. The extensive musical mastery and long-cultivated expertise of our members guarantee a standard of excellence that is consistently elevated. This distinction is further enhanced by our repertoire, which showcases original arrangements and is accredited by years of experience across a spectrum of settings—from street festivals to theatres and auditoriums, from exclusive clubs to grand hotels and private gatherings.

The acoustic instruments—guitar, piano, snare drum, and voice—offer a vast palette of colours and dynamics. The warm, captivating vocal tone alternates with instrumental improvisations on piano and guitar, a magical fusion supported by the lively yet discreet rhythm of brushes on the snare drum.

The repertoire is vast and richly hued, drawing from diverse musical genres. With original arrangements, it spans Italian, European, and American swing of the 1940s, jazz standards, Bossanova, and instrumental pieces such as waltz musettes, beguine, and more. A place of considerable honour is reserved for the iconic Italian songs that conquered the world—the vintage swing music of radio and gramophone.

If you seek to engage the most refined jazz and swing band that Tuscany, Italy, has to offer for your wedding or event, we invite you to reach out.
