Refined Enquiries from Discerning Clients

Is an outdoor performance possible? (asked by Marina on 8 December 2025)

Response from Stefano: Yes, however we require a shaded performance area of at least 4 metres length by 2 metres depth, within proximity of an electrical socket.

What additional provisions do you require? (asked by Marina on 8 December 2025)

Response from Stefano: We also require a dressing room for attire changes and access to washroom facilities.

Do you require parking close to the venue? (asked by Marina on 8 December 2025)

Response from Stefano: Yes, we must install substantial equipment (amplifiers, etc.), so the performance area must be accessible by vehicle.

runaway-soul-reggello-italy.intro_html:
Runaway Soul – An Exquisite Swing Trio Based in Arezzo, Italy

Conceived in the summer of 2021, Runaway Soul debuted with a series of performances at exclusive clubs spanning the enchanting region between Florence and Arezzo. Their refined artistry quickly garnered acclaim, securing invitations to private celebrations and wedding ceremonies throughout the prestigious Chianti region.

Further elevating their stature, they have been graciously invited to perform at the illustrious Frescobaldi estate, where they forge connections with discerning event planners. This has led to engagements across Italy, curating unforgettable musical experiences for weddings and bespoke events.

Explore our curated selection of Italy’s most refined wedding bands ➡️

Their impeccable reputation has made them a regular fixture at the esteemed Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena and Relais Guado Al Sole in Pisa, where they provide an exquisite musical accompaniment for weddings and exclusive soirees.

Inquire with Runaway Soul
runaway-soul-reggello-italy.description_html:
During the summer of 2023, Runaway Soul enchanted guests at aperitifs and wedding celebrations along the Tuscan coast, gracing the idyllic islands of Giglio and Elba with their refined sound. Recognised for their extraordinary talent, they have amassed a remarkable calendar of over 60 performances for this year alone — a testament to their enduring allure.

Their repertoire spans an impeccable fusion of Italian swing and dance music, interwoven with jazz, funk, and irresistibly danceable rhythms. Beyond these, they offer a curated selection of traditional Tuscan melodies and beloved Italian folk classics, evoking the soul of the region.

Bespoke Line-Up Options

  • Trio (Saxophone, Guitar with Vocals & Drums) — the quintessential configuration
  • Expandable to a roaming ensemble of up to six musicians, with the addition of double bass, trumpet, and further wind instruments, ensuring a bespoke musical presence.

Our Identity

We are a trio that masterfully blends the finest elements of traditional music, folk heritage, and Italian swing. Our meticulously curated repertoire ranges from timeless classics to spirited anthems, designed to either ignite the dance floor or create an elegantly refined musical backdrop.

Our Approach

Our versatility is unmatched, allowing us to adapt seamlessly to any event's unique character. Whether positioned as a central musical focus or moving gracefully among your guests to infuse spontaneity and intimacy, the choice is entirely yours. The atmosphere you envision — whether romantic and refined, vibrant and energetic, or intimately cozy — guides our every note.

Our Offering

Music is the soul of our service, yet the rhythm remains yours to command. Whether you desire spirited entertainment that animates the dance floor or a delicate auditory tapestry that enhances conversation, we dedicate ourselves to realising your bespoke musical vision.

For your convenience, we kindly request access to a private dressing room for the musicians to prepare and store their instruments. We also appreciate being provided with a meal and refreshments during the event.

To achieve the most exquisite musical performance, we recommend positioning the musicians in a shaded area, ensuring optimal conditions for their artistry.

Curated Line-Up Options:
- Trio
- Duo
- Solo

violinist-dj-puglia-italy-violin-vibes.intro_html:
Violin & Vibes — An Exquisite Fusion of Refined Strings and Curated Beats

Hailing from the sun-drenched, musically rich shores of Taranto, Italy, our virtuoso violinist brings an enchanting legacy to life. She captivates the most discerning audiences with performances of rare elegance and emotional depth.

Dedicated to delivering bespoke musical experiences, she has become a luminary in the realm of luxury weddings and exclusive celebrations throughout Italy.

Her impeccable artistry and commanding yet graceful stage presence make her an indispensable addition to ceremonies, refined cocktail receptions, and evening soirées. She is frequently joined by a masterful saxophonist and a discerning DJ to elevate the experience.

From her earliest years, a profound devotion to the violin was unmistakable, inspiring a lifelong journey of mastery and artistic exploration.

We are privileged to be the preferred musical artisans at some of Italy's most illustrious estates, including Villa Mon Repos in Messina and the historic Castello Orsini Odescalchi in Rome.

Enquire About This Bespoke Experience
violinist-dj-puglia-italy-violin-vibes.description_html:
Violin & Vibes orchestrate an unforgettable, luxurious ambience that perfectly complements the grandeur of any occasion. Recognizing that true luxury lies in bespoke personalization, every set is meticulously tailored to the unique desires of the client.

Whether performing a timeless classical masterpiece or a contemporary chart-topper, she effortlessly imbues every piece with her own refined artistry, crafting an atmosphere that mesmerizes and deeply moves her audience.

Her artistic versatility is unparalleled. She transitions with seamless grace from soul-stirring classical elegies to lively, exuberant melodies. This exquisite adaptability ensures that the artistic vision of the client is not just met, but surpassed.

The repertoire is a meticulously curated collection spanning classical, pop, jazz, and beyond, guaranteeing a flawless performance for the most refined tastes.

The artistry of Violin & Vibes extends far beyond the music. Their genuine warmth, discretion, and impeccable professionalism make them an absolute pleasure to collaborate with. An unwavering commitment to excellence and a meticulous attention to detail guarantee that every performance is flawlessly executed, cultivating an indelible memory of sonic splendor.

Through extraordinary talent and refined curation, Violin & Vibes has become synonymous with bespoke, unforgettable musical experiences. The melodious strains of the violin breathe life into the event, while our expertly curated DJ sets and additional instrumentalists elevate the atmosphere, leaving guests spellbound and creating cherished, timeless memories.

We are honored to have been selected for exclusive weddings and events at the following distinguished locations:

  • Villa Mon Repos, Messina, Italy
  • Castello Orsini Odescalchi, Rome
  • Masseria Spina, Bari, Italy
  • Chiostro dei Domenicani, Lecce
  • Borgo Gallana, Puglia
  • Bellagio, Lake Como, Italy
  • Corato, Bari, Italy

Whether delicately weaving the violin through the sacred moments of a romantic ceremony or igniting the dance floor with an exhilarating collaborative energy, the music of Violin & Vibes resonates deeply with all who are fortunate enough to hear it.

With a signature style, these accomplished musicians perform some of the most beloved ballads and timeless hits, delivering an impeccable atmosphere for every occasion. Whether an intimate soirée or a lavish gala, The Kickers create an unforgettable, seamless experience.

the-headliners-milan-italy.intro_html:
The Headliners – An Exquisite, Bespoke Wedding Band from Milan, Italy

A curated collective of Italy’s most refined musicians and vocalists, complemented by equally impeccable English and American performers. This distinguished ensemble features former competitors from X-Factor and The Voice, actors from celebrated theatrical productions, session musicians of the highest calibre, and vocalists who have performed alongside renowned Italian and international artists. The Headliners are regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at the magnificent Villa Erba on Lake Como, Italy.

Contact The Headliners

Line-ups range from a refined six-piece configuration (featuring two vocalists) to an opulent fifteen-piece orchestra (with five vocalists), and beyond. For occasions where a fully live ensemble cannot be accommodated, we offer intimate line-ups that perform with backing tracks, allowing you to experience the same sonic grandeur and vibrant energy of a spectacular live band.

Bespoke Line-Ups

  • Band: from an exquisite 6-piece to a magnificent 15-piece (or even larger).
  • DJ Live: from a curated 4-piece (DJ with bespoke options including saxophone, percussion, violin, vocalists, and more).
  • DJ Live 2-Piece starting (DJ with bespoke options including saxophone, percussion, violin, vocalists, and more).

blu-mare-dj-live-sicily.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 2 x 60-minute sets or 3 x 40-minute sets, but I’m flexible depending on the event. After the band performance there is 2 Hours with DJ Set.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, I offer different line-ups, from solo DJ sets to DJ + saxophonist, singer, or percussionist.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, I can provide a full setup for events of up to 150/200/300 guests, including stage, a professional sound system, DJ booth, microphones, and lighting (moving heads, LED lights, etc.). For larger events, I collaborate with external AV providers.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, I offer continuous music through DJ sets or playlists between and after my live performances.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- I usually arrive around 2 hours before the start of the performance.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Approximately 60–90 minutes depending on the venue and setup required.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, I can prepare and perform specific song requests, including first dance songs.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- I need at least 6x3 meters for stage ,PA and lights

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes, I have Public Liability Insurance and all my equipment is PAT-tested.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Absolutely, I’m comfortable performing outdoors or in unique settings such as barns, beaches, and historical villas.</details>

Renowned for their exquisite versatility, they present a curated spectrum of sound—from classical and jazz for serene, intimate moments to vibrant pop, soul, and funk for spirited festivities. Conceived from a spark of inspiration ignited by Amanda, the captivating lead vocalist, and Roberto, the skilful guitarist, this ensemble was born into being.

one-more-time-wedding-band-bari-italy.description_html:
Through each performance, the band weaves an elegant and sophisticated tapestry of harmonies, devoted entirely to your refined entertainment.

The unmistakable refinement of their musical choices marries seamlessly with their artistic professionalism, setting the stage for an indelible and enchanting experience.

View our curated collection of Italy’s pre‑eminent wedding bands ➡️

By selecting this ensemble, you embark on a journey through an expansive collection of both Italian classics and global hits.

Their repertoire spans genres from the sultry rhythms of R&B to the heartwarming embrace of Soul Music, ascending further to the lively notes of Swing and echoing the nostalgic melodies of the 70s, 80s, and 90s. Every arrangement is meticulously crafted by the musicians, reflecting the distinctive musical roots and backgrounds of each artist.

An Additional Duo Offering

We are also pleased to offer an intimate Duo service—a harmonious blend of guitar and vocals, perfect for creating an elegant and intimate atmosphere. Ideal for ceremonies, aperitifs, and dinner accompaniment, this talented pairing adds a touch of musical magic to your most special moments.

Frequently Asked Questions

What services do you provide?

  • Ceremony Music
  • Cocktail Music
  • Reception Music
  • Party Music
  • Entertainment
  • DJ

What is included in the wedding package?

We offer a TRIO comprising vocals, guitar, and keyboard, as well as a QUINTET featuring vocals, guitar, keyboard, bass, and drums. Upon request, we may add additional instruments (saxophone, violin, etc.) and a DJ set.

How far in advance should I contact you?

We recommend reaching out up to a maximum of two months in advance to coordinate the event with the couple in impeccable detail.

What genres of music do you offer?

Nu Soul, R&B, Disco, Jazz, Italian, Pop, Commercial, Contemporary

What type of musical formations are available?

Duo, Trio, Quartet, Full Band (5 elements)

Size of the ensemble?

  • Small (2–3 musicians)
  • Medium (4–6 musicians)

Repertoire?

Arrangements are bespoke, crafted by the musicians themselves, allowing you to enjoy a refined selection of Italian and international songs—from swing to the timeless sounds of the ’70s, ’80s, and ’90s.

Can I request songs not in the repertoire?

We are delighted to receive and consider song requests, ensuring a truly personalised experience.

Experience?

One More Time is particularly active in the wedding sector and can accompany every aspect of the reception—from the civil or religious ceremony to the final celebration—with impeccable grace.

Do you have your own equipment?

Yes.

Do you require any specific materials or conditions to provide the service?

No.

Are you available for travel?

Yes, throughout Italy.

Is there an additional fee for travel?

Yes, it depends on the distance.

How much time do you need to set up for the performance?

Two to three hours before the start of the event.

Do you perform outdoors?

Yes.

What other types of services do you offer?

Rental of audio equipment, lights, and video projectors.

Do you charge per hour or per event?

Per event.

If necessary, are you available to work extra hours?

Yes.

puglia-string-quartet-weddings-italy.intro_html:
The Puglia String Quartet – An Ensemble of Unrivalled Refinement, Based in Puglia, Italy

For ceremonies, wedding breakfasts, and receptions of the most discerning taste, as well as for exclusive private and corporate occasions—milestone birthdays, anniversaries, christenings, and high-level conferences—The Puglia String Quartet curates an atmosphere of impeccable elegance. Their presence elevates every moment into something truly exquisite.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's finest string quartets for hire ➡️

The quartet is principally available across Puglia, Basilicata, Calabria, and Campania, and is in discerning demand for weddings and events throughout Italy.

Follow the ensemble’s journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸

They are regularly engaged for the most distinguished weddings and events at Masseria Pettolecchia La Residenza in Puglia and Agriturismo Masseria Salamina in Pezze di Greco, Italy.

Enquire about The Puglia String Quartet

For those who desire a yet more bespoke experience, the quartet may be expanded upon request with a female vocalist and/or harpist—an addition that brings an entirely new dimension of sonic opulence to their performance.

View our handpicked selection of Italy's most distinguished string quartets for hire ➡️

What truly distinguishes The Puglia String Quartet is their superlative musicianship, extraordinary versatility of repertoire, and the magnetic energy of their live performances—each note delivered with precision and passion. The ensemble comprises two violins, a cello, and a double bass.

Their repertoire, a collection of bespoke arrangements crafted by one of the quartet’s own members, traverses an exquisite range of musical styles and genres, each piece masterfully adapted for the refined timbre of string instruments.

The ensemble’s paramount objective is to honour the musical desires of you and your guests, drawing upon a lifetime of musical mastery and an instinctive understanding of how to craft the perfect ambient narrative for your celebration.

If you seek to secure the services of the finest local string quartet for your wedding in Puglia, we invite you to make contact.

Follow on Facebook and Instagram 📸

In Italiano

Il Quartetto d’Archi Puglia si propone con eleganza sia per la cerimonia in chiesa o in comune, sia per il banchetto nuziale, nonché per qualsiasi altra occasione pubblica o privata di pregio—meeting, compleanni, anniversari, battesimi, convegni.

Opera principalmente in Puglia, Calabria, Campania e Basilicata, ma è disponibile per trasferte in tutta Italia.

Ciò che li contraddistingue è senza dubbio l’originalità della formazione, la poliedricità dei repertori proposti e l’atmosfera magica e raffinata di esecuzioni rigorosamente dal vivo. Il quartetto si compone di due violini, un violoncello e un contrabbasso.

Il repertorio, le cui trascrizioni si avvalgono degli esclusivi arrangiamenti elaborati da uno dei componenti del gruppo, spazia tra diversi stili e generi musicali, arricchiti e caratterizzati dalla particolare timbrica di strumenti classici.

L’obiettivo primario del Quartetto d’Archi Matrimonio Puglia è quello di assecondare i gusti musicali di ogni ospite ed esaudire ogni richiesta, avvalendosi della competenza e dell’esperienza maturata in una vita dedicata alla musica.

The Italian DJ Belmo is the embodiment of bespoke artistry—ideal for clients who desire a disk jockey capable of weaving through every genre or crafting a completely tailored sonic journey to their preferred musical styles.

Belmo’s craft has been meticulously refined under the mentorship of DJ Zano, one of Italy’s most celebrated and sought-after wedding DJs, whose prestige elevates Belmo’s own impeccable standard.

Throughout his distinguished career, Belmo has collaborated with an elite circle of high-profile artists, including Fedez, Baby K, Bart B More, Speaking Minds, Master Freeze, John Type, Pink is Punk, Gilgamesh, Black Loops, and more—a testament to his exclusive standing in the industry.

Explore the finest DJs Tuscany has to offer.

dj-daniel.intro_html:
DJ Daniel – An Artisan of Sonic Elegance, Based in Rome

DJ Daniel is widely regarded as one of Italy's most distinguished wedding DJs, celebrated for curating exquisitely refined and emotionally profound experiences for the world's most discerning couples at prestigious destination celebrations.

Based in the Eternal City, his impeccable artistry regularly adorns the most exclusive enclaves of Lake Como, Tuscany, and the Amalfi Coast, serving an international clientele who value impeccable style, consummate professionalism, and music of profound meaning.

With over 15 years of mastery and a formidable background in both classical instrumentation and contemporary production, Daniel has cultivated a reputation for impeccable taste, seamless mixing, and an intuitive command of the room's energy.

His sets are a masterclass in atmosphere—a meticulously orchestrated journey from the serene elegance of a ceremony to a vibrant, joy-soaked dance floor.
dj-daniel.description_html:
Daniel frequently elevates his performances alongside virtuosic live musicians—saxophonists, electric violinists, and percussionists—forging immersive and wholly exclusive auditory experiences.

Every event is a bespoke creation, carefully tailored to the couple's narrative, cultural tapestry, and aesthetic desires. Whether orchestrating a sunset aperitivo or an exuberant late-night gala, each moment is sculpted with meticulous precision and heartfelt care.

Couples are consistently drawn to Daniel's calm, sophisticated presence and his deeply collaborative approach. He dedicates time to intimately understanding their preferences, curating bespoke edits for pivotal moments, and ensuring an impeccably smooth narrative across the entire celebration, particularly within complex venue environments.

Languages Spoken: English, Italian, and conversational French

Most Requested Format: A refined cocktail set accompanied by a live saxophonist, flowing seamlessly into a dynamic and unforgettable evening soirée

Venues Performed At: Villa Balbiano, Castello di Vicarello, Villa Cimbrone, Masseria Potenti

Clientele: International creatives, luminaries of the luxury fashion industry, esteemed destination wedding specialists, and an exclusive circle of VIP clients

From the intimate, candlelit glow of a Tuscan villa ceremony to a breathtaking rooftop celebration on the Amalfi Coast, DJ Daniel brings impeccable taste, vast experience, and genuine musical artistry to weddings destined for the extraordinary.

italian-folk-band-genoa.intro_html:
Presenting the Italian Folk Band — an exquisite ensemble of refined musicians based in Genoa, offering a sublime soundtrack for the most discerning celebrations.

The Italian Folk Band conjures the quintessence of Italian heritage, infusing your occasion with unparalleled elegance. Curating a bespoke repertoire of timeless masterpieces by legendary maestros such as Fred Buscaglione, Dean Martin, and Domenico Modugno, they evoke the dreamy allure of the Italian Riviera. This impeccable ensemble comprises a commanding male vocalist, a virtuosic accordionist, and a masterful guitarist, each a peerless expert on their instrument. Their dynamic performance weaves together spirited tarantellas and soul-stirring Neapolitan classics, ensuring every guest is utterly captivated. A hallmark of prestige, the band regularly graces five-star destinations including the Belmond Caruso Hotel on the Amalfi Coast and Villa Sola Cabiati on Lake Como. Inquire about the Italian Folk Band

Explore our curated selection of Italy's finest wedding bands: Best Wedding Bands in Italy | Full Portfolio of Luxury Bands

Curated as an intimate trio or expanded to a resplendent sextet, with the optional addition of double bass and percussion, the line-up is perfected for your exclusive event. Discerning clients may further personalize the experience by selecting the band’s attire: impeccable formal wear for a contemporary aesthetic, or a traditional ‘old-style’ white ensemble, complete with the iconic Coppola hat and vibrant red accents, for an authentically nostalgic touch. Fusion Street Players – An Exquisite Roaming Ensemble, Based in Venice, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most: an energetically refined and engaging presence, a meticulously curated repertoire, impeccably professional and responsive service, bespoke setlists, and an atmosphere that keeps guests dancing until the final note.

Conceived in 2015 from the shared passion of four virtuoso musicians, Fusion Street Players reimagined the very essence of the celebratory band.

Discover the full collection of wedding bands in Italy

Since that inaugural season, we have graced hundreds of exclusive gatherings—from opulent gala dinners to illustrious corporate soirées—bringing our artistry to the most refined and secluded private venues.

Our sound marries the timeless charm of Italian tradition with a contemporary, captivating energy, securing our reputation as one of the most sought-after roaming bands in Italy

We are regularly commissioned to elevate weddings and events at the distinguished Le Stonghe Palazzo in Fossombrone.

Enquire About Fusion Street Players 💬
fusion-street-players-roaming-venice-ita.description_html:
Our ensemble—comprising two acoustic guitars, a cajón, and a lead vocalist—sets us apart, enabling four-part vocal harmonies throughout our repertoire and infusing every performance with an utterly original sophistication.

Our signature roaming format allows us to adapt seamlessly to any setting, delivering live music wherever the most discerning audience desires.

Explore the curated selection of the best wedding bands in Italy

Our repertoire spans beloved Italian classics and international hits, all reimagined in exquisite acoustic arrangements.

Fusion Street Players is the quintessential choice for weddings, private receptions, gala dinners, and any occasion demanding an unparalleled musical experience.

The band tailors both the setlist and the ambiance to the client’s precise vision.

We typically perform live during the aperitivo, followed by two or three fifteen-minute sets throughout dinner.

These sets may be presented in a completely acoustic, unamplified manner or enhanced by our own professional audio system—including headset microphones and a wireless instrument setup—according to the event’s requirements.

fusion-street-players-roaming-venice-ita.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths? (e.g. 2 x 60 minute sets or 3 x 40 minute sets)</summary>- We are able to perform 3 sets of 30 mins or 1 set of 90 mins during welcome or aperitif, and 3 sets of 20 mins during the dinner. If necessary we can play during evening party with a 90 mins set.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Our line up is the same, 4 piece band. Main Voice + 3 background voices, 2 guitars, 1 portable cajon, but the musicians could change.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, we offer two proposals: totally Acoustic WITHOUT audio system and amplification or WITH audio amplification, Audio system, headset mics and wireless instrument system. If required we are able to offer all sound & Lighting equipment. Final price of equipment is to be agreed after discussing requirements with the client.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- To be established during communication with client.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We normally arrive at the venue 2 HOURS before the event starts, to set up and soundcheck

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, we can learn song requests (first dance, the entry of newlyweds, cut of cake...)

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- We are able to perform outdoors and in unusual settings</details>

The Ravenna Violinist – An Exquisite Offering from Faenza, Italy

As a refined violinist and vocalist, I orchestrate bespoke musical experiences for weddings and celebrations throughout Italy and beyond. Every performance is an impeccably curated interplay of violin and voice, seamlessly alternating between the two to enrapture the senses.

I command both a luminous electric violin—adorned with an LED-lit bow for a visually breathtaking effect—and a classical acoustic instrument, delivering a versatile repertoire that spans classical masterpieces, contemporary pop, dance, and reggaeton. Among the exclusive venues that regularly welcome my artistry are Casali di Casole in Siena and Villa Miani in Rome.

ravenna-violinist-faenza-italy.description_html:
My setup includes a wireless microphone system for the violin, perfectly suited to most intimate settings. For larger or open-air spaces, enhanced amplification is thoughtfully arranged to ensure the sound remains as impeccable as the ambiance.

Each performance features a curated selection from my repertoire, yet I am always delighted to accommodate special requests—whether for the ceremony, the dinner, the cutting of the cake, or the first dance. Prior to your event, I coordinate closely with the DJ, sharing my tracks and finalising the set list, while also agreeing on a suitable time for a sound check to ensure flawless execution.

I am entirely at ease performing in a wide array of environments—indoors, outdoors, on a sun-drenched beach, or within unconventional spaces—always adapting to the unique atmosphere of each setting.

Whether you seek to infuse your occasion with a whisper of elegance or a crescendo of energy, my performances are designed to elevate the atmosphere and leave an indelible impression. Should you wish to imbue your celebration with sophistication and joy, I would be honoured to be part of your day. Do not hesitate to reach out.

DJ Edo is a virtuoso artist who has carved a distinguished reputation within the music world—a native of Lucca, Italy, yet originally hailing from Guatemala. Born with an innate devotion to music, he first pursued a degree in pharmacy, excelling in that field before his unwavering passion for sound ultimately prevailed. In October 2011, he embraced his true calling, embarking upon a professional journey as a DJ.

He is honoured to be listed on FixTheMusic's 25 Best Wedding DJs in Italy 🏆, and is regularly engaged to perform at exquisite venues such as L'Arancera di Villa Grabau in Lucca, La Sorgente di Francesca in Florence, and Agriturismo Terre di Nano in Siena.

Inquire About DJ Edo's Bespoke Services 💬

Over the years, DJ Edo has refined his craft through a wealth of experience, performing at premier dance clubs and exclusive private events. fret-flow-florence-italy.intro_html:
Fret Flow Duo – An Exquisite Professional Ensemble Based in Florence, Italy

What discerning clients most cherish about Fret Flow Duo: impeccable communication, a vibrant yet refined atmosphere, beautiful music, an emotional ambience, professional flexibility, bespoke song selections, and an unreservedly high recommendation.

Founded by a Florentine musician and vocalist with over two decades of mastery, Fret Flow embodies a curated approach to live performance.

View the complete range of wedding musicians in Italy

Through years of artistic exploration, the ensemble has immersed itself in a refined spectrum of genres—from Irish folk to jazz, from rock to contemporary compositions—each enriching their musical ear and personal repertoire with unmistakable elegance.

The group performs with guitar, mandolin, saxophone, double bass, and voice, weaving a unique and harmonious blend of sounds into every performance.

View FixTheMusic's list of the best wedding bands in Tuscany

Whether performing as a solo artist or leading distinguished formations—duos, trios, or quartets—every experience has allowed Fret Flow to refine their eclectic, personal, and sophisticated musical signature.

View more wedding bands in Tuscany

Fret Flow is regularly booked to perform for weddings and exclusive events at Villa Ardore in Florence and Quercia Al Poggio in Barberino Tavarnelle.

Contact Fret Flow Duo 💬
fret-flow-florence-italy.description_html:
Why Choose Fret Flow?

From romantic ceremony melodies to the most vivacious reception vibes, we adapt seamlessly to the atmosphere and the refined tastes of your guests.

Bilingual communication in English and French—ensuring effortless collaboration with international couples, planners, and guests alike.

We warmly welcome song requests and personal interactions, transforming each performance into a bespoke, unforgettable occasion.

With an expansive repertoire, we perform for up to three hours, divided into 45-minute sets. Should you desire a bespoke first dance or any other intimate moment, we can learn and perform that piece live, provided we are notified in advance.

Thanks to our battery-powered amplification, we can perform virtually anywhere—even in the middle of a field—without requiring any power connection; every detail is included in our curated pricing.

During our short intervals, we ensure no silence lingers, instead offering refined background music through our sound system.

Our setup requires a mere 20 minutes, though we always prefer to arrive at least 90 minutes before performance time, ensuring impeccable readiness.

We have performed at hundreds of weddings across Italy, curating exclusive musical experiences for couples from around the world.

Line-up Options:

  • Solo Guitar – Intimate and sophisticated.
  • Guitar Duo – Harmonious and warm.
  • Guitar & Mandolin Duo – A touch of Italian and folk charm.
  • Guitar + Voice & Double Bass Duo – Charm & elegance.
  • Guitar & Sax – Smooth, soulful, and jazzy.
  • Guitar & Violin Duo – Makes you tap your feet with refined grace.
  • Trio: Guitar, Violin & Double Bass – Swinging instrumentals with an Italian feel.

wedding-party-band-tuscany-the-blazers.intro_html:
About The Blazers – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Band, Based in Tuscany, Italy

The Blazers are a refined function ensemble, impeccably curated to deliver bespoke entertainment of the highest calibre for every occasion.

With years of distinguished professional experience performing for Italy’s most prestigious venues and renowned luxury brands, The Blazers offer a performance of unparalleled sophistication.

Kindly explore our 2025 Set List for a glimpse of our curated repertoire.

Rooted in Tuscany, The Blazers are privileged to travel extensively across Italy, gracing weddings, exclusive private parties, and corporate celebrations with their impeccable artistry.

We are consistently engaged to perform at such esteemed destinations as Villa Teloni in Macerata, Laticastelli Country Relais in Siena, and Villa Mussio in Livorno, Italy.

Contact The Blazers
wedding-party-band-tuscany-the-blazers.description_html:
The Blazers’ vast and exquisitely curated repertoire spans eras and genres with effortless grace—from Queen to Stevie Wonder, they command every note with masterful precision.

View our selection of Italy’s finest wedding bands ➡️

The band’s impressive collection includes both English and Italian songs, making them the quintessential choice for those seeking refined entertainment for a destination wedding.

With a swift and seamless setup, The Blazers are able to perform anywhere—inside or outside—ensuring an uninterrupted, luxurious experience.

We are proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s 20 Best Wedding Bands in Tuscany 🏆

Among the exquisite locations where we have been booked by discerning clients through FixTheMusic for weddings and events are:

  • Villa Teloni, Macerata
  • Laticastelli Country Relais, Siena
  • Villa Mussio, Livorno, Italy
  • Borgo Il Poggiaccio, Siena, Italy
  • Pieve A Nievole, Pistoia
  • Empoli, Florence, Italy

Thus, if you seek to engage one of Italy’s most distinguished wedding and party bands, look no further than The Blazers—and do contact us today to reserve your exquisite celebration.

milan-swings-band-italy.intro_html:
Milan Swings – An Exquisite Swing & Jive Ensemble, Based in Milan, Italy

Milan Swings is a refined swing and jive band, a distinguished presence within the Italian music scene for decades.

Discover the full curations of bespoke jazz bands across Italy

They have graced the stages of Italy’s most prestigious venues and international destinations, including Blue Note Milan, Assago Forum, Alcatraz, Bloom, and Spirit de Milan.

Explore the finest jazz bands for hire in Italy

For over twenty-five years, Milan Swings has infused private celebrations with impeccable energy at some of Italy’s most iconic settings, particularly along the enchanting shores of Lake Como.

Inquire About Milan Swings 💬

Their curated appearances have included Villa d’Este, Villa Erba, Villa Pizzo, the Mandarin Oriental (formerly CastaDiva), Principe di Savoia in Milan, the Crown Plaza, Palazzo Ferrajoli and Palazzo Brancaccio in Rome, and Il Pelagio Castle in Florence—exclusive venues that epitomise elegance.

The ensemble has released two albums of original compositions.

Their handpicked setlist weaves these original pieces together with the finest Italian and American swing, featuring timeless classics such as That's Amore, Mambo Italiano, Volare, Wanna Be Americano, Buonasera Signorina, Zooma Zooma, Via Con Me, and many more.

Milan Swings also collaborates with exceptionally talented Lindy Hop and swing dancers, adding an extra layer of refinement and vibrancy to every performance.

Their shows are always characterised by impeccable rhythm, captivating charm, and unparalleled entertainment.

Bespoke Line-up Options:

The core formation comprises saxophone, piano and vocals, double bass, and drums.

For a more expansive sound, additional elements may be added: trumpets, trombones, guitar, percussion, and even female vocalists, culminating in a full Big Band of up to twenty members. Personalised lecterns and a themed aesthetic for the evening are available upon request.

tuscany-party-duo-cortona-italy.intro_html:
The Tuscany Party Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic & Electric Band and DJ Duo, Based in Cortona, Italy

What discerning clients most cherished about The Tuscany Party Duo: an impeccably talented and professional duo, a masterful blend of live performance and DJ sets, a vast and bespoke repertoire that invites personal requests, flawless communication, and an atmosphere of refined celebration that keeps guests enraptured on the dance floor until the final note.

For over two decades, our singular devotion has been to live music in its most sophisticated forms. Alongside our many engagements as wedding musicians in Tuscany and throughout Italy, we have graced concert stages across the country—performing as a duo or alongside other distinguished musicians and ensembles. One of the hallmarks of our artistry is a profound affinity for international music; we curate a repertoire that embraces foreign songs with as much passion as Italian classics, a preference that has earned us a reputation as one of the most coveted wedding bands in Tuscany and beyond.

Clients who enquired with The Tuscany Party Duo also enquired with these similarly curated ensembles:

  1. The Prodigal Duo
  2. Trio Toscano
  3. Forever Young Duo
  4. Bellissimo Duo

The ability to perform English-language music with impeccable authenticity is essential when orchestrating celebrations for English, Irish, American, Australian, and other international couples. We are regularly commissioned for weddings and private events at Villa Cungi in Sansepolcro and Castiglione del Lago in Perugia, Italy.

Follow us on Facebook · Follow us on Instagram

Contact The Tuscany Party Duo

We stand among the most seasoned wedding musicians in Italy. It is of paramount importance to offer a diverse, international repertoire that includes the most celebrated songs from various countries—even those rarely heard in Italy. On occasion, after performing as a wedding band in Tuscany, guests have inquired about our nationality, praising our song selection and flawless pronunciation. More than twenty years since our ambitious beginnings, we take immense pride in our consistent evolution year after year. Though we have received numerous accolades in recent seasons, our greatest satisfaction remains the joy of the couples and their guests. We are wholly dedicated to fulfilling every desire, offering refined suggestions, bespoke advice, and any assistance required to create an unforgettable evening.

Follow us on Facebook · Follow us on Instagram

Our Bespoke Packages

Acoustic Set
Two acoustic guitars and two voices—an exquisite choice for aperitifs and cocktail hour. This genuinely unique act, with a vast and varied repertoire spanning eras and genres, will elevate your event with sublime sophistication.
Included in this package:
Sound system and instruments set up in the aperitif area. Duration of performance: up to 2 hours live.

Acoustic Set & DJ Set (or DJ Set + Sax)
After a serene aperitif and a delectable dinner, nothing compares to an enchanting evening on the dance floor, filled with laughter and joy. We can DJ in any style—chart & pop, 60's–90's, R&B, hip hop, Motown, funk, soul, garage, and beyond. With years of industry experience, we understand that music is the heartbeat of every event, especially weddings.
Included in this package:
Sound system and instruments set up in the aperitif area. Sound system and wireless microphone set up in the dinner area for mp3/Spotify background music and speeches. Sound system, DJ equipment, and disco light system set up in the after-dinner area.
Duration: Acoustic Set – up to 2 hours live; DJ Set – maximum 4 hours.

Live Electric Set & DJ Set
For those who desire both live music and a DJ set, this exclusive package offers the best of both worlds—the energy and spontaneity of live performance paired with the seamless transitions and limitless playlists of a professional DJ. Prepare to elevate your event as The Tuscany Party Duo combines the talents of skilled musicians and experienced DJs in one unforgettable experience.
Included in this package:
Sound system and wireless microphone set up in the dinner area for mp3/Spotify background music and speeches. Sound system, professional instruments, DJ equipment, and disco light system set up in the after-dinner area.
Duration: Up to 4 hours total, blending live performance and DJ set.

DJ + SAX
Included in this package:
Sound system and wireless microphone set up in the dinner area for Spotify background music and speeches. Sound system, DJ equipment, and disco light system set up in the after-dinner area. SAX performance during the after-dinner DJ set.
Duration: Up to 4 hours DJ set after dinner.

DJ SET
Included in this package:
Sound system and wireless microphone set up in the dinner area for mp3/Spotify background music and speeches. Sound system, DJ equipment, and disco light system set up in the after-dinner area.
Duration: Up to 4 hours DJ set after dinner.

In search of the perfect wedding musicians to craft a magical atmosphere for your most special day? Look no further than The Tuscany Party Duo—the dynamic ensemble that transforms dreams into reality. With extraordinary musical talent and extensive experience performing at weddings, The Tuscany Party Duo guarantees an evening of refined entertainment. They offer a wide range of musical options tailored to your taste: from elegant acoustic soulful renditions of the greatest hits during aperitifs to vibrant dance and sing-along tunes performed live or as a DJ during the after-dinner party. Their versatility ensures every moment of your wedding is accompanied by the most exquisite music.

tuscany-party-duo-cortona-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Are you open to receiving requests?</summary>Absolutely, we do! You can fully personalise every playlist to your liking. In regards to the DJ set, you have complete freedom to select any song of your choice.  
						


</details><details><summary>Could you perform our 1st dance or a special song live?</summary>In case you have a special song that holds personal significance to you (such as your first dance), and you would like us to perform it live at your wedding, even if it is not currently part of our regular repertoire, we are more than willing to learn and play it exclusively for you. Just inform us of the song title and artist as soon as possible or at least three months prior to the wedding date. Thank you!  
						


</details><details><summary>Is it possible for us to utilise Spotify in order to send you our requested playlists?</summary> Certainly! We do have a Spotify Premium account. Don't hesitate to share your playlists!  
						


</details><details><summary>What is the number of songs you will play?</summary>Approximately 15 to 20 songs per hour, resulting in an average of 45 to 60 songs during our performance, and a maximum of 60 to 80 songs.  



</details><details><summary>What time do you start playing?</summary>Consider this as a possible schedule: dinner commences at approximately 7:00 pm and concludes at 9:30-10:00 pm. Following dinner, we promptly commence playing and the music continues uninterrupted until 2:00am!!    
						


</details><details><summary>What time do you usually stop? Can we eventually add an extra hour?</summary>We usually stop to play/dj at max 2:00 am. Once we finish our Live/DJ set at 2:00 am, we have the option to rent a sound system until 3am for an additional fee. During this time, you can choose to play either one of our dance playlists or your own music using your personal device such as a Smartphone, iPhone, tablet, or any other device you prefer.  
						


</details><details><summary>At what time will you be arriving at the venue?</summary>For our live electric & DJ set we may arrive around one and a half to two hours ahead of dinner. All necessary preparations will be completed beforehand, ensuring no interference with the ceremony reception or any check-sound procedures. For the acoustic and the acoustic DJ set] we arrive one and a half to two hours ahead of start of the Acoustic Set.  
						


</details><details><summary>What is the duration required for you to set up?</summary>From the moment we arrive and begin unloading our equipment, it takes approximately one and a half to two hours.  
						


</details><details><summary>Are venue contacts something that you require?</summary>It would be greatly beneficial if we could obtain the contact information for the venue manager, including their email address and telephone number. This would allow us, if needed, to directly address any technical requirements, such as power supply and other technical needs.  
						


</details><details><summary>Can a friend or family member participate in the evening by singing a song?</summary>Yes of course!! Nonetheless, it would be greatly appreciated if you could give us prior notice (via e-mail), especially if the performance is intended to be a surprise! Our repertoire is constantly evolving and thoughtfully curated to encompass timeless classics from the last six decades as well as current chart-topping hits. When you book us, you will receive a complete wedding entertainment package for your event in Italy.</details>

dj-lecce-italy-gius.intro_html:
DJ Gius: An Exquisite Curator of Bespoke Musical Experiences – Based in Lecce, Italy

What discerning clients cherish most about DJ Gius:

  • Impeccably versatile mixing
  • Refined crowd intuition
  • Electrifying, high-energy sets
  • Seamless, polished communication
  • Unwavering professionalism and reliability
  • Tailored, bespoke playlists
  • An unforgettable, curated atmosphere

DJ Gius is a masterfully talented DJ hailing from the sun-drenched shores of Italy, specializing in delivering meticulously crafted musical entertainment for the most exclusive events. His artistry is recognized among the finest—featured on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of Italy's premier wedding DJs.

His innovative remixes are simply extraordinary, transforming beloved hits into exhilarating, freshly imagined sounds. Discover the complete portfolio of Italy's finest wedding DJs.

With a distinguished career spanning hundreds of refined celebrations—from intimate weddings and private soirées to high-energy club nights and prestigious festivals—DJ Gius commands every venue with effortless grace. He is a regularly booked presence at the exquisite Castello di Ugento Hotel in Lecce, the enchanting Masseria Grieco in Ostuni, and the glamorous COCO Beach Club in Bari, Italy.

Enquire About DJ Gius 💬
dj-lecce-italy-gius.description_html:
For an even more elevated sensory experience, a virtuoso saxophonist may join DJ Gius on stage, creating an electrifying fusion of DJ and live saxophone—an impeccable pairing for your most cherished celebration.

His ingenious sets traverse eras and genres with sublime fluidity, moving effortlessly from the golden 70s and 80s through the naughties and into the vibrant 2010s.

Explore our handpicked selection of Italy’s most sought-after wedding DJs ➡️

Happy to venture beyond borders, DJ Gius regularly performs across Italy and abroad, dedicating himself to fulfilling every desire of your refined event with impeccable attention to detail.

View the complete collection of Italy's premier wedding musicians.

Should you wish to secure the services of one of Italy’s most celebrated DJs—or a sublime DJ & Sax performance—look no further than DJ Gius. Reach out today to begin crafting your bespoke musical journey.

Follow me on Facebook

In Italiano

Gius è un dj professionista d’eccellenza che si occuperà dell’intrattenimento musicale del vostro matrimonio, valorizzando con raffinatezza ogni momento più significativo e selezionando i brani più pregiati per ciascuna fase del ricevimento. Affidandovi a Gius troverete serietà impareggiabile, carisma magnetico ed esperienza consolidata: tutto ciò che serve per un evento perfettamente riuscito.

Il dj dispone di attrezzatura audio e luci di altissimo livello, effetti speciali quali fontane luminose Sparkular e macchine delle scintille, servizio di videoproiezione su maxi schermo, karaoke, microfoni wireless e gadget esclusivi di ogni tipo.

Di norma si fa accompagnare da un vocalist dallo scopo di coinvolgere ancor più gli invitati in un’atmosfera curata. Entrambi saranno a disposizione per soddisfare ogni vostra richiesta, esigenza e gusto musicale con altissima precisione.

Gius vanta un repertorio vastissimo che spazia dalla musica degli anni '70 fino ai giorni nostri, attraversando generi come disco, commerciale, dance, reggaeton, balli latino-americani e molto altro ancora.
dj-lecce-italy-gius.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Impianto Audio/Luci professionale (TesteMobili,Strobo,Laser,EffettiLed ecc) Effetti speciali: Fontane Sparkular/Macchine delle scintille+Macchina del Fumo Videoproiettore+Maxi Schermo+Microfoni+Gadget.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Preferibilmente con largo anticipo al fine di poter organizzare al meglio l’evento



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Solista, Piccola (2-3 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Qualsiasi genere musicale a disposizione. L'importante è far divertire tutti gli invitati.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Certo.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>DJ dal 2011. Attestati DJ/Producer e Tecnico del Suono.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di materiale particolare o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì.

vespa-dreams-tuscany-italy.intro_html:
Vespa Dreams – An ensemble of refined artistry, based in Florence, Italy.

Originating from the sun-drenched hills of Tuscany, Vespa Dreams presents an exquisite all-male trio, whose presence elevates any occasion.

Their meticulously crafted sound is built upon the refined interplay of guitar and vocals, complemented by the resonant depths of the bass and the impeccable dynamism of the drums.

They are proudly recognized as one of the premier wedding bands in Tuscany by FixTheMusic, a true mark of their distinguished musicality.

Their bespoke repertoire is a masterfully curated journey, seamlessly traversing the genres of Funk, Soul, Rock, and Pop, drawing profound inspiration from the rich musical heritage of the Maremma region.

An esteemed and recurring presence at the revered Castello di Albola, Vespa Dreams graces only the most distinguished celebrations across Italy.

Enquire About This Exclusive Ensemble

Their repertoire—a sophisticated selection of international pop anthems and timeless R&B classics—ensures a flawless fit for any gathering, from the most traditional Italian wedding to the most contemporary soirée. Suitably Hyped is regularly commissioned to perform at the illustrious Hotel Villa Simplicitas on Lake Como and the magnificent Villa Valentini Bonaparte in Perugia, a testament to their exclusive status among discerning clientele.

Enquire About Suitably Hyped
wedding-band-rome-italy-suitably-hyped.description_html:
Conceived by a collective of consummate musicians whose passion for music and entertainment is matched only by their dedication to artistry, Suitably Hyped delivers unforgettable performances that leave every guest enraptured. With years of refined experience within the industry, this ensemble possesses an instinctive ability to ignite the festivities and sustain an impeccable tempo throughout the evening.

What distinguishes Suitably Hyped from other wedding and party bands in Italy is their modern, yet sophisticated approach to music. Their contemporary sound and polished style make them the preferred choice for couples seeking something both unique and elevated for their most cherished day. Whether your vision calls for a traditional Italian celebration or a modern affair of unparalleled glamour, Suitably Hyped orchestrates an experience of seamless perfection.

Prepare to revel in an evening of sublime entertainment. Suitably Hyped’s high-energy performances and exquisite engagement with your guests will ensure your event is remembered as the pinnacle of refined celebration. Secure their presence for an extraordinarily curated experience.

vibe-mix-latina-italy.intro_html:
About Vibe Mix – an exquisite wedding & celebration ensemble, based in Latina, Italy

Vibe Mix is a refined electro-acoustic trio, curated for discerning clientele.

The ensemble features Daniele on vocals and guitar, the captivating lead vocalist Pamela, and Francesco on bass.

Vibe Mix lends its impeccable artistry to private soirées, weddings, milestone birthdays, open-air galas, exclusive nightclubs, and distinguished Disco Rock venues.

The band offers the flexibility of a female lead, a male lead, or both, tailored precisely to the client’s preference.

They are a coveted choice for weddings and events at the prestigious Villa Brasini in Rome, Italy.

Inquire with Vibe Mix

Driven by a passion for music and an extraordinary synergy among its members, the band has cultivated a reputation for delivering bespoke, high-calibre entertainment throughout the nation.

A Vibe Mix performance typically spans approximately three hours, artfully structured to elevate every moment of your celebration. They usually offer:

  • One refined acoustic set of roughly one hour—an atmosphere of sophisticated background music.

  • One vibrant electric set of approximately two hours—an invitation to dance with exuberance. Alternatively, the performance may be divided into three one-hour sets, each impeccably paced.

The curated show weaves together serene acoustic interludes for tranquil moments and electrifying, up-tempo selections to inspire joyous movement. Upon request, the line-up can be expanded with additional musicians—a saxophonist, a violinist, a male vocalist, or a DJ—to create an even more bespoke experience.

Our fee encompasses a professional audio system and stage lighting of the highest standard. The configuration is ideal for medium-sized venues, yet we are pleased to provide a larger audio and lighting service to suit the specific grandeur of your event.

We are also able to cover up to three distinct areas—for example, the reception, cocktail hour, and main hall—ensuring an uninterrupted and seamless atmosphere.

Before, after, and between our live sets, we present carefully curated playlists as refined background music, maintaining a consistently elegant ambiance throughout the celebration.

We typically arrive two hours prior to the event for a discreet setup; the soundcheck and arrangement process requires approximately thirty minutes of meticulous attention.

We can perform up to two live songs selected by the couple—such as the first dance, parent dance, or cake-cutting moment. Any other segment of the event may be customised with background music upon request.

The ideal performance area is at least 4x4 metres, though we gracefully adapt to more intimate spaces if required.

All of our equipment is CE-certified and fully compliant with European safety standards, reflecting our commitment to both luxury and peace of mind.

We are available to perform in any venue, from the most classic settings to the most unique or unconventional locations, always with impeccable finesse.

Line-up Options

A 3 to 7 piece ensemble. Additional musicians include a male singer, saxophonist, violinist, or DJ—each an exquisite addition to your bespoke celebration.

wedding-band-amalfi-italy-turnpikes.intro_html:
The Turnpikes – an exquisite folk and roaming ensemble, impeccably based in the enchanting town of Amalfi, Italy.

The Turnpikes is a refined four-piece folk roaming band, curated for the most discerning celebrations. With soulful harmonies and dynamic instrumentation, they have captivated audiences across the wedding and entertainment sphere for several years, delivering an experience of unparalleled sophistication.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's finest wedding bands ➡️

The ensemble comprises a guitarist/vocalist, a violinist, a cajonist/backing vocalist, and a bass ukulele/accordionist—each artisan in their craft. Their bespoke song list spans Italian and international rock, folk, and pop masterpieces by luminaries such as The Beatles, Sting, Coldplay, Oasis, Red Hot Chili Peppers, Bob Marley, Bruce Springsteen, and David Bowie, interwoven with pure 1950s rock & roll and classic Neapolitan traditions, reimagined through a folk lens.

We are proudly featured on FixTheMusic’s 28 Best Wedding Bands in Italy 🏆

We are regularly entrusted with performing at weddings and exclusive events at Waterfall Garden in Malta, Caruso Belmond Hotel on the Amalfi Coast, SPAO Borgo San Pietro Aquaeortus in Umbria, Villa Arvedi in Grezzana, and Masseria Astapiana Villa Giusso in Vico Equense, Italy.

Inquire about The Turnpikes 💬
wedding-band-amalfi-italy-turnpikes.description_html:
The Turnpikes' performances transcend mere music—they are an immersive, luxury experience. Their impeccable stage presence and innate ability to forge a connection with every guest ensure that each event becomes an unforgettable soirée.

Below are just a few of the exquisite venues where we have been booked by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events…

  • Caruso Belmond Hotel, Amalfi Coast
  • SPAO Borgo San Pietro Aquaeortus
  • Borgo Castello Panicaglia, Perugia
  • Villa Arvedi, Grezzana
  • Masseria Astapiana Villa Giusso
  • Villa dei Fisici, Positano
  • Borgo di Castelvecchio, Siena
  • Waterfall Garden, Malta
  • Villa Zagara, Sorrento
  • San Martino Alfieri, Asti
  • Asciano, Siena, Italy
  • Vietri sul Mare, Italy

Below, a refined overview of our bespoke services:

Acoustic Roaming Performance

The band follows guests through the venue's most picturesque settings, delivering acoustic music with the support of a battery-powered amplifier and microphone. A curated background ambience is provided. Typically, the roaming performance encompasses:

  • Arrival and welcome toast of the newlyweds (e.g., Wagner’s wedding march reimagined in a swing style)
  • Initial buffet—seven to eight songs with an interlude
  • Cutting of the cake—three to four songs

Fixed Position with Amplification

In this configuration, we typically offer pre-recorded music before, between, and after our live sets, ensuring a seamless sonic tapestry.

View our list of Italy's best wedding bands ➡️

We always bring a signature party playlist—a bespoke mix of timeless classics and contemporary favourites—though you are welcome to provide your own. During this segment, the most cherished moments include:

  • Entrance of the bride and groom
  • First dance of the bride and groom
  • Dance of the bride and groom with parents
  • Dance with all guests
  • Throwing of the bouquet
  • Launch of the garter

Upon request, the performance order may be impeccably customised to reflect the couple’s unique vision.

Whether gracing a rustic outdoor wedding or an elegant street festival, The Turnpikes’ music is certain to inspire dancing and joyous revelry among the most refined guests.

splendour-duo-padua-italy.intro_html:
About Splendour Duo – An Exquisite Violin & Cello Duo, Based in Padua, Italy

Splendour Duo is a meticulously curated ensemble of violin and cello, offering impeccably refined live music for weddings and the most exclusive private events across the globe.

View the complete range of wedding musicians in Italy

Classically trained and seasoned on the world stage, this duo delivers a polished, expressive sound—perfect for ceremonies, receptions, and every bespoke moment where atmosphere and musical excellence are paramount.

View the list of acoustic duos in Italy

Their collaboration began aboard luxury cruise ships, where they performed for prestigious international lines, cultivating a versatile repertoire tailored to wedding ceremonies, grand private celebrations, and extraordinary events.

They are regularly engaged to grace the elegant settings of Villa Muggia in Stresa and Villa Cariola in Caprino Veronese.

Contact Splendour Duo 💬
splendour-duo-padua-italy.description_html:
Today, Splendour Duo dedicates itself primarily to luxury weddings and private functions, while also offering refined solo performances on violin or cello upon request. Based in Padova, they are available for international travel, bringing their artistry to the world’s most discerning destinations.

Both musicians possess formidable academic foundations and extensive stage presence. Violinist Marina, a graduate of the Kyiv Academy of Music, has toured extensively across Europe as lead violinist with the symphonic production Lord of the Sound.

Her distinguished career includes performances for VIP and corporate events, Carnival Cruise Line productions, opening ceremonies at Celebration Key, and contemporary crossover shows such as Celestial String.

Cellist Olesia, a graduate of the Dnipro Academy of Music, served as lead cellist of the Dnipro Youth Orchestra and toured throughout Europe.

She also spent over five years performing with a resident string quartet on Princess Cruises, playing for formal ceremonies, private events, ship inaugurations, celebrity guests, and members of the British Royal Family.

Splendour Duo offers flexible formations—from solo violin or cello to string duo, trio, or quartet—with impeccably timed sets typically ranging from 30 to 45 minutes.

The ensemble provides essential sound equipment, arrives well in advance to ensure a seamless setup, and is delighted to learn a limited number of special requests, such as a first dance.

Performances are elegantly adapted to a wide range of venues, including outdoor settings when weather permits, always delivered with the utmost elegance, professionalism, and meticulous attention to detail.

italian-dixie-band.intro_html:
About The Italian Dixie Band – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Rome, Italy

The Italian Dixie Band presents a curated repertoire spanning the refined classics of 1920s jazz through the spirited swing of the 1950s, delivering an impeccably expressive Dixieland experience for the most discerning occasions. This distinguished ensemble is a regular presence at weddings and private celebrations throughout Italy and Europe, bringing a touch of bespoke sophistication to every event.

Should you wish to engage the finest traditional jazz and Dixieland swing band that Italy has to offer for your wedding or gala, we invite you to contact us. Recently, the band was selected by England Rugby Travel for their Platinum experiences in Rome, and is frequently booked for weddings and exclusive events at the illustrious Casina Valadier on Piazza Bucarest.

Enquire About The Italian Dixie Band
italian-dixie-band.description_html:
Jazz revolutionised music history across the globe, and Dixieland remains its most joyful and refined expression. The Italian Dixie Band offers an exquisite journey from the jazz classics of the 1920s to the swing of the 1950s.

Led by the accomplished Raffaele, the six musicians of the Italian Dixie Band have won audiences over with their impeccable renditions of great jazz standards in pure New Orleans style. The ensemble comprises:

  • Raffaele – clarinet, saxophone, and vocals
  • Gianfranco – trumpet
  • Ferruccio – trombone
  • Fausto – sousaphone
  • Alberto – banjo
  • Matteo – washboard and drums

Discover our curated selection of Italy's finest jazz bands ➡️

wedding-band-perugia-italy-big-apples.intro_html:
The Big Apples – An Exquisite Wedding Band Based in Umbria, Italy

For nearly a quarter of a century, The Big Apples have graced Italy’s most distinguished events as a refined cover band, delivering impeccable performances at over two thousand concerts across the nation — from exclusive weddings and corporate galas to elite private soirées.

Their curated repertoire is a masterful fusion of contemporary hits, timeless ballads, and cherished evergreens spanning the 1970s to the present day, all presented with an electrifying energy that ensures an unforgettable evening of dancing and delight.

Recognised among the 12 Best Wedding Bands in Umbria 🏆 by FixTheMusic, The Big Apples are a preferred choice for celebrations at esteemed venues including Castello di Ugento Hotel in Lecce, Villa I Tramonti in Rimini, and Castagneto Carducci in Livorno.

Enquire with The Big Apples 💬

Beyond their exceptional live performances, the band offers a bespoke DJ service, and all sound and lighting equipment is provided with impeccable precision — unless otherwise specified in the quotation.

Discover our selection of Italy's finest wedding bands ➡️

For those seeking an even more opulent experience, The Big Apples can be expanded to include a saxophonist and percussionist (at an additional fee), and can also curate a ensemble of supplementary musicians — such as a DJ, saxophonist, or acoustic duo — to craft the perfect bespoke package for your occasion.

We invite you to share your vision with us; we shall be honoured to devote our utmost artistry to your celebration.

If you desire to secure one of Italy’s most distinguished wedding bands, we welcome your enquiry with The Big Apples.

DJ Luke – An Exquisite Wedding DJ, Curated for Your Florentine Celebration

What discerning clients most cherish about DJ Luke: impeccable professionalism and reliability, a bespoke musical journey throughout the day, masterful genre blending and crowd reading, an effortlessly full dance floor — a refined choice, highly recommended.

DJ Luke is an award-winning sonic artisan based in Florence, Tuscany.

His curated set list traverses an exquisite range of genres, from dance and house to Latin and chillout.

Explore the complete collection of wedding DJs in Italy

DJ Luke is sought after to perform at weddings and exclusive events across Tuscany and throughout Italy.

I am honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic's 20 Best Wedding DJs in Italy 🏆

I am regularly commissioned to perform at weddings and distinguished events at Villa Cora and Quercia Al Poggio in Florence, as well as Conti di San Bonifacio Wine Resort in Grosseto, Tuscany.

Enquire with DJ Luke 💬

Follow me on Facebook

In Italiano

Luke nasce a Firenze nel febbraio del 1988, e fin da piccolo coltiva grande passione per la musica. All'età di sedici anni, inizia quasi per gioco, a organizzare le prime feste con gli amici, proponendosi come deejay e intrattenitore con karaoke.

Passa un po' di tempo e la sua grande passione comincia a svilupparsi sempre di più : gira per discoteche e locali, iniziando così ad identificarsi in suo genere musicale. Arriviamo dunque all'inverno del 2005, quando lavorando come PR per varie discoteche fiorentine (Meccanò,Costes,Tenax), trova l'occasione per cimentarsi con una console "vera", nell'impianto della discoteca Meccanò di Firenze.

Nel'estate dell' 2006 collabora con l'animazione del villaggio Baia Verde di Punta Ala, suonando spesso nel discopub del villaggio, proponendo genere commerciale e revival. Questa collaborazione viene rinnovata ogni estate, grazie allo staff d'animazione e ai gestori del locale.

Nella stagione 2008-09, conclusa la scuola superiore, decide di partire come dj/animatore con l'agenzia pratese 69 Groove, per tutta la stagione invernale. Come incarico, ha quello di organizzare e coordinare le attivita' musicali dello staff di animazione dell'Hotel Artuik a Marilleva, in Trentino Alto Adige.

Questa esperienza lo arricchisce molto dal punto di vista musicale e non, e lo porterà a proporsi ufficialmente anche come dj e intrattenitore per cerimonie e matrimoni.

Negli anni successivi continua a lavorare con le discoteche della zona, e viene spesso chiamato per feste di compleanno,laurea e matrimoni, ma anche per le inaugurazioni di alcune palestre e di negozi di abbigliamento.

Nell'ultima stagione invernale ha lavorato con la Discoteca NO LIMIT di Calenzano, Il Lounge Bar CHAPEAU di Campi Bisenzio, e l'Amercian Bar MIX di Sesto F no; mentre nella stagione estiva appena trascorsa è stato impegnato nella località balneare di Punta Ala (GR), alla discoteca "BLACKSUN" al sabato e nel Beach Club "LA VELA" alla domenica.

Proprio al Blacksun , ha esordito nella serata inaugurale di venerdi 9 luglio 2012, che ha visto come ospiti speciali "I Soliti Idioti" Francesco Mandelli e Fabrizio Biggio. Collaborazioni continue anche con un altro Beach Resort della zona, il locale "CALA FELICE" (Marina di Scarlino), dove sempre nel mese di luglio ha tenuto una festa esclusiva per la nazionale olimpica di ginnastica ritmica.

Nel mese di Settembre ha organizzato le serate a tema del venerdi per il BarSport di Calenzano, :
Serata Gresae (14-09-12) e Serata Oktoberfest (28-09-12), con musica revival anni 50-60 e musica tipica bavarese.

Nella stagione corrente inizia a lavorare anche con L'Oibò e La Rotonda a Firenze.

Predilige musica commerciale/house ma anche revival anni 70-80, italiana, balli di gruppo e anche lounge/chill-out per una situazione più tranquilla.

Dal 2012 è iscritto all' Accademia Italiana Deejay di Firenze, dove ha frequentato con successo corsi di specializzazione per producer e deejay.

wedding-dj-amalfi-coast-crescendo.intro_html:
DJ Crescendo – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Experience on the Amalfi Coast, Italy

For several years, DJ Crescendo has been curating impeccably refined musical experiences for weddings and exclusive events along the enchanting Amalfi Coast.

Discover the full collection of wedding DJs in Italy

His bespoke services are sought after at the most distinguished venues across Naples, Salerno, Ravello, and Positano, as well as throughout Italy.

If you desire the most distinguished DJ the Amalfi Coast (Italy) has to offer, an invitation to connect with DJ Crescendo awaits.

I am honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 22 Best Wedding DJs in Italy 🏆

I am regularly engaged to perform at exquisite weddings and events at Villa Eva in Ravello, Relais Villa San Martino in Taranto, and Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole, Italy.

Enquire with DJ Crescendo 💬
wedding-dj-amalfi-coast-crescendo.description_html:
The innate and universal effect of music within us arises not from harmony alone, but from sound itself—an element that electrifies and stirs the soul at the very first touch, even in its most monochrome form.

Explore our curated selection of Italy's finest wedding DJs ➡️

This is the singular quality that elevates music above all other arts.

Impassioned by music since childhood, DJ Crescendo first stepped into the world of dance at the age of sixteen, mastering an array of refined digital tools—Virtual DJ, Traktor, and beyond.

In October 2010, he embarked on an immersive DJ course at Studio 76 under the tutelage of the celebrated Salerno artist Marco Montefusco.

The programme culminated in a prestigious internship at "Dolcevita" in June 2011. Over the following years, from 2012 to 2013, he lent his expertise to MPA radio as the technical director of the Quinto Piano programme alongside Roberto Giaquinto.

The summer of 2013 marked a defining chapter—an extraordinary sojourn in Rimini and Riccione, where DJ Crescendo joined the esteemed staff of the Altromondo Studios Discotheque.

Here, the dream of performing beyond one’s own city manifested into reality: on the first of July, he had the privilege of playing at the club’s grand opening soirée.

DJ Crescendo also graced the stage of "Vanilla Club" in Cava dei Tirreni alongside Alex Colle, a luminary of RADIO IBIZA.

The summer of 2014 heralded the inception of the "Street Festival" project—a refined celebration designed to enchant audiences of every generation.

This exquisite event featured singing contests, dance, DJ battles, fashion presentations, and a captivating piazza disco.

Presented here is a selection of the prestigious locations where clients on FixTheMusic have reserved my services for weddings and events…
