View FixTheMusic's selection of best wedding bands in Italy

Their meticulously curated repertoire spans an array of genres including dixieland, rock ‘n’ roll, gipsy, surf, twist, boogie woogie and swing, ensuring a vibrant and captivating musical journey for every discerning audience.

Contact The Admirers
admirers-puglia-italy.description_html:
Specialising in providing top‑tier entertainment for bespoke occasions, The Admirers have become synonymous with refined excellence in live music.

Whether an enchanting outdoor concert, an intimate soirée, or a grand wedding celebration, the band’s versatility is unparalleled.

Their mission is to blend impeccable musicality with an infectious stage presence, forging a connection that transcends the barrier between performer and audience. With each performance, The Admirers aspire to create unforgettable memories and lasting impressions.

When it comes to weddings, The Admirers offer a tailored entertainment package designed to elevate every moment of the celebration. Their wedding party animation typically unfolds as follows, though it can be customised to suit the couple’s vision and the venue’s character:

  • Civil Ceremony: Set the mood with an exquisite DJ accompanied by guitar, vocals and/or saxophone or violin.
  • Wedding Entrance in ‘New Orleans’ Style and Aperitif: Serenade guests with a roaming acoustic ensemble featuring banjo, vocals, saxophone and percussion.
  • Music During the Meal: Keep the atmosphere alive with an electric set, alternating between listening and dancing intervals, performed by five musicians on vocals, guitar, tenor saxophone, bass and drums, complemented by refined DJ interludes.
  • Cake Cutting Ceremony: Enhance the moment with instrumental accompaniment, whether a guitar‑saxophone duo or a guitar‑vocals‑saxophone trio, tailored to suit the ambiance and song choice.
  • Music After the Cake Cutting and After Party: Transition seamlessly into the evening festivities with the expertise of a skilled DJ, ensuring the celebration continues well into the night.

With The Admirers curating the soundtrack, every wedding becomes an exquisite affair, immersed in music, jubilation, and indelible memories.

night-shift-wedding-band-rome-italy.intro_html:
About The Night Shift — A Refined Wedding & Celebration Ensemble Based in the Heart of Rome, Italy

Unwavering Acclaim: Clients consistently praise The Night Shift for their exquisite musical versatility, impeccable communication, and bespoke approach to event planning. From the first note of the ceremony through to the final dance, they orchestrate a flawless atmosphere and effortlessly command packed dance floors.

The Night Shift represents the consummate choice for a wedding celebration defined by elegance and distinction.

Their curated repertoire features a sublime selection of lounge, bossa nova, and jazz standards, presented in both exquisite vocal and refined instrumental arrangements.

The ensemble seamlessly traverses musical eras, from the soulful depths of 60s Motown and R&B to the iconic dance and funk anthems of the 70s and 80s. This impeccable versatility firmly establishes them as one of the most sought-after wedding bands in Rome.

The Night Shift are a distinguished and recurring presence at the prestigious Tenuta Mocajo in Pisa, curating unforgettable sonic landscapes for exclusive weddings and bespoke events.

Enquire About The Night Shift — Experience Unparalleled Artistry
night-shift-wedding-band-rome-italy.description_html:
Their extensive repertoire is further enhanced by a masterful selection of contemporary pop dance anthems and timeless evergreen pop & rock classics, ensuring every musical preference is elegantly addressed.

The Night Shift orchestrates the complete arc of your wedding reception with impeccable finesse. Begin with sophisticated, mellow jazz during the cocktail hour, and transition seamlessly into an irresistible, high-energy groove that commands the dance floor and elevates the entire celebration.

two-violins-duo-puglia-italy.description_html:
We are delighted to present a bespoke ensemble of two exquisite Italian virtuosas. The Two Violins curate an atmosphere of unparalleled sophistication and refined beauty for the most discerning weddings and events.

Discover the complete collection of wedding musicians in Italy. Their seamless harmonies and graceful melodies captivate audiences, reflecting a truly impeccable artistry. View our curated selection of string quartets in Italy.

Inquire About The Two Violins

Their journey began with a shared passion discovered in youth, individually honed through years of rigorous formal training. They possess a profound command of the classical repertoire, an accomplishment matched only by their refined sense of style. On stage, their elegant attire perfectly complements their musical dialogue, creating a visually impeccable and sonically harmonious performance. This unwavering commitment to quality has rightfully earned them widespread international recognition.

Their performances radiate an air of enchanted sophistication, transforming every event into an exclusive, bespoke experience. From timeless classical compositions that stir the soul to modern interpretations infused with a contemporary twist, The Two Violins flawlessly bridge tradition and innovation. Their unique interpretations captivate and inspire, leaving a lasting, indelible impression on all who listen.

Embodying elegance, talent, and grace, The Two Violins bring an exquisite touch of Italian allure to every occasion. Their harmonious melodies and distinctive fashionable flair continue to enchant and inspire, leaving an enduring legacy in the world of refined, luxurious music.

wedding-band-naples-crazy-cats.intro_html:
The Crazy Cats – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Naples, Italy

The Crazy Cats is a curated collective of consummate musicians and vocalists, devoted to orchestrating every sonic facet of your wedding with impeccable refinement, seasoned expertise, and bespoke flexibility. Since 1999, this distinguished ensemble has dedicated itself to delivering superlative musical entertainment for events of every ilk—from soul-stirring ballads during sacred ceremonies to exuberant performances that elevate the evening celebration. United by an authentic, profound passion for music and performance, the group offers a fully adaptable configuration, ranging from intimate duos and trios to a magnificent full big band, ensuring an ensemble precisely tailored to your vision.

Marking 2019 as its 20th anniversary, The Crazy Cats’s illustrious career stands as a testament to its extraordinary artistry and enduring brilliance. The band will artfully adjust its size to suit your unique occasion and is delighted to journey to your chosen venue. Its vast, meticulously curated repertoire spans eras and genres, delivering beloved hits with a refined touch. Upon request, the ensemble can also provide an exclusive DJ service. With a song for every guest, The Crazy Cats ensures that guests of all ages are irresistibly moved to the dance floor. Presently regarded as one of Italy’s most sought-after wedding and party bands, this is a rare opportunity to secure an unparalleled musical experience. Should you wish to engage one of Italy’s finest wedding and party ensembles, we invite you to make an enquiry without delay.

wedding-band-naples-crazy-cats.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Our performances are tailored to the flow of the event rather than fixed “gig” timing.

We don’t follow a traditional 2×60 or 3×40 structure — instead, we curate live music throughout the key moments of your day, ensuring energy, elegance and atmosphere are seamless from start to finish.

If needed, we can completely reshape the show, tailoring every element to the event itself.

In addition to the live band performance, we also provide music for the civil ceremony or traditional wedding ceremony with harp, piano and violin.

We can also take care of the aperitif moments with sax, DJ and live percussion — in short, there are countless combinations and artistic solutions that can make any type of celebration truly extraordinary.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, The Crazy Cats offers multiple curated line-ups.

From intimate piano & strings, to roaming acoustic ensembles, to full live band + DJ sets.

All musicians are part of our core team — selected, trained and styled to ensure a consistent The Crazy Cats  experience.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Absolutely.

We provide a professional sound system with a certified audio engineer and, when required, a lighting package to enhance the atmosphere — including moving heads, LED bars and ambient uplighting.

For destination weddings, we can also coordinate premium local suppliers if preferred.


</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes.

Our team can manage music transitions with curated playlists, and we offer a DJ option for the party moments.

DJ + live musicians (sax, percussion, violin) is one of our signature experiences.


</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We typically arrive 2–3 hours before guest arrival.

For production-heavy events or multi-area setups, we arrive earlier to ensure everything is perfectly prepared.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Depending on the formation, 60–120 minutes.

Our setup is quiet and elegant — we coordinate with the planner and venue to ensure no disruption to your atmosphere or décor.


</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Of course.

We love personalising your musical experience,  your first dance or a special request can be arranged and performed live.


</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- It depends on the chosen formation:

Duo / Trio: from approx. 2×3m

Full band: from approx. 4×6m

That said, one of our signature experiences is our Roaming Band — a fully mobile, immersive performance with musicians performing among your guests rather than on a stage.

This option requires no fixed performance space, making it ideal for:

Boutique weddings or intimate events

Venues with limited space

Outdoor and unconventional layouts

Moments where you want energy and interaction without a “band setup”

The Roaming Band creates a luxury, spontaneous atmosphere — high engagement, minimum footprint, maximum elegance.


</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes, full PLI coverage and certified, tested equipment.

We work regularly with high-end venues, both in Italy and internationally.


</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Absolutely.

We perform in villas, vineyards, historic estates, luxury hotels, terraces on the Amalfi Coast, private islands and destination venues worldwide.

We simply ask for weather-safe staging and power access — we will assist with technical planning.</details>

sonicstrum-dj-wedding-france.intro_html:
About SonicStrum DJ – An exquisite purveyor of refined soundscapes & bespoke musical artistry, based in the French Alps

SonicStrum DJ’s impeccable journey began at the age of fourteen, when he first coaxed melodies from his acoustic guitar and curated spontaneous rhythms at intimate house gatherings. This formative chapter evolved into a grand odyssey across Europe’s most prestigious stages—from curated festival line‑ups to exclusive club nights—before finding its serene home in the French Alps, where family and alpine inspiration now weave through every note.

Contact SonicStrum DJ

In his twenties, SonicStrum DJ’s refined beats resonated across Europe’s finest venues—festivals, clubs, and bars—each performance a masterclass in unifying discerning audiences through impeccable musical curation. Settled now in the French Alps, he channels the region’s tranquil majesty into his work, crafting a signature style that marries nature’s serenity with the exhilarating pulse of dance music. Beyond the decks, his art is elevated by the harmony of family life—supported by his wife, daughter, and loyal canine companion—a wellspring of inspiration that lends depth to every set. His passions, from the timeless allure of Fleetwood Mac and House Music to the elegance of road biking and skiing, infuse his performances with an eclectic sophistication. SonicStrum DJ remains devoted to igniting dance floors with unwavering energy, transforming every celebration into an exclusive, unforgettable experience.

glamour-bari-italy.intro_html:
The Glamour – A Bespoke Luxury Showband, Curated in Bari, Italy

The Glamour is where Italian refinement meets the exhilaration of an impeccable celebration.

Born in Bari and meticulously crafted by Puglia’s most distinguished session musicians, The Glamour presents a sublime fusion of elegance, precision, and captivating entertainment—exclusively for weddings and events across Italy and beyond.

Forged from over fifteen years of performances at the most prestigious venues and opulent galas, The Glamour elevates the classic party band into an exquisite, full-scale production.

With stunning vocals, a commanding rhythm section, and a sleek stage presence, every performance is designed to enchant an international audience and ignite the dance floor from the very first note to the final, unforgettable chord.

Enquire About The Glamour
glamour-bari-italy.description_html:
Whether you envision an intimate sunset soirée or a grand, glamorous reception, the ensemble adapts with effortless grace.

Line-ups range from a refined duo or an acoustic trio to a complete six-piece showband featuring male vocals, DJ, drums, guitar, bass, and keyboards—each configuration curated to deliver an extraordinary experience.

The Glamour provides bespoke sound and lighting solutions, and offers curated playlists or DJ services between sets.

Special song requests—such as a first dance—are prepared with meticulous attention.

Setup timing varies according to the chosen show design; arrival is scheduled hours in advance, or even the day prior for more elaborate productions.

From elegant villas and seaside terraces to the stages of luxury hotels, The Glamour performs with unwavering confidence in both indoor and outdoor settings, always upholding the highest safety standards for performers and guests alike.

For those who desire a celebration that feels stylish, exhilarating, and effortlessly refined, The Glamour delivers an impeccable show that lingers in memory long after the final chord fades.

Curated Line-Up Options:
- 2 members: male vocalist and DJ

  • Acoustic line-up: 3 members – male vocalist, guitar, percussion, and keyboards
  • From 6 members: male vocalist, drums, guitar, bass, keyboards, and DJ
  • Up to 15 members: 3 male vocalists, 3 female vocalists, drums, percussion, bass, guitar, keyboards, saxophone, trumpet, trombone, and DJ

slender-symphony-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Slender Symphony – A Refined Ensemble of Voice, Guitar & Strings, Based in Florence, Italy

Slender Symphony is an Italian musical odyssey—an exquisite fusion of classical strings, voice, and acoustic guitar, performed by candlelight within intimate, visually captivating settings. Born from the artistic vision of Simone, this curated project delivers bespoke performances for weddings and exclusive private events, often set amidst the timeless elegance of Tuscany or beneath the stars in the Italian countryside. Our concept marries musical refinement with aesthetic grace, seamlessly blending acoustic and amplified arrangements to create an impeccably atmospheric experience.

Contact Slender Symphony
slender-symphony-florence-italy.description_html:
Our repertoire features a refined selection of both Italian and international songs, each reimagined with sophistication. Based in Tuscany, we are available for events throughout Italy and abroad—bringing a touch of luxury to any destination. Our offering is perfectly suited for ceremonies, aperitifs, and pre-wedding evenings, including the exclusive “Promise Under the Stars” experience, designed for destination couples arriving the day before their nuptials. Standard set times are 2 x 60-minute sets or 3 x 40-minute sets, each bespoke and entirely customizable to the rhythm of your celebration. Amplification for voice and guitar is included in the price; should you wish to amplify the strings, this refined addition is available at an extra cost. A laptop DJ service is seamlessly provided during breaks and after the final set, ensuring an uninterrupted, curated ambiance. For effortless execution, we arrive at the venue two to three hours before our performance. Our singer and guitarist can learn a requested song for your first dance or a special moment—string arrangements, however, require an additional fee. We also welcome occasional collaborations with DJs or rhythmic elements, but only when they enhance the style and immersive character of your event.

Line-Up Options:

  • solo performance (voice + guitar)
  • string quartet with voice & guitar
  • various combinations of voice, guitar, and strings.

milan-harpist-sofi.intro_html:
About Sofi Harpist – an exquisite professional wedding harpist based in Milan, Italy

Sofi Harpist is a refined performer of impeccable pedigree, specialising in bespoke musical accompaniment for the most distinguished occasions.

Explore the complete collection of wedding musicians in Italy.

The harp, an instrument of singular beauty, is the quintessential choice for those seeking a spellbinding and romantic ambiance for their celebration.

With years of curated experience performing across Italy at weddings, private soirées, corporate galas, and beyond, Sofi brings an unmatched level of sophistication to every event.

Kindly peruse my 2026 SET LIST.

With her natural charisma and unwavering professionalism, Sofi delivers a performance of extraordinary grace, transforming your event with the enchanting resonance of the harp.

She is frequently engaged to perform for weddings and exclusive events at Villa Serbelloni on Lake Como and Villa Monastero in Lecco, Italy.

Contact Sofi Harpist 💬

As a seasoned virtuoso, Sofi is eminently adaptable and has collaborated with a select ensemble of fellow musicians, regularly performing alongside singers, violinists, flautists, and saxophonists.

View our full roster of wedding harpists in Italy ➡️

Sofi Harpist regularly performs throughout Milan and Italy, and would be delighted to travel to your chosen destination.

Below are a few of the exquisite locations where clients on FixTheMusic have engaged her for weddings and events…

  • Villa Serbelloni, Lake Como
  • Villa Cimbrone, Ravello, Italy
  • Villa Monastero, Varenna
  • La Torre di San Marco
  • Hotel la Palma, Lake Maggiore
  • Zoagli, Genoa, Italy

If you seek to engage one of Milan’s finest harpists, look no further than Sofi Harpist — do not hesitate to reach out today.

In Italiano

La scelta dell'arpa come strumento per accompagnare la cerimonia renderà il vostro matrimonio un evento esclusivo, elegante e di successo. Le particolari sonorità dello strumento vi offriranno un viaggio sonoro che renderà indimenticabile il giorno più magico e incredibile della vostra vita.

Sofi Harpist è un'arpista professionista che, per l'atteso giorno delle nozze, vi propone un accompagnamento musicale raffinato, dolce e personalizzabile in base ai vostri desideri. Con le melodie del suo prezioso strumento, infatti, farà da sottofondo ai momenti principali del rito, religioso o civile, e durante il ricevimento, rimanendo per sempre nei ricordi di voi sposi e dei vostri ospiti.

Disponibile in tutta Italia per il vostro matrimonio.

Oltre che come solista, ha la possibilità di suonare con altri strumentisti:

  • arpa e canto;
  • arpa e violino;
  • arpa, violino e canto;
  • arpa e flauto;
  • arpa, flauto e canto;
  • arpa e sax.

Sofi si è diplomata all'ISSM Conservatorio "G. Cantelli" di Novara in Arpa, sotto la guida della M° Maria Luisa Bona. Attualmente si dedica a concerti, eventi culturali e matrimoni in tutta Italia. Ha suonato nell'orchestra giovanile del Conservatorio di Novara sotto la guida del M° Giorgio Tagliabue.

Ha collaborato con l'Orchestra Sinfonica delle Terre Verdiane e con il coro Gregorio Magno diretti dal Maestro Mauro Trombetta. Ha partecipato a concorsi e masterclass con Anna Maria Restani, Melinda Felletàr, Isabelle Moretti, Irina Zingg, Mario Falcao, Fabrice Pierre, Park Stickney.

Vanta un ricco curriculum di concorsi, concerti, masterclass, matrimoni ed eventi culturali, esibendosi come solista, in duo e in orchestra. Spinta da una profonda passione, sta approfondendo i suoi studi avvicinandosi sempre più alla musicoterapia per accompagnare sedute meditative e di yoga. Collabora con alcuni centri olistici nel nord Italia.

velvet-riviera-bologna-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Velvet Riviera – An exquisite, bespoke luxury wedding & event ensemble, curated from Bologna & Florence, Italy

Velvet Riviera is a refined live band, meticulously curated for the most exclusive celebrations and high-end weddings. We orchestrate unforgettable musical journeys, tailored impeccably to the most discerning audiences.

Over the years, we have had the distinct privilege of performing for illustrious maisons such as Dior, bringing our signature refinement and uncompromising excellence to events of the highest calibre.

Our musicians are not merely session artists; they are dedicated virtuosi who believe profoundly in the artistry of the project.

Contact Velvet Riviera
velvet-riviera-bologna-florence-italy.description_html:
We rehearse with unwavering consistency, ensuring every performance attains an impeccable standard of quality, energy, and precision.

Our vocalists are internationally recognised talents, having received major awards and accolades across the globe.

Among them, one of our singers is the winner of Factor Romania, while another serves as the official voice of Italy’s foremost Queen tribute ensemble.

This level of artistry guarantees a performance that is both powerfully commanding and profoundly emotionally resonant.

We also take exceptional pride in our in-house costume atelier. Every garment is carefully conceived and crafted by our own team, with meticulous attention to each exquisite detail, ensuring a visually stunning and impeccably refined stage presence.

With a sublime fusion of musical mastery, elegance, and professionalism, we create unique, bespoke experiences that elevate every event into something truly extraordinary.

tango-guitarist-brisighella-italy.intro_html:
About Tango Guitarist – A Maestro of the Spanish Guitar, Based in Brisighella, Italy

Having refined my artistry across Spain and abroad, sharing the stage with esteemed ensembles and acoustic orchestras, I am now exclusively devoted to my most exquisite undertaking: the Plays Piazzolla project.

This bespoke presentation interprets the visionary works of Astor Piazzolla, the father of Tango Nuevo, through a distinctly personal, contemporary, and impeccably curated lens.

I am a sought-after presence at exclusive weddings and prestigious events, regularly enchanting guests at the illustrious Ristorante Neccio in Pisa, as well as the breathtaking shores of Lago di Como, Lago di Garda, and the rolling hills of Umbria.

Inquire About an Exclusive Performance
tango-guitarist-brisighella-italy.description_html:
Astor Piazzolla’s Nuevo Tango diverges from traditional tango through its masterful integration of nuanced jazz harmonies, daring dissonances, and profoundly innovative structural techniques. My curated repertoire—featuring luminous works such as Oblivion, Libertango, Milonga del Angel, Night Club, Café 1930, Tango Final Tema di Maria, and Tangata del Alba—is rendered solely on the Spanish guitar, imbued with the refined flamenco flair that defines my artistic voice.

This distinctively refined approach renders each piece exceptionally original and profoundly captivating, whether presented as a focused concert performance or as an evocative backdrop for an evening of sophisticated ambiance.

I specialize exclusively in bespoke solo performances for the world’s most prestigious resorts, private estates, and discerning venues that champion music of the highest artistic calibre and originality.

The nuanced challenge of reinterpreting Piazzolla’s masterworks in a manner that is both intimately personal and boldly contemporary—while preserving the unmistakable flamenco soul of my technique—has brought me immense personal satisfaction and curated acclaim within the most distinguished circles I am honoured to perform for.

dj-du-florence-italy.intro_html:
DJ Du — An Exquisite Curator of Bespoke Musical Experiences, Based in Florence, Italy

Presenting DJ Du, an impeccably refined presence for the most discerning wedding celebrations across Italy.

His journey commenced within Italy’s most illustrious club circuit, holding esteemed residencies at Paradiso in Rimini, Pascia’ and Peter Pan in Riccione, Tendenza in Siena, and Pepero and You in Porto Cervo.

He is proudly featured within FixTheMusic’s exclusive curated list of the finest wedding DJs in Tuscany.

The latter, an iconic destination for the international jet set, has played host to an elite clientele including Morgan Freeman, Beyoncé, Cindy Crawford, Craig David, and Janet Jackson.

His expertise has been sought after across France, Switzerland, and Dubai, orchestrating captivating evenings for both exclusive club gatherings and the most sophisticated private affairs.

Explore the definitive selection of Italy’s premier wedding DJs

He is a recurring presence at Tuscany’s most enchanting estates, including Villa Le Bolli in Siena and Villa Castelletto in Sinalunga, where he curates the perfect ambient narrative for weddings and high-profile events.

Enquire About the Exceptional Services of DJ Du

A refined aesthetic sensibility, cultivated through collaborations with prestigious fashion houses including Loro Piana and Alberta Ferretti, informs his impeccable approach.

View the complete portfolio of exquisite wedding DJs in Italy.

In recent years, DJ Du has devoted his artistry exclusively to private celebrations and bespoke weddings. He works frequently throughout Tuscany, having performed at a handpicked selection of exceptional venues, including Borgo Divino, Tenuta Corbinaia, Villa Apparita, and I Bonsi.

Having captivated cosmopolitan audiences across the globe, he possesses an innate ability to seamlessly weave together a diverse tapestry of musical genres, ensuring a perfectly tailored atmosphere for every gathering.

Discover the refined collection of wedding DJs in Tuscany.

milan-harpist-weddings-italy.intro_html:
An Introduction to The Milan Harpist – an exquisite wedding harpist based in Milan, Italy

The Milan Harpist embodies the pinnacle of refined artistry, a harpist of impeccable pedigree with extensive experience orchestrating unforgettable moments within the Events and Entertainment sector, particularly for bespoke destination weddings.

A graduate of the illustrious N. Paganini Conservatory of Genoa, she further honed her exquisite craft at the Fondazione Scuola di Musica di Fiesole under the esteemed tutelage of Prof. Claudia Antonelli, establishing herself as a supremely versatile and accomplished musician.

Her distinguished career is adorned with a series of prestigious accolades, including First Prize at the Moneglia Music Performance Competition, Second Prize at the International Competition of Spotorno, and performances with the Orchestre des Jeunes de la Mediterranée.

Her meticulously curated repertoire gracefully spans classical, pop, and jazz genres, delighting discerning audiences and ensuring an utterly unforgettable ambiance for every occasion.

She is consistently celebrated as one of FixTheMusic's most sought-after wedding harpists in Italy.

The Milan Harpist is a perennial choice for exclusive weddings and events at exquisite venues such as Villa Silver on Lake Como and Castello di Petrata in Perugia, Italy.

Contact The Milan Harpist 💬

For an even more elevated experience, she is also available to perform as an exquisite harpist and violinist duo.

Ceremony: The duo typically arrives a full hour before the ceremony to orchestrate an impeccable musical setting as guests are seated. Every piece performed during the ceremony can be bespoke, tailored to your unique preferences, and they delight in learning new compositions beyond their already extensive repertoire – a service they provide with great frequency.

Cocktail Hour: Following the ceremony, they seamlessly transition to the cocktail area, curating a refined musical backdrop as guests enjoy libations. Their repertoire includes contemporary selections, and they exhibit supreme flexibility with timing, continuing to perform until guests gracefully move to the dining area – never interrupting the atmosphere prematurely.

First Dance: Should you desire their enchanting presence for the first dance, overnight accommodations for two are required. Kindly account for this additional investment if you wish to extend their performance to this cherished moment.

She performs upon a Camac Grand Blue Harp, an instrument celebrated for its exceptional sound quality and exquisite visual allure.

Her performances may be further refined with amplification, either utilizing her own equipment or engaging an external service, affording the flexibility to perfectly suit the bespoke requirements of each event.

She is also fluent in English and French, enabling impeccable, seamless communication with an international clientele.

Career Highlights

  • A distinguished array of awards and scholarships, including a merit-based scholarship from the Fondazione Scuola di Musica di Fiesole.
  • Extensive concert experience across Italy and abroad, gracing prestigious venues such as the Concertgebouw in Amsterdam and the Konzerthaus in Berlin.
  • Esteemed collaborations with notable orchestras, including the Sanremo Symphony Orchestra, Savona Symphony Orchestra, and Genoa Philharmonic Orchestra.
  • Performances at illustrious festivals and events, including the Ravenna Festival, MiTo SettembreMusica, and the La Milanesiana Festival.
  • The Milan Harpist also pioneers innovative projects, producing NFTs of original compositions and modern pieces for electroacoustic harp utilizing a loop station.
  • Her recent album, “The Sound of the Soul,” features an exquisite selection of classic and contemporary pieces, alongside original works dedicated to her by composer Michele Gentilini.
  • The Milan Harpist is currently available for bespoke bookings across a refined spectrum of event types in Italy, including weddings, corporate events, private parties, and concerts.

yonder-showband-verona-italy.intro_html:
About Yonder Showband – An exquisite luxury wedding and events ensemble, based in Verona, Italy

Yonder Showband is a bespoke live entertainment project conceived for high-profile occasions where music transcends mere ambiance to become an indelible facet of the experience. Composed of consummate professionals with an impeccable foundation in live performance, the ensemble curates each presentation around a refined balance of elegance, rhythm, and energy—tailored to the setting, the audience, and the rhythm of the day. Their repertoire flows seamlessly through pop, soul, and dance, featuring a meticulously curated selection of iconic and contemporary compositions reimagined with a modern sensibility. The music gracefully follows the pivotal moments of an event: establishing a relaxed and sophisticated tone during the aperitif and dinner, before ascending into a vibrant, high-energy celebration as the evening unfolds.

Contact Yonder Showband
yonder-showband-verona-italy.description_html:
Every performance is entirely unique, with setlists crafted in real time to respond to the mood of the guests and the atmosphere of the venue. Yonder Showband is built upon a flexible, modular lineup—ideal for destination weddings, private occasions, and corporate celebrations throughout Italy and abroad. The core formation features eight distinguished musicians, including three female lead vocalists alongside piano, guitar, saxophone, bass, and drums. From this foundation, the ensemble can be expanded with additional performers—such as male vocalists, horn sections, or other instruments—to complement the scale and style of each event. A dedicated DJ is also part of the team, ensuring a seamless transition from live performance into the after-party.

The band collaborates closely with wedding planners, international productions, and event teams, delivering a reliable and impeccably tailored service that integrates effortlessly into elegant, contemporary settings. Music is distributed across the distinct phases of the day rather than confined to rigid set times, allowing the performance to evolve naturally—from the first welcoming moments through to the final song of the night. Yonder Showband typically arrives two to three hours before the event’s start to allow for setup and soundcheck, which usually requires around two hours depending on the venue and technical specifications. Audio and lighting are coordinated with the location and production team to ensure the highest quality outcome. The band is always pleased to prepare special song requests for pivotal moments such as a first dance, entrances, or cake cutting, helping to render every celebration truly personal and memorable.

playback-theory-bari-italy.intro_html:
About Playback Theory – An exquisite wedding & celebration ensemble, based in Bari, Italy

Since 2011, Playback Theory has been illuminating occasions with impeccable live performances, transforming every event into an unforgettable, refined affair. Renowned across Puglia and beyond, we are the bespoke choice for discerning couples seeking a curated sound that is both distinctive and universally captivating.

Our repertoire is a masterfully selected journey through pop, soul, early 2000s nostalgia, and a signature emphasis on ‘90s dance anthems – an explosive fusion of international chart-toppers and iconic Italian melodies. Every set is a sophisticated, high-energy experience designed to enchant.

Contact Playback Theory
playback-theory-bari-italy.description_html:
We orchestrate a musical narrative that effortlessly intertwines emotive intimacy with exuberant vitality, ensuring guests remain spellbound from the first note to the final flourish.

Composed of four virtuoso musicians united by a profound passion for live artistry, Playback Theory delivers a polished, impeccably tight groove that distinguishes each performance. Our collective experience includes collaborations with luminaries such as Patty Pravo, Ronnie Jones, and Benny Benassi – a testament to our standing among elite professionals.

With years of refined expertise and an unwavering devotion to our craft, we animate every celebration with music designed to leave an indelible, positive imprint upon you and your esteemed guests.

  • 5 Piece Band: Vocals, Piano, Drums, Guitar & DJ

verona-jazz-bossa-band-italy.intro_html:
Verona Jazz – An Exquisite Ensemble of Professional Jazz, Bossa & Swing, Based in Verona, Italy

Verona Jazz is a meticulously curated jazz and bossa nova ensemble, composed of consummate professionals whose passion for their craft is palpable in every note. Their artistry has graced festivals and prestigious events across the globe, yet their true devotion lies in crafting those rare, intimate moments through live music—whether performing on a grand stage or within the hushed glow of a candlelit courtyard. The ensemble’s configuration is entirely bespoke, adapting seamlessly to the ambiance of your occasion. They most frequently perform as a trio, with piano, double bass, and drums, or substituting guitar for piano to achieve a distinctly refined texture.

Inquire About Verona Jazz

When joined by their enchanting female vocalist, the sound acquires an even warmer, more expressive resonance. For those desiring a fuller tonal palette, the band can expand into a quartet or quintet—every possibility is thoughtfully discussed to align with your vision. Their repertoire is a masterful blend of timeless jazz standards, classic bossa nova melodies, and beloved modern compositions, all reimagined with a distinctive, laid-back jazzy twist. The result is a smooth, elegant sound that suffuses weddings, intimate dinners, private soirées, and stylish corporate events with an atmosphere of relaxed yet impeccable sophistication.

Should you require it, the band brings its own state-of-the-art sound and lighting equipment at an additional cost, arriving approximately two hours before your guests to set up and conduct a meticulous sound check—ensuring every detail is flawless. If a cherished song—such as a first dance—holds special meaning, Verona Jazz welcomes requests and will gladly evaluate all possibilities. Whether indoors or outdoors, in classic venues or extraordinary settings like rustic barns, lush gardens, or serene beaches, they are always prepared to create a beautiful musical backdrop, provided the space and conditions are appropriate. A typical performance spans approximately one and a half hours per set, and they recommend a performance area of roughly five by four metres to ensure a comfortable and refined setup. At the heart of every performance lies a singular desire: to elevate the spirit with music that is timeless, smooth, and brimming with soul.

The Impressionists represent the zenith of refined wedding and private-event entertainment, offering decades of impeccable pedigree within the music industry. Fronted by Thomas—a luminary ascending the UK blues, funk, and soul firmament—the ensemble is elevated by his extensive tours across the UK and USA, alongside Birmingham’s most distinguished session musicians, who provide a magnificently grooving foundation. Such consummate artistry renders them one of the most sought-after wedding bands available in Tuscany.

Enquire with The Impressionists
impressionists-trio-tuscany-italy.description_html: Also fronted by Ben—an award-winning singer-songwriter, host of the UK’s longest-running open mic night, and a session musician who has opened for the likes of Prince, Red Hot Chili Peppers, John Mayer, Simply Red, Gregory Porter, and many more—the band offers an unrivalled, bespoke musical experience.

italian-swing-tap-catania-italy.intro_html:
Italian Swing Tap – An Exquisite Confluence of Swing Band & Tap Dance, Curated in Catania, Italy

Italian Swing Tap is a Sicily‑based live ensemble that artfully weaves refined jazz melodies, spirited swing rhythms, and the captivating energy of professional tap dance into an impeccable experience for weddings and private celebrations.

Conceived as a truly bespoke project in Sicily, this collective marries live music with performance in a manner that feels supremely stylish, deeply engaging, and infused with personality.

Based in Catania, the band comprises seasoned musicians and performers united by a passion for crafting unforgettable moments through the art of live sound.

A defining highlight of their show is the professional tap dancer, whose dynamic visual artistry imbues every set with an interactive and vivacious spirit.

Enquire About Italian Swing Tap

Their curated repertoire traverses the realms of swing jazz and bossa nova, while bestowing classic Italian and international pop songs with a fresh, jazz‑inspired reimagination.

Guests may expect everything from timeless swing favourites to modern classics, each re‑envisioned with warmth, rhythmic sophistication, and distinct character.

Every performance is entirely live—no backing tracks—allowing an authentic connection between musicians and audience to radiate throughout the occasion.

The music is meticulously tailored to each moment of the celebration, from an elegant aperitivo set to an exuberant evening performance that sustains the atmosphere until the final, resonant note.

Italian Swing Tap offers a refined selection of flexible lineups: an acoustic ensemble, a larger big band, or a full orchestra‑style configuration, with the option to include a DJ set for the ensuing festivities.

Their wedding package may also feature live saxophone during the aperitivo, refined background music between ceremonial moments, and the signature tap dance show.

With an unwavering commitment to detail and a personalised approach, Italian Swing Tap collaborates intimately with each couple to compose the perfect soundtrack for their wedding day, ensuring every celebration feels utterly unique, genuinely memorable, and exquisitely alive.

golden-aura-collective-rome-italy.intro_html:
About Golden Aura Collective – An Exquisite DJ & Live Ensemble Based in Rome, Italy

Golden Aura Collective is an impeccably curated, female-only ensemble that specializes in delivering refined musical entertainment for every occasion—from bespoke weddings and intimate soirees to distinguished corporate events and concerts.

The collective comprises an elite group of accomplished vocalists and instrumentalists, drawn from both domestic and international stages, ensuring an unparalleled performance.

Remarkably versatile, Golden Aura Collective offers a fully customizable lineup, crafted to realize your exact vision—whether an elegant reception or a grand celebration.

Adaptable and gracious, the collective guides you in orchestrating the perfect performance for your day, attending to every detail with impeccable finesse.

Contact Golden Aura Collective
golden-aura-collective-rome-italy.description_html:
The meticulous planning and analysis undertaken months prior to your event encompass every refined detail—the arrangement of venue spaces, the synchronization of all providers, the expectations of guests and the couple, and their individual desires.

Each wedding is a singular masterpiece, from the selection of music to the orchestration of the entire affair.

Every event includes a private consultation with the agency manager and stylist, dedicated to curating the costumes and stage presence for every artist.

Integration is the hallmark that distinguishes Golden Aura Collective.

The breadth of musical selections and performance styles ensures a 360-degree engagement that captivates every attendee.

Beginning with the most cherished classical compositions and the soundtracks of celebrated motion pictures, we journey through swing, the finest eras of pop and rock, and culminate with contemporary melodies.

We are delighted to accommodate any bespoke requests.

The most sought-after formula—the all-in-one arrangement—enables seamless event management, from the ceremony to the celebration.

Throughout the event, the Golden Aura Collective DJ remains at your service.

She masterfully blends backing tracks for the bands, curates distinct DJ sets to inspire dancing, and provides refined background music for the entire day.

Violinists and cellists, capable of performing the most exquisite classical works—both live and with backing tracks—as well as iconic movie soundtracks, oversee every facet of the festivities.

As the queens of the aperitif, the saxophone and congas set an elegant tone for the celebration.

The dinner unfolds with a curated mix of background music interspersed with multiple live performances by the band, followed by a welcome display on platforms and stage costumes.

A two-hour DJ performance follows the cake cutting.

Packages range from a minimum of four musicians to a maximum of eight. The violin, cello, saxophone, and congas are among the refined instruments available, alongside the DJ and vocals.

savvies-dj-live-venice-italy.intro_html:
About The Savvies – An Exquisite Live Band & DJ Experience, Based in Venice, Italy

Prepare for an unforgettable evening of refined revelry with The Savvies.

Our ensemble of live performers and curated dance crews entices every guest to the floor with rhythms that are both irresistible and impeccably crafted.

Each DJ is a virtuoso musician; do not be surprised when they set down the decks to take up a saxophone or drumsticks, joining you in a bespoke moment of celebration.

Far more than a mere live DJ — an elevated, immersive experience.

Contact The Savvies
savvies-dj-live-venice-italy.description_html:
Discover their sister showband… The Flair ➡️

Founded by Chiara, a world-class vocalist and entertainer devoted to opulent entertainment. Her background in management renders her indispensable behind the scenes, orchestrating projects and serving as artistic director for grand international events.

She has graced national television on Mediaset, Rai, and Sky — Italy’s foremost networks.

She collaborates intimately with prestigious global event and wedding planners, touring the globe with her performances at such exclusive destinations as Florida, Indonesia, Qatar, Cyprus, Scotland, Israel, Slovakia, Morocco, Pakistan, Turkey, and many more.

Our philosophy is to curate every element by hand, offering a spectrum of bespoke solutions to create an ambience that is both unique and memorably refined for your occasion.

We provide the formation that perfectly suits your taste — whether in terms of ensemble size or the atmosphere you wish to evoke.

What configuration do you envision? Our foundational band begins as a four-piece: DJ, voice, saxophone, percussion. From there, you may add any instrument you desire.

We offer an extensive array of formations and entertainment proposals, as our entertainment company includes acrobats, dancers, performers, magicians, and more — each meticulously selected.

Our standard quotations for events within Italy include:

  • Travel expenses
  • Accommodation
  • Possibility of selecting attire from our curated catalogue
  • Insurance
  • Management of unforeseen circumstances & substitutions
  • Online briefing with clients or planners for direction, lineup details, and event customisation

diamond-live-singer-milan-italy.intro_html:
Diamond Live — An Exquisite Vocalist Based in Milan, Italy

Diamond Live is a refined vocalist and songwriter based in Milan, celebrated for her impeccably smooth timbre and warmly expressive artistry. Delivering her repertoire in both Italian and English, she masterfully weaves influences from R&B, pop, and soul, crafting a sound that is at once intimate, elegant, and deeply emotive.

Following her graduation in Modern Singing from Milan’s most prestigious institutions, she devoted herself to the continuous refinement of her craft, honing her voice, songwriting, and stage presence through years of curated performances across Italy and Switzerland. She soon began collaborating with distinguished professional musicians at weddings, corporate galas, and luxury celebrations, earning a reputation for authenticity and sensitivity in every bespoke appearance.

Contact Diamond Live

This extraordinary journey inspired her own musical project: a meticulously curated live band designed to bring sophisticated pop, soul, funk, and Latin music to life with elegance and engaging grace. Every performance is tailored to the unique atmosphere of the event, always enhancing the singular character of her voice and forging a memorable connection with each discerning audience.

Diamond Live presents flexible line-ups ranging from an intimate duo to a full seven-piece ensemble, with options to include saxophone, violin, or cello, depending on the desired ambience. Each repertoire is built around the style of the celebration, the preferences of the couple or client, and the precise emotion they wish to evoke.

She collaborates with a professional team capable of delivering impeccable sound and lighting, and can also incorporate a refined DJ set when desired. Drawing on her extensive experience, she understands how to support high-level events with calm professionalism, meticulous attention to detail, and genuine passion.

Performing in exclusive venues and for notable clients throughout Italy and beyond, she continues to build a legacy of elegance, artistry, and heartfelt performance, bringing a touch of Milanese sophistication to weddings and celebrations of every scale.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • 2 = Voice + Guitar or Piano
  • 3 = Duo + Sax, Cello, or Drums
  • 4 = Duo + Sax and Drums + our sound engineer
  • 5 = Quartet + Bass + our sound engineer
  • 7 = Quintet + Cello and Violin + our sound engineer
  • Additional DJ option available upon request.

naples-rhythms-percussionist-italy.intro_html:
About Naples Rhythms – The Artistry of an Elite Percussionist & DJ, based between Naples & Capri, Italy

Born on 10th October 1985 in Benevento and now residing in the refined enclave of Airola, Naples Rhythms is a percussionist of extraordinary pedigree, whose career has graced a constellation of international events and exclusive high-profile performances. His connection to music began in earliest youth, nurtured within a family steeped in rich musical heritage. At just fourteen, he embarked upon his professional journey, joining the tour of the acclaimed Eugenio Bennato and Taranta Power—a debut that carried him across Italy and beyond, culminating in a distinguished appearance on the fabled Ariston stage in Sanremo. He has since collaborated with an impeccable roster of Italy’s most celebrated artists, including Claudio Baglioni, Tony Esposito, Mariella Nava, and Pietra Montecorvino. His refined artistry is regularly commissioned for weddings and private events at the exquisite Castello Monaci in Lecce.

Contact Naples Rhythms 💬

These illustrious collaborations have allowed him to perfect an elegantly bespoke style and technique, offering a sweeping musical perspective that renders him the ideal virtuoso for any affair—from the most intimate ceremony to the grandest spectacle. His artistic journey is further deepened by theatrical partnerships with the legendary Dario Fo, a unique opportunity that unlocked new expressive languages, using music as a vessel for narrative and emotion. In 2005, he commenced a lasting collaboration with Monica Sarnelli, cementing his reputation among the preeminent percussionists and drummers on the Italian scene. By 2012, he founded the MEV Trio, recording the album Contromano as both arranger and musician, his compositional brilliance and passion for sonic exploration forging a distinctly original sound—ideal for events that demand a truly distinctive musical signature. Naples Rhythms also stands as a core member of Enzo Gragnaniello’s ensemble, where alongside drummer Vittorio Riva and guitarist Carlo Fimiani, he delivers performances of breathtaking emotional power. With vast experience across diverse musical realms and an extraordinary capacity to adapt to any style or atmosphere, Naples Rhythms is the consummate partner for those seeking an exceptional percussionist for their occasion—whether an opulent wedding, an intimate ceremony, or a grand-scale concert.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • Solo Percussionist
  • Percussion & DJ
  • Percussion, DJ & Sax
  • Percussion, DJ, Sax & Violin
  • Percussion, DJ, Sax, Violin & Singers
  • Band – Singer, Guitar, Keyboard, Sax, Percussion & Drums

Florence Rhythms – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

A supremely refined, vibrantly captivating, and impeccably professional live band rooted in the heart of Florence; Florence Rhythms orchestrates the perfect alchemy of sophistication, grace, and radiant energy for every occasion.

Featuring two lead vocalists, guitar, bass, drums, and keyboards, this versatile ensemble possesses an innate mastery of atmosphere—whether the moment calls for elegant intimacy or bold, effervescent vitality.

Curated for:
- Weddings
- Private Celebrations
- Corporate Gatherings
- Luxurious Galas

The Bespoke Soundtrack for Your Celebration

Florence Rhythms transforms every event into an indelible experience—refined, soulful, and meticulously tailored to your vision.

With years of distinguished live performance and an unwavering passion for music, the ensemble delivers a wholly personalized journey, designed to accompany every chapter of your day.

Inquire with Florence Rhythms

Imagine your grand entrance, the exchange of vows, your first kiss as one—each sublime moment underscored by a melody that stirs every heart in the room.

Florence Rhythms curates an exquisite musical tapestry, from delicate acoustic renditions of your most beloved songs to timeless classics or transcendent gospel harmonies.

Whether you desire an intimate duo or a fuller, more opulent ensemble, the sound remains heartfelt, seamless, and breathtakingly beautiful.

As your guests savour their first cocktails and conversation, the band sets the tone with understated sophistication.

Their aperitif repertoire—featuring light jazz, lounge, and iconic pop classics—weaves a relaxed yet polished ambience that invites connection without ever overwhelming the moment.

An impeccable prelude to an evening of celebration.

The Party Band – Energy. Groove. Pure Joy.

When the dance floor beckons, Florence Rhythms ignites the evening with effortless intensity.

Their party set is a masterful blend of high-energy modern hits and timeless favourites, uniting every generation in movement and delight.

With commanding stage presence and contagious exuberance, they ensure a night of unbridled joy, rhythm, and memories that linger long after the final note.

Why Choose Florence Rhythms?

Impeccable Artistry & Professionalism: From the first setup to the final encore, every detail unfolds with flawless precision.
Superior Acoustics: Only premium audio instrumentation delivers a crystal-clear, powerfully immersive sound.

italy-choir.intro_html:
About The Italy Choir – An Exquisite Professional Pop & Gospel Choir, Curated from the Heart of Florence

An impeccably refined vocal ensemble of thirty extraordinary vocalists and musicians, The Italy Choir was founded and is directed by Alessandro Gerini—a distinguished Italian-Polish vocalist, vocal coach, and arranger. Their unique, multifaceted artistry weaves the rich choral traditions of gospel and classical polyphony with the contemporary allure of electronic, soul, and pop, creating a sound both timeless and refreshingly modern.

This exclusive group has earned international acclaim through bespoke collaborations with luminaries such as Italian pop star Ultimo, the late beloved actor and presenter Gigi Proietti, the rock ensemble Modà, and international artists including American soul singer Sergio Sylvestre and British vocal coach Paul Phoenix—former member of the Grammy-winning a cappella ensemble the King’s Singers.

They are regularly engaged to perform at weddings and events at the breathtaking Convento Viandante del Cielo in Perugia, Italy.

Inquire About The Italy Choir
italy-choir.description_html:
Renowned for their electrifying and impeccably curated performances, the ensemble has graced stages across Italy, Europe, and Asia—including prestigious festivals such as the Choral Events’ International Choir Festival in Provence, France; the Lucca International Choir Festival; the Wien International Festival for Choirs and Orchestras; the Prague Advent Choral Meeting; the Jeju International Choir & Symposium 2018 in South Korea; the Pantheon Gala Concert in Rome; and Chorus Inside’s Moscow Sounds 2019 festival, where they received the distinguished prize for "Best Overall Performance"—a first for any foreign choir to earn such an honour.

The Italy Choir continues to perform at refined private events in various formations, collaborating with elite international wedding agencies at the most exclusive locations throughout Italy and Europe.

In 2022, the group released its first eponymous full-length album, available on all digital platforms. Their most recent endeavour: a fifth official music video and single—a breathtaking cover of Drake’s “Hotline Bling.”

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • INTRO PACKAGE: 6 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction and Sound system/Backline
  • PRO PACKAGE: 8 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction and Sound system/Backline
  • BRONZE PACKAGE: 10 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction and Sound system/Backline
  • SILVER PACKAGE: 15 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction and Sound system/Backline
  • SAPPHIRE PACKAGE: 18–20 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction and Sound system/Backline
  • GOLD PACKAGE: 22–25 vocalists, 1 pianist, Musical Direction and Sound system/Backline
  • PLATINUM PACKAGE: Full choir of 25 vocalists, Musical Direction and Sound system/Backline
  • Smaller ensembles—duo, trio—are available for pre-party cocktail or after-party events; pricing determined on bespoke request.

celestial-funk-showband-rome-italy.intro_html:
Celestial Funk — A Bespoke Musical Atelier for the Discerning

Hailing from the heart of Rome's illustrious cultural landscape, Celestial Funk is a refined assembly of virtuoso musicians, each possessing an impeccable pedigree honed across the most prestigious national and international stages.

The ensemble presents an exquisitely curated repertoire of timeless masterpieces, traversing the elegant realms of Soul, Funk, Rock, and Dance. Every composition is meticulously selected to cultivate an ambiance of sophisticated vibrancy and effortless grace.

Meticulously conceived to elevate life's most significant milestones, the band lends its bespoke artistry to exclusive weddings, high-profile galas, corporate soirees, and the most intimate of private celebrations.

An unwavering commitment to sonic perfection and a resolutely elegant presentation guarantee a luxuriously transcendent experience for the most discerning hosts and their distinguished guests.

Inquire About the Celestial Funk Experience

golden-ticket-bologna-italy.intro_html:
About The Golden Ticket – an exquisite Wedding & Party ensemble, based in the refined city of Bologna, Italy

The Golden Ticket is a bespoke musical project, conceived with the singular purpose of curating unforgettable soundscapes for private events — from weddings to corporate galas, and every occasion deserving of impeccable music, whether performed live or through a sophisticated DJ set.

Comprising a team of consummate professional musicians and entertainment connoisseurs, we orchestrate the perfect atmosphere, tailoring background melodies, live performances, and DJ playlists to the client’s distinct taste and style.

Contact The Golden Ticket
golden-ticket-bologna-italy.description_html:
We present a curated selection of lineups: from a solo DJ or a DJ accompanied by a saxophonist, to an intimate piano-and-voice duo, a refined five- or six-piece band, and culminating in the magnificent Big Party band — a twelve-piece ensemble delivering a breathtaking, high-energy spectacle.

Throughout the celebration, the ensemble ensures that every moment is graced by the perfect music, with bespoke playlists meticulously chosen to complement the mood, the setting, and the ideal volume for each phase of the event.

Services:
- Exquisite custom soundtrack for your ceremony (if held on-site)
- Tailored playlists for refined background music interludes
- Personalised tracks for special dedications
- A 60-minute acoustic or aperitif live set
- A 90-minute full live dance show
- Elegant table entertainment, upon request
- A 90-minute customisable DJ Set
- Impeccable support for speeches, games, sketches, or videos organised by your guests
- Full-day event management, ensuring every detail is flawlessly curated

singer-guitarist-tuscan-troubadour-italy.intro_html:
About The Tuscan Troubadour – An Exquisite Singer-Guitarist, Based in Tuscany, Italy

The Tuscan Troubadour presents a refined one-man ensemble: a masterful singer and guitarist who employs an impeccable loop station to craft a rich, full-bodied sound in real time. His bespoke performances are ideally suited for intimate acoustic ceremonies, enchanting cocktail hours, and curated open-format DJ sets. The repertoire is an exquisite fusion of Italian classics, international chart-toppers, and his own original compositions.

Contact The Tuscan Troubadour
singer-guitarist-tuscan-troubadour-italy.description_html: With over fourteen years of distinguished experience and more than one thousand performances across Europe, the United States, and Japan, he has graced everything from exclusive private soirées to the world’s most illustrious stages. His artistry has been featured on Netflix, Harper’s Bazaar, and acclaimed television productions including X Factor, Sky, and Rai 1. Moreover, he has performed for Fortune 500 enterprises and at some of the planet’s most iconic venues—an impeccable testament to his global prestige.

lucente-visual-performers-modena-italy.intro_html:
Lucente – An Exquisite Ensemble of Visual Performers, Based in Modena, Italy

Lucente represents a meticulously curated collective of visual artists, rooted in the refined city of Modena, Italy. Conceived to enchant guests with an air of understated elegance, this ensemble transforms every arrival and transition into a moment of quiet wonder and impeccable luxury.

Designed exclusively for occasions that demand the extraordinary, Lucente weaves a spell of bespoke sophistication—turning the simplest passage into a memory etched in grace.

The troupe comprises impeccably costumed mime-style artists, including performers on stilts, masters of card artistry, artisans of soft-light installations and lanterns, all moving in choreographed harmony.

Enquire About Lucente

Through a delicate fusion of dance, music, and luminous acrobatics, Lucente crafts an atmosphere that is at once immersive, sophisticated, and effortlessly captivating. Each performance is conceived as a fluid artistic framework, allowing the experience to be meticulously tailored to the venue, the occasion, and the client’s singular vision.

Whether greeting guests at the entrance, animating pivotal moments, or lending a poetic visual presence throughout the evening, Lucente adapts its style and rhythm with refined discretion—perfect for weddings, luxury galas, corporate receptions, and exclusive private celebrations.

Elegant, unobtrusive, and visually arresting, Lucente is the choice of hosts who wish to impress without overwhelming. Their artistry does not distract from the event; it enhances it, leaving guests with a lingering sense of beauty, refinement, and exquisite attention to every detail.

golden-hour-jazz-band-florence-italy.intro_html:
Golden Hour – an exquisitely curated Jazz & Swing ensemble, based in the heart of Florence, Italy.

Golden Hour embodies refined sophistication and cultural richness, making them the impeccable choice for weddings and distinguished celebrations.

Led by a luminary jazz vocalist and composer—a graduate of Siena Jazz University’s prestigious Vocal Jazz Performance programme—the ensemble delivers flawlessly polished performances, infused with deep artistry and a globally inspired perspective.

Inquire about Golden Hour
golden-hour-jazz-band-florence-italy.description_html:
Their resume boasts bespoke engagements of the highest calibre: the Italian National Day celebrations, the European Union Day Reception, and exclusive appearances at landmark venues such as The Peninsula Hong Kong and Ritz-Carlton.

What distinguishes Golden Hour is their remarkable linguistic versatility—a hallmark of true exclusivity.

They perform an exquisite repertoire of pop, jazz, and folk songs in over ten languages, including Cantonese, English, Italian, and Mandarin, crafting multilingual set-lists that honour global heritage.

This refined approach ensures their music resonates effortlessly with discerning international audiences.

Whether your vision calls for a romantic jazz serenade, sophisticated love songs, or vibrant multilingual medleys, Golden Hour tailors each performance with bespoke precision.

Combining artistry, elegance, and an intimate personal touch, they transform every event into a cherished memory—imbuing each moment with a golden, luminous grace.

dandeluxe-duo-milan-italy.intro_html:
Dandeluxe Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble, Based in Milan, Italy

Born from a serendipitous encounter in 2023, Dandeluxe Duo represents an impeccably refined Milanese acoustic project, forged from an instant and profound musical connection. What began as a singular collaboration effortlessly evolved into a bespoke duo dedicated to curating live performances of the highest calibre, suffused with an air of relaxed elegance. Their artistry is perfectly suited to weddings, private soirées, and the most discerning gatherings.

The ensemble’s sound is an exquisite tapestry of expressive vocals and acoustic guitar, enriched by ethereal backing harmonies and live loop station artistry—every layer woven in real time. This masterful approach preserves the warmth of an acoustic setting while introducing a rhythmic depth and fullness that feels both captivating and supremely unobtrusive.

Enquire About Dandeluxe Duo

Their curated repertoire is vast yet intimate, traversing pop, soul, romantic melodies, reggae, and rock with seamless grace—a refined blend of beloved Italian and international classics. Dandeluxe Duo performs regularly at weddings, corporate affairs, private celebrations, and house concerts, artfully adapting their set to honour the atmosphere and the client’s every wish. Song requests are welcomed with utmost care, including those cherished moments such as a first dance, and the performance can fluidly transition from a serene, background ambiance to a spirited, exuberant celebration.

Beyond the duo configuration, the experience may be elevated to a trio with additional instrumentation or vocals, or expanded into a full band for those occasions demanding a grander sonic presence. They bring their own professional sound equipment, can manage a DJ-style playlist should it be desired, and are equally at home in any setting—be it indoors or under an open sky. With a warm, bespoke approach and an unwavering dedication to musical perfection, Dandeluxe Duo crafts an impeccable soundtrack that transforms any event into an unforgettable affair.

roaming-divas-bologna-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Roaming Divas – An Exquisite All-Female Roaming Ensemble, Based in Bologna & Florence, Italy

Roaming Divas is a refined, all-female roaming ensemble from Italy, curated to bring elegance, energy, and an impeccably immersive live experience to weddings, corporate affairs, and private celebrations. With a sophisticated stage presence and a modern, stylish edge, they glide effortlessly through the crowd, transforming each moment into something personal, vibrant, and utterly captivating.

For couples orchestrating a destination wedding, they represent one of the most exclusive roaming bands in Italy available: their sound knows no boundaries, blending Italian classics, international hits, and iconic songs—all delivered live with a fresh, contemporary refinement.

Contact Roaming Divas
roaming-divas-bologna-florence-italy.description_html: Every performance is bespoke, adapting naturally to the flow of the event—shifting seamlessly from sophisticated, curated atmosphere to more upbeat, interactive moments—without ever compromising an ounce of class. The ensemble is composed of singer, guitarist, saxophone, double bass, and drums; each artist brings impeccable musicality and a distinct personality to the experience. With all performers singing, the result is a rich, dynamic tapestry of harmonies that forges a powerful connection with guests. Ever in motion, Roaming Divas does not merely perform—they engage, surprise, and entertain up close, ensuring each event feels exclusive, memorable, and brimming with character.

amalfi-strings-pompei-italy.intro_html:
The Amalfi Strings – An Exquisite String Ensemble, Based in Pompei, Italy

Crafted for the discerning, The Amalfi Strings is a bespoke musical formation that masterfully bridges the worlds of classical and contemporary repertoire. Their signature sound is an innovative fusion, both refined and dynamic.

Comprising highly accomplished classical musicians, each with an impeccable background spanning both classical and popular genres, the ensemble reimagines iconic Pop and Dance anthems from the 1970s through the present day.

What distinguishes them is the seamless integration of classical tradition with the captivating allure of Venetian rondò style, delivered through the electrifying synergy of string instruments—a truly curated auditory experience.

Enquire About The Amalfi Strings
amalfi-strings-pompei-italy.description_html:
The ensemble, featuring two violinists and one cellist, shares not only a deep camaraderie but also an extraordinary artistic and musical rapport.

With extensive experience at national and international musical events, and collaborations with a diverse array of formations, The Amalfi Strings brings a wealth of refined expertise to their innovative explorations.

United by a passion for transcending musical boundaries, the group leverages its classical foundation to experiment with new soundscapes—an approach that is both timeless and strikingly contemporary.

Their journey extends into cutting-edge musical technologies, yielding a sound that is at once elegantly classic and modernly vital.

The Amalfi Strings is not merely an ensemble; it is an odyssey through genres, a celebration of fusion, and an exploration of the limitless possibilities that arise when classical elegance meets contemporary energy.

Prepare to be enraptured as The Amalfi Strings guides you through a musical voyage, weaving threads of refined sophistication with vibrant modernity.

This is not just a band—it is an experience, an evolution of sound. This is The Amalfi Strings.

amalfi-strings-pompei-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Usually 2 x 45-minute sets or 3 x 40-minute sets, depending on the event requirements.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, we offer different line-up options including solo violin, duo, trio and full live ensemble configurations depending on the event.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- We can provide our own sound and lighting equipment depending on the distance from our base in Pompeii and the event requirements.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, we can provide a laptop playlist service between and after our live sets if requested.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We normally arrive 1.5 to 2 hours before the performance time, depending on the venue and technical requirements.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Our setup and soundcheck usually take between 15 and 30 minutes, depending on the venue and technical requirements

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, we are happy to learn special song requests such as first dances or meaningful songs for your event.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- We are very flexible and can adapt to most venues, but we normally require a performance area of approximately 3x2 metres.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- We currently do not have Public Liability Insurance or PAT-tested equipment.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, we are comfortable performing both outdoors and in unique venues such as beaches, villas, barns and other special event locations.</details>

dj-oro-florence-italy.intro_html:
About DJ Oro – An Exquisite Wedding & Events DJ Based in Florence, Italy

DJ Oro stands as a Florence-based curator of refined musical journeys, devoted to crafting elevated destination weddings throughout Italy’s most prestigious venues.

Explore the finest wedding DJs in Italy

With over a decade of experience in DJing and multimedia production, he designs bespoke sonic narratives that intimately reflect each couple’s story, the distinctive character of their venue, and the vibrant energy of their international guests.

He is regularly commissioned to perform weddings and events at the esteemed Villa Lena in Pisa.

Inquire with DJ Oro 💬
dj-oro-florence-italy.description_html:
Every celebration is meticulously built from the ground up—no fixed playlists, no standard formulas, only an impeccably curated experience.

Browse the complete collection of luxury wedding DJs in Italy

The auditory journey unfolds seamlessly: from romantic ceremony moments and refined aperitif atmospheres to elegant dinner selections, before evolving into a dynamic, stylish dance floor.

Blending timeless classics, contemporary hits, and global influences, DJ Oro reads the room in real time, ensuring the energy flows naturally while preserving the sophistication expected in a luxury setting.

Beyond music, he offers complete audio-visual direction—tailored sound systems, architectural lighting, immersive videomixing with LED or projection installations, cold spark effects, and discreet wireless solutions for flawless speeches and ambient soundscapes.

Working in close coordination with planners, venues, and creative teams, he guarantees a seamless experience from the first note to the final track—delivering a celebration that feels polished, personal, and utterly unforgettable.

party-band-milan-late-nights.intro_html:
About The Late Nights – an exquisite wedding & party ensemble based in Milan, Italy

The Late Nights represent a refined collective of musicians dedicated to delivering impeccably curated musical entertainment for the most discerning events. Based in Milan, this distinguished ensemble is available for bespoke performances worldwide, whether for an exclusive wedding, an intimate private soirée, or a prestigious corporate gathering.

Their repertoire—vast, timeless, and meticulously selected—spans eras and genres, ensuring that every guest encounters a melody that resonates. The Late Nights are regularly commissioned to perform at celebrated venues such as Relais Castel Bigozzi in Siena and Borgo Sant'Ambrogio in Pienza, where their artistry elevates each occasion.

Contact The Late Nights

The Late Nights offer a supremely versatile configuration, each line-up tailored to the scale and sensibility of your event.

Discover our curated selection of Italy's most distinguished wedding bands ➡️

The ensemble may be experienced in the following refined formations:

  • Trio: Piano/Keyboards & Singer + Drums + Bass
  • Quartet: Piano/Keyboards + Female Singer + Drums + Bass
  • Quintet: Piano/Keyboards + Female Singer + Guitar + Bass + Drums
  • Sextet: Piano/Keyboards + Female Singer + Male Singer + Bass + Guitar + Drums

The Late Nights travel with effortless grace, performing regularly across Italy, Spain, and France, and beyond for those who seek the extraordinary.

Below is a selection of esteemed locations where FixTheMusic clients have secured the band for their weddings and events:

  • Relais Castel Bigozzi, Monteriggioni
  • Bersi Serlini Franciacorta
  • La Villa Hotel, Mombaruzzo
  • SPAO Borgo San Pietro Aquaeortus
  • Borgo Iesolana, Bucine
  • Borgo Sant'Ambrogio, Pienza
  • Castelfalfi, Montaione
  • Castello di Grazzano Visconti
  • Masseria Baroni Nuovi, Brindisi
  • Villa Boscarello, Trequanda
  • Greve in Chianti, Florence

If your vision demands one of Italy’s—and Europe’s—finest wedding and party bands, look no further than The Late Nights. Enquire today to reserve an unparalleled experience.

Please be advised that The Late Nights are a family of uncompromising musicians, each at the summit of their craft. Consequently, the performing line-up may not correspond exactly to promotional footage. The set list is indicative and will be tailored according to the vocalist.
