plush-echoes-sorrento-italy.intro_html:
About The Plush Echoes – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble Based in Sorrento, Italy

The Plush Echoes is a bespoke, high-energy wedding and gala band, proudly based in the refined coastal enclave of Sorrento, Italy, and available for performances nationwide.

Established in March 2025, this ensemble was conceived from a profound passion for crafting original, curated arrangements infused with the vibrant, soulful spirit of the 1970s.

Contact The Plush Echoes
plush-echoes-sorrento-italy.description_html:
Their impeccably assembled lineup features seven exceptional musicians: two saxophonists, a vocalist, a drummer, a bassist, a guitarist, and a pianist. The Plush Echoes deliver a performance of two meticulously timed, 60-minute sets, separated by an elegant interlude during which refined background music is provided. The price includes a state-of-the-art PA system and lighting upon request; for grander affairs, a rental service is available, or the band may utilize the venue’s own equipment should it meet their exacting standards. Arrival at the venue is typically two hours prior to the event to allow for an unhurried setup and a pristine soundcheck.

Clients may request two bespoke live performances – such as the ceremony procession, first dance, or cake-cutting moment – while additional requests are gracefully delivered via a curated laptop playlist. An exclusive additional offering is a roaming ensemble of three musicians, perfect for intimate settings without power outlets; the band supplies compact, battery-powered amplifiers to ensure seamless, refined acoustics. Every performance is a lively, engaging, and impeccably executed journey, defined by a signature retro-inspired groove that elevates any celebration.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • 7-Piece Band
  • 6-Piece Band
  • 5-Piece Band
  • Duo
  • DJ Service
  • Roaming Band

tuscany-funk-band-arezzo-italy.intro_html:
An Exquisite Ensemble: Tuscany Funk – A Bespoke Wedding & Celebration Band, Based in the Heart of Arezzo, Italy

Tuscany Funk presents an impeccably curated musical experience for weddings and soirées throughout Arezzo and beyond.

From the first sip of aperitivo, we craft an atmosphere of refined sophistication—our repertoire drawing from the timeless allure of Motown, Soul, Funk, R&B, and the effortless elegance of classic Jazz & Bossa Nova standards.

As evening descends, our live performance elevates the energy with an electrifying fusion of dance classics and today’s most coveted hits, ensuring every guest is irresistibly drawn to the dance floor. We are honoured to be among the most sought-after wedding bands in Tuscany.

Inquire About Tuscany Funk
tuscany-funk-band-arezzo-italy.description_html:
For your ceremony, we offer an array of refined configurations—from an intimate solo performer to a full quartet—each arrangement bespoke to your vision.

Our marching band provides an original and effervescent escort, guiding esteemed guests from the buffet to the dinner table with spirited flair.

We also present a seamless DJ set, ensuring the celebration continues with an impeccably mixed soundtrack.

Our ensemble comprises nine virtuoso musicians—male and female vocals, guitars, keyboards, saxophones, trumpet, trombone, bass, and drums—united by a shared passion, creating an electric atmosphere that leaves every guest enchanted and dancing.

prestige-jazz-bologna-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Prestige Jazz – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Bologna & Florence, Italy

Prestige Jazz Band is a supremely refined swing and jazz ensemble, gracing weddings, private celebrations, and exclusive events with timeless elegance and an unmistakable Italian allure. Based between the cultural capitals of Florence and Bologna, this curated collective offers an impeccable musical experience.

Discover more exceptional jazz bands in Italy

Inspired by the golden-hour ambience of a classic Italian aperitivo, the band crafts a sophisticated musical backdrop that is both stylish and effortlessly captivating.

Enquire about Prestige Jazz
prestige-jazz-bologna-florence-italy.description_html:
Each performance marries virtuosic live musicianship with meticulously engineered musical stems, yielding a sound of exceptional richness and polish. This bespoke fusion captures the warmth of traditional jazz and swing while delivering a modern clarity and depth that feels both authentic and contemporary, drawing guests into a relaxed yet vibrantly elegant atmosphere.

A defining signature of Prestige Jazz Band is their striking visual identity. The musicians perform in exclusive stage costumes—designed and produced in-house—adding an extra layer of refinement and character to every appearance. For clients seeking something truly bespoke, the ensemble can also craft tailored solutions that perfectly harmonise with the style, theme, and mood of each event.

Prestige Jazz Band typically performs for up to ninety minutes, divided into exquisite thirty-minute sets, with flexible scheduling to complement the flow of your celebration. They arrive several hours in advance to ensure a seamless setup and soundcheck, and can provide professional sound equipment when required. A curated playlist service can be arranged between live sets, maintaining an uninterrupted musical atmosphere throughout the occasion.

Comfortable performing in both indoor and outdoor settings, fully insured, and equipped with professional-grade gear, Prestige Jazz Band delivers a polished, unforgettable musical experience. Their seamless blend of classic swing, refined presentation, and Italian style makes them an impeccable choice for events that demand true sophistication and personality.

Line-up Options:

  • Duo with double-bass and singer (mixed duo or female duo)
  • Jazz quartet with singer, pianist, double-bassist and drummer
  • Jazz quintet with two singers, pianist, double-bassist and drummer
  • Jazz 6‑piece band with two singers, pianist, double-bassist, drummer and guitarist
  • Jazz 6‑piece band with one singer, violinist, pianist, double-bassist, drummer and guitarist
  • Jazz 7‑piece band with two singers, pianist, violinist, double-bassist, drummer and guitarist
  • A custom-made experience with a full jazz orchestra can also be arranged
  • DJ available

swing-band-milan-french.intro_html:
An Exquisite Ensemble: French Swing Band – Refined Swing & Jazz from Milan, Italy

Founded in 2013, this impeccably curated Riviera‑inspired swing band specialises in transporting discerning audiences back in time with their exquisite musical arrangements.

French Swing Band’s performances evoke a journey along the Promenade des Anglais in Nice, the Croisette Boulevard in Cannes, and the charming Valbonne Square—each note a curated passage through the French Riviera’s golden era.

Their artistic research embraces both refined style and impeccable sound: the ensemble performs exclusively with acoustic instruments, harmoniously paired with enchanting female vocals that embody timeless elegance.

Their bespoke tracklist features classic French café‑chantant, international standards, and fresh interpretations of traditional pieces—each selection meticulously chosen for a truly sophisticated experience.

Enquire About French Swing Band
swing-band-milan-french.description_html:
The band possesses years of combined industry experience, and their refined expertise ensures they are the superlative choice for any occasion—from intimate soirées to grand celebrations.

Delighting in travel, the group performs regularly across Italy and Europe, tailoring each performance with impeccable attention to detail to meet every bespoke requirement.

Their professionalism, skill, and talent render them the ideal ensemble for connoisseurs of swing music seeking an unforgettable, luxurious auditory experience.

For those desiring one of Italy’s most distinguished swing bands, look no further than French Swing Band. Reach out today to secure an exclusive performance.

swing-band-milan-french.faq_html:
<details><summary>Can I ask for tracks not included in the repertoire?</summary>Yes, we can learn new songs but this works best if the requests are still in a swing / Riviera style. 



</details><details><summary>What is your experience?</summary>We have worked together since 2013 in Europe and Italy. We have performed at events in Montecarlo, Nice, Cape D'antibes, Milan, Brescia, Riva Del Garda, Portofino, Como, Cremona, Mantua to name a few. 



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Are you happy to travel for an event?</summary>Yes, we are very happy to travel.



</details><details><summary>Is there a surcharge for travel?</summary>Yes, it depends on the distance. In general, we ask for travel expenses when we have to travel over 100km for the event. 



</details><details><summary>Do you work for more than one wedding per day?</summary> Yes 



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>Between 2 and 3 hours of live music. But we guarantee widespread music for the entire duration of the event, even with customized playlists and DJ service.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to prepare for the performance?</summary>45 minutes approx. 



</details><details><summary>Do you perform outdoor performances?</summary>Yes. 



</details><details><summary>What other types of services do you offer?</summary>DJ for after dinner, music during the ceremony that can accompany other elements, such as organ, harp, string quartet, violin, flute, sax. 



</details><details><summary>You charge per hour or per event?</summary>We charge per event. 



</details><details><summary>If necessary, would you be willing to work extra hours?</summary>Yes, at a cost.</details>

milan-party-band-italy.intro_html:
About The Milan Party Band – an exquisite professional cover band, based in the heart of Milan, Italy

Conceived in 2013 from the refined vision of vocalist Giulio and guitarist Enrico, the ensemble was born to elevate the art of live performance.

We curate an impeccable musical experience exclusively for weddings and distinguished celebrations throughout Northern Italy.

Discover our 2025 SET LIST — a bespoke collection of timeless and contemporary masterpieces.

Masters at enthralling audiences of any stature, we assure an evening where every guest is drawn to the dance floor and remains, captivated, until the final note.

Contact The Milan Party Band 💬
milan-party-band-italy.description_html:
The ensemble is composed of drums, bass, guitar, keyboard, and lead vocal, complemented by acoustic guitar and a refined small percussion set.

View our curated selection of Italy's most distinguished wedding bands ➡️

Sophisticated and meticulously refined arrangements, elevated by the exquisite vocal harmonies of the band’s members, define the distinctive allure of The Milan Party Band.

We embrace the so-called "American" approach to performance — eschewing rigid song structures in favour of spontaneity, allowing the energy of the moment and the interplay with our audience to shape each rendition and, in turn, the very flow of the event itself.

This philosophy fosters a luminous exchange of energy between the band and the gathering, one that organically becomes an integral part of the performance.

The repertoire of The Milan Party Band is vast, yet seamlessly adaptable to the bespoke requirements of any occasion.

Our curated genres span pop, rock, R&B, blues, soul, disco, and revival — each delivered with unparalleled finesse.

The Duo

This exceptionally talented acoustic duo, an intimate facet of The Milan Party Band, first converged during a 2011 jam session at Barrio’s Café in Milan, where a shared devotion to quality music was instantly discovered.

With seamless harmonies and the warm, resonant blend of two guitars, their repertoire traverses timeless classics from icons such as The Beatles, Cat Stevens, and Bob Marley, to modern masterpieces from Bruno Mars, Avicii, and Justin Timberlake.

Adaptable and supremely engaging, they compose the perfect soundtrack for life’s most cherished moments — weddings, receptions, private soirées, and corporate gatherings alike.

The duo may be exquisitely expanded into a trio with the addition of a stunning female vocalist, enriching the performance with further layers of harmony and depth. Equipped with their own audio and lighting, they tailor the ambiance to each venue, ensuring an immersive and bespoke live experience.

The duo also collaborates with distinguished professional DJs and nationwide audio-visual providers, adding a touch of unparalleled distinction to every performance and rendering each event truly unforgettable.

milan-party-band-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Consulenza sulla parte artistica Impianto audio professionale Formazione componibile dal duo acustico alla band completa, voce maschile e/o femminile Cura del sottofondo Mp3 Repertorio personalizzato.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Anche last minute se siamo lberi, molto meglio con preavviso.



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Piccola (2-3 musicisti), media (4-6 musicisti), grande (più di 6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>The Beatles, M. Jackson, Alicia Keys, Ben Harper, Bryan Adams, Lucio Battisti, Bruno Mars, Cat Stevens, Foo Fighters, M. Bublè, Ed Sheeran, Justin Timberlake, John Mayer... Repertorio adattabile.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>Assolutamente no, la scaletta del ricevimento viene decisa insieme parlando con voi sposi. Quello che non si può suonare dal vivo lo si può cantare su base o mandare in originale.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>Molti matrimoni ed un sacco di date dal vivo, alle quali vi invito e in cui potremmo conoscerci: faccio questo lavoro da oltre 10 anni, mosso da pura passione per la musica.



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque! Italia, Europa, Mondo!



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, le spese di viaggio.



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Dipende, a seconda del servizio richiesto, ma di certo abbiamo batterie Duracell che ci fanno "durare di più"!



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Circa un'ora, ma mi piace fare le cose con calma quindi arrivo sempre per tempo. Se invece il senso è capire quanto tempo occorra per studiare i pezzi a richiesta, 20 giorni bastano.



</details><details><summary>Realizzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

dj-capa-rome-italy.intro_html:
DJ Capa – An Exquisite Presence for Weddings & Celebrations, Based in Rome, Italy

DJ Capa is a luminary in the world of refined entertainment—an international DJ and producer whose illustrious career has graced the most exclusive private soirees to the world’s most prestigious stages. Selected as the official UEFA DJ for EURO 2020 and the distinguished DJ for the Ryder Cup 2023, he imbues every performance with an impeccable blend of energy, style, and musical mastery. His refined sound has captivated discerning audiences across the international club scene, with performances at iconic destinations including ADE Amsterdam, WMC during Miami Music Week, New York, Ibiza, London, Düsseldorf, Istanbul, Liverpool, Paris, Kristiansand, Nice, Monaco, Ljubljana, St. Moritz, and Rhodes.

Contact DJ Capa
dj-capa-rome-italy.description_html:
DJ Capa’s unparalleled artistry has been curated for an extraordinary roster of global events, luxury brands, and corporate clientele, including:

  • Ryder Cup 2023
  • FIFA EURO 2020
  • Bulgari
  • Endemol
  • Meta
  • Porsche

For weddings, private celebrations, and exclusive gatherings, DJ Capa delivers a polished and exquisitely flexible entertainment experience—curating the perfect sonic atmosphere from refined background melodies to an electrifying dancefloor. His bespoke line-up options encompass an array of configurations: DJ alone, DJ & Saxophone, DJ & Violin, DJ & Singer, DJ, Sax & Violin, DJ, Sax & Singer, and more—each meticulously tailored to the unique ambiance and stylistic vision of the client.

DJ Capa provides his own professional sound and lighting apparatus, featuring options that include up to three audio stations, disco lighting, moving heads, LED PARs, LED bars, smart bats, smoke machines, and lasers. He seamlessly integrates DJ sets between and after live performances, accommodates special song requests—such as a first dance—and performs effortlessly in outdoor settings or unconventional venues, including barns and beaches.

Performance durations and formats are bespoke, agreed directly with each client to ensure every celebration feels personal, seamless, and utterly unforgettable. DJ Capa typically arrives approximately two hours prior to the event, allowing one hour for meticulous setup and soundcheck.

Impeccably professional, effortlessly stylish, and brimming with dynamic energy, DJ Capa is the quintessential choice for couples and clients seeking a premium DJ experience with an international edge.

His refined career is defined by extraordinary performances delivered within the most prestigious hotels and private villas of Positano, Ravello, Amalfi, and Sorrento — each engagement a meticulously curated affair.

Beyond the intimacy of private celebrations, he has captivated the distinguished nightlife scenes of the Amalfi Coast, Sorrento, Napoli, and Salerno, showcasing a sophisticated mastery of genre that commands every audience.

For those who seek a seasoned artisan to shape the perfect sonic landscape for their occasion, Amalfi Coast DJ is poised to transform your event into an unforgettable symphony of elegance.

We invite you to reach out and entrust your celebration to the unparalleled artistry of Amalfi Coast DJ.

vivo-collective-milan-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Set lengths are fully adaptable depending on the nature of the event. As a general reference, I often perform:

- 2 x 60-minute live music sets, or

- 3 x 40-minute sets for more dynamic formats.

- For weddings, I frequently alternate between live sets and DJ sessions throughout the day or evening.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Absolutely — I offer a wide range of line-up combinations to suit the mood and style of each event. Options include:

- Solo vocal + DJ set (my signature format)

- Duo (vocals + sax or piano)

- Live band (3 to 5 musicians, including sax, guitar, piano, percussion)

- Custom ensembles for ceremonies, such as violin + piano, or harp + voice

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, I can provide full sound and lighting upon request. In some cases, it’s included in the price 

- Depending on the scope of the event and the venue’s setup. I always coordinate directly with planners or couples to ensure everything is tailored and smooth.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, I always offer a curated DJ set or background playlist between and after live performances. This keeps the flow seamless and the atmosphere continuous.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- I typically arrive at the venue at least 3 hours before the event starts — to ensure soundcheck, setup, and coordination with the team on-site.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Depending on the setup, I usually need between 1 and 2 hours for full setup and soundcheck.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Absolutely! I love learning special songs, especially first dances or meaningful tracks, as long as I receive the request with enough notice to prepare it properly.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- The space I require varies based on the lineup:

- From 2 meters for a solo setup

- Up to 10 meters for a full band or show-style performance

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes, I have full Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment, available on request for venues that require certification.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, I’m comfortable and experienced performing in a wide variety of locations: from beaches and barns to castles, gardens, rooftops, boats, and more!</details>

The Groove Syndicate – An Exquisite Wedding & Jewish Party Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

Curated from the most refined corners of Florence’s underground music scene, The Groove Syndicate unites a select collective of virtuoso musicians. Their artistry fuses effortless energy with impeccable quality, offering a bespoke soundtrack for life’s most precious celebration—the wedding.

View FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest wedding bands in Tuscany

Founded in 2021 through the convergence of young, distinguished professionals, the ensemble has cultivated a repertoire that welcomes guests with a sparkling instrumental jazz sound. As the evening unfolds, the performance evolves into an exhilarating journey through international pop and rock—a refined narrative spanning the 1970s to the present day.

Inquire About The Groove Syndicate 💬
groove-syndicate-jewish-florence-italy.description_html:
The band performs impeccably in English, Italian, Spanish, Hebrew, and French, alongside an exclusive selection of tunes in Russian.

Discover the complete collection of bespoke wedding bands in Italy

For Jewish celebrations, the ensemble offers a curated setlist of traditional chants, dances, and Israeli pop—elevating every moment of the wedding with expressive sophistication. Their extensive medley of traditional Jewish dances includes Hora, Ava Nagila, Mazal Tov, Kol Sason Ve Kol Simcha.

The Jewish wedding line-up is a refined six-piece configuration, featuring guitar/lead vocals, keyboards, saxophone, bass, drums, and violin.

Years of distinguished performances across Tuscany, Rome—home to Italy’s most exquisite villas—and exclusive destination weddings in Cyprus have forged a seamless cohesion and sound. This harmonious synergy gifts the bride and groom with a band devoted to positive achievement, conscious artistry, and effortless amusement.

An openness to the audience, a masterful blend of genres, and the option to conclude the evening with a DJ set accompanied by live saxophone define the signature formula of The Groove Syndicate’s refined show.

Bespoke Line-Up Options:

  • 4 to 7 piece Band (lead singer, guitarist/singer, female lead singer, keyboard, saxophone, drums, bass)

milan-duo-italy.intro_html:
About The Milan Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo Based in Milan, Italy

The Milan Duo embodies refined energy, impeccable chemistry, and a musical presence that feels exquisitely personal. Their journey began with a serendipitous encounter on stage at a Milanese jam session—an instant connection that blossomed into a bespoke collaboration, captivating audiences across the most distinguished venues and events throughout Lombardy and Emilia Romagna.

At the heart of this curated ensemble lie two guitars and two voices, weaving intimate, stripped-back arrangements suffused with warmth and character. Their repertoire moves with seamless elegance from timeless classics—The Beatles, Cat Stevens—to iconic acts such as Oasis, The Verve, and Bob Marley, alongside a refined selection of Italian favourites, rendering them an impeccable choice for weddings and international celebrations.

Contact The Milan Duo
milan-duo-italy.description_html:
Their style is relaxed yet supremely engaging—perfect for everything from sophisticated ceremonies and champagne receptions to spirited evening interludes. A signature offering is the roaming duo experience, gliding among guests and tables to create an immersive, intimately up-close atmosphere that guests cherish.

For those seeking a grander soundscape, The Milan Duo can expand into a full band, incorporating additional musicians—drums, bass, keys, and female vocals—or seamlessly blend live performance with a bespoke DJ set to carry the celebration into the night. Their live sets typically span two and a half hours, with the option to cover up to eight hours of music, including curated background playlists and DJ service.

Entirely self-contained, they bring their own professional sound and lighting infrastructure, arriving well in advance to ensure every detail unfolds with impeccable precision and absolute serenity. Adaptable and effortlessly collaborative, they are equally at home in elegant indoor venues as in al fresco celebrations.

Fun, flexible, and genuinely captivating, The Milan Duo curates a feel-good soundtrack for every occasion—creating moments that feel naturally luminous, deeply memorable, and brimming with life.

seraphic-swing-lucca-italy.intro_html:
About Seraphic Swing – an exquisite Jazz & Swing ensemble, based in Lucca, Italy

Presenting Seraphic Swing: a refined Jazz and Swing ensemble that imparts timeless elegance, impeccable rhythm, and an effervescent spirit to weddings and events throughout Lucca and its surrounds.

Seamlessly blending sophisticated Jazz standards with an international Pop repertoire, Seraphic Swing reinterprets beloved classics through a bespoke, Swing-infused lens.

From iconic Italian melodies to contemporary English-language favourites, every performance is meticulously curated with warmth, character, and an irresistible, polished groove.

Formed in 2019 after nearly a decade of performing together, the virtuosos behind Seraphic Swing share a profound musical affinity—forged through years of live artistry, studio collaborations, and an unwavering passion for enchanting audiences.

Contact Seraphic Swing

With pedigrees spanning Jazz, Blues, Rock, Fusion, and Pop, the group offers both extraordinary versatility and refined musicianship for every occasion.

The most coveted formation is the classic Trio—featuring voice, jazz guitar, and double bass—delivering an intimate yet vibrant atmosphere, perfect for aperitivos, dinners, and elegant soirées.

For grander affairs, Seraphic Swing presents Duo, Quartet, and Quintet configurations, layering additional rhythm and flair onto the dance floor as required.

Renowned for their flexible, immaculate approach, the ensemble performs seamlessly in distinctive settings—villas, beaches, barns, and al fresco venues—always adapting with exquisite grace to the spirit of the event.

They provide their own professional sound equipment, vintage-inspired stage touches, and curated playlists between live sets, ensuring a flawless ambiance throughout the celebration.

With over fifteen years of live music experience and a shared devotion to Swing culture and performance, Seraphic Swing crafts unforgettable moments imbued with class, romance, and joyful energy.

The perfect soundtrack for weddings, private parties, and sophisticated celebrations.

Bespoke Line-Up Options:

  • Duo / voice – guitar
  • Trio / voice – guitar – double bass
  • Quartet / voice – guitar – double bass/electric bass – drums
  • Quintet / voice – guitar – double bass/electric bass – piano – drums
  • Duo (instrumental) / guitar – double bass
  • Trio (instrumental) / guitar – double bass – drums

revival-jazz-band-florence-italy.intro_html:
About Revival – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Wedding Ensemble, Curated in Florence, Italy

Revival emerges from the refined convergence of five impeccable talents: Vocals, Piano, Saxophone, Double Bass/Electric Bass, and Drums. Based in the heart of Florence, Italy, this bespoke ensemble is poised to elevate any occasion across Europe and beyond with an aura of sophisticated exclusivity.

Their curated soundscape weaves together jazz, swing, pop, and soul—a seamless tapestry of melodies that transforms every event into an unforgettable luxury experience.

Over the years, Revival has graced some of Italy’s most prestigious venues, including The Four Seasons Hotel in Florence and Hotel Danieli in Venice. Their artistry has also transcended borders, enchanting international audiences at iconic destinations such as Le Bar Américain in Monte Carlo, the Sporting Club in Monte Carlo, Hotel Belles Rives in Antibes, France, and Hotel Hermitage & Casino in Monte Carlo.

Contact Revival 💬
revival-jazz-band-florence-italy.description_html:
Their vast and meticulously updated repertoire encompasses timeless ballads, classic jazz standards, and elegantly swinging numbers—perfectly suited for refined lounge entertainment. For evenings that call for heightened energy, Revival seamlessly transitions into a spirited celebration of 70s, 80s, and contemporary pop hits, all while preserving the impeccable elegance that defines their identity.

The repertoire is artfully curated for each phase of the event: jazz, swing, and international classics with a touch of Italian charm during the aperitif, followed by an exuberant post-dinner dance set designed to captivate and delight.

Duration of Performances (customised upon request):

  • 90 minutes during the aperitif
  • 120 minutes for the dance party after dinner

Logistics & Equipment:

Upon request, we provide a bespoke sound system and lighting suitable for medium to small venues, adaptable for both indoor and outdoor settings. For larger-scale requirements, a more extensive sound system, lighting configuration, and stage setup can be arranged for an additional fee, ensuring every detail meets the highest standards of luxury.

wildcards-wedding-band-bologna-italy.intro_html:
The Wildcards — An exquisite wedding & celebration ensemble, based in Bologna, Italy

Since 2002, The Wildcards have performed at more than 600 weddings throughout Italy, establishing themselves as one of the most distinguished bands in the realm of nuptial entertainment. Their repertoire and setlists have been meticulously curated for destination weddings across Italy, allowing discerning couples to benefit from decades of refined expertise. Through the transcendent power of music, this live show-band orchestrates the entire wedding day with impeccable care, attending to every nuance and gracefully managing any circumstance that arises.

Enquire with The Wildcards

The ensemble comprises five exceptional musicians: Andrea, the masterful bassist; Paolo and Chiara, whose vocals are simply sublime; Massimo, a guitarist of remarkable skill and presence; and Valerio, whose percussion is flawless, yet whose foremost responsibility has been the stewardship of this magnificent band since 2002. Paolo is also a superlative pianist and acoustic guitarist, while Valerio is a magnificent DJ.

Through the years, the band has amassed a wealth of glowing testimonials, and their videos offer an immersive glimpse into the unforgettable atmosphere they create. Their repertoire is extraordinarily vast, spanning beloved Italian classics, the electrifying rock 'n' roll of the 1960s, the defining hits of the 1970s and 1980s, and the anthems of the 1990s and 2000s. The acoustic aperitif set is especially coveted, offering a sophisticated way to savour the golden hour with every guest. Entertainment is an indispensable element of the experience, with Paolo and Chiara compelling every guest to sing and dance until the final moment.

The band also attends to the moments that render a wedding truly unforgettable — the couple’s slow dance, the bouquet toss, and every bespoke touch. Additional curated services, such as lighting, audio production, DJ sets, and vocalists, are available upon request.

What elevates The Wildcards to the pinnacle of choice? Their images and films reveal a tapestry of colour, joy, passion, laughter, tears, and exhilaration — every wedding tells its own unique narrative, and they await yours with anticipation. To fully realise every detail of a wedding celebration, one must trust true professionals who recognise the pivotal moments and collaborate seamlessly with venue staff, wedding planners, and photographers.

On your wedding day, they do not simply perform a show — they ensure that you and your guests remain the luminous focal point of the entire affair. Reach out to discover more.

wildcards-wedding-band-bologna-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Acoustic set 60min and Live Show 90min

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Our price includes equipment and stage lights. In case of special requests (strobe, sparkular, moving heads)

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, we are equipped to cover up to 3 stations with mp3 music and dj set after live set

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- Morning wedding (we arrive the day before) 
- Evening wedding (we arrive the same day of the event up to 3 hours travel time)

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 2-3 hours

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Of course. We are happy to be able to play songs that we don't know. If the songs are too difficult, we immediately inform the customer and use the mp3 (Latin, Opera, Prog and similar)

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Aperitif (small stage 3x4), Live Show (medium stage 4x5- 4x6)

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)</summary>- Yes, we only require a small platform/stage/floor so as not to damage the equipment.</details>

internal-voices-jazz-naples-italy.intro_html:
Internal Voices – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Naples, Italy

Internal Voices stands as one of Naples’ most cherished local ensembles, a paragon of refined artistry. Our guiding philosophy, “One band, two sounds,” speaks to a bespoke duality that distinguishes us. Born and celebrated in its acoustic incarnation, the project has since evolved to embrace an electronic dimension, earning us the distinction of being the only band to seamlessly transform both its sound and aesthetic within a single event.

Contact Internal Voices

The repertoire of Internal Voices is a curated journey through world music, featuring over one hundred impeccably selected songs. From jazz and pop to bossa nova, Neapolitan classics, reimagined house, and Italian pieces from the 1960s—each piece is a testament to our dedication to exclusivity and quality. We continually enrich this collection with new additions, ensuring each performance feels distinct.

Our ensemble has graced the most prestigious national and international clubs and events, delivering an experience of unparalleled sophistication. Performances are tailored to the occasion: three refined forty-minute sets or a single ninety-minute set, with an unmanned background playlist woven seamlessly between live interludes.

All sound and lighting equipment is included in the price, alongside travel expenses as agreed during quotation. With a setup requiring just sixty minutes and a space of approximately nine square meters, we ensure effortless elegance. We arrive at the venue around three hours prior to our start time, allowing ample preparation for an impeccable presentation—whether indoors or outdoors, as the event demands.

Line-up Options:

  • Trio – Voice, Guitar & Double Bass
  • Quartet – Voice, Guitar, Double Bass & Saxophone/Trumpet
  • Quartet – Voice, Guitar, Double Bass & Saxophone, Trumpet/Trombone
  • DJ Set & Saxophone

Presenting DJ Capri Grooves: an impeccable maestro of melody, whose refined artistry bridges eras and cultures, enchanting discerning audiences with his bespoke sonic narratives.

With a sun-drenched spirit born on the picturesque isle of Capri, Italy during the summer months, and radiating warmth across the shores of Phuket, Thailand in winter, DJ Capri Grooves is a globe-trotting purveyor of unparalleled musical sophistication.

His impressive résumé, curated over years of performing on the world’s most prestigious stages, reflects a craft honed to perfection—a testament to his unwavering dedication to quality and exclusivity.

With an innate ability to read the room and tailor his sets to the moment, he crafts seamless transitions that transport guests through decades of musical excellence—an experience of flawless, bespoke elegance.

Whether igniting the dance floor with infectious energy, weaving soul-stirring melodies into cherished moments, or providing the refined backdrop for an elegant soirée, DJ Capri Grooves sets the tone for memories of impeccable luxury.

Jazzin Rome embodies the quintessence of Italian romance and timeless elegance, enveloping every occasion in the spirit of la dolce vita. A refined fusion of Italian and Chilean musical heritages, the ensemble performs an exquisitely curated repertoire—from smooth bossa nova and Latin jazz to classic swing, boleros, and soulful pop. jazzin-rome-italy.description_html: The band’s foundation is an exquisite jazz trio of guitar, double bass, and voice, which may be elevated to a 4, 5, or 6-piece ensemble with the addition of trumpet, saxophone, and drums for a fuller, more opulent sound. They present 45-minute sets of impeccable musicality and supply their own state-of-the-art sound equipment, arriving an hour prior for a meticulous setup and soundcheck—a process that typically requires around 45 minutes. Jazzin Rome graciously accommodates bespoke song requests with advance notice and curates a refined laptop playlist between sets when desired. Their footprint is a mere 3×3 meters, and they are equally at home in opulent ballrooms, rustic barns, or seaside terraces. With their versatile artistry and impeccably polished performance, Jazzin Rome ensures that every occasion feels nothing short of unforgettable.

tuscan-strollers-brass-roaming-italy.intro_html:
About The Tuscan Strollers – An Exquisite Roaming Brass Ensemble, based in Tuscany, Italy

The Tuscan Strollers present an impeccably curated musical experience, conjuring the effervescent spirit of Italy’s golden “Dolce Vita” era for the most discerning weddings, private soirees, and exclusive celebrations.

Discover more refined roaming bands in Italy

Comprising a hand-selected lineup of virtuoso musicians and a bespoke collection of rare, unusual instruments, the ensemble delivers an acoustic experience that is both vibrantly alive and authentically Italian.

Inquire about The Tuscan Strollers
tuscan-strollers-brass-roaming-italy.description_html:
Their refined style draws deeply from the sophisticated soundscapes of the 1950s and 1960s, masterfully weaving swing, jazz, and classic Italian melodies into a sonic tapestry that is both warm and utterly captivating.

Through an artful, distinctive approach, beloved treasures from the Italian songbook are reimagined with sophisticated arrangements. Their signature roaming, kinetic energy provides an impeccable acoustic backdrop for the most stylish of gatherings.

The ensemble’s versatile configuration—ranging from five to eight musicians—allows it to be seamlessly tailored to the unique dimensions and ambiance of any venue.

Performing entirely acoustically, The Tuscan Strollers glide effortlessly through historic villas, secret gardens, and panoramic terraces. This intimate mobility allows them to engage naturally with guests, cultivating an atmosphere of relaxed, effortless elegance without the intrusion of amplification.

Their captivating live sets are typically curated to last between 70 and 75 minutes, with the flexibility to extend to an indulgent 90 minutes should the occasion demand it.

Equally at home in grand indoor salons or beneath the open sky, the group gracefully adapts to almost any environment, ensuring a flawless performance irrespective of the setting.

Dedicated to personalization, they are delighted to master special song requests, ensuring each celebration is a uniquely bespoke reflection of the client’s narrative.

With their elegant stage presence, impeccably authentic repertoire, and engaging artistry, The Tuscan Strollers offer an unforgettable journey into the romance and charm of Italy’s most iconic musical epoch.

blue-zone-wedding-perugia-italy.intro_html:
Blue Zone – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Perugia, Italy

For discerning couples celebrating their nuptials in Italy, Blue Zone presents an impeccably curated musical experience, designed exclusively for life’s most precious occasion. The ensemble’s core formation is a refined four-piece line-up, fronted by a captivating lead vocalist and supported by a resonant bassist, a soulful guitarist, and a masterful drummer whose precision underpins every performance. Renowned for conjuring unforgettable moments, we transform each wedding and celebration into a bespoke sensory journey.

Inquire About Blue Zone

Our repertoire is a meticulously selected tapestry of international pop, rock, soul, and dance classics, crafted to enchant every guest with effortless sophistication. We employ a state-of-the-art sound system, delivering crystal-clear audio that adapts flawlessly to venues of every scale—from intimate courtyard gatherings to opulent grand halls. Our lighting设计方案 is equally bespoke, offering everything from subtle, elegant illumination to spectacular lightscapes that transform the dance floor into a vibrant, exclusive party atmosphere. When the live performance concludes, a seamless transition to a professional DJ set ensures the evening’s energy remains effervescent, carrying the celebration into the night. Beyond the main event, we offer comprehensive wedding packages that span your entire day: refined ambient music for the ceremony, acoustic elegance for the aperitif, and a high-energy show for the evening festivities. Every detail is tailored in close collaboration with you, creating a musical narrative that reflects your unique vision. Our mission is to deliver an impeccable, effortless experience that delights both you and your guests, leaving lasting impressions of joy and love. Our dedication to excellence ensures your wedding is as enchanting as the magnificent Italian setting you have chosen. We also take pride in honouring our Italian heritage, offering the option to weave the most beloved Italian classics into your bespoke playlist. Additionally, we collaborate with and can be booked alongside Beats & Cello for an even more refined acoustic dimension.

  • Guitar & Singer Duo
  • DJ Service
  • Cello and/or Violin for Ceremony

<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Around 8-10 minutes a set, usually 2 sets.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, we can do one, two or three tenors and also adding a female singer for some duets

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- We can do that, although usually at these kinds of events there is already a service on site and we rely on him. We bring our own tracks.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We usually arrive before the guests enter the venue, calculating the technical time to prepare the instrumentation and do the soundcheck

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- If there is already a service on site, 10 minutes is more than enough. If we have to bring the speakers ourselves you have to calculate 45 minutes/1 hour

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes</details>

The Energy – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Florence, Italy

Founded in the heart of Florence in 2009, The Energy emerges as a truly refined wedding band—a bespoke musical experience meticulously curated for the most discerning clientele. Through exceptional talent and impeccable professionalism, they have ascended to become one of the most sought-after ensembles in all of Tuscany, gracing hundreds of exclusive concerts and private celebrations, from storied weddings to distinguished corporate galas.

Enquire About The Energy
wedding-band-florence-the-energy.description_html:
In every performance, The Energy glides seamlessly across a vast, ever-evolving repertoire—an elegantly curated selection that effortlessly fulfills any musical request. Whether orchestrating a sophisticated jazz aperitivo or commanding an exuberant dance floor, the band delivers impeccable renditions of cherished songs, shining brightly in every musical context. With a spirit of refined adventure, they travel throughout Italy, collaborating with the nation’s most esteemed agencies, wedding planners, and event venues. For those in pursuit of Tuscany’s most exclusive wedding and party band, look no further than The Energy—an invitation to elevate your celebration into an unforgettable, luxurious affair.

silk-soul-duo-florence-italy.intro_html: Silk & Soul – an impeccably refined soul & jazz duo, curated in the heart of Florence, Italy
silk-soul-duo-florence-italy.description_html:
Silk & Soul is where exquisite elegance meets effortless groove. Born within Florence’s most distinguished soul and jazz milieu, this bespoke ensemble marries refined musicianship with a warm, commanding stage presence—delivering live music that feels both deeply sophisticated and vibrantly alive.

Discover the finest jazz bands in Italy

Originally conceived as an intimate piano-and-vocal duo, Silk & Soul has evolved into a flexible collective, capable of expanding seamlessly into a trio or a full band when the occasion demands a grander scale. Whether gracing a romantic wedding ceremony, an elegant cocktail hour, or a spirited evening celebration, every performance is shaped by the event’s unique atmosphere and the discerning guests in attendance.

Enquire about Silk & Soul

Their sound glides effortlessly through soul and jazz standards, international pop, Italian classics, bossa nova, and tasteful pop rock—each selection curated with impeccable taste. The unifying thread remains constant: emotion, quality, and connection. They do not simply play songs; they cultivate a mood—sophisticated when required, playful as the energy rises, always engaging yet never overwhelming the moment.

Formations range from an exclusive piano solo to an intimate vocal-and-piano duo, a trio enhanced by saxophone, and a full band featuring piano, voice, sax, drums, and upright bass. Performances can extend up to three hours, with bespoke special requests—such as a first dance—happily accommodated. An additional DJ service is available upon request, ensuring the music flows seamlessly beyond the live sets.

Silk & Soul provides professional sound and lighting, guaranteeing a polished, immersive experience from the first note to the last. Setup time varies by formation, and the ensemble performs with equal poise indoors and outdoors. Effortlessly placed in smaller spaces for duo and trio formats, yet adaptable to larger configurations, they bring style, soul, and the precise measure of sparkle to every exclusive event.

string-quartet-turin-bella.intro_html:
Bella Quartet – An Exquisite String Quartet from Turin, Italy

Bella Quartet is a refined ensemble of virtuoso musicians, offering an impeccable musical experience curated exclusively for the most discerning celebrations. Their artistry is defined by a bespoke versatility, drawing from a vast and meticulously assembled repertoire that spans every genre and era.

The quartet takes pride in presenting a classical, time-honoured selection alongside an expansive array of contemporary masterpieces—from the elegance of Baroque to the edge of modern compositions, from iconic film scores to the energy of Pop and Rock, as well as the soulful rhythms of Argentine tango and the sophistication of jazz standards.

Contact Bella Quartet
string-quartet-turin-bella.description_html:
Bella Quartet is delighted to travel and perform extensively throughout Italy, lending their refined harmonies to weddings, private soirées, and exclusive corporate events.

Discover our selection of Italy’s finest string quartets for hire ➡️

Since their formation, Bella Quartet has graced prestigious venues across Italy and abroad, including the majestic Reggia of Venaria, the historic Pisani Moretta Palace in Venice, the Royal Palace in Monza, the iconic Mole Antonelliana in Turin, the Palazzina di caccia in Stupinigi, the Triennale di Milano, Villa del Balbianello, Villa Rusconi-Clerici, and many other illustrious settings.

If you seek to engage one of Italy’s most exquisite string quartets, look no further than Bella Quartet. Enquire today to secure an unforgettable musical experience.

dainty-brood-latina-italy.intro_html:
Dainty Brood – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble, Based in Latina, Italy

With over a decade of impeccable experience within the music industry, this refined ensemble has graced private soirées, open-air concerts, and exclusive clubs. Born from a vision to deliver bespoke musical entertainment, Dainty Brood curates each performance to the unique desires of every couple. Their expansive repertoire, spanning from the 1960s to the present day, ensures a perfectly tailored soundtrack for your most refined celebration.

Inquire with Dainty Brood
dainty-brood-latina-italy.description_html:
Music is the soul of joy among cherished guests—and we wholeheartedly embrace this philosophy. That is why only the most professional artists should orchestrate the soundscape of your special day.

BESPOKE REPERTOIRE:
Our curated selection offers something for every discerning taste. Whether you desire timeless classics from the 1970s, 80s, and 90s, electrifying dance anthems, sophisticated funk grooves, or refined reggae vibes, we possess it all. The possibilities are boundless, and we guarantee your event will be nothing short of spectacular.

REFINED SERVICES:
Select the configuration that perfectly complements your vision: an intimate soloist, an elegant duo, or a full ensemble—from a trio or quartet to a quintet or an entire band. Whichever you choose, we are devoted to transforming your celebration into the most exquisite day of your life.

Our set times are typically structured as follows, though we delight in discussing a tailored package for your wedding:

  • Aperitif: 1 hour
  • Party: 2 hours
  • DJ Set: 1.5 hours

Every band option includes a premium sound system and lighting package, featuring RCF Evox J8 Black speakers, beam lights, strobe lights, and additional refinements. During our intervals, we provide curated background or party music via iPad or laptop, ensuring an uninterrupted ambiance.

Contact us today to begin planning your event, and grant yourself and your loved ones an unforgettable experience. Join the Dainty Brood—and let the music commence.

juliets-jam-verona-italy.intro_html:
Juliet’s Jam – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble, Based in Verona, Italy

Juliet’s Jam is a meticulously curated Italian pop‑rock trio, boasting more than a decade of impeccable live performances throughout Italy and beyond.

Founded in Verona and refined through national and international tours, record releases, and hundreds of bespoke events, this ensemble has earned its reputation as one of Italy’s most distinguished wedding bands for corporate galas and premier public occasions.

The trio comprises lead vocals, guitar, and keys, alongside bass and double bass, with backing vocals and a percussion‑driven drum setup. The result is a powerful yet refined sound that harmoniously adapts to intimate, elegant celebrations and expansive, grand stages alike.

Curated Line‑up Options:

  • Duo: guitar + vocals & bass/double bass
  • Trio + Drum
  • Additional members: Female Voice, Saxophone & Lead Guitar

Enquire About Juliet’s Jam

Their extensive repertoire spans international pop‑rock classics from Kings Of Leon, Foo Fighters, Oasis, and The Police, through reggae influences inspired by Bob Marley, to contemporary folk indie and alternative artists including Mumford and Sons, The Lumineers, James Bay, Nothing But Thieves, and YUNGBLUD.

The resulting performance is energetic and universally appealing, yet always retains a strong, authentic live identity.

Juliet’s Jam has released original music—the EP 4 in 2013 and the album Via in 2015—and has graced national television during the Sanremo Festival, as well as reaching the national final of a major Italian music contest at the Teatro Ariston.

Over the years, they have performed for prestigious international brands such as Coca‑Cola and Brunello Cucinelli, alongside a host of high‑profile corporate clients across Italy and Europe.

Every performance is conceived as a true live concert. No backing tracks—only genuine musicianship, tight interplay, and space for spontaneity and improvisation, ensuring each event is utterly unique.

Professional, experienced, and musically authentic, Juliet’s Jam delivers a vibrant concert experience, impeccably tailored to exclusive gatherings and large public audiences alike.

garda-wedding-pianist-italy.intro_html:
Garda Wedding Pianist — An Exquisite Presence for Weddings & Exclusive Events, Based on the Shores of Lake Garda, Italy

Garda Wedding Pianist is a refined and highly sought-after pianist, residing in San Felice del Benaco with an impeccable vantage overlooking the pristine waters of Lake Garda. Every performance is a bespoke musical experience, curated for discerning clientele.

Classically trained at the Conservatory and holding a distinguished degree in Classical Piano, this artist seamlessly marries formidable technical foundations with an innate passion for contemporary pop repertoire and cinematic scores. The result is a uniquely emotive and exquisitely layered musical signature.

With nearly two decades of professional mastery, Garda Wedding Pianist has graced the most prestigious five-star hotels and resorts in the region, along with luxury weddings and private celebrations throughout Lake Garda. Each engagement is executed with an unwavering commitment to excellence and discretion.

Enquire with Garda Wedding Pianist

Residencies include an impeccable roster of celebrated venues: Villa Cortine Palace, Isola del Garda, Villa Fiordaliso, La Casa degli Spiriti, Dogana Veneta, and countless others, alongside sacred ceremonies within the region’s most cherished churches.

The performance aesthetic is defined by two complementary identities. The emotional facet is an intimate, melodic palette of soft piano pieces, ambient textures, and evocative soundtracks—curated for wedding ceremonies and quiet, cherished moments.

The pop identity awakens during cocktail hours and receptions, offering a modern, rhythmically refined repertoire performed on piano with subtle, elegantly woven backing tracks.

This minimalist yet deeply emotive approach has captivated international couples, establishing Garda Wedding Pianist as the region’s most in-demand non-singing pianist—a testament to an artistry that is both impeccable and rare.

Every performance is delivered upon a grand piano, with exacting attention to sound quality, visual poise, and an aesthetic of understated luxury.

Each appearance is marked by discretion, flawless professionalism, and meticulous attention to every detail, ensuring a seamless and elevated auditory experience from the first note to the last.

Available configurations include solo piano, piano gracefully paired with violin or saxophone, and bespoke combinations with modern or operatic vocalists—each arrangement curated for ceremonies, cocktail hours, and receptions.

Organ performances are also offered for religious ceremonies upon request.

This exclusive service is available throughout Lake Garda, Lake Como, Brescia, Verona, Bergamo, Venice, and Tuscany.

<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Ceremony: 30 min to 1 hour // Cocktail hour: 2 hours

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes: Symbolic, civil, or religious wedding ceremonies: Solo piano Piano & violin duo Piano & modern or operatic singer duo Piano, violin & modern or operatic singer trio I primarily perform as a pianist, but I also have extensive experience on the organ, if you prefer it for a religious ceremony in a church.
- Cocktail hours / receptions: Solo piano with backing tracks Piano & saxophone duo Piano & modern singer duo Piano, saxophone & modern singer trio

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- I have my own sound system for small to medium-sized venues; otherwise, I can arrange to rent an audio service. I usually don’t have a lighting setup for the ceremony and aperitif, but I can arrange one if needed

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Usually, for the music services I offer, I play background music from a tablet before the ceremony and for a few minutes at the end of the aperitif.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 2 to 3 hours before the start of the event.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 1 hour

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Usually, the choice of songs is based on my repertoire, but it’s possible to request songs that are not in my repertoire for an additional fee.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- A 3×3 meter space is the minimum required to set up the baby grand piano.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- I have my own private public liability insurance, and my instruments and sound systems are CE-certified.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, certainly, I love performing in unique and unusual venues</details>

monopoli-sax-dj-bari-italy.intro_html:
Monopoli Sax & DJ – An exquisite fusion of saxophone and curated soundscapes, tailored for the most refined celebrations. Based in Bari, Italy.

Monopoli Sax & DJ embodies the zenith of Italian musical artistry—a virtuoso saxophonist and producer renowned for impeccable versatility and an electrifying stage presence.

His distinguished career, traversing a vast spectrum of genres, has established him as a luminary within the realm of exclusive private events and high-calibre live performances.

His collaborative legacy is nothing short of extraordinary, having performed and recorded with the legendary Zucchero Fornaciari and the globally revered tenor Andrea Bocelli. He further demonstrated his compositional brilliance by creating music for the prestigious Sanremo Festival alongside the sublime Filippa Giordano.

This international acclaim is solidified by multiple gold and platinum certifications earned in Japan, Australia, and England—a definitive hallmark of his global resonance and refined mastery.

Enquire About This Exclusive Artistry
monopoli-sax-dj-bari-italy.description_html:
Beyond private engagements, Monopoli Sax & DJ is a coveted presence on Italian national television, gracing esteemed broadcasts for Rai, Mediaset, and MTV. His innate charisma and commanding stage presence make him a perennial favourite among discerning event organisers and sophisticated audiences.

His paramount objective is the curation of fantastical, bespoke experiences for life’s most cherished milestones—including elegant weddings, grand birthday celebrations, and extravagant bachelor or bachelorette affairs. To achieve this, he meticulously orchestrates collaborations with a diverse array of artists, including masterful DJs, emotive vocalists, accomplished violinists, dynamic percussionists, and engaging dance entertainers.

His performances are frequently staged within the most exquisite masserie of Puglia, aboard opulent private yachts, or alongside shimmering pools, adding an indelible touch of elegance to any setting.

To guarantee an impeccably fluid execution, his dedicated team of expert audio and lighting technicians handle every technical detail, providing comprehensive support from the first note to the final bow.

Curated Line-Up Configurations:

An ensemble ranging from an intimate 2-piece formation to a grand 8-piece orchestra. The foundational line-up pairs the saxophone with a DJ, creating a dynamic core. This can be elevated with the addition of a percussionist, a captivating vocalist, an elegant violinist, or an animator to orchestrate group celebrations.

Aurea Sax DJ is a refined saxophonist and DJ, based in Italy, who curates an impeccably luxurious atmosphere for weddings and exclusive private events across Europe.

Blending the live allure of saxophone with expertly curated DJ sets, she crafts a sound that is both modern and sophisticated—vibrant, polished, and utterly unforgettable, transforming each moment into a bespoke experience.

Equipped with a premium wireless system, she glides effortlessly among guests, forging intimate connections and elevating the ambiance in real time with an elegant, immersive presence.

aurea-sax-dj-florence-italy.description_html:

Her repertoire spans international pop, soulful melodies, chillout lounge, nu-disco, modern house, and, upon request, classic Italian tunes—all delivered with a refined, elegant touch that speaks to discerning tastes.

Beyond live performances, she produces original music in collaboration with top Italian producers, adding an extra layer of artistry and exclusivity to every event.

Fully equipped and available for destination celebrations, Aurea Sax DJ offers a complete luxury experience, including a DJ setup, sound system, and microphones as required.

The result is a dynamic, immersive performance—vibrant, polished, and unforgettable from the first note to the final encore.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • Solo Sax (wireless roaming performance)
  • Sax + DJ set (live sax and DJing performed by the artist)
  • Sax with client’s DJ (live sax over the DJ’s set)

aurea-sax-dj-florence-italy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- My normal set lengths are flexible and can be adapted to the flow of the event. Typically, I perform in
sets of 45–60 minutes, with the option of multiple sets throughout the day (ceremony, aperitif, dinner,
party). For DJ + Sax performances, I can provide continuous music with live sax interventions as needed.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, I offer different line‑up options: • Solo Sax (wireless roaming performance) • Sax + DJ set (I
perform both live sax and DJing) • Sax with the client’s DJ (live sax over the DJ’s set) • Sax +
Percussion (available on request)

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, I can provide my own professional sound system, DJ equipment and wireless microphones when
required. For larger events or venues with their own setup, I am also happy to connect to the existing PA
system. Lighting can be arranged on request.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes, I can provide a laptop playlist and a full DJ service between and after my live sax sets. I can keep
the music going seamlessly throughout the event, with curated playlists or a complete DJ performance
depending on the client’s needs.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- I normally arrive 60–90 minutes before the performance to set up and sound‑check. For larger events or
when providing my full PA system, I may arrive earlier if needed.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- My setup and sound‑check usually take around 20–30 minutes. If I am providing my full PA system, it
may take slightly longer, depending on the venue.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes, I can learn special song requests, including first dances or key moments of the event. I’m happy to
prepare personalised arrangements to make the performance unique for the couple.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- I don’t require much space. A small area of around 1–2 square meters is usually enough for my
performance. If I am providing my full PA system or DJ setup, I may need a bit more room, depending on
the venue.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Public Liability Insurance is not required in Italy, but I always work with safe, professional equipment and
follow all standard safety practices. If a venue requires specific documentation for international events, I
can arrange it on request.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, I am very comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings such as beaches, gardens,
rooftops, villas or barns. My wireless setup allows me to move freely and adapt to different
environments, as long as there is safe access to power when needed.</details>

Golden Reed is a Milan-based saxophonist who brings a refined, modern aesthetic to weddings and private occasions throughout Italy and beyond. Renowned for his captivating live sets, Golden Reed has graced an array of exclusive venues, from luxury beach clubs and Lake Como’s most prestigious estates to international milestones such as a Formula 1 Grand Prix weekend. Every performance is a masterclass in atmosphere, transitioning effortlessly from serene daytime ambience to exuberant celebration.

Contact Golden Reed

His artistry shifts seamlessly between understated elegance and dynamic revelry, making him an exceptional choice for the most discerning celebrations. Whether performing solo, alongside a DJ, or complemented by additional live elements—such as a singer or violinist—Golden Reed tailors each set to the unique ambiance of the event.

dj-delo-rome-florence-italy.intro_html:
DJ Delo – An Exquisite Curator of Bespoke Wedding & Event Soundscapes, Based in Rome, Italy

With an impeccable international career spanning two decades, DJ Delo has graced the stages of Europe’s most iconic clubs and festivals, sharing the spotlight with esteemed house artists and crafting unforgettable dancefloor narratives.

Discover the full collection of refined wedding DJs in Italy

As a touring house DJ and acclaimed music producer, his releases have been embraced by prestigious labels and celebrated by global tastemakers.

Today, he brings that same artistry, energy, and precision to a new, more intimate stage: your wedding.

Explore FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest DJs in Italy

Since his debut in luxury holiday resorts in the late 1990s, DJ Delo has mastered the refined art of reading a room.

He is regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at Castello di Montignano in Perugia and Borgo di Pietrafitta Relais in Siena.

Inquire About DJ Delo 💬

Every beat, every transition, every song choice is meticulously curated to the moment—this is the essence of his unforgettable performances.

Yet weddings are not nightclubs; they are deeply personal narratives, emotional journeys, and celebrations of love.

Thus, DJ Delo seamlessly fuses his professional pedigree with the intimacy of a wedding atmosphere, crafting an experience that is both supremely stylish and exquisitely personal.

At the core of his philosophy lies a belief in creating moments that linger forever.

When the lights dim and the bass resonates, when you look around to see your loved ones dancing, smiling, and utterly alive—that is where the magic unfolds.

Your wedding is not merely an event. It is the most significant celebration of your life, and DJ Delo ensures its soundtrack is as impeccably refined as the occasion demands.

Let us conjure magic together: bring the sound of global nightlife to your most intimate, cherished celebration.

Bespoke Line-Up Options:

  • DJ only
  • DJ + Sax and/or Trumpeter
  • Percussionist
  • Electric Violin
  • Singer
  • MC and/or dancers and original performers

little-italy-band-modena-italy.intro_html:
About Little Italy – An Exquisite Jazz & Soul Ensemble, Based in Modena, Italy

Little Italy is a refined musical collective from Modena, Italy, offering an impeccable fusion of Italian allure and international sophistication for weddings and exclusive events throughout Europe. Their bespoke lineups—ranging from an intimate acoustic duo to a full-scale ensemble—are meticulously curated to elevate every moment, whether it be the serene grace of a ceremony, the effortless charm of an aperitivo, or the vibrant energy of a late-night celebration. Their repertoire traverses seamlessly from Italian and international pop to smooth jazz and soulful ballads, each note delivered with warmth and an unmistakable polish.

Contact Little Italy
little-italy-band-modena-italy.description_html:
Over the years, Little Italy has been entrusted to compose the complete soundtrack for countless destination weddings, ensuring each phase of the day flows with the perfect mood and energy. The ensemble typically arrives several hours prior to the event for a meticulous setup and soundcheck—a process that requires approximately one hour. They bring their own professional sound and lighting equipment of the highest calibre, and can sustain the atmosphere with a curated playlist or DJ service between live sets. Requests for cherished songs—such as a first dance—are always welcomed with grace, and the band performs with equal elegance indoors or outdoors, from palatial villas and rustic barns to breathtaking beachfront settings. The performance area adapts to the chosen lineup, yet the inherent flexibility of their configuration ensures a seamless fit within any venue. Fully insured and impeccably equipped, Little Italy marries unwavering professionalism with a deeply personal touch, crafting music that is stylish, heartfelt, and unforgettable.

About Torino Rhythms – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo, Based in Torino, Italy

Torino Rhythms is a refined acoustic duo, residing in the cultural heart of Torino and performing at the most distinguished venues across Italy and beyond. Comprising two impeccably talented singers and multi-instrumentalists, the ensemble brings a curated blend of romance and elegance to weddings, receptions, and exclusive celebrations. Renowned for their versatility and consummate professionalism, they craft an impeccable atmosphere with a repertoire that gracefully spans multiple genres and styles. Explore FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest wedding bands in Italy.

From delicate, soft melodies for intimate moments to spirited, luminous tunes that inspire joyous smiles, Torino Rhythms adapts seamlessly to the mood of your bespoke event. Contact Torino Rhythms
torino-rhythms-turin-italy.description_html: Whether your vision is a traditional celebration or a thematically designed wedding, their music is exquisitely tailored to render every occasion truly unforgettable. Their standard performance set is approximately one hour and thirty minutes, with the additional option of a curated laptop playlist or DJ service between and after their live sets. The duo arrives two hours before the first performance, requiring a mere twenty minutes for an effortless setup and soundcheck. They delight in learning special song requests—up to four personalised choices, such as a first dance—to infuse your day with even greater meaning. Requiring only three to four square metres of space for their refined setup, they provide their own sound and lighting equipment of the highest calibre. With extensive experience performing outdoors or in extraordinary locations—barns, beaches, gardens—and equipped with a battery-powered PA and mixer, they are able to bring their impeccable artistry to virtually any setting.

With over sixteen years of refined artistry behind the turntables, I have had the honour of orchestrating music across an impeccable spectrum of occasions—from exquisitely intimate gatherings to grand-scale productions of the highest calibre.

The orchestration of wedding celebrations is a particular forte. I have successfully curated hundreds of nuptials, including VIP and high-profile ceremonies where precision, timing, and atmosphere are paramount.

I possess an innate ability to read the room, effortlessly adapt to shifting energies, and sustain a vibrant dance floor from the first bespoke chord to the final farewell.

Contact DJ City
dj-city-rome-italy.description_html:
I collaborate intimately with wedding planners, coordinators, and esteemed vendors to ensure every element flows in seamless harmony—from your grand entrance to the last curated note.

Trusted by global icons such as Coca-Cola and Red Bull, I bring the same level of polished professionalism and refined energy to private celebrations as I do to major corporate events.

Every wedding possesses its own distinctive rhythm, and the music must narrate your unique story. I treat each couple and every celebration as a singular, bespoke journey—no recycled playlists, no generic sets.

I work directly with my clients to craft a customised sonic tapestry, meticulously tailored to your personal style, cultural heritage, and emotional milestones.

Whether your preferences lean toward timeless classics, Arabic pop, indie anthems, deep house, House, or a sophisticated blend of all, I ensure the soundtrack reflects your essence with impeccable taste.

gypsy-jazz-orchestra-ravenna-italy.intro_html:
About Gypsy Jazz Orchestra – An Exquisite Klezmer & Gypsy Jazz Ensemble, Based in Ravenna, Italy

An exquisite fusion of chamber intimacy and spirited dance hall vibrancy, interwoven with Balkan echoes, circus-inspired whimsy, refined orchestral movements, and an irrepressible popular joy. This is The Gypsy Jazz Orchestra—a finely curated ensemble based in Ravenna, Italy, impeccably suited to any occasion that calls for an atmosphere of elegant revelry and impeccable good humour.

Founded in 1996, this bespoke orchestra comprises a select assembly of musicians from Ravenna and its surrounding territories. Over the years, they have graced an illustrious array of live events and festivals, earning the distinction of winning several editions of the esteemed "On The Road Festival" in Pelago—a testament to their refined artistry and enduring appeal.

Contact Gypsy Jazz Orchestra

Beyond their captivating live performances, this distinguished orchestra has also lent their refined sound to a number of studio-recorded albums. To date, they have meticulously recorded and released five studio albums, some of which feature exquisite arrangements and evocative soundtracks that have been selected for use in various documentaries and films.

In 2016, they were honoured with the prestigious ROMAGNA MIA 2.0 contest, announced by the legendary Raoul Casadei—a crowning recognition of their exceptional talent and cultural resonance.

The band members’ meeting was a serendipitous encounter—a seemingly chance convergence that, perhaps, was always destined. Like all things that appear to emerge from nothing only to blossom into something truly extraordinary, the desire to look beyond the Adriatic while remaining firmly rooted on this shore had long been stirring within each of them.

As the band’s recurring gatherings introduced new inspirations, these novelties kindled a shared longing to explore diverse sonic landscapes. The harmonious fusion of these distinct sounds allowed the ensemble to seamlessly amalgamate every facet of their artistry, crafting a sound that is at once cohesive and brilliantly original.

The Gypsy Jazz Orchestra brings a singularly whimsical and utterly unique presence to every event, imbuing each occasion with an extra measure of distinction. This is an experience unlike any other—a refined, bespoke journey into sound that lingers long after the final note.
