The Croatia Wedding Band is an exquisite cover band hailing from Rijeka, composed of six kindred spirits united by an impeccable passion for music. Their curated energy is nothing short of magnificent, enhanced by a repertoire that spans from the timeless elegance of the 1960s evergreens to today’s most distinguished chart-toppers. Every performance is a bespoke experience, destined to leave no guest indifferent.

This ensemble is regularly entrusted with weddings and exclusive events at the illustrious Beach Club Hvar in Croatia, a testament to their refined craft.

Request an exquisite consultation with The Croatia Wedding Band
croatia-wedding-band.description_html:
From destination weddings and open-air concerts to intimate club soirées and every distinguished celebration, this band excels. Their approach is entirely bespoke—each client receives a tailor-made, professional service. They offer flawless command of English, extensive experience, extraordinary musical creativity, and the finest audio and stage equipment.

These elements ensure your event unfolds with seamless perfection. Long after the final note, your guests will speak of the band that compelled them to sing until their voices gave way and dance until their legs ached—a memory curated to linger.

Discover the finest wedding bands of Croatia: Explore our curated selection ➡️

Na Hrvatskom

The Croatia Wedding Band profesionalni je cover band iz Rijeke, a čini ga šest prijatelja i velikih zaljubljenika u glazbu. Energija koju želimo podijeliti s Vama je ogromna, a kada tome dodamo repertoar koji se proteže od 60-ih godina (evergreen) pa sve do danas (TOP ljestvica) i svirku koja Vas ne može ostaviti ravnodušnim.

Destination Weddings, OPEN AIR koncerti, klupske svirke i sve vrste evenata događaji su gdje se najbolje snalazimo. Profesionalan i individualan pristup svakom našem klijentu, mogućnost vođenja programa na engleskom jeziku, iskustvo i glazbena kreativnost te vrhunska audio i scenska oprema garancija su da će Vaš event proteći savršeno, a Vaši gosti neće moći prestati pričati o bandu zbog kojeg nemaju glasa i zbog kojeg ih bole noge.

celeste-harp-milan-italy.intro_html:
About Celeste Harp – An Exquisite Harpist, Curated for the Most Refined Occasions, Based in Milan, Italy

Celeste Harp presents an impeccably elegant presence as a Milan-based harpist, offering her artistry for weddings, corporate events, and exclusive celebrations across Italy. With over two decades of musical mastery upon the harp, her journey commenced with formal Conservatoire training and matured into a distinguished professional career spanning more than fifteen years of live performances. Renowned for a graceful sound and a sophisticated approach, Celeste Harp delivers music that infuses every occasion with beauty, emotion, and timeless elegance. Her repertoire is meticulously curated—an exquisite fusion of classical tradition and modern songs, alongside film soundtracks bespoke reimagined for the harp.

Contact Celeste Harp

For wedding ceremonies, Celeste Harp provides a sublime live soundtrack for the day’s pivotal moments—the entrance, the ring exchange, and the exit—crafting a serene and romantic atmosphere that is equally perfect for intimate ceremonies and grand, elegant celebrations. Beyond solo harp, she also performs as a refined harp and violin duo, ideal for couples and clients seeking a graceful yet contemporary allure. This combination can be further enhanced with backing tracks during cocktail receptions, yielding a fuller, more modern sound while preserving a polished and luxurious sensibility.

Line-up options include solo harp, harp and violin, or harp with two electric violins, each format meticulously adapted to the event’s style—from a delicate ceremony setting to a sophisticated drinks reception. Celeste Harp also offers a laptop playlist service between and after live sets, and song requests can be prepared wherever possible, allowing bespoke personalisation of special moments such as a ceremony entrance or first dance.

For setup, Celeste Harp typically arrives approximately one hour and thirty minutes before the performance, with setup and soundcheck requiring around forty minutes. The performance area is compact—a mere 1.5 x 1.5 metres—ensuring seamless integration into any refined venue. Based in Milan and available for events throughout Italy, Celeste Harp is an exquisite choice for clients seeking refined live music imbued with a classical soul and a contemporary touch.

aleks-sax-dubrovnik-croatia.intro_html:
About Aleks Sax – an exquisite wedding saxophonist, based in the refined coastal city of Dubrovnik, Croatia

Aleks curates a bespoke soundscape defined by masterful improvisation, perfectly suited to the most sophisticated electronic genres—Deep, Progressive, and Dance House. He performs in impeccable collaboration with a handpicked selection of Croatian and international DJs.

His performances radiate an electrifying energy and effortless expression, elevating every atmosphere to an unparalleled level of refinement. Whether at the celebrated Hula Hula Beach Bar (Hvar), Carpe Diem Beach (Hvar), Culture Club Revelin (Dubrovnik), Central Club (Split), or La Bodega Croatia, his presence transforms any setting into an exclusive, unforgettable experience.

Contact Aleks Sax 💬

Born in the elegant city of Dubrovnik, where he continues to live and work, Aleks discovered his passion for music at an early age. His foundation is grounded in a classical clarinet education from the Music Academy in Split, where he earned a bachelor’s degree. Yet, during his studies and upon graduation, he cultivated a profound love for the saxophone and its vast repertoire of styles—Jazz, Blues, Rock, and Funk.

View our curated selection of Croatia's finest DJs and sax players ➡️

His artistry has been shaped by the influence of luminaries such as Maceo Parker, Dave Sanborn, Branford Marsalis, Michael Brecker, and Candy Dulfer. The discipline of classical technique and instrumental education has remarkably honed his prowess as a saxophonist, lending an impeccable polish to every note.

Aleks is a resident performer on the exquisite island of Hvar, enchanting guests at some of its most prestigious bars and clubs. Below is a selection of the exclusive locations where discerning clients have booked him through FixTheMusic for weddings and celebrations.

  • San Marco Terrace, Hvar, Croatia
  • Ulica Ivana Matijaševića 10, Dubrovnik, Croatia
  • Villa Ruza, Donje Čelo, Koločep, Croatia
  • Cavtat, Croatia
  • Bonj Les Bains Beach Club, Hvar, Croatia
  • Split, Croatia

Should you desire the finest saxophonist Dubrovnik (Croatia) has to offer for your wedding or private soirée, we invite you to connect with Aleks Sax.

travellers-band-french-riviera.intro_html:
About The Travellers – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble from the French Riviera

The Travellers rank among the French Riviera’s most distinctive strolling ensembles, celebrated for their impeccable elegance, refined ambience, and effortless rapport with guests at the world’s most exclusive weddings and private events. Their presence is both curated and spontaneous—an exquisite art form that transforms every occasion into an unforgettable luxury experience.

Warm, sophisticated, and exquisitely interactive, the band weaves through cocktail hours, seated dinners, and celebratory gatherings with a fluid grace that feels effortless yet remains impeccably controlled. Their style was forged on the Côte d’Azur, where live music is an essential element of the art of hosting: intimate, refined in presentation, and so naturally integrated that it becomes part of the very fabric of the moment.

As demand for this bespoke musical experience grew, two additional ensembles were developed under the same artistic direction—each upholding the same meticulous attention to presentation, the same balance of elegance, charm, and musical energy.

View the complete range of South of France wedding bands

They are regularly engaged for weddings and celebrations at Château de Robernier in Montfort-sur-Argens and Le Galinier de Lourmarin in Provence, France—venues synonymous with refined luxury.

Enquire with The Travellers 💬
travellers-band-french-riviera.description_html:
The Travellers perform primarily in an acoustic or lightly amplified format, requiring minimal setup and offering extraordinary flexibility. For grander affairs, a bespoke hybrid roaming configuration—utilising wireless microphones or a full stage setup—is also available, ensuring every event receives an impeccably tailored sonic experience.

Discover all of our France-based roaming bands ➡️

Their curated repertoire spans jazz, soul, pop classics, Italian and French chansons, Latin rhythms, and upbeat international favourites—each piece adapted live to the unique atmosphere of the occasion. Based on the French Riviera and performing worldwide, the ensemble has journeyed for weddings and private celebrations across Europe and to coveted destinations including London, New York, Kuwait, Tokyo, Dubai, and Mexico.

Similar Ensembles of Distinction

Discerning clients who have enquired with The Travellers have also expressed interest in the following hand-picked bands on FixTheMusic:

  • Riviera Roaming Band
  • The Impresarios
  • The Mad Socks
  • The Rovers

artists-party-band-french-riviera.intro_html:
About The Artists – an exquisite wedding band based in Nice, France

What discerning clients most treasure about The Artists: an impeccable ability to read the room, an atmosphere of refined revelry, boundless energy and versatility, unwavering professionalism, and a charisma that keeps every guest utterly captivated — perfectly suited for weddings and exclusive events, and unequivocally recommended.

The Artists, formerly celebrated as The Boatmen, are a curated party band residing in Nice on the Côte d’Azur, the jewel of the French Riviera. This exceptional ensemble of virtuoso musicians has entertained an elite clientele of celebrities and VIPs across the globe.

View the complete range of wedding bands in France

Among their distinguished audiences are luminaries such as Elton John, Bono, Quincy Jones, Nicolas Sarkozy, Gérard Depardieu, Jean Reno, Jamie Cullum, Ian Somerhalder, Nikki Reed, and many more.

Please take a look at our 2026 Set List

We are regularly engaged to perform at the most exclusive weddings and events, including Villa Cora in Italy and Château de Brametourte in Lautrec, France.

Contact The Artists 💬
artists-party-band-french-riviera.description_html:
Whether serenading the red-carpet elite at the Cannes Film Festival or enchanting guests elsewhere in the world, The Artists possess an innate mastery of elevating any occasion into an unforgettable celebration.

View all of our France-based roaming bands ➡️

Performing over 200 times annually, their vast repertoire — a bespoke curation of hits from every musical era — offers an impeccable selection of beloved songs for every guest.

Available for weddings and private celebrations on the French Riviera and worldwide, The Artists perform entirely acoustically, requiring neither amplification nor stage. Their preferred approach is to mingle intimately with the audience — serenading, flattering, surprising, and seducing each listener with refined artistry.

View FixTheMusic's list of the best wedding bands in France

The group’s audacious repertoire spans from Rat Pack swing, sixties classics, rock ’n’ roll, and eighties anthems to contemporary chart-toppers, bestowing every song with the distinctive Artists treatment: bespoke instrumentation, riotous yet polished performances, and four-part harmonies of impeccable precision.

About Sunset Roamers – an exquisite wedding band based in Monte Carlo, Monaco

✨ What discerning clients most cherish about Sunset Roamers: an impeccably curated high-energy wedding band that commands packed dance floors, gracefully accommodates bespoke requests, exudes professionalism and effortless collaboration, and earns ceaseless praise from guests.

Sunset Roamers is a multi-talented, refined roaming ensemble with years of experience in the entertainment industry — the unequivocal, perfect choice for any distinguished event.

They perform at celebrations and galas as a French Riviera wedding band available for exclusive hire.

Their artistry delivers the most exquisite music, ensuring guests remain captivated and the occasion radiates true success.

Backed by a magnificent band of three or more members, they guarantee a powerful, resonant sound that elevates every atmosphere.

We are proud to be listed on FixTheMusic's prestigious selection of the best French Riviera bands for 2026.

They are regularly commissioned for weddings and events at Schloss Schönau in Austria, Hôtel Château de La Chèvre d’Or in Èze, and Le Domaine Du Rey in Saint-Félix-de-Pallières, France.

Inquire with Sunset Roamers 💬
sunset-roamers.description_html:
Their extensive repertoire features the most celebrated works of Italian and international music — each piece bespoke in its curation and execution.

Clients may request songs of profound personal significance to be woven into the setlist, and the ensemble is delighted to oblige with impeccable grace.

To crown the evening, an exuberant DJ set accompanied by percussion can be arranged — a refined touch guaranteed to send every guest into euphoric motion upon the dance floor.

This exclusive enhancement is available upon request.

Sunset Roamers masterfully perform modern pop covers alongside classic rock and rock 'n' roll, each delivered with their signature flair and infectious enthusiasm.

They are celebrated for filling dance floors at every occasion, from opulent weddings and milestone birthday celebrations to prestigious award ceremonies and university events.

With a completely mobile, elegant setup, they roam intimately among guests, crafting a truly interactive and unforgettable performance. They are frequently engaged as a roaming band in France.

Based in Monaco, they travel effortlessly to the South of France — particularly the French Riviera — as well as the Italian Riviera and Alpine destinations across France, Italy, and Switzerland.

They have graced the Alps with numerous après-ski performances in the finest clubs, restaurants, bars, and hotels.

wedding-band-cannes-provence-south-of-fr.intro_html:
An Introduction to High Jinx – An Exquisite Wedding Band Based in Cannes, Curated for the Most Refined Events Across France

High Jinx stands as a distinguished wedding band on the French Riviera, exceptionally sought after for bespoke performances at exclusive events throughout the south of France, across Europe, and with particular acclaim in northern Italy.

Comprising four impeccable musicians, High Jinx delivers a curated selection of pop and rock covers with a refined, high-energy presence designed to grace your dance floor with elegance and vitality.

We are honoured to be listed among FixTheMusic's 24 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆

Discover our complete collection of France-based wedding bands ➡️

We invite you to explore our 2026 Set List

Our ensemble is regularly engaged for weddings and esteemed events at La Villa Hotel in Asti (Italy), Hotel Hermitage in Monte Carlo, and Château Destinée in Saint-Seurin-de-Prats, France.

Enquire with High Jinx 💬

For wedding receptions, private soirées, and corporate gatherings, we offer the following refined services:

  • An exquisite 4-piece pop rock ensemble featuring three-part male vocal harmonies, two guitarists, two keyboardists, a drummer, and a bass player.
  • A meticulously curated repertoire spanning the world's greatest hits from the 1960s through to today's most celebrated anthems.
  • Graceful background music before, between, and after the band's performance.
  • A wireless microphone for speeches, ensuring every word is delivered with clarity and sophistication.
  • Technical assistance throughout the evening, ensuring an impeccable experience.
  • A dedicated sound technician and a professional PA system, guaranteeing the highest calibre of audio quality.
  • An unwavering professional demeanour and polished presentation.
  • Complete flexibility for open-air performances, wedding ceremonies, and acoustic or electric sets.

The band also offers an acoustic set, particularly beloved for outdoor cocktail receptions or venues with refined sound restrictions.

For an additional bespoke touch, a professional DJ may be added to the booking at a modest supplementary fee, or an acoustic guitarist and singer for earlier moments such as the ceremony or afternoon reception.

View our full portfolio of France-based wedding bands ➡️

If your vision is to secure the finest wedding band Cannes has to offer, we invite you to connect with High Jinx.

Beyond France, the band is in exceptional demand for events throughout Italy, particularly for destination weddings around the enchanting Lake Como and the rolling hills of Tuscany.

riviera-rock-band-france.intro_html:
An Introduction to The Riviera Rock Band – an impeccably curated cover ensemble, elegantly based on the French Riviera.

What discerning clients cherish most about The Riviera Rock Band: an electrifying live presence, a dance floor brimming with sophisticated revelry throughout the evening, effortless crowd connection, masterfully executed first dances and bespoke requests, unwavering professionalism, and an enduring recommendation among the refined.

Founded in 2012, the ensemble’s artistry is brought to life by the talents of Fabrizio, Simone, and Julien.

We are honoured to be recognised on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest wedding bands along the French Riviera.

Bound by years of camaraderie, the formation of this project was an exquisite inevitability—a natural convergence of kindred musical spirits.

Each wedding and private concert is a uniquely crafted experience, an infusion of effervescent energy delivered by three exceptional individuals whose spontaneity and artistry radiate through every note.

Discover our entire collection of France-based wedding bands ➡️

Our refined repertoire is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at illustrious venues such as Villa Corsini a Mezzomonte in Italy, Domaine de la Fauconnie in Campsegret, and Château de Robernier in Montfort-sur-Argens, France.

Enquire with The Riviera Rock Band 💬
riviera-rock-band-france.description_html:
The Riviera Rock Band is both a distinguished pop-rock trio and a powerful indie rock force, performing original compositions from their base in Nice, France.

Explore our full portfolio of France-based wedding bands ➡️

While chiefly devoted to an exquisite selection of covers, they frequently grace private occasions of the highest calibre—weddings, the Monaco Grand Prix, corporate soirées, luxury hotels, superyachts, après-ski in Switzerland, and even gatherings for Harley Davidson—instilling a vibrant yet sophisticated atmosphere.

The Riviera Rock Band delivers dynamic, meticulously crafted covers, igniting an impeccable party ambiance that resonates with elegance.

Their performances span Monaco, the South of France, Switzerland, Italy, Corsica, the Netherlands, and beyond.

The Riviera Rock Band is the harmonious union of…

Fabrizio (vocals/guitars) and Simone (vocals/bass), who for years anchored the celebrated group “Running Birds” (Nice). In 2010, they recorded an album with Ian Paice, drummer of Deep Purple, and secured the prestigious honour of opening for Status Quo, Jean-Louis Aubert, Scorpions, Deep Purple, and ZZ Top from 2010 to 2012.

Julien (drums/vocals), who spent many years performing with his ensemble “Koma,” opening for Iggy Pop and the Stooges, ZZ Top, Pete Doherty, and Deus in 2010, and later accompanying—on stage, radio, and television—Louis Bertignac (Téléphone) from 2010 to 2011.

mythos-strings-london.intro_html:
Mythos Strings — an exquisite string ensemble, impeccably based in London, offering a refined auditory experience for the most discerning occasions.

What our esteemed clientele most cherish: a bespoke repertoire that seamlessly marries classical elegance with contemporary sophistication—Bridgerton-inspired pop covers, meticulously curated aisle melodies, and an atmosphere of romantic grace. Praised for their professionalism, punctuality, and flexibility, our musicians leave an indelible impression on every guest.

Mythos Strings is a young, stylish collective that captivates audiences at weddings, galas, corporate soirees, and private celebrations. With our home in the United Kingdom, we are in demand across Europe, the Middle East, and beyond—bringing our refined artistry to destinations of unparalleled beauty.

Discover the complete selection of UK string quartets on FixTheMusic.

Our ensemble is regularly engaged for weddings and events at the most prestigious venues: LeCrans Hotel & Spa in Switzerland, Château de la Valouze in La Roche-Chalais, InterContinental Le Grand Hotel in Paris, and London’s The Ned, The May Fair Radisson Collection Hotel, and Lincoln’s Inn.

Inquire with Mythos Strings 💬

Mythos Strings was founded in 2000 by David, whose impeccable training included study under Italy’s foremost violinists—Riccardo Brengola at the Accademia Chigiana in Siena and Alberto Fiore. His distinguished career encompasses performances at the Rome Opera House, the London Concert Orchestra, Birmingham Royal Ballet, the London Soloists, Cunard Cruise Liners, and as a session musician for the BBC.

Explore our curated list of London’s finest string quartets ➡️

Mythos Strings comprises a distinguished assembly of highly regarded professionals, each having performed extensively in concert halls across Europe. We specialise in bespoke musical engagements—weddings, corporate events, Bollywood celebrations, and Jewish festivities including Bar Mitzvahs and nuptials.

Our versatility is unmatched: we perform as a soloist, duo, trio, quartet, quintet, sextet, octet, or chamber orchestra, tailored to your vision and budgetary considerations.

View the finest string quartets on FixTheMusic.

Our repertoire of string arrangements is the largest in the UK, spanning classical, jazz, pop, soul, Bollywood, folk, Jewish, and Israeli traditions. Should your personal playlist not yet grace our extensive collection, we will arrange it with bespoke precision for your special event.

These are but a few of the exquisite locations where clients have booked us through FixTheMusic for weddings and events:

The Bollywood String Quartet Experience

Mythos Strings possesses deep expertise in presenting Bollywood and Indian string music for weddings and all manner of celebrations. We have cultivated a lavish repertoire of beloved mehndi Bollywood songs, interwoven with contemporary hits, and continually collaborate with clients to compose new arrangements of the pieces you hold most dear—performed with exquisite finesse at your event.

Performance Details

  • We perform outdoors with impeccable grace
  • We travel to engagements in our own vehicles
  • We require parking in close proximity to the venue
  • All equipment is PAT tested for safety and reliability
  • We own a professional PA system

party-band-monaco-navigators.intro_html:
The Navigators – An Exquisite Cover Band Based in Monte Carlo, Monaco

The Navigators stand among the most sought-after private event ensembles in Europe, their calendar a testament to unparalleled demand.

Hailing originally from the United Kingdom and now seamlessly settled in Monaco, the band delivers a bespoke repertoire spanning from the golden era of the 1960s to today’s chart-topping anthems—each selection meticulously curated for the most discerning celebrations.

We invite you to explore our 2025 Set List, a refined collection of impeccably chosen tracks.

The band is frequently engaged to grace weddings and exclusive events at Chateau de La Motte Husson in Martigné-sur-Mayenne and Château Les Carrasses in Quarante, France—venues that epitomize refined elegance.

Inquire with The Navigators
party-band-monaco-navigators.description_html:
Having graced the world’s most illustrious stages—including The O2 Arena and The Royal Albert Hall—and been summoned for countless celebrity soirées, prestigious galas such as the Monaco Grand Prix and Cannes Film Festival, and exclusive corporate events for Google, the BBC, TopShop, Renault, Sony, and Dior, The Navigators are celebrated for their vibrant and energetic performances of the world’s most iconic songs.

Discover our full collection of France-based wedding bands ➡️

The ensemble offers an impeccable state-of-the-art sound system, a refined lighting production, a two-hour live performance (extended upon request), optional post-show DJ sets, and the expertise of a fully qualified sound technician. For further particulars, we warmly invite you to reach out.

Below are merely a few of the distinguished venues where clients have engaged The Navigators through FixTheMusic for weddings and private events...

  • Chateau de La Motte Husson
  • Château Les Carrasses
  • La Bastide de Gordes, Provence
  • Château Les Oliviers de Salettes
  • Château de Fonscolombe
  • Villa di Maiano, Florence, Italy
  • Marseille, France
  • Saint-Lizier, France

Weddings Across France, Italy, and Beyond

Over the past three years, The Navigators have ascended to become one of the most coveted English-speaking wedding bands in Europe, performing at more than seventy weddings annually—predominantly across the south and west of France, as well as Lake Como and Florence in Italy, yet also reaching destinations around the globe.

France stands as one of the world’s most enchanting backdrops for a wedding—its climate, majestic venues, and exquisite cuisine form the perfect canvas for a dreamlike celebration.

The Navigators are the quintessential choice to conclude the most magical of experiences on an unforgettable crescendo, ensuring that every measure of grace and refinement befitting a French wedding endures until the final note.

The band’s repertoire is meticulously curated through years of captivating audiences, featuring only the most exceptional songs—each performed as the sun sets over a dance floor bathed in golden light, within France’s most prestigious châteaux, often in collaboration with the nation’s leading wedding planners and event agencies.

Exceptional Musicianship

The caliber of this assembly—a convergence of some of Europe’s finest musicians, elevated by an extraordinary male vocalist, a dedicated booking manager, and fluency in both English and French—positions The Navigators as the unequivocal choice for wedding entertainment in France.

The evening’s entertainment is the moment to release the joy of months—often years—of meticulous planning.

What more splendid way to celebrate your new chapter with family and friends than through the most beloved songs of all time, each delivered with impeccable artistry.

Should you seek to engage the finest party band Monaco has to offer for your corporate gathering or wedding, we invite you to connect with The Navigators.

Follow our journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸

The Wedding Band Performance

The Navigators’ wedding set comprises two hours of music, tailored to the client’s exact preferences. Extended performances are available upon request, and the fee encompasses all PA sound equipment and the expertise of a qualified sound engineer.

Optional Bespoke Additions

  • An exclusive DJ set following the live performance, with curated background music prior to the show. All requested tracks are procured by the band at no additional cost.
  • A refined solo piano performance for cocktail hours, lounge settings, or ceremony—available before, during, or after the meal.
  • Bespoke lighting design of any scale.
  • Premium sound equipment hire for speeches or ceremony.

bow-harp-cannes-france.intro_html:
Bow & Harp – An Exquisite String Ensemble with Harp, Based in Cannes, France

Bow & Harp presents a refined duo of harp and violin, united by an unwavering devotion to music cultivated since their earliest years.

For over two decades, they have curated impeccable musical entertainment for weddings and private celebrations, specialising in bespoke wedding music across France.

Their repertoire—an elegant fusion of classical masterpieces and modern compositions—adapts seamlessly to every atmosphere, infusing each performance with emotion and sophistication.

They are regularly engaged to perform at distinguished venues such as Château Saint-Martin in Vence and Château de Tourreau, elevating events with their refined artistry.

Enquire About Bow & Harp 💬
bow-harp-cannes-france.description_html:
The violinist discovered her passion for the violin at the age of six. Born into a family of musicians, she was immersed in classical melodies and intimate family rehearsals, cultivating an exquisite artistic sensitivity and impeccable technique from an early age.

The harpist fell in love with her instrument as a child of four, when a chance encounter with a street harpist left her utterly enchanted. That first magical moment awakened a profound passion for music that has only deepened over the years.

Their paths intertwined at the Conservatory of Cannes when they were fourteen. A deep friendship and an extraordinary musical bond formed almost instantly. Becoming inseparable, they united their talents to create a bespoke duo where the powerful resonance of the violin meets the ethereal elegance of the harp.

Today, Bow & Harp share their artistry with young students and continue to captivate audiences with both passion and sensitivity.

For ceremonies—whether secular or religious—they craft a custom musical programme that aligns flawlessly with your vision. Should you require guidance, they are delighted to curate selections from their extensive repertoire.

They also offer elegantly engaging entertainment for cocktail receptions and dinners, presenting a refined range of music to match the atmosphere you wish to create.

globe-strollers-roaming-band-nice-france.intro_html:
About The Globe Strollers – an exclusive roaming ensemble based in Nice, France

The Globe Strollers are the preeminent roaming band and DJ on the French Riviera, offering an unparalleled sonic experience.

Discover the complete collection of roaming bands in France.

Comprising four virtuoso musicians, the ensemble presents their finest artistry either as a Strolling Band—wandering intimately among guests, immersive at your whim—or as a Live Band commanding the stage, captivating all in attendance. Whether for your wedding or any occasion of significance, their performance is nothing short of exquisite.

We are proudly featured in FixTheMusic's curated selection of the finest bands on the French Riviera.

Contact The Globe Strollers 💬
globe-strollers-roaming-band-nice-france.description_html:
Our full-fledged, impeccably styled DJs synchronise seamlessly with the band, guiding you through a refined journey of befores and afters with bespoke, trend-focused mixes.

Explore the full spectrum of South of France wedding bands.

With a decade of experience cultivating unforgettable weddings and private events, The Globe Strollers possess an exceptional reputation and an abiding passion for music. Their mission is to render your celebration impeccably festive and radiant, in the company of those you cherish.

View FixTheMusic's curated registry of the most distinguished wedding bands in France.

A singular musical performance, crafted for an indelible moment.

croatia-dj-sax-istra.intro_html:
Exquisite Croatia DJ & Sax – A Bespoke Musical Artisan Based in Pazin, Croatia

Since the age of sixteen, the virtuoso known as Croatia DJ & Sax has been immersed in the world of refined sound, cultivating an impeccable career in music. He earned a diploma in piano from Pazin’s esteemed elementary music school, yet his artistic path soon led him toward an entirely curated realm of sonic expression.

His journey began as a resident performer at the distinguished discos Zodijak Lanterna in Pore and Kukuriku in Pazin. Since 2015, he has graced the stage of Magnus Nightclub in Pazin, crafting an atmosphere of unparalleled sophistication. Beyond Croatia, his exclusive services are available for bookings in Italy—most notably in the elegant region of Veneto and the enchanting city of Venice.

Enquire About Croatia DJ & Sax
croatia-dj-sax-istra.description_html:
The maestro draws inspiration from the golden eras of the 1980s and 1990s, seamlessly blending them with contemporary house and deep house—an exquisite fusion that has elevated disco clubs and upscale urban venues to new heights of allure.

Honoured to be invited to the most coveted events along the Istrian coast and the Adriatic shores, Croatia DJ & Sax is celebrated for his distinctive musical expression and an innate ability to read a room with impeccable precision. His refined approach has earned him the privilege of curating the soundtrack for hundreds of weddings and exclusive gatherings across Croatia and Europe.

To imbue your celebration in Croatia or throughout Europe with an extraordinary, bespoke touch, submit an inquiry today to secure the artistry of Croatia DJ & Sax.

latino-vibes-band-nice-france.intro_html:
Latino Vibes – An Exquisite Latin American Ensemble from Nice, France

Nestled on the French Riviera, Latino Vibes is a refined musical experience curated by Laura, an impeccably talented vocalist and instrumentalist of Havana, Cuba. This ensemble weaves a bespoke fusion of jazz and Latin American rhythms, imbuing each event with the warmth and sweetness of the Caribbean. Every performance radiates an unmistakable vitality, showcasing artistry of the highest calibre. The band is a regular fixture at the distinguished Château Saint-Roux in Le Cannet-des-Maures and the elegant Circé Restaurant in Beaulieu-sur-Mer, among other prestigious occasions.

Enquire About Latino Vibes
latino-vibes-band-nice-france.description_html:
Latino Vibes offers a bespoke live performance, meticulously tailored to the occasion. Their line-up evolves with seamless grace—from an intimate solo or duo to a full, 5- or 6-piece ensemble, each formation delivering an impeccable sound. Whether for an exclusive private reception, a glamorous cocktail party, or a distinguished corporate event, Latino Vibes elevates every atmosphere with understated sophistication. The ensemble has earned the trust of the French Riviera’s most revered venues: the Carlton, Martinez, Monte-Carlo Bay, Metropole, Hermitage, and the Monaco Yacht Club—each a testament to their unparalleled artistry. Whether the occasion calls for a vibrant salsa experience, a languid bolero, or a silk-smooth bossa nova—or a curated blend of all three—Latino Vibes responds with effortless refinement. Their adaptable style and polished professionalism ensure an unforgettable evening, perfectly harmonising with the setting and the celebration.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Solo
  • Duo
  • Trio
  • 4-Piece Band
  • 5-Piece Band
  • 6-Piece Band

wedding-saxophonist-croatia-ant.intro_html:
About Ant Sax—An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist, Based in Zadar, Croatia

Born in the sun-drenched city of Zadar, Ant Sax draws deeply from the soulful heritage of his native Dalmatia. His sound is a refined tapestry of smooth jazz, subtly woven with delicate electronica and an irresistible groove—all beneath the lift of joyfully curated melodies. Every performance is a bespoke auditory experience, impeccably crafted for the most discerning celebrations.

Discover our curated selection of Croatia’s finest DJs and saxophonists ➡️

Ant Sax is a sought-after presence at weddings and exclusive soirées across Croatia and throughout Europe, bringing an air of effortless sophistication to every occasion.

Enquire with Ant Sax 💬

Below is a selection of the exquisite venues where discerning clients have secured Ant Sax through FixTheMusic for their weddings and events…

azure-melodies-duo-saint-tropez-france.intro_html:
About Azure Melodies – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo, Based in Saint-Tropez, France

Boasting a meticulously curated repertoire of over 500 compositions, Azure Melodies presents a refined acoustic duet, specialising in impeccably tasteful interpretations of Pop, Soul, and Jazz.

Discover the full collection of wedding bands in France.

Infused with an understated French elegance, the duo revitalises beloved classics and reimagines contemporary favourites through their clear, generous vocals and smooth, bespoke guitar tones.

The perfect accompaniment for intimate dinners, exclusive cocktails, and both religious and secular ceremonies, every performance is a study in sophisticated ambiance.

Explore FixTheMusic’s selection of the best French Riviera wedding bands.

They are regularly engaged for weddings and high-profile events at the prestigious Althoff Villa Belrose in Gassin and Mas des Olives in Bédoin, France.

Contact Azure Melodies 💬
azure-melodies-duo-saint-tropez-france.description_html:
The Azure Melodies duo takes a bespoke approach, consistently enquiring about your musical preferences to tailor the performance to your exact vision. Should three songs hold particular significance yet not reside within their already vast repertoire, they will learn them exclusively for you—a hallmark of their dedication to personalisation.

With a decade of experience orchestrating luxury events, these two consummate professionals have performed at hundreds of private celebrations and served as resident musicians for several seasons at iconic luxury hotels, including the Hôtel de Paris Saint-Tropez and Hôtel Christiania Val d'Isère in the French Alps. Now, they offer their refined artistry to grace the most beautiful day of your life with an aura of impeccable elegance.

Their music is perfectly suited for an intimate wedding. Seasoned in performing for engagements, anniversaries, and nuptials, they draw from a wide repertoire of romantic songs—all delivered in a joyfully refined acoustic atmosphere. Again, if three songs are particularly special to you but absent from their repertoire, they will learn them with pleasure.

They typically perform for two to three hours, with the option to incorporate a short interlude during longer sets. During this pause, a curated Spotify playlist sustains the exquisite ambiance. For local events, they can also provide professional sound equipment at no additional charge—an added gesture of seamless luxury.

azure-melodies-duo-saint-tropez-france.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>-Usually when we are booked for a 2h performance, we play a 1h set, then take a 15min break and 45min set.

- For a 3h performance, we play a 1h30 set, 30min break and 1h set.

- For a 4h performance, we play 3 x 1h sets and 2 x 30min breaks.

- Of course we adapt completely on the day, depending on the time and the length of the speeches, wedding surprises or anything else.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- We don’t, we only play as a duo.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- We provide our own sound equipment, it’s a LD system Maui 28 G2. The client don’t need to provide anything about the sound system and it’s included in the price. We can also provide one or two additional microphones on request for speeches for example, with no additional charge. We don’t provide lighting equipment as it’s usually not necessary, so if the client requires special lighting, this will be at their expense.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>-  We always play a curated Spotify playlist during our breaks.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We normally arrive about an hour and a half before we start playing to have time to install our sound system, and change. We do a quick soundcheck. We know in some venues it can be disturbing for the guests or other clients so we can be very discreet.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Of course ! The client can choose any songs from our vast 500 songs repertoire. Plus, we always offer to learn up to 3 more songs that are really special to them for the cocktail or dinner, at no extra cost.

- Regarding the wedding ceremony, to accompany this very personal moment, we offer them a tailor-made experience with no limits on song choices. We can learn any songs they wish, within the limits of possible acoustic arrangements. If they prefer the original version of certain songs, we can also play them on Spotify.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Our sound system is very discreet and we are only two musicians so we don’t need a large space, 4 square meters will be enough for us.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- No problem at all, we are used to playing in any setting, we regularly play on beaches, gardens, forests, barns, boats… As long as we have access to electricity, we can play anywhere !</details>

The Buddies represent an impeccably curated wedding and party band, rooted in the refined elegance of Nice. They specialise in delivering exquisite renditions of your most cherished musical selections, each performance a bespoke masterpiece.

As one of France’s most distinguished roaming and strolling ensembles, the group brings years of unparalleled industry experience to every event, conducting themselves with flawless professionalism, grace, and magnetic charisma.

Delighting in travel, The Buddies regularly grace weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas across France and Europe—offering a seamless, luxurious experience wherever the celebration takes place.

They are frequently engaged for exclusive celebrations at La Badelle in Provence and Villa Super Cannes in Vallauris, France—venues that attest to their refined pedigree.

acoustic-covers-band-nice-france-sparks.intro_html:
About The Sparks – an exquisite acoustic roaming ensemble, based in Nice, France

Since 2010, The Sparks have graced the Côte d’Azur with their refined artistry, beginning as a bespoke busking act through the cobbled streets of Nice, Antibes, and Villefranche. Today, they curate an impeccable musical experience across Europe—exclusively for weddings and the most distinguished corporate soirées.

Comprising four British virtuosos, the ensemble features double bass, saxophone, guitar, and a newly crafted custom drum kit, elevated by impeccable four-part vocal harmonies. Their presence is a fixture at Geneva’s Hotel d’Angleterre, where they are routinely engaged for celebrations of the highest order.

Contact The Sparks

The Sparks offer a refined acoustic pop repertoire—an exclusive roaming band in exceptional demand for weddings, events, and private parties across the South of France and throughout Europe.

View all of our France-based roaming bands ➡️

They move effortlessly among guests at weddings and receptions, delivering something utterly unique and contemporary to your most cherished day. Their curated setlist spans from the 1950s to the present, performed in English, French, Spanish, and Portuguese.

This is an exhilarating, sophisticated ensemble that creates the kind of celebration guests will speak of for years. To engage the finest acoustic roaming band the French Riviera has to offer for your wedding or event, we invite you to reach out.

Below are but a few of the exquisite locations where clients have booked The Sparks through FixTheMusic for weddings and événements:

  • Saint-Privat-des-Prés, France
  • Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat, France
  • Ramatuelle, France

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸

The Sparks performed at Camille & Jacob’s destination wedding, set within an 18th-century château surrounded by the forests of Dordogne, France (Château de Saint-Privat-des-Prés).

party-garcons-frejus-france.description_html:
Hailing from the sun-drenched shores of Fréjus, France, Party Garçons is a bespoke musical ensemble comprising four distinguished artists: a vocalist-guitarist-trumpeter, a pianist-guitarist, a bassist, and a drummer. For over eleven years, they have curated unforgettable experiences across the Var (PACA), throughout France, and beyond its borders.

The ensemble frequently elevates its performances through collaborations with additional virtuosos, including saxophonists and violinists, ensuring a truly refined and tailored auditory journey.

Their repertoire is a masterfully curated selection spanning Pop, Rock, Soul, Funk, R&B, Jazz, Hip-Hop, Folk, and Blues.

The ensemble's songbook features impeccable renditions of Michael Jackson, Jamiroquai, the Beatles, Bruno Mars, Coldplay, Maroon 5, Oasis, Tracy Chapman, John Mayer, and Ed Sheeran, among others. Every performance is supported by their own premium sound system and sophisticated lighting, with the option to extend the evening with a seamless DJ experience.

Discover our complete collection of France-based wedding bands ➡️

Party Garçons adapts to every occasion—cocktail receptions, weddings, gala dinners, corporate celebrations, christenings, exclusive brunches, gallery openings, bar mitzvahs, inaugurations, and seminars—delivering each as either a refined static ensemble or an enchanting strolling acoustic configuration.

Bespoke Line-Up Configurations:

  • Quintet (5-piece band)
  • Roaming Band
  • Trio
  • Duo
  • Solo Singing Guitarist

wedding-band-marseille-france-twilights.intro_html:
The Twilights – An Exquisite Wedding Ensemble, Based in Marseille, France

The Twilights comprise an impeccably curated collective of exceptional young musicians, performing with refined artistry at weddings, concerts, and the most exclusive private or public celebrations.

We are based in the South of France, nestled between Aix-en-Provence and Marseille.

Should you seek to engage the finest wedding band Marseille (France) can offer for your nuptials or bespoke event, we invite you to connect with The Twilights.

Contact The Twilights
wedding-band-marseille-france-twilights.description_html:
The Twilights are a distinguished ensemble of event musicians, performing at weddings, concerts, and both private and public soirées.

View all of our France-based wedding bands ➡️

This group is based in the south of France, between Aix-en-Provence and Marseille.

We also perform throughout Provence, in the region of Avignon or in the Luberon, toward Apt. The PACA region is our curated playground.

As a result, we are accustomed to performing along the French Riviera—including Saint Tropez, Cannes, Monaco, and Nice.

The repertoire spans from the rock’n’roll of the 1960s to today. We specialize in international pop, soul music, funk, as well as rock ’n’ roll and rock.

We take the greatest hits of those eras and adapt them in our own unique, refined manner.

The live music we deliver is vibrantly alive—the energy and resonance elevate your moment into something truly extraordinary.

We communicate with the audience, interact with them, lending an exceptional character to your evening. To be convinced, view our videos.

The Twilights, a professional orchestra, can also travel to Languedoc (Montpellier, Sète), or throughout the south of France—as well as the Alps, in cities such as Sisteron, Dignes, Embrun, and even Guillestre.

The Twilights is a group of event-delivery musicians for your wedding in the south of France. Thus, The Twilights is a professional band capable of playing nearly every genre: from Pop to Rock, through Soul or Funk.

For your services in Provence, we are completely autonomous in sound and lighting, offering turnkey solutions of impeccable quality.

The musicians of The Twilights are all passionate connoisseurs of music, their devotion unequivocal.

Nearly all have been trained at the various conservatories of the Provence Alpes Côte d’Azur region—either in Marseille or Aix-en-Provence.

Here are just a few of the exquisite locations where clients on FixTheMusic have booked us for weddings and events:

  • Route de Vauvenargues, Jouques, France
  • Ginestas, France

En français

The Twilights, groupe de musiciens de prestation événementielle, mariage, concert, fête privée ou publique (mariage, soirée de gala, anniversaire, mairie…)!

Ce groupe est basé dans le sud de la France, entre Aix-en-Provence et Marseille.

Nous rayonnons aussi dans toute la Provence, dans la région d’Avignon ou dans le Luberon, vers Apt. La région PACA est notre terrain de jeu raffiné!

De ce fait, nous sommes habitués à jouer sur la French Riviera – côte d’azur, à Saint Tropez ou Cannes, voire Monaco, ou Nice.

Le répertoire s’étend du rock’n’roll des années ’60 à nos jours ! Nous sommes spécialisés dans la pop internationale, la soul music, le funk, mais aussi le rock’n roll et le rock…

Nous reprenons tous les plus grands succès de ces années en les adaptant à notre façon exclusive !

La musique que nous jouons en live est vivante ! L’énergie et les vibrations qui se dégagent apportent un vrai plus à votre moment!

Nous communiquons avec le public, nous interagissons avec lui, ce qui donne un caractère exceptionnel à votre soirée! Pour en être convaincu, allez voir nos vidéos ici!

The Twilights, orchestre professionnel, peut se déplacer également vers le Languedoc (Montpellier, Sète), ou tout le sud de la France! Mais aussi les Alpes, dans des villes comme Sisteron et Dignes, et même Embrun voire Guillestre.

The Twilights est un groupe de musiciens de prestation événementielle, pour votre mariage dans le sud de la France. Ainsi, The Twilights est un groupe professionnel capable de quasiment jouer : du Pop au Rock, en passant par la Soul ou le Funk.

Pour vos prestations en Provence, nous sommes complètement autonomes en sonorisation et petit éclairage, ce qui fait donc que nous pouvons proposer des prestations clé en main d’une qualité irréprochable.

Les musiciens du groupe The Twilights sont tous des mélomanes affirmés ; ainsi, leur passion pour la musique est sans équivoque.

Ils ont quasiment tous été formés aux différents conservatoires de la région Provence Alpes Côte d’Azur (soit celui de Marseille ou d’Aix-en-Provence). Ils ont reçu une formation solide.

Donc, si vous cherchez à louer le meilleur groupe de mariage que Marseille (France) puisse vous offrir pour votre mariage ou votre événement, contactez The Twilights.

wedding-band-french-riviera-craftsmen.intro_html:
The Craftsmen – An Ensemble of Refined Musical Artistry, Based in Nice, France

Curating an impeccable repertoire of rock and pop masterpieces, The Craftsmen perform across the French Riviera and throughout Europe, gracing exclusive festivals, distinguished private clubs, luxury hotels, and Michelin-starred restaurants, as well as bespoke private events—from lavish weddings and corporate galas to intimate soirées.

Explore FixTheMusic's curated compendium of the most distinguished wedding bands on the French Riviera.

Established in 2015, The Craftsmen are a collective of consummate professionals, each a master of their craft. The full ensemble presents a trio of masterful guitarists, underpinned by a compelling double rhythmic section of bass and drums, while vocal duties are shared amongst the collective to weave a seamless tapestry of harmonies that elevate every piece performed.

Drawing inspiration from legendary artisans—The Beatles, The Rolling Stones, Creedence Clearwater Revival, and The Killers—their curated setlist is a journey through iconic eras of music.

Please review our exclusive 2026 Set List.

For those discerning clients seeking to secure the French Riviera's most dynamic live act and curate an atmosphere of vibrant celebration, we invite you to initiate a conversation.

Discover the complete collection of exquisite France-based wedding bands →

The Craftsmen are frequently engaged to perform at the world's most exquisite destinations, including the enchanting Borgo del Carato in Sicily, the glamorous Casa Fuego in Menton, and the historic Chateau de la Bourlie in Urval, France.

Inquire about commissioning The Craftsmen →
wedding-band-french-riviera-craftsmen.description_html:
Their guitar arrangements, echoing the refined sensibilities of The Eagles and the raw energy of Creedence Clearwater Revival, are elevated by a powerful rhythmic foundation and masterful vocal interplay.

To perfectly suit the scale and ambiance of your occasion, The Craftsmen offer a bespoke selection of ensemble configurations, from an intimate duo to a full quintet.

Their eclectic repertoire and refined multicultural influences are cultivated from extensive international sojourns across England, New Zealand, Canada, Australia, Eastern Europe, and South America—a global journey unified by a profound love for rock 'n' roll.

While their foundation rests in electrifying rock performances, they are equally adept at crafting intimate acoustic sets for more refined gatherings. Impeccable preparation is paramount; we are dedicated to delivering an auditory experience of the highest fidelity, ensuring every note resonates with pristine clarity.

To achieve this sonic perfection, we perform exclusively with professional-grade equipment, continuously refining our sound. Notably, our drummer, Jules, brings a refined technical edge, having rigorously studied sound engineering and worked professionally as a sound technician.

Among the distinguished venues that have hosted The Craftsmen are...

  • Casa Fuego, Menton, France
  • La Ferme Du Rastel, France
  • Chateau de la Bourlie, Urval
  • Borgo del Carato, Sicily
  • Grand-Hotel du Cap-Ferrat
  • Le Grand Banc, Oppedette
  • Luxembourg
  • Grimaud, France
  • Montreuil-sur-Mer, France
  • Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat

Based in the stunning capital city of Croatia, Magic Touch is a premier ensemble dedicated to providing impeccable musical artistry for life’s most refined celebrations.

Specialising in bespoke musical entertainment, Magic Touch elevates events into extraordinary experiences, adding a touch of unparalleled sophistication to your most cherished moments.

This exceptional ensemble performs brilliant covers of the greatest hits across history, moving seamlessly from the 1940s and 1950s through 1970s disco to contemporary chart-toppers. The result is a meticulously curated party experience like no other.

This refined ensemble is delighted to travel and regularly performs across Croatia at weddings, private parties, and corporate events.

We are consistently sought after for weddings and events at the prestigious Hotel Dubrovnik Palace, the enchanting Zori Restaurant in Hvar, and the idyllic Villa Ruza in Koločep, Croatia.

lola-nice-french-riviera-france.intro_html:
About LOLA – An Exquisite All-Female Soul & Bossa Ensemble, Based in Nice, France

LOLA is a bespoke, internationally curated all-female ensemble, rooted on the French Riviera. Their artistry weaves the warmth of Brazil, the soul of Cuba, the elegance of France, and the depth of the Balkans into a singular, refined sound. This impeccable fusion of bossa nova, Cuban rhythms, soul, jazz, swing, and international pop creates the definitive soundtrack for luxury events and unforgettable celebrations.

Contact LOLA

Their performances unite voices and instruments honed through classical training, soulful jazz, and global influences—radiating a beauty, strength, and timeless sophistication that is both rare and captivating. Having graced the world’s most exclusive occasions, including Cannes Lions, Monaco Formula 1, high-end weddings, and VIP celebrations, LOLA delivers an experience of elegance, fire, and impeccable musicality. For those seeking to journey through music, they offer an unparalleled, curated escape.

Line-up:
- 5-Piece Band + Saxophone

malta-string-quartet.intro_html:
About The Malta String Quartet – An Exquisite Ensemble for Bespoke Weddings and Refined Events

This impeccably curated quartet performs with distinction at weddings across Malta, as well as at exclusive concerts throughout the island. Their repertoire, a masterful collection spanning from the Baroque era to contemporary compositions, has graced the hallowed halls of prestigious venues such as the Inquisitor's Palace in Vittoriosa, Palazzo Parisio, the Mediterranean Conference Centre, and select churches. For those seeking to engage the most refined string quartet Malta has to offer for their wedding or event, we invite you to connect with us.

Contact The Malta String Quartet
malta-string-quartet.description_html: The Malta String Quartet has represented the island with elegance abroad, performing bespoke classical concerts in New Delhi and Calcutta, India. Their artistry has been showcased at official state dinners and receptions, as well as on Austria’s national day, the distinguished August Moonball event, and other gala evenings hosting dignitaries including presidents and prime ministers. In high demand for weddings—encompassing religious and civil ceremonies as well as receptions—the quartet brings an impeccable touch to celebrations in both Malta and Gozo. For those in pursuit of the finest wedding string quartet Malta has to offer, we invite you to make an enquiry today.

luna-gitana-nimes-france.intro_html:
About Luna Gitana – An exquisite Gypsy & Flamenco ensemble, based in Nîmes, France

Luna Gitana is a refined live band, gracefully positioned in the South of France, between the untamed beauty of the Camargue, the elegance of Provence, and the glamour of the French Riviera. Drawing inspiration from the world of the Gipsy Kings and the sun-drenched, soulful sounds of the Mediterranean, this curated ensemble weaves together rumba, gypsy melodies, Latin influences, and an impeccable live energy to craft an experience that is at once sophisticated, celebratory, and utterly unforgettable.

Comprising seasoned musicians of the highest calibre, Luna Gitana has graced stages across France and beyond, performing at iconic venues, distinguished festivals, exclusive concerts, private soirées, and the most prestigious of celebrations. The ensemble is an impeccable choice for high-end weddings, corporate events, luxury hotels, private resorts, and bespoke parties—bringing warmth, style, and the very spirit of the Mediterranean to every occasion.

Enquire about Luna Gitana

Their repertoire spans from the world-renowned masterpieces of the Gipsy Kings to international classics, reimagined in a signature gypsy style, alongside exquisite reggaeton tracks and a rich tapestry of Spanish-inspired music. Whether cultivating a serene, elegant ambience or igniting a vivacious, feel-good celebration, Luna Gitana possesses an innate ability to connect with guests and unite them through the power of music.

A hallmark of this exceptional ensemble is its bespoke flexibility. Luna Gitana may perform as an intimate duo—featuring guitarist and vocalist—or expand to a magnificent ten-piece orchestra. Depending on the scale and vision of your event, the performance can also be elevated with one to four dancers, creating an immersive Mediterranean spectacle of music, movement, and captivating visual artistry.

For most occasions, Luna Gitana offers either two sets of approximately one hour each, or a single, uninterrupted two-hour performance. They are also delighted to accommodate special requests—such as a first dance—provided the chosen composition aligns with their distinctive musical aesthetic.

The group can provide a fully integrated service, including bespoke sound and lighting, wherever possible. For larger productions with multiple musicians on stage, or for venues situated further afield, additional sound engineers and technicians may be engaged to ensure an impeccable performance setup. They can also furnish a curated laptop playlist or DJ-style service between and after their live sets.

Luna Gitana typically arrives no fewer than two hours prior to the performance, with setup and soundcheck requiring approximately two hours. They require a performance area of at least three by three metres and are entirely at ease performing outdoors or in unconventional settings—including barns, beaches, and the most unique event spaces.

Fully insured and supremely adaptable, Luna Gitana marries authentic gypsy soul with refined elegance and powerful live energy, crafting a truly unforgettable atmosphere for weddings, parties, and the most exclusive of events.

The Malta Wedding Violinist is a refined, professional female violinist available for hire throughout Malta and across Europe. Her impeccable artistry is in constant demand for the most exclusive weddings and corporate celebrations in Malta.

She is regularly engaged to perform at distinguished venues, including the Hilton Hotel in Saint Julian’s and the historic Knisja tal-Vittorja in Valletta, Malta.

Inquire About The Malta Wedding Violinist
malta-wedding-violinist.description_html:
For many years, she has curated bespoke musical experiences for weddings and private events across Malta. island-sax-malta.intro_html:
About Island Sax – An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist, Based in Malta

Island Sax is a refined, young saxophonist established in Malta, delivering an impeccable blend of saxophone tonality and vibrant energy to every occasion.

Throughout his distinguished career, Island Sax has performed alongside prominent ensembles and impeccably curated bands.

As a session saxophonist with the Malta Philharmonic Orchestra, he has graced major productions such as Rockestra, the MPO/MYO Concert, Guns N’ Roses – A Symphony to the Jungle, and Do-Re-Mi Meets La.

He is consistently booked for bespoke weddings and exclusive events at the Hilton Hotel in St. Julian’s, Malta.

Contact Island Sax 💬

Performing with the BHU, he has appeared at high-profile affairs, including Expo 2020 Dubai, the Valletta New Year’s Eve Celebrations, and the Farsons Beer Festival.

His collaboration with the BBB has involved him in exquisite weddings, concerts such as Unforgettable with tenor Nico Darmanin, and original music productions like Xehda.

As a session musician, he has lent his artistry to a curated selection of events, including X Factor Malta (Season 2), a live performance with Cristina Ramos at the Cittadella, and as the opening act for Julian Marley.

His versatility renders him a highly sought-after talent for weddings, functions, and other momentous celebrations.

Complementing his performance credentials, he won the New Names Malta National Music Competition in 2015, held under the patronage of Her Excellency Marie-Louise Coleiro Preca, President of Malta.

Line-up Options:

  • Solo Sax
  • Sax & DJ

wedding-dj-saint-tropez-france.intro_html:
DJ Tropezia – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Experience, Based in Saint-Tropez, France

DJ Tropezia stands as one of the most coveted musical curators for weddings and exclusive events throughout Saint-Tropez and the entire French Riviera. From refined pop covers and timeless rock to sophisticated funk, electronica, deep house, and jazz, he orchestrates an impeccable atmosphere for every occasion. An accomplished percussionist, he elevates his DJ sets with the art of live drumming, offering a truly bespoke auditory experience. For those seeking to engage the most refined wedding DJ Saint-Tropez has to offer, an introduction with DJ Tropezia is an invitation to unparalleled elegance.

Contact DJ Tropezia

DJ Tropezia curates unforgettable soirées across the entire PACA region, with a particular focus on the exquisite Golfe de Saint-Tropez, Sainte Maxime, Les Issambres, Grimaud, and Ramatuelle.

View all of our DJs in France ➡️

From private celebrations and milestone anniversaries to elegant weddings and corporate galas, music has always been the essence of my journey. Since my earliest years, I have nurtured a profound passion for rhythm, tempo, and the diverse musical cultures of the world—from percussive artistry and live concerts to the evolution of sound from the 1970s through to modern electronica.

I began performing in exclusive clubs in 1998, my sets a carefully curated blend of house, tribal house, tech-house, and 2-step. A transformative seven-month sojourn on the island of Ibiza allowed me to refine and experiment with my craft. Following this illustrious experience, I established myself in Paris, performing at the city’s most sought-after venues: Club-club (Paris 18), Folie's Pigalle (Paris 09), and Boomerang (Paris 11).

My playlist evolved to incorporate a more eclectic and popular repertoire—Hip-hop, R&B, world music, Funk, Disco, Dance, and Afro-Caribbean rhythms—allowing me to set the tone for the most discerning audiences. The prestigious venues I graced also shaped my artistry, leading to collaborations with elite event agencies such as Charlestown and Meetic. Extensive tours across France introduced me to the nation’s finest clubs.

It was during this period that I conceived a bespoke DJ/Percussion concept, performing for nearly two years with a seamless fusion of mixing and live drumming. Now based in the Var, I dedicate a significant portion of my time to music production—a lifelong passion that has seen me flourish as a DJ, musician, and vocalist through various ensembles. I am currently finalizing my debut album and performing as a duo with a saxophonist on the private beaches of Sainte Maxime, Pampelonne, and Cannes.

Distinguished Clients & Venues

malta-wedding-harpist.intro_html:
The Malta Wedding Harpist – an exquisite, professional harpist available for weddings and exclusive events in Malta.

This refined musician offers performances on either a full concert pedal harp or a smaller Irish harp, impeccably suited to intimate gatherings. He is regularly engaged for bespoke ceremonies at the revered Church of the Madonna of Lourdes in Gozo, Malta.

Enquire with The Malta Wedding Harpist
malta-wedding-harpist.description_html:
Mastering a curated range of string instruments, The Malta Wedding Harpist performs at the highest level—frequently joining distinguished ensembles such as the St James Consort in Malta on any instrument required. Beyond the harp, his virtuosity on the violin is equally impeccable; he is currently preparing for an advanced qualification in the instrument and serves as a music teacher at the Gozo School of Music.

His refined presence has graced weddings and recitals across Malta, including the historic St. Laurence Parish Church, a government function at Fort St. Angelo, The Villa Malta, the Sant' Antnin ta' Padova church, the Providenza chapel in Siggiewi, Palazzo Parisio, and the Embassy of Ireland in Malta—among an elite selection of venues.

If you seek the most distinguished harpist that Malta has to offer, we invite you to make a bespoke enquiry with The Malta Wedding Harpist.

An exquisite jazz-inspired soul and pop covers band, The Nice Soul Band presents an impeccably curated repertoire that elevates every occasion. Whether destined for an exclusive wedding, a corporate soirée, or an intimate private celebration, this ensemble delivers an unparalleled auditory experience.

nice-soul-band-france.description_html:
Rooted in the timeless elegance of soul and jazz, the band revisits forgotten sounds and refines them through a modern lens—reimagining pop and soul classics with covers of artists such as Gnarls Barkley and Rihanna. The vocalist is a Conservatoire-trained pianist and singer; her extraordinary artistry, cultivated alongside a legal career, eventually demanded her full-time devotion to music. She and her band now grace the most prestigious venues along the French Riviera—Monaco, Cannes, Antibes, Saint-Tropez, and Aix-en-Provence—performing at luxury weddings, corporate galas, and refined restaurants.

Their impeccable artistry earned a feature on the esteemed Martha Stewart Weddings blog following their performance at Patricia and Ralph’s stunning wedding at Pan Dei Palace—a castle in Saint-Tropez, in the south of France.

Among the exclusive destinations where they have been booked through FixTheMusic:

For those seeking the finest jazz and soul ensemble Nice, France has to offer—a truly bespoke musical experience for your wedding or event—we invite you to connect with The Nice Soul Band.

dj-croatia-martin.intro_html:
About DJ Martin – An Exquisite Wedding DJ Based in Zagreb, Croatia

DJ Martin is an impeccable performer with more than a decade of refined professional experience, specialising in bespoke musical curation for the most distinguished celebrations.

From destination weddings to exclusive rooftop soirées, private galas to intimate club nights, his artfully programmed repertoire and meticulously selected tracks grant him an unparalleled versatility that elevates every occasion.

A master of his craft, DJ Martin glides effortlessly across decades and genres, delivering a performance of singular sophistication and seamless flow.

His profound command of the musical canon spans Studio54, Disco, Funk & Soul, Rnb, Pop, Rock, Old School Classics, Party Anthems, and House—a curated tapestry that bridges generations and keeps the dance floor enchantingly engaged until the final note.

With over 700 engagements to his name—across clubs, cafés, weddings, and private events—his experience is both extensive and impeccable.

Beyond the solo DJ offering, he also presents the option to include a saxophonist and violinist, should the client desire a truly immersive and opulent party experience.

He is regularly engaged for weddings and events at the esteemed Laganini Beach Club in Okrug Gornji, Croatia.

Contact DJ Martin
dj-croatia-martin.description_html:
His wealth of experience renders him the quintessential choice for those planning a destination wedding or an exclusive celebration along the Croatian coast.

View our curated selection of Croatia's finest DJs and saxophonists ➡️

DJ Martin has performed across Croatia at the country’s most distinguished venues and establishments, holding several remarkable residencies over the years.

If you seek to secure one of Croatia’s most exceptional DJs for your occasion, look no further than DJ Martin—and make your enquiry today.

peter-beck-saxophonist-cannes-france.intro_html:
Peter Beck – An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist, Based in Cannes, France

👏 What discerning clients cherish most about Peter Beck: An impeccable saxophonist, an outstanding live performer who engages guests, collaborates seamlessly with DJs, surprises and delights with every note – a consummate professional, highly recommended.

Peter Beck stands as one of the most sought-after saxophonists along the Côte d’Azur, his artistry coveted for refined weddings and exclusive events in Cannes, Monaco, Nice, and Saint-Tropez.

He may be engaged as a solo saxophonist or in bespoke collaboration with a DJ – please inquire about these curated options.

For those seeking to secure the finest saxophonist on the French Riviera, an invitation to connect with Peter is the first step toward an unforgettable experience.

I am regularly booked to perform at distinguished venues such as the Grand Hyatt Martinez Hotel in Cannes, Château de Labro in Aveyron, and the Negresco Beach Club in Nice.

Contact Peter Beck 💬
peter-beck-saxophonist-cannes-france.description_html:
Below are a selection of the exquisite locations where clients have engaged my services through FixTheMusic for weddings and events…

  • Château de Labro, France
  • Grand Hyatt Cannes Martinez Hotel
  • Cannes Yachting Festival, Vieux Port
  • Negresco Beach Club, Nice
  • Chateau de St Jeannet
  • Grange de Javon, Provence
  • Plage de la Pointe l'Aiguille
  • Hotel Belle Plage, Cannes
  • Les Rosees Hotel, Mougins
  • Èze, France
  • Valbonne, France

En français

Pour une touche d’exception, choisissez un saxophoniste professionnel qui fera danser vos convives sur des airs envoûtants.

Avec le saxophone live de Peter Beck, votre cérémonie se pare de joie et d’originalité. Sur des notes jazz, soul ou funk, vivez un moment de rêve orchestré par ce prestataire d’exception.

Le saxophone, instrument universellement apprécié, offre une animation raffinée qui ravira vos invités et animera votre mariage d’une manière étonnante.

Laissez-vous emporter par les sonorités débordantes d’amour et de gaieté qui s’échappent de cet objet magique hors du commun. Peter est à vos côtés pour la cérémonie, le cocktail ou la soirée dansante avec le DJ – c’est vous qui décidez.

Votre prestataire dispose d’un vaste répertoire de morceaux et s’adapte à vos désirs. Plutôt bossa nova que house ?

Aucun problème : le professionnalisme et la réactivité de Peter Beck lui permettent de proposer des compositions qui correspondent à vos goûts et à ceux de vos invités.

Vous pouvez le rencontrer avant le jour J pour lui décrire vos envies et le thème de votre mariage.

Au cœur de la belle et ensoleillée Région PACA, votre saxophoniste se fera un plaisir de contribuer au bonheur que représente votre union.

Cette animation musicale, originale et appréciée, est l’œuvre d’un musicien professionnel d’exception.

N’hésitez pas à le contacter pour en savoir plus sur la prestation qu’il vous propose, et l’adapter à votre guise pour vos noces.

Peter is available to perform saxophone at weddings, corporate events, beach and yacht parties, product launches, and VIP club events.

If you seek the most refined saxophonist France has to offer, do not hesitate to contact Peter.

dj-ale-florence-italy.intro_html:
DJ Ale – An Exquisite Wedding & Event DJ, Based in Florence, Italy

Born in the charming enclave of Prato, just beyond the illustrious city of Florence, DJ Ale’s profound passion for music was cultivated from an early age, inspired by his father’s impeccable collection of records.

Guided by his elder brother—a fellow DJ—and immersed in the refined sounds of the 1970s, 1980s, and 1990s, Ale developed an enduring love for House music.

He masterfully honed the art of vinyl pressing and perfected his ability to captivate audiences with an exuberant, curated soundscape.

Contact DJ Ale
dj-ale-florence-italy.description_html:
Ale’s journey commenced within the vibrant tapestry of Florence’s nightlife, visiting iconic establishments such as Tenax, Yab, Kama Kama, and Cocoricò—venues of unparalleled prestige.

There, surrounded by celebrated DJs, he refined his technique and expanded his musical repertoire with impeccable precision. Upon reaching eighteen in 2005, Ale made his debut behind the decks at an exclusive selection of private soirées.

Shortly thereafter, alongside two like-minded collaborators, he ventured into music production—a refined creative pursuit that yielded a collection of bespoke remixes and an original composition, now available for discerning listeners online.

From 2010 to 2015, Ale served as the esteemed Resident DJ at Florence’s Twice Club—a globally recognized venue—where he diversified his sonic palette to encompass R&B, Hip Hop, Pop, and EDM, curating unforgettable evenings.

He further graced the decks alongside the Radio Deejay collective at distinguished Prato locales, including Prato City and Pecci Bar, and established his own exclusive residency at Bartat, hosting the celebrated “House Nation” event there until 2020.

Beyond his club engagements, Ale orchestrated private and corporate gatherings with an unwavering commitment to excellence, ensuring each affair was nothing short of remarkable.

Today, Ale collaborates directly with elite service providers and wedding coordinators across Tuscany, lending his refined expertise to intimate, bespoke celebrations of medium scale.

Equipped with his own state-of-the-art audio system and the latest production software, he crafts individualized remixes and playlists—meticulously tailored to each client’s unique preferences.

Dedicated to remaining at the vanguard of his craft, Ale continuously refines his knowledge and skills, ensuring his artistry evolves in perfect harmony with the latest innovations and trends.

moon-rivers-dubrovnik-croatia.intro_html:
Moon Rivers – An Exquisite Wedding Ensemble Based in Dubrovnik, Croatia

Moon Rivers is a refined wedding band hailing from the breathtaking coastal enclave of Dubrovnik, Croatia. They represent a bespoke choice for discerning couples and esteemed event planners, specialising exclusively in weddings, private soirées, and corporate functions of the highest calibre.

Enquire with Moon Rivers
moon-rivers-dubrovnik-croatia.description_html:
The ensemble offers up to three hours of impeccably curated live music, artfully interspersed with two graceful intermissions, tailored precisely to the client’s vision. Should the occasion demand, they also provide their own state-of-the-art PA system.

Their repertoire is a masterful blend of contemporary sophistication—featuring the likes of The Weeknd and Harry Styles—alongside timeless funk and soul from icons such as James Brown and Al Green. Yet their true forte lies not merely in prompting movement, but in crafting an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance and allure.

Comprising highly accomplished musicians, each member brings years of distinguished professional experience performing on international stages. Having toured extensively from Ukraine to the United States and countless destinations beyond, the artists of Moon Rivers offer a wealth of musical mastery and rich cultural diversity.

This illustrious touring history speaks to their remarkable versatility and their refined ability to captivate audiences from every walk of life. Moon Rivers is available for bookings not only throughout Croatia but also on a global scale—whether orchestrating a dreamy Adriatic coastline wedding, an exclusive European affair, or a destination celebration abroad.

Their vast, curated repertoire spans timeless classics, modern hits, jazz standards, and lounge favourites, each selection delivered with impeccable artistry.

From his earliest years, a profound passion for music and the art of captivating an audience has defined The Zadar DJ. His journey began with the rhythmic pulse of home gatherings, where the beat was the heart of every celebration. With more than two decades of refined experience, his craft has been impeccably honed to perfection. His illustrious career has graced the most distinguished venues across Zadar and Croatia, including the esteemed Gotham Club, Forum, La Habana, Maya, Saturnus, and Guma Bar.

Enquire About The Zadar DJ
zadar-dj-croatia.description_html:
Beyond these celebrated locales, he has curated bespoke experiences for prestigious hotels and exclusive resorts such as Punta Skala Resort and Zaton Holiday Village. His expertise, however, extends far beyond the turntables, encompassing the refined orchestration of events across a diverse spectrum—from sophisticated corporate gatherings and congresses to haute couture fashion shows, intimate private soirées, and the most exquisite weddings. Each set is a personalised masterpiece, meticulously tailored to the unique ambiance of every occasion through close collaboration with clients to craft the perfect, resonant playlist.
