wedding-harpist-malta-lydia.intro_html:
About Lydia Harpist & Pianist – An Exquisite Choice for Your Bespoke Wedding in Malta

Lydia is a refined professional harpist and pianist, based in Malta, whose impeccable artistry has graced the most exclusive weddings and corporate events across the islands. Her credentials are a testament to a lifetime of dedicated mastery: a Doctor of Philosophy in Musicology (PhD) from the University of Durham, a Bachelor’s Degree in Piano Performance (B.A. Hons) from the University of Malta, the prestigious Licentiate of the Trinity College of Music and London College of Music (LTCL, LLCM) in both harp and piano, the Fellowship of the London School of Music (FLCM) in piano accompaniment, and a post-graduate certificate in Music Psychology in Education from the University of Sheffield.

For those who seek the finest wedding harpist Malta has to offer, an invitation to engage with Lydia is an opportunity to curate a truly unforgettable experience. She is regularly booked for the most coveted celebrations at the illustrious Villa Bologna in Attard, Malta.

Contact Lydia Harpist & Pianist
wedding-harpist-malta-lydia.description_html:
Lydia offers her refined talents for weddings, ceremonies, receptions, dinners, and corporate events, performing as a soloist or as part of an ensemble—from intimate duos and trios to sophisticated quartets. As the co-founder of two distinguished ensembles, she brings a curated elegance to every performance. The Venus Harp Trio (harp, violin, and cello) has collaborated for over thirteen years, while the ensemble “Classique meets Pop,” featuring vocalist and guitarist Fiona Cauchi, has delivered standing-ovation concerts and exclusive ceremonies at Malta’s most prestigious venues.

Beyond her academic accolades, Lydia is a highly sought-after musician whose presence has been secured for official State Dinners, Ambassadors’ Annual State Dinners, prestigious Ceremony Awards, and the inauguration of grand openings, including dinners organised for the EU Maltese Presidency in 2017. Her versatility has led her to premiere solo and orchestral works by both Maltese and foreign composers.

As a professional wedding harpist and pianist, Lydia performs at approximately one hundred and twenty weddings each year. Her vast experience in guiding discerning couples through the planning of their special day allows her to formulate an impeccable, bespoke programme tailored to every taste.

When you engage Lydia for your wedding ceremony, reception, lunch, or dinner, you and your guests will be captivated by the exquisite variety of music performed on the harp. Her repertoire is a curated journey, ranging from timeless Classical masterpieces to modern popular music, including foreign traditional pieces and authentic Maltese folk music.

Lydia possesses three exceptional instruments: the majestic Salvi Concert Grand Gold Harp, the Camac Concert Harp, and the Teifi Celtic Harp from Wales—each a masterpiece in its own right, ensuring a sound of unparalleled refinement.

cannes-acoustic-duo-france.intro_html:
The Cannes Acoustic Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble Based on the French Riviera

Nestled along the prestigious French Riviera, The Cannes Acoustic Duo presents a refined acoustic experience, curating an impeccable atmosphere for the most discerning weddings, corporate soirées, and private celebrations.

Discover our 2026 Set List — a bespoke collection of modern repertoire.

With a soulful British vocalist, Becky, at the helm, the duo has cultivated an outstanding reputation along the Côte d’Azur, offering a polished and sophisticated auditory journey.

We are frequently engaged for exclusive weddings and events at Château Canet in Rustiques, France.

Inquire with The Cannes Acoustic Duo 💬
cannes-acoustic-duo-france.description_html:
The Cannes Acoustic Duo provides bespoke musical accompaniment for every facet of your wedding day: from the ceremony and cocktail reception to dinner, after-dinner ambience, your first dance, welcome parties, and brunches.

Explore all of our acoustic duos in France ➡️

While based on the French Riviera, the duo frequently travels across France, gracing events in Nice, Cannes, Marseille, Montpellier, and Provence.

Born in England into a lineage of musicians, Becky is far more than a vocalist. She began mastering the piano, violin, saxophone, flute, clarinet, and guitar from the age of five, performing with orchestras, choirs, bands, and jazz ensembles throughout her youth and adult life.

Her passion ignited singing every Sunday at her local church, evolving into a lifelong devotion to her craft.

She studied music at the University of Southampton in England, specialising in voice as her chosen instrument. Upon graduating, she was immediately offered a position in Bordeaux, France, as a vocalist with an entertainment group, performing five nights each week.

Enamoured with France and its elegant way of life, she made a permanent move, seeking out an acoustic guitarist in the South of France to form this exceptional duo.

If you seek to engage the finest acoustic duo the French Riviera has to offer for your wedding or event, we invite you to connect with The Cannes Acoustic Duo.

En français

The Cannes Acoustic Duo est un duo acoustique élégant, idéal pour créer une atmosphère musicale parfaite, quel que soit le type d’événement que vous recherchez, aussi bien pour vos mariages que pour vos soirées privées.

L’alchimie de la voix suave de Becky et du sens aiguisé de l’arrangement à la guitare vous laissera un souvenir inoubliable de votre soirée.

split-dj-collective-croatia.intro_html:
About Split DJ Collective – Exquisite Wedding & Event Curation, Based in Split, Croatia

An impeccably refined trio of two virtuoso DJs and a master saxophonist, based in the resplendent coastal city of Split, Croatia.

Music forms the very soul of our craft. We possess an innate artistry in mixing, a sophisticated command of energy, and an unwavering ability to orchestrate moments that linger in memory long after the final note fades.

Yet we are far more than musicians; we are purveyors of bespoke experiences, understanding that every celebration is a once‑in‑a‑lifetime affair deserving of unparalleled attention.

With an extensive portfolio of international weddings and elite events, we adapt with effortless grace to any discerning audience, seamlessly weaving our signature disco and house foundation with your most cherished sounds.

We are regularly entrusted to perform at the distinguished Port 22 in Dubrovnik, a testament to our standing among the finest.

Contact Split DJ Collective
split-dj-collective-croatia.description_html:
The saxophone is no mere adornment—it is an integral, curated element of the experience, elevating key moments with velvety melodies or electrifying solos precisely when the dance floor reaches its zenith.

We reject the notion of generic, one‑size‑fits‑all playlists.

Every event is a singular masterpiece, and the music that animates it must be equally unique.

Thus, we collaborate intimately with each client to compose a soundscape that mirrors their personal taste and the refined energy of their guests.

We also offer a selection of multiple premium sound systems and bespoke lighting options to complete the ambiance.

Prior to your occasion, we deliver a meticulously crafted questionnaire—a confidential briefing where you may share your favourite songs and artists, tracks and genres you prefer to avoid, and those profoundly meaningful pieces—whether an anthem for your closest circle, a nostalgic family treasure, or an indispensable floor‑filler.

We do not merely play music… We read the room with exquisite intuition, react in real time, and ensure every moment resonates with impeccable precision. Whether it be an intimate sunset yacht cruise or a spectacular high‑energy wedding celebration, our singular purpose is to forge unforgettable memories through a soundtrack tailored exclusively for you.

Curated Line‑up Options:

  • Trio – Two DJs & Saxophone
  • DJ Only
  • DJ & Saxophone
  • DJ Duo
split-dj-collective-croatia.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 3 to 6 hours

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes (listed in description)

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 3 to 5 hours before the event starts

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 1-3 hours

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Ideally 16m squared, minimum 9m squared

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes</details>

malta-dj-saxophonist.intro_html:
Malta DJ Sax – An Acclaimed Virtuoso of DJ, Saxophone & Trumpet, Based in Mosta, Malta

Malta DJ Sax commenced his extraordinary musical odyssey at the age of seven in a quaint hamlet near Manchester, England.

Upon completing his formal education, he had already established himself as a consummate horn player and percussionist, garnering numerous accolades while performing alongside the United Kingdom’s most distinguished brass ensembles.

His prodigious talents propelled him to the prestigious World and European Championships, where he embarked upon an extensive tour across Germany, Belgium, the Netherlands, the Czech Republic, and Poland.

Contact Malta DJ Sax

His devotion to music deepened as he pursued A-Level studies and subsequently a degree at the University of Huddersfield. It was during this transformative period that his affinity for dance music flourished. Weekly sojourns to legendary nightclubs in Leeds and Sheffield introduced him to iconic figures such as Paul van Dyk and Ferry Corsten, inspiring his embrace of electronic music. Attending seminal festivals like Summer Sound System, Global Gathering, and Creamfields cemented his desire to curate the electrifying experience of music for others—guiding him unequivocally toward a career as a DJ.

In 2015, after masterfully balancing his musical pursuits with a conventional day role, he resolved to turn professional.

The Art of DJing:

Based in Malta, Malta DJ Sax holds exclusive weekly residencies at the island’s most sought-after venues: Oyster, Cava Baja, Medasia, and TexMex. During the summer season, he is an indispensable presence at refined lounge events and bespoke boat parties. A frequent guest DJ on xFM 100.2’s Housekeeping show, he is also an integral member of the DnB collective Urban Kaos.

His live performance has evolved into one of Malta’s premier entertainment duos, seamlessly blending refined DJ sets with live saxophone to energise an elite clientele at clubs, weddings, and grand celebrations across the island.

Festival Appearances:

Malta DJ Sax is a perennial fixture at Malta’s most illustrious festivals, including Earth Garden, Rock the South, Farsons Beer Festival, and the Bubble Festival. His collaborations with distinguished acts such as ManaTapu, Swing Nuages, and nosnow/noalps have graced stages at Beland, White Sands, Harbour Fest, Fools Garden in Stuttgart, August Island Festival, and Stramash in Edinburgh.

Session Musicianship:

As a session musician, Malta DJ Sax is in exceptionally high demand for his impeccable expertise on trumpet and keyboards. In Malta, he has lent his artistry to chart-topping singles for beloved local acts including nosnow/noalps, ManaTapu, and Relikc.

Curated Line-up Options:

  • Solo Saxophone
  • Saxophone + Trumpet
  • Saxophone + Trumpet + Percussion
  • DJ + Saxophone
  • DJ + Saxophone + Trumpet
  • DJ + Saxophone + Trumpet + Percussion

gemini-swing-band-zagreb-croatia.intro_html:
Gemini Swing Band – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Zagreb, Croatia

Founded in 1999, Gemini Swing Band has since graced hundreds of weddings, corporate galas, and private soirées across Croatia and beyond. Their impeccably curated repertoire spans Jazz, Swing, Dixieland, and Blues, alongside a refined selection of Croatian melodies. For those seeking to engage the most distinguished jazz ensemble Croatia has to offer for a truly bespoke celebration, we invite you to make an inquiry.

Enquire About Gemini Swing Band
gemini-swing-band-zagreb-croatia.description_html:
Gemini Swing was conceived by Jabuka and Bonzo in the autumn of 1999 with a singular, elegant purpose: to while away the impending long winter nights, with a glass in hand and a bite to eat, all artfully disguised as a musical backdrop. What might have remained mere hedonism was elevated when clarinetist Bery—already possessing a rich mastery of swing and dixie—joined the duo, placing an impeccable accent on the music itself.

Discover our curated selection of Croatia's finest jazz & swing bands ➡️

For a time, the trio performed at Zagreb’s Pračka club, then under the direction of today’s drummer, Kruno. A pivotal moment arrived with the addition of double bassist Mario, whose singular charisma and distinctive style imbued the ensemble with the refined signature that would come to define Gemini Swing Band. With drummer Dražen, they became a quintet, regularly enchanting the city’s most exclusive clubs.

The arrival of pianist Joško and a new drummer, Lehpamer, secured the final, exquisite note in what began as a pastime. The band formed a brass line—comprising Šinc, Geč, and Bery—and from this refined alchemy, Gemini Swing Band was born. Over the years, Rile (violin) and Križan (saxophone) joined the ensemble; Mario was succeeded by Vedran, and the lineup was further enhanced by Alis on guitar. The rest, as they say, is an illustrious history—and a touch of legend.

provence-jazz-band-france.description_html:
The Provence Jazz Band offers a bespoke formation of three to seven virtuoso musicians, each a master of their instrument, for live acoustic performances of the most impeccable quality—entirely tailored to your desires. With a retro allure and an effervescent spirit, The Provence Jazz Band infuses your soirée with colour, setting every guest’s heart alight with the joy of live music. More than mere entertainers, they are consummate musicians who take profound pleasure in animating the most splendid day of your life. Live music eclipses any other form of entertainment. Leave behind the cold sterility of a playlist cycling through mp3 files; gift yourself the immersive thrill of live performance. The ensemble comprises between three and six members, curated precisely to your requirements. Their performances possess a refined sonic quality and masterful instrumentalisation, traversing jazz, bossa nova, French chanson, and Latin jazz. From the 1930s to contemporary compositions, they also enchant with swing and bebop.

With The Provence Jazz Band, every detail is attended to. The group operates with complete autonomy and possesses its own state-of-the-art sound system. They offer a bespoke adaptation to the number of your guests and the nature of your event. Below are examples of the exquisite configurations they can provide:

  • A trio of voice, double bass, and guitar
  • A trio of piano, guitar, and double bass
  • A trio of double bass, saxophone, and guitar
  • A quartet with saxophone, double bass, guitar, and drums
  • A quartet with voice, guitar, drums, and double bass
  • A quintet comprising drums, double bass, guitar, vocalist, and saxophonist
  • A sextet with voice, guitar, piano, saxophone, double bass, and drums

Upon request, additional musicians—such as a trumpeter, trombonist, clarinetist, or flautist—may be incorporated. Contact The Provence Jazz Band to arrange a personalised consultation and a custom proposal. In the weeks preceding your wedding, you will liaise directly with the ensemble to convey your every desire and suggestion. These professionals listen attentively to ensure your utmost satisfaction. The Provence Jazz Band adapts to any venue, any audience, and any occasion. Once your wedding has concluded, do not hesitate to summon these exceptional artists for future celebrations.

The Provence Jazz Band and its supremely talented musicians perform wedding soirées across the south of France and throughout the entire Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur region.

sugar-beats-marseille-france.faq_html:
<details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up? How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>Minimum 4 hours before the show is ideal but it all depends on the type of event (cocktail, night or both). For instance, for a light acoustic cocktail show, 1h30/2h would be enough when for a full-trio show we need 3h very minimum (so it's chill for everyone, 4h is perfect for sound check, make up and set up). Of course, we will provide each client with a detailed, personal answer and we adapt to every situation.   

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>Yes, if the song is not too far from our style. For instance, we are a pop/rock duo or trio so it would not be doable for us to play a traditional Irish song or classical music 😉

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>Minimum 2x2m for the duo and minimum 3x3m for the trio it perfect but a bit more will be welcome.  

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>Each of us has civil liability insurance and the equipment is insured for the concerts so everything is properly covered.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>Yes of course and we are very used to it :)</details>

malta-acoustic-duo.intro_html:
About The Malta Acoustic Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo for Weddings in Malta

It was early summer in 2013 when Luke reached out to Josef for a guitar repair. Within moments, an effortless rapport was forged, their conversation seamlessly turning to music. This serendipitous connection led to an impromptu jam session just days later, and from that refined, spontaneous collaboration, the duo was born.

Now, after curating performances for hundreds of weddings, exclusive corporate events, and distinguished festivals, The Malta Acoustic Duo has become a bespoke sensation, enchanting audiences across Europe as their ascent to acclaim continues. They are frequently engaged as the premier wedding band in Malta, lending their impeccable artistry to celebrations at MUŻA Restaurant in Valletta and Ta’ Betta Wine Estate in Siġġiewi.

Contact The Malta Acoustic Duo 💬
malta-acoustic-duo.description_html: The Malta Acoustic Duo is a refined acoustic pairing, featuring Josef on vocals and guitar, and Luke on guitar and backing vocals. They deliver an impeccable, all-encompassing experience, elevating each moment with vibrant energy while sharing an authentic, joyous connection with their audience. If you seek to secure the most distinguished pop covers wedding band Malta has to offer, we invite you to reach out.

Nik on Sax is an impeccably refined performer, based in France, who brings his signature, velvety saxophone sound to the most exclusive weddings, private soirées, and prestigious events across Europe.

His playful riffs, creative effects, and seamless improvisation integrate so naturally into any curated DJ mix that guests are often unaware they are experiencing a live musician—such is the sophistication of his craft.

On the dance floor, he orchestrates unforgettable, hands-in-the-air moments; during refined dinners and receptions, he sets a warm, stylish, and utterly elegant atmosphere.

Having delivered thousands of performances across Europe, Asia, and Central America, Nik has perfected the art of reading any distinguished crowd and adapting with effortless grace.

His illustrious career includes corporate events for iconic brands such as Nike, Hugo Boss, Volkswagen, Grundig, Formula E, and major European banks, alongside regular performances at the world’s finest hotels, including Hilton, Waldorf Astoria, Orania Berlin, and even the Swedish Embassy in Berlin.

blue-horizon-jazz-band-marseille-france.intro_html:
Blue Horizon Jazz – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Aix-en-Provence, France

Blue Horizon Jazz is the refined musical vision of Caroline, an impeccably trained female lead jazz vocalist. Her journey began at the age of four, mastering classical piano before gracing numerous concert stages. By ten, she earned a coveted place at Adolf Fredrik, Sweden’s most prestigious music school, where her passion for performance was meticulously cultivated. Her artistic path then led her to the esteemed Berstein School in Bologna, Italy, where she spent three years immersed in the study of acting, dance, and voice. This bespoke ensemble is regularly curated for weddings and exclusive events at Domaine La Plume in La Penne and the magnificent Château de Tourreau in Provence.

Enquire About Blue Horizon Jazz 💬

The band offers a supremely flexible configuration, typically performing as an intimate three-piece jazz & swing ensemble—featuring Caroline’s captivating vocals, double bass, and piano—or elevated to a fuller, four-piece sound with the addition of a drummer. Caroline’s refined artistry extends to acclaimed Italian theatre productions, including Into the Woods, Parade, Ragtime, and Sweeney Todd. She also delivered a memorable performance at the prestigious celebration of the London Palladium’s 100th anniversary. Residing in a picturesque Provençal village, Caroline performs with her quartet across France. Her jazz journey has fostered collaborations with world-renowned musicians, from intimate club stages to distinguished festivals such as “Jazz En Touraine,” “Jazz sous les Châtaigniers,” “Jazz bat la campagne,” and “Festival Les Musicales dans les vignes.” Blue Horizon Jazz has recently graced premium weddings and events throughout France and the world, serenading discerning guests with their impeccable renditions of beloved jazz standards and original compositions.

golden-chords-cannes-france.intro_html:
Golden Chords – An Exquisite Acoustic Guitarist, Based in Cannes, France

Welcome to the refined world of Golden Chords.

His journey began at the age of five, when he first touched a guitar, yet his true artistic evolution commenced at fifteen. At sixteen, he was invited to join a rock band, and by nineteen, he auditioned for the prestigious Music International Academy of Nancy—one of France’s most esteemed conservatoires. The jury bestowed upon him a particular commendation upon his graduation, recognizing his impeccable talent. Encouraged by his mentors to continually expand his musical vocabulary, he made his stage debut in the illustrious jazz clubs of Paris, performing alongside celebrated jazz-fusion luminaries.

Contact Golden Chords

Golden Chords spent five formative years in the French metropolis. He now contributes regularly to Guitar Xtrem, crafting bespoke articles on jazz and funk improvisation and reviewing the latest equipment. In addition, he imparts his expertise as an instructor at several distinguished music schools. Since 2008, he has performed as a solo guitarist and within curated acoustic duos—featuring exquisite female vocalists—at weddings, private soirées, and exclusive hotels across the Riviera.

Set times are tailored to your event, offering a choice of two 60-minute sets or three 40-minute sets, depending on your bespoke schedule. The fee encompasses a comprehensive suite of premium services: a professional sound system, all travel expenses, curated background and party music during breaks, public liability insurance, and PAT-tested equipment. To ensure an impeccable performance, he arrives at the venue at least two hours before the start time, though his setup and soundcheck require merely 45 minutes.

Should you desire a special song for your first dance, simply inform Golden Chords in advance, and he will learn it exclusively for you. For outdoor performances, he is delighted to oblige, provided the weather is favourable. His refined artistry is equally suited to indoor and outdoor settings, requiring a performance space of approximately three metres by three metres.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Solo Acoustic Guitar
  • Duo – Guitar & Voice
  • Duo – Guitar & Sax

emotional-pianist-vienna-austria.intro_html:
About The Emotional Pianist – An Exquisite Solo Pianist of Unparalleled Refinement, Based in Vienna, Austria

The Emotional Pianist is an Italian pianist and neoclassical-cinematic composer of exceptional artistry, now residing in the cultural capital of Vienna, Austria. Born in Milan, she commenced her musical journey at an early age, studying at the illustrious “Giuseppe Verdi” Conservatory—a foundation that imbued her craft with impeccable discipline. Beyond her musical prowess, she holds a PhD in foreign languages and a degree in psychology, lending a profound intellectual and emotional depth to her performances.

In May 2023, Ale signed with the prestigious label INRI Classic, whose distribution via Universal Music Group brought her debut album to a global audience. Her repertoire, both recorded and live, is a bespoke tapestry of emotion and narrative, curated for the most discerning listeners.

Enquire About The Emotional Pianist
emotional-pianist-vienna-austria.description_html:
Her debut album, released in January 2024, was recorded within the hallowed Bösendorfer Salon at Vienna’s Musikverein—a sanctuary of acoustic excellence and home to the legendary Austrian piano maker. The release concert there was an exclusive affair, a testament to her refined artistry. She has been invited on multiple occasions to perform at the Italian Embassy in Vienna, an honour reserved for the most distinguished talents.

The Emotional Pianist’s international presence is as curated as it is far-reaching: featured at such esteemed festivals as Piano City (across Italy, Spain, and Portugal) and MilanoMusic Week, she has graced venues from Hannersarholt in Reykjavík, Iceland, to the Theatre of Digital Art in Dubai, UAE—the latter a luminous collaboration with the Italian Embassy in Abu Dhabi and Bösendorfer. Each performance is a meticulously crafted journey into sound.

Her global narrative continued with the release of the single Glow on April 11, 2025, as part of the Woman Muse Series from the Spanish neoclassical label AD21. Her second album, forthcoming in 2025, promises an even more expansive vision: original compositions where Ale not only writes the piano parts but also arranges exquisite orchestral string sections, elevating her work to a symphonic plane.

Every composition is a compelling speech of emotions that transcend words. The opening notes serve as an attention-grabbing statement, akin to the first words of a masterful orator. She employs dynamics and articulations with surgical precision—a sudden shift from soft to loud, a delicate staccato passage—to highlight key moments within her music. Each piano piece tells a different story, inviting the listener on a bespoke journey of emotions. The Emotional Pianist’s ability to harness music’s power to convey meaning, evoke feelings, and tell stories is a testament to her remarkable artistry and the transformative potential of her piano keys—a truly exclusive luxury for those who seek the sublime.

lyon-jazz-band-france.intro_html:
The Lyon Jazz Band — An Exquisite Ensemble of Refined Jazz & Swing, Based in Lyon, France

Presenting The Lyon Jazz Band: an impeccably curated ensemble of consummate musicians, celebrated for their charismatic presence and sought after for the most discerning weddings and events throughout the South of France and across Europe.

Their repertoire is a masterful tapestry of refined versatility — from effervescent jazz and swing crafted for elegant dancing, to exuberant gypsy jazz that transforms any soirée into a spirited celebration, or the most sublimely understated background melodies when ambience demands subtlety and grace.

Discover our complete collection of jazz bands in France ➡️

The Lyon Jazz Band is privileged to perform regularly at the most exclusive estates, including Chateau Plombis in Castelsagrat and Château Rigaud in Mouliets-et-Villemartin, France — venues synonymous with sophistication and timeless romance.

Enquire About The Lyon Jazz Band
lyon-jazz-band-france.description_html:
Among the distinguished destinations where we have been commissioned by our clientele through FixTheMusic for their most cherished celebrations...

  • Chateau Plombis, Castelsagrat
  • Domaine de la Fauconnie
  • Chateau de Castellaras
  • Chateau de Varennes
  • Château Rigaud, France
  • LE PARK MOUGINS, Côte d’Azur
  • Chateau Martinay
  • Juan-les-Pins, Antibes
  • Hôtel Le Vieux Castillon
  • Marseille, France
  • Oppède, France
  • Saint-Jean-d'Ardières, France

Should you wish to engage the most refined swing & jazz ensemble that Lyon (Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes) has to offer for your wedding or event, we invite you to reach out.

View our entire portfolio of jazz bands in France ➡️

En français

Le swing-musette, c’est une drôle de musique peu connue et pourtant si riche : née à Paris de la rencontre entre les accordéonistes musette, le jazz fraîchement débarqué d’Amérique, et les guitaristes manouches, cette musique connaîtra ses heures de gloire pendant une courte période de l’Entre-Deux-Guerres, de 1930 à 1940.

Revisitant le bal musette en le réadaptant au contexte d’aujourd’hui, c’est un véritable hommage à un répertoire qui a donné son identité à tout un pays que nous livre The Lyon Jazz Band.

C’est la musique de la France d’hier et d’aujourd’hui : quand la valse parisienne, animée d’un swing contagieux, vient colorer notre quotidien ; quand le bal renaît de nos quartiers pour faire danser ses petits-enfants, et que le suranné flirte avec le neuf. La musique de Lyon Jazz Band s’adresse à tous.

Et ce, dans le but de nous faire réfléchir sur les liens qui nous relient aujourd’hui à notre histoire.

Car c’est de cela qu’il s’agit : The Lyon Jazz Band questionne notre rapport à l’imaginaire populaire, remet en cause notre capacité à reconnaître les fondamentaux de notre histoire et notre capacité à créer nos propres mythes face à une culture de masse triomphante.

The Lyon Jazz Band redécouvre ce répertoire emmené par ses précurseurs qu’étaient Gus, Tony, Jo, Vitese...

Une musique inédite, un voyage pour les jambes, le cœur et les oreilles. L’accordéon toupille, le swing sautille ; c’est une alchimie parfaite entre écriture, virtuosité et un style de vie « canaille », qui souligne le climat créatif d’une époque où tout est encore possible, propre à la période d’entre-deux-guerres.

bordeaux-france-acoustic-duo-under-the-b.intro_html:
About Under the Bay Tree – An Exquisite Acoustic Duo, Based in the Refined Enclave of Arcachon Bay, France

Two virtuosos from impeccably distinct artistic spheres first crossed paths in 2018, their journeys converging in a serendipitous encounter. From this fortuitous meeting, a refined friendship blossomed into an extraordinary musical offering: Under the Bay Tree, a bespoke acoustic duo.

Rooted in the luminous landscapes of the French Riviera, Cannes, and Monaco, their curated presence ensures seamless travel for every distinguished performance. They are regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at the prestigious Château Allure du Lac in Grez-Neuville and the enchanting Château de Tourreau in Sarrians, France.

Inquire About Under the Bay Tree
bordeaux-france-acoustic-duo-under-the-b.description_html:
On one side stands Mat, a blues-rock artisan drawing deeply from funky, rhythmic currents. For years, he carved an illustrious path across Australia, evolving from intimate street performances to the grandest festival stages.

Opposite him is Alex, whose artistry is defined by the subtlest of nuances. Her mellow, ethereal soundscapes have graced the most sophisticated venues across Switzerland and France.

Under the Bay Tree was unveiled in 2022—the sublime union of these two worlds, a seamless blend of rhythm and tenderness. Now based on the serene Bassin d'Arcachon, they perform with impeccable grace throughout France and beyond, having most recently curated a series of exclusive events in the Philippines in February 2023.

About The Marseille Gospel Choir – an exquisite gospel choir for refined weddings along the French Riviera

The Marseille Gospel Choir curates bespoke gospel concerts and impeccably accompanies wedding ceremonies with a repertoire of African American spirituals, alongside elegantly arranged pop and soul covers.

Over two decades of curated gospel performances and festivals, we have cultivated an impeccable reputation and exclusive partnerships with distinguished choral conductors and gospel ensembles across France, Europe, and the international stage.

Should you wish to engage the finest gospel choir the South of France has to offer for your wedding or exclusive event, we invite you to contact The Marseille Gospel Choir.

Contact The Marseille Gospel Choir

french-gipsy-kings-france.intro_html:
About The French Gipsy Kings – An Exquisite Tribute Ensemble Based in Marseille, France

The French Gipsy Kings stand as the most refined Gipsy Kings tribute act available, second only to the original Gipsy Kings themselves. Operating from France, this impeccable ensemble performs regularly across the United Kingdom, Europe, and beyond, offering a truly bespoke experience for discerning clientele.

Since the summer of 2008, the band has been elevated by a lead singer hailing from the Camargue region of France—a gypsy from the area’s original Camargue gypsy families. With a full eight-piece live act, they now present the definitive alternative to the actual Gipsy Kings, curating an atmosphere of unparalleled authenticity and sophistication.

The French Gipsy Kings perform the complete catalogue of Gipsy Kings hits, including such cherished classics as Volare, Bamboleo, My Way, and Hotel California. Their repertoire is a curated journey through the most iconic melodies, each delivered with exquisite artistry.

We are regularly engaged to perform for weddings and exclusive events at St James’s Park in London, a testament to our standing among the most sought-after acts in the industry.

Contact The French Gipsy Kings

With decades of live performance experience and a distinguished client list of high-profile patrons, this tribute band will delight even the most ardent Gipsy Kings aficionado. Their refined musical talent ensures every note is delivered with impeccable precision and passion.

The French Gipsy Kings provide the ultimate fiesta atmosphere, celebrating the history, music, and vibrant spirit of the Gipsy Kings. Their performance is a bespoke experience, designed to transport guests into a world of elegance and joy.

Rest assured, the band’s extraordinary artistry guarantees that every audience member will be moved to rise and dance, creating memories that linger long after the final note. For those seeking to hire one of France’s most exquisite Gipsy Kings tribute bands, look no further than The French Gipsy Kings—and make your inquiry today.

zagreb-jazz-band-croatia.intro_html:
The Zagreb Jazz Band – an exquisite ensemble of professional jazz & swing musicians, bespoke to the cultural heart of Zagreb, Croatia.

Conceived in the spring of 2010, this refined quintet was born from a serendipitous meeting at a jazz workshop in Groznjan, Croatia. A shared fascination with the impeccable opus of Django Reinhardt and an abiding devotion to jazz manouche forged their artistic alliance, culminating in a formation of curated musical mastery.

The Zagreb Jazz Band graces corporate events and weddings across Croatia and Europe, offering a luxurious auditory experience for the most discerning clientele.

Inquire for an Exclusive Booking
zagreb-jazz-band-croatia.description_html:
From 2011 to 2015, the ensemble adorned a distinguished array of venues—from intimate jazz clubs and prestigious festivals to televised broadcasts, private soirées, and cultural landmarks. Each performance is a testament to their bespoke artistry.

Discover Croatia's most refined jazz & swing ensembles ➡️

Below, a curated retrospective of The Zagreb Jazz Band's most notable engagements:

2011

  • XI. Liburnia Jazz Festival, Opatija – First Prize at the Liburnia Jazz International Band Competition
  • Spring Jazz Revue – Marjan Marjanovic, KD Vatroslav Lisinski, Zagreb
  • Moscenice Art Festival, Moscenicka Draga

  • World Music Day, Zagreb
  • Food Film Festival, Zagreb

Discography

In June 2013, the band unveiled their debut album in collaboration with the impeccable Hot Club Records (NOR), under the stewardship of the legendary Jon Larsen (Hot Club de Norvege). This bespoke collection presents nine original compositions—a refined interpretation of contemporary gypsy jazz, weaving influences from traditional jazz, from bebop to modal jazz, and beyond.

The year 2014 marked the release of their second album, Swing '14. This curated record offers an exquisite vision of the jazz standard, serving as an audacious experiment within the genre, featuring compositions seldom heard on gypsy jazz releases or concert stages.

Released once again by Hot Club Records (NOR), the album is available through all premier digital sources. Further elevating its prestige, the acclaimed Norwegian jazz guitarist Jon Larsen included a track from Swing '14 in his compilation Django Festival 8, a showcase of the world's most exceptional contemporary Gypsy Jazz.

wedding-dj-london-europe-glenny.intro_html: DJ Glenny – An Exquisite Wedding DJ, Based in Monaco
wedding-dj-london-europe-glenny.description_html:
DJ Glenny is an internationally acclaimed British DJ, residing in Monaco and the sun-drenched South of France—encompassing Nice, Cannes, and the refined shores of the French Riviera. Each summer, he curates impeccable soundscapes for luxury weddings and exclusive private events across the French Riviera and Provence, performing at the Mediterranean’s most distinguished venues.

Since dedicating himself to the art of DJing full-time in 2014, DJ Glenny has graced premier London establishments—including Café de Paris, Tropicana Beach Club, Century, Heaven London, O2 Academy Islington, and the esteemed Gaucho chain. His bespoke services have been commissioned by corporate luminaries such as H&M, Uber, IBM, and Microsoft.

He is proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s 11 Best Wedding DJs in France 🏆.

Clients who have enquired with DJ Big also explored the following refined wedding DJs on FixTheMusic:

  • DJ Lenny
  • DJ Chris
  • DJ George Jonathan
  • The Exclusive DJ
  • DJ Douglas

Since 2019, DJ Glenny has spent his summers in France, delivering impeccable music management and bespoke DJ sets for luxury weddings and high-end private affairs. His summer residencies include UP Ultimate Provence, Belles Rives Hotel, and Le Provencal Beach Club.

He is regularly engaged to DJ for weddings and events at the exquisite Rocco Forte Masseria Torre Maizza in Italy, Domaine de Collex in Switzerland, and Hotel Belles Rives in Antibes, France.

Contact DJ Glenny

Alongside his passion for House, Pop, Classic R&B, and Disco, DJ Glenny possesses an exceptional wealth of experience in cross-genre mixing, with the refined ability and artistry to captivate any audience.

View all of our DJs in France ➡️

His international sound has echoed through some of France’s most prestigious venues—including Hotel du Cap Eden Roc, Grand-Hotel du Cap-Ferrat, Anjuna Beach Club (Eze), Hôtel Martinez Cannes by Hyatt, and Villa Ephrussi de Rothschild, to name but a few. Notable private commissions include the Monaco Grand Prix, Cannes Lions, and TFWA Cannes.

Please note: DJ Glenny is based on the Côte d’Azur in the South of France and is available for events in Monaco, Nice, Cannes, and Provence. For events in South West France or beyond, additional travel is required, and sound equipment is to be sourced locally.

DJ Glenny currently serves as the global Resident DJ for Virgin Voyages, Richard Branson’s luxury fleet of cruise ships—launching Valiant Lady from the UK in March 2022 and Resilient Lady from Athens in May 2023. From 2015 to 2018, he traversed the globe as a professional DJ aboard the P&O Cruises fleet, delivering a curated selection of Commercial, Chart, Classics, Disco, Soul, R&B, and Pop to up to 4,000 distinguished British guests per cruise.

If you seek to engage one of Monaco’s most exceptional international DJs, do not hesitate to reach out to DJ Glenny today.

wedding-party-sax-dj-greece.intro_html:
About Greece Sax & DJ – a virtuoso saxophonist and masterful DJ, based in the enchanting city of Katerini, Greece

Greece Sax & DJ presents an exquisite duo of refined musical artistry, originating from the idyllic coastal city of Katerini, Greece. This impeccably curated pairing unites a consummate saxophonist with an exceptional DJ, crafting an electrifying fusion of live saxophone melodies and sophisticated DJ mixes that elevate dance floors and leave discerning audiences utterly captivated.

Browse the most sought-after wedding musicians in Greece ➡️

The saxophonist of Greece Sax & DJ is a true virtuoso, driven by a profound passion for music. With years of impeccable experience and a richly diverse musical background, his saxophone mastery delivers an enchanting, soul-stirring performance. He is regularly engaged for bespoke weddings and private events at Laze Santorini and Aelia Luxury Suites in Santorini, Greece.

Contact Greece Sax & DJ
wedding-party-sax-dj-greece.description_html:
Their extraordinary ability to seamlessly traverse genres—from jazz and soul to pop and electronic—imbues each performance with a uniquely captivating sound. The saxophonist’s soulful, melodious phrases, paired with an infectious stage presence, create an indelible experience for every guest. Alongside him, the duo’s exceptional DJ possesses an innate command of atmosphere, curating a playlist that effortlessly reads the room and keeps every guest immersed in the moment.

Browse the most popular wedding musicians in Greece ➡️

With an extensive collection of music spanning multiple genres and eras, the DJ’s expert mixing and seamless transitions sustain an impeccable flow of energy throughout the evening. Greece Sax & DJ is in high demand for weddings and events across Greece and Cyprus, delivering a uniquely unforgettable entertainment experience. Their performances strike a perfect balance between live saxophone and DJ sets, creating an immersive, dynamic atmosphere—from intimate ceremonies to grand corporate galas, the duo’s versatility adapts effortlessly to any setting, tailoring an exceptional performance to the audience’s refined preferences.

Through their exceptional artistry and unwavering dedication, Greece Sax & DJ continues to captivate audiences, establishing themselves as one of the most sought-after sax & DJ duos in Greece. Their passion for music, paired with impeccable professionalism and a commitment to outstanding performance, ensures that every event becomes a truly unforgettable experience for all who attend.

Below are just a few of the prestigious locations where clients have engaged Greece Sax & DJ through FixTheMusic for weddings and events…

  • Laze Santorini
  • Alas Resort & Spa, Elea
  • Paleokastritsa, Corfu
  • Thessaloniki Concert Hall
  • Elounda Bay Palace Hotel
  • Anavyssos, Greece

They offer a bespoke musical experience for weddings and events, providing either:

  • A DJ performance combined with live saxophone, or
  • A solo live saxophone performance

Their services are meticulously tailored to reflect each couple’s unique style and preferences, with the following refined features:

Personalised Playlists

  • Clients may share a curated list of favourite songs or preferred genres.
  • Expert DJs will then craft a custom playlist to perfectly suit the desired mood and atmosphere.

Live Saxophone Repertoire

  • A full repertoire list is available in advance for review.
  • Specific song requests are warmly welcomed with at least 2–3 months’ notice if the piece is not already in the repertoire.

Professional Setup

  • Musicians arrive fully equipped with:
  • Professional musical instruments
  • State-of-the-art sound systems
  • Exquisite lighting systems
  • This ensures a seamless, stress-free experience on the day.

Transparent Pricing

  • All quotes for local events are inclusive of:
  • Travel expenses
  • Equipment setup
  • Performance time
  • This enables precise budgeting with no hidden fees.

Performance Times

  • DJ: Available throughout the entire event
  • Saxophonist: Performs up to 3 sets of 45 minutes each

wedding-band-toulouse-france-funk-mode.intro_html: Funk Mode – An Exquisite Soul, Funk & Pop Covers Ensemble, Based in Toulouse, France
wedding-band-toulouse-france-funk-mode.description_html:
Funk Mode stands as France’s most refined purveyor of soul, Motown, funk, and pop cover performances.

Discover the full collection of bespoke wedding bands in France.

Rooted in Toulouse, this impeccable ensemble is in meticulous demand across France—curated for weddings, corporate galas, private soirées, and any occasion where an exuberant dance floor is the ultimate objective.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 24 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆.

Discerning clients who have explored Funk Mode have also expressed interest in these similarly distinguished ensembles on FixTheMusic:

  1. Funky Fresh

  2. Hyperfunk

  3. Vital Signs

  4. The Bordeaux Soul & Funk Band

  5. The Earthshakers

Connect with us on Facebook and Instagram 📸.

We are frequently engaged for weddings and exclusive events at Chateau La Durantie in Lanouaille and Chateau de Lartigolle in Pessan, France.

Enquire with Funk Mode 💬

Widely acclaimed as the preeminent funk, Motown, and soul ensemble in France, Funk Mode is available for hire at weddings and corporate functions throughout the country, as well as across Europe—particularly in northern Spain.

View our entire curated selection of soul bands in France ➡️

The band is exceptionally sought after for weddings and corporate events in the south of France—including Bordeaux, Cannes, Nice, Toulouse, Marseille, Montpellier, Provence, Lyon, and Carcassonne—as well as in Barcelona and Sitges, Spain. Funk Mode features some of France’s most exceptional vocalists, alongside virtuoso saxophone and trumpet players.

For those seeking to secure the most exhilarating soul band France has to offer for your wedding or event, we invite you to connect with the refined artisans at Funk Mode.

En français

Un des seuls orchestres midi pyrénéen à avoir un rayonnement national et international.

Issue des meilleurs orchestres français et/ou ayant accompagné de grands noms de la variété française, notre équipe compte à son actif des disques d’or et plusieurs victoires de la musique.

Notre répertoire a une ligne directrice claire : La Variété Soul / Funk avec les tubes marquants des 60 dernières années.

Notre ambition : réunir les danseurs invétérés et les mélomanes avertis en proposant une musique dansante et de qualité.

Nous proposons nos services en direct pour les départements suivants : Ariège (09), Aveyron (12), Aude (11), Haute Garonne (31), Gers (32), Lot (46), Lot et Garonne (47), Hautes Pyrénées (65), Pyrénées Orientales (66), Tarn (81), Tarn et Garonne (82), Gironde (33), Landes (40), Pyrénées Atlantiques (64), Dordogne (24), Gard (30), Hérault (34) mais aussi à certaines périodes dans le Var (83).

Pour toute prestation hors de notre région (le grand Sud Ouest), nous vous re-dirigerons vers nos partenaires événementiels.

Pour les déplacements internationaux, nos partenaires événementiels ont une solide expérience et un réseau qui nous permet d'être très réactifs en terme organisationnel (demandes de visas, billets d'avion, hôtels....).

dj-france-exclusive.intro_html:
The Exclusive DJ — An Artisan of Ambiance, Based in Montpellier, France

An open-format virtuoso, The Exclusive DJ curates an impeccable aural experience for the most exalted gatherings. His refined artistry transforms events into immersive, bespoke celebrations of sound.

For over a decade, his captivating performances have enchanted the most distinguished audiences across France, solidifying his reputation as a purveyor of truly sophisticated entertainment.

His prestige is affirmed by his inclusion in FixTheMusic's 12 Best Wedding DJs in France.

Clients captivated by the mastery of The Exclusive DJ frequently also inquire with these esteemed colleagues:

  • DJ Lenny
  • DJ Chris
  • DJ George Jonathan
  • The Exclusive DJ
  • DJ Glenny
  • DJ Douglas

He is available for the most discerning clientele, regularly lending his impeccable touch to weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas across the most exquisite destinations in France.

Prior to your celebration, a bespoke concierge consultation ensues. He will invite you to present a 'wish list' and a 'blacklist' of compositions, orchestrating a custom-tailored set that resonates deeply with your personal narrative.

Discover the full portfolio of exquisite DJs in France ➡️

He is a regular, coveted presence at the most esteemed estates, including Villa La Coste in Le Puy-Sainte-Réparade, Domaine Rocabella in Le Pradet, and Château Gassies in Latresne.

Inquire Regarding The Exclusive DJ's Availability
dj-france-exclusive.description_html:
Immersing himself in the libraries you have curated on Spotify and iTunes, The Exclusive DJ meticulously refines his selection to echo your distinct sensibilities, unearthing the perfect compositions to define your ambiance.

Together, you will define the pivotal 'moments' of your occasion—a grand entrance, the ceremonial cutting of the cake—and synchronize an impeccable soundtrack to elevate each cherished memory.

For weddings, he provides an exquisite score for your first dance, offering refined counsel on the ideal piece to mark this timeless and intimate chapter.

Among the prestigious locales where he has been commissioned by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events:

  • Villa La Coste
  • Domaine Rocabella, Le Pradet
  • Château Gassies, Latresne
  • Le Petit Roulet, Cavaillon
  • Domaine du Mas de Pierre
  • Saint Jean Cap Ferrat

Thus, if your pursuit is one of the South of France's most refined musical curators, your search culminates with The Exclusive DJ. We invite you to initiate a conversation.

Explore the complete collection of distinguished DJs in France ➡️

The Chamonix Singer & Pianist – An Exquisite Solo Performer, Based in Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, France

An exceptionally refined pianist and vocalist, The Chamonix Singer & Pianist brings over fifteen years of impeccable experience to every bespoke performance. Based in the prestigious alpine enclave of Chamonix, France, she curates a sophisticated repertoire that spans the full spectrum of musical styles, ensuring an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance for your celebration.

With a distinguished foundation in classical and jazz disciplines, she crafts a personalised soundscape for your most cherished day. Whether orchestrating a classy ceremony or elevating the evening into an up-tempo, dancing atmosphere, this artist promises unforgettable, luxurious moments woven throughout your wedding.

Inquire About The Chamonix Singer & Pianist

Beyond her classical studies, she earned a four-year degree in jazz piano, a testament to her refined artistry. Since 2019, the esteemed German cruise line AIDA has entrusted her as its music director—a role reserved for only the most accomplished and impeccable talents.

The band’s curated repertoire is both eclectic and sophisticated, spanning contemporary modern anthems alongside cherished classics from the 1970s and 1990s. For those seeking a vintage pop and rock experience of the highest order, these musicians are the ultimate choice.

sax-in-greece-thessaloniki.intro_html:
About Sax in Greece – An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist, Based in Thessaloniki, Greece

Sax in Greece is a refined wedding and event saxophonist, residing in Thessaloniki and performing across the Greek mainland and its enchanting islands. His musical journey began at a distinguished local conservatory, where he immersed himself in the study of music theory, piano, and the saxophone. He graduated with distinction from the NEO Music Conservatory in Thessaloniki in 1999, and holds impeccable diplomas in Harmony, Fugue, Counterpoint, and Orchestration from the Kentrikon Music Conservatory.

Contact Sax in Greece

This bespoke artist has participated in exclusive masterclasses with luminaries such as Greg Badolato, Ron Savage, Chico Freeman, and Eric Alexander. His curated performances have graced prestigious events, including the Papaioannou Festival and the Attiko Alsos in Athens, and have resonated across Russia, Germany, Turkey, Bulgaria, and Italy. Since 2016, he has served as an official endorser and artist for Dave Guardala saxophone mouthpieces, meticulously produced by the Nadir Saxwind Company in Germany. In 2021, his refined artistry was featured in the Hollywood film The Enforcer, starring Antonio Banderas and Kate Bosworth. Sax in Greece continues to captivate discerning audiences, transforming special occasions into unforgettable, luxurious experiences throughout Greece and beyond.
sax-in-greece-thessaloniki.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths? (e.g. 2 x 60 minute sets or 3 x 40 minute sets)</summary>- Usually my sets are 3x45 or 2x60 but i can be flexible depending on what the client wants.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>I can provide my own sound and equipment's in Greece mainland. For events on the Greek islands and places outside Greece where I have to travel by airplane or boat I don't provide my own sound equipment, but I can find sound engineers and companies to supply all the equipment needed. 

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- I can provide any playlist depending on the style you want. I am very flexible and able to add any song you want.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- I arrive at the venue around 2 hours before the event but if if I'm already familiar with the venue, I usually arrive 1 hour before the event starts. This depends of course if I have to set many PA systems or not.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- Soundcheck is less than 10 minutes.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- I can accept all song requests you have and I'm also happy to help you choose special songs if you need recommendations.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- A 3m x 3m space should be perfect for myself to perform comfortable, my laptop and sound system.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- I can also provide a battery powered sound system, which allows me to play anywhere even in places with no electricity.</details>

Skyline Duo presents a refined acoustic experience, specialising in smooth, ambient live music that serves as an impeccable accompaniment to weddings, corporate gatherings, and celebrations of the highest calibre. acoustic-duo-zurich-skyline.description_html:
This versatile ensemble comprises two exceptionally gifted musicians: David and Matt.

David, for whom music is an enduring passion, began his journey at the age of sixteen. Today, he commands a revered presence in the local functions scene. With his Brazilian heritage, he enchants audiences with a soulful voice and exquisite guitar work, or invites them to move to the allure of tropical rhythms.

Matt, who demonstrated his prodigious talent from a remarkably young age, has devoted two decades to mastering the drums. His education includes prestigious music schools in Hungary and a coveted place at the Berklee College of Music. Offering both drums and percussion alongside captivating vocals, he possesses a flair for showmanship and eclectic beats that infuse every performance with an air of excitement.

Together, they deliver an impressive act that elevates any event with a layer of distinction and elegance. For those seeking to engage one of Zürich’s finest acoustic duos, look no further than Skyline Duo—an invitation to experience impeccably curated live music.

Their artistry has been showcased across Spain, the Czech Republic, Austria, Germany, Dubai, Oman, Malta, Cyprus, Bahrain, and Abu Dhabi—each performance a bespoke affair.

Their regular venues include the prestigious Hotel Meliá Palma Marina in Mallorca, LA VILLA am Starnberger See in Germany, the elegant Občanská Plovárna Restaurant in Prague, and the luxurious Kocierz Hotel & SPA in Poland.

Refined Inquiries from Discerning Clients

Do you take any breaks, if so how many and when? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: The fee is for 1 hour and a half with no breaks. If you require breaks, we would be delighted to adapt our set list to your needs.

If there are breaks, will there still be music? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: Certainly. We can provide background music between breaks if desired.

Would we need to rent any equipment (speakers, etc)? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: The price includes the sound system and setup. The system is intended solely for the band’s performance. We manage the setup ourselves, though we welcome the presence of a sound technician if you prefer.

Can you provide wireless mics for the wedding? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: Our equipment is reserved exclusively for our performers. For speeches or other moments, you would need separate microphones, as our system is dedicated to our performance.

What kind of space or stage setup do you require? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: We adapt to our clients’ needs and possibilities. For weddings, we typically discuss the designated area provided by the venue and arrange our stage accordingly.

How much time will you need for setup, soundcheck and breakdown on the day of the event? Does your rate include setup and breakdown? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: Our rate encompasses everything—setup, soundcheck, transportation, and more. We usually arrive 4–5 hours prior to the performance for setup and soundcheck, then enjoy dinner before we begin.

Have you done a performance at Hotel Alfonso before? Are you familiar with the space? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: We have performed in Sevilla at haciendas, though not at the exquisite Hotel Alfonso XIII. Finding the ideal space would pose no challenge, as we have performed in a diverse array of venues—luxury hotels, clubs, outdoors, indoors, and on stages of every scale.

Do you have any lighting or special effects? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: We offer one set of LED lights with various colours that pulse to the rhythm of the music, though we do not provide a full lighting show.

How do you handle song requests? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: Dance song requests are provided at no additional cost. Other requests not already in our set list incur a fee of €120 each.

How long has the band been together? How many weddings have you performed? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: The band formed in 2012, and we have performed at over 30 weddings. Additionally, we have entertained at numerous corporate events, gala dinners, VIP parties, and luxury hotels such as the W Hotel in Barcelona (2018) and Yas Viceroy in Abu Dhabi (2015).

Do you have a COVID / reschedule policy? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: We understand the challenges of planning in these times. We have refunded down payments without hesitation for cancelled events and are happy to reschedule if we are available for the new dates.

Are there any additional fees that are not mentioned? (asked by Zarah on 29 October 2025)

Response from Gaspar: All costs and fees are included as stated, except for invoices, which require an additional 21% IVA/VAT.

pop-covers-duo-montpellier-france-chic.intro_html:
À propos de The Chic Duo – un duo d’exception dédié aux reprises pop, basé à Montpellier, France

The Chic Duo est un duo raffiné, disponible sur réservation pour les mariages, réceptions, événements d’entreprise et toutes autres manifestations privées.

Laissez ces deux musiciens impeccables insuffler une atmosphère d’enchantement à vos convives grâce à un concept sur mesure alliant contrebasse, piano et guitare.

Contacter The Chic Duo
pop-covers-duo-montpellier-france-chic.description_html:
Laissez ces deux musiciens d’exception orchestrer votre événement et surprendre vos invités avec ce concept unique et élégant mêlant la contrebasse, le piano et la guitare.

Des reprises subtilement réarrangées de la variété internationale et française, de la Pop à la Soul, jusqu’au Funk, le tout dans une interprétation résolument exclusive.

Bénéficiez de l’expertise d’un duo qui s’adapte avec une discrétion parfaite à vos désirs, pour vous offrir un moment inoubliable. Soirée privée, anniversaire, cocktail de mariage, réception d’entreprise, plage privée… chaque occasion devient une expérience sur mesure.

Le Spineaker (Port-Camargue), Le Mas du Ministre Mauguio, Le Château St Maur (cru classé) à Cogolin, La Plage des Bikinis Grande Motte – autant d’adresses prestigieuses qui leur ont déjà accordé leur confiance.

Un duo d’exception associant la contrebasse, le piano et la guitare, offrant ainsi un panel d’ambiances raffinées et feutrées, du « Groovy » le plus doux au « Funky » le plus endiablé.

Si vous le souhaitez, vous pouvez soumettre quelques morceaux que vous rêvez d’entendre le jour de votre événement.

Une Animation Musicale d’Exception pour Votre Événement

Vous recherchez des musiciens pour sublimer un événement en préparation ?

Que vous soyez un professionnel, une entreprise organisant un séminaire, un pot de départ ou un cocktail client, ou bien un particulier en quête d’un groupe pour animer une soirée privée, un mariage, un vin d’honneur ou un anniversaire…

The Chic Duo vous proposera une animation unique, sur mesure et d’un professionnalisme irréprochable, afin que votre événement soit un succès éclatant.

Des Musiciens Live pour une Ambiance Exclusive et Envoûtante

Offrez à vos convives ou collaborateurs un concert privé d’une élégance rare.

Quoi de plus précieux que de partager l’intimité d’un petit concert privé durant votre soirée ou votre cocktail ?

The Chic Duo réadapte et réarrange chaque chanson pour lui conférer ce style unique et groovy qui les caractérise.

Que vous aimiez la Pop, les Variétés Internationales ou Françaises, la Soul ou le Funk, vous serez surpris et conquis par la voix sublime d’Amandine, par la beauté chaleureuse de la contrebasse, par le groove et les volutes de la guitare de Jérôme, par les ballades délicates au piano et les morceaux funky endiablés.

Un éventail de styles musicaux qui évoluera au fil de votre événement pour varier les ambiances avec une grâce parfaite.

pop-covers-duo-montpellier-france-chic.faq_html:
<details><summary>Quels sont les services inclus dans le forfait mariage ?</summary>Système de son 1100 watts et amplification, éclairages, piano numérique, guitares, contrebasse + musique pour toujours assurer un fond musical à votre cocktail + éclairage des musiciens.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps à l'avance dois-je vous contacter ?</summary>Le plus tôt sera le mieux car nous sommes souvent réservés 6 mois à un an à l'avance par les mariés.



</details><details><summary>Taille du groupe ?</summary>Petit (2-3 musiciens).



</details><details><summary>Répertoire ?</summary>Variétés internationales et française, pop, rock, soul et funk.



</details><details><summary>Est-il possible de demander une chanson qui ne figure pas dans le répertoire ?</summary>Oui même plusieurs.



</details><details><summary>Expérience ?</summary>Nous nous produisons régulièrement dans les lieux prestigieux du sud de la France et sommes souvent en collaboration avec des Wedding Planner et organisateurs de soirées et mariages.



</details><details><summary>Disposez-vous de votre propre matériel ?</summary>Oui.



</details><details><summary>Avez-vous besoin de matériel spécifique ou de conditions particulières pour pouvoir travailler ?</summary>Non.



</details><details><summary>Pouvez-vous vous déplacer ?</summary>Oui, selon nos disponibilités.



</details><details><summary>Facturez-vous les déplacements ?</summary>Oui, coût variable selon la distance.



</details><details><summary>Couvrez-vous plus d'un mariage par jour ?</summary>Non.



</details><details><summary>Travaillez-vous seul ou en équipe ?</summary>En équipe.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps dure la prestation ?</summary>2 heures environ de musique live.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps de préparation avez-vous besoin ?</summary>1 heure environ.



</details><details><summary>Acceptez-vous de travailler en plein air ?</summary>Oui.</details>

roameo.intro_html: ROAMEO – The World’s First Fully Amplified, Roaming Band. Conceived in London, with curated bases in Barcelona and Dubai, and available for the most discerning clientele worldwide.
roameo.description_html:
✨ What our esteemed clientele cherish most about ROAMEO: An electrifying atmosphere, a captivated dance floor from dusk until dawn, seamless audience engagement, impeccable musicianship, a refined and effortless professionalism, and a bespoke repertoire of exquisite song selections.

ROAMEO is honoured to be ranked No.1 on FixTheMusic's 19 Best Roaming Bands in the UK 🏆

Designed for the most sophisticated settings—exclusive clubs, Michelin-starred restaurants, multi-level estates, private poolside soirees, superyacht decks, and pristine beaches—ROAMEO’s virtuosos transcend the confines of a traditional stage.

Instead, they move with effortless grace through any venue, delivering a balanced, high-definition sound that envelops every guest in an intimate, sonic journey.

ROAMEO is proud to be ranked No.1 on FixTheMusic's 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆

A collective of masterful party architects, united by a refined passion for spirited Soul, Funk, Hip-Hop, 90s nostalgia, and the most sophisticated edge of Pop. Dynamic, charismatic, and delightfully irreverent.
Elevating your wedding, private celebration, or corporate gala to an unparalleled level of distinction.

ROAMEO is celebrated as No.1 on FixTheMusic's 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆

Recently featured in Vogue Adria and Vogue España, we are the preferred choice for weddings and exclusive events at Sofitel Cairo Nile El Gezirah Hotel in Egypt, Borgo Sant'Ambrogio in Italy, Sky Garden in London, and La Baronía in Barcelona, Spain.

Enquire About ROAMEO 💬

ROAMEO stands as the world’s premier electric/amplified roaming wedding band. Our bespoke wireless technology liberates our artists to move through the audience, crafting an immersive experience that draws every guest into the performance, while preserving the full, rich sound of a stage-based ensemble.

Discover our complete collection of UK roaming bands ➡️

Every member of ROAMEO is a seasoned entertainer from the most distinguished backgrounds—impeccable presentation and a finely honed, audience-sensitive charm set us apart. Our sets are a curated journey of cool hits and ingenious mashups.

Our previous clientele includes Facebook, Google, Manchester United Football Club, Ted Baker, Coca Cola, and Hampton Court Palace, among a constellation of other prestigious organisations and venues, including the Singapore Grand Prix.

We possess extensive experience performing beyond the UK, with recent and forthcoming engagements in Malta, France, Italy, Spain, Egypt, Greece, and Portugal. Our performance at a destination wedding in Barcelona was recently celebrated as a real wedding feature in Whimsical Wonderland Weddings.

We are ranked No.1 on FixTheMusic's 21 Best Wedding Bands in Spain 🏆

brass-parade-roaming-lyon-france.intro_html:
Brass Parade – An Exquisite Roaming Brass Ensemble, Curated in Lyon, France

Brass Parade is a refined, high-energy roaming brass band, meticulously based in Lyon, offering a bold sonic presence, impeccable character, and an elevated sense of celebration to weddings, corporate affairs, and private soirées throughout France and Europe.

Among the most distinctive wedding bands in France, they deliver powerful brass arrangements, vibrant percussion, and musicians of unparalleled versatility—equally at home performing on skis as they are orchestrating a dance floor that feels like a sun-drenched summer beach.

Every performance is a bespoke experience, defined by effortless interaction, graceful movement, and curated moments of pure euphoria.

Enquire About Brass Parade
brass-parade-roaming-lyon-france.description_html:
Presenting a repertoire of global hits, exquisitely reimagined for brass, they transform any venue into an immersive live celebration, captivating guests from the very first note. Since 2017, they have orchestrated hundreds of distinguished events, cultivating an impeccable reputation for unforgettable atmosphere and infectious energy.

Available as a refined six-piece ensemble or elevated with an integrated DJ for a seamless hybrid experience, Brass Parade sustains momentum with live sets and polished musical transitions.

Performances extend up to two hours, divided into dynamic, curated sets designed to maintain an impeccable energy flow without interruption.

Professional, flexible, and impeccably prepared, they adapt their repertoire for bespoke moments and arrive fully equipped for performances with a DJ setup.

Effortless to set up, a pleasure to collaborate with, and equally at home in elegant ballrooms or open-air celebrations, they deliver a unique roaming experience that transforms every event into a moving, sophisticated spectacle.

Presenting The Croatia Wedding Saxophonist, a refined and impeccably skilled saxophonist based in Zagreb, who curates captivating performances across Croatia for the most exclusive private weddings, soirées, and distinguished events, as well as prestigious club engagements and festivals. With years of impeccable industry mastery, he is a consummate expert in delivering the perfect, tailored musical entertainment for your most treasured occasion. Drawing from a vast, meticulously curated repertoire spanning eras and genres, he will artfully tailor his set to your every request. From the most tender love songs to anthemic floor-filling masterpieces, The Croatia Wedding Saxophonist ensures an unforgettable auditory journey for every discerning guest. He is regularly commissioned for weddings and elite events at the illustrious Beach Club Hvar and Sun Gardens Dubrovnik, Croatia.

Inquire About The Croatia Wedding Saxophonist

wandering-wonders-roaming-band-paris-fra.intro_html:
Wandering Wonders – An Exquisite Roaming Ensemble Based in Paris, France

Wandering Wonders presents a refined, bespoke musical offering, performing as a roaming ensemble or, upon request, as a fixed band upon a stage or curated area.

Discover FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest wedding bands in Paris.

An acoustic formation graced by an impeccable vocal quartet, this ensemble delivers an immersive, elegant, and uniquely sophisticated experience for your distinguished guests.

From the effortless charm of swing to the vibrant energy of pop, enriched with soul, folk, and rock ’n’ roll, the repertoire is artfully tailored to the atmosphere and audience—always fresh, always refined.

Explore the complete collection of premium wedding bands in Paris.

This ensemble is regularly engaged for exclusive weddings and events at Domaine du Château de Mairy and Hotel Château du Grand-Lucé in France.

Enquire About Wandering Wonders 💬
wandering-wonders-roaming-band-paris-fra.description_html:
With years of impeccable performance experience, Wandering Wonders marries charisma with uncompromising standards, crafting high-end entertainment that leaves an indelible impression.

A supremely flexible formula, exquisitely suited to every setting—indoor or outdoor, relaxed or festive, with or without a sound system—ensuring seamless elegance.

They guarantee flawless service, even amid last-minute changes, with a grace that defines true professionalism.

From intimate cocktail soirées to grand-scale receptions, they infuse every occasion with a chic, warm, and vibrant atmosphere.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Trio: electric guitar/vocal + acoustic guitar/vocal + cocktail drum/vocal
  • Quartet: electric guitar/vocal + acoustic guitar/vocal + double bass/vocal + cocktail drum/vocal

the-menorca-saxophonist.intro_html: The Menorca Saxophonist – an exquisite, bespoke wedding saxophonist based in the refined island of Menorca, Spain.
the-menorca-saxophonist.description_html:
Since 2010, this impeccably curated musician has held an exclusive residence as a live saxophone performer at the legendary Cova d’en Xoroi discotheque. His previous career as a stage and recording artist saw him perform with some of Argentina’s most distinguished pop ensembles, touring across the three Americas and contributing to over one hundred records. He is regularly engaged for weddings and high-calibre events at Comitas Tramontana Park and Comitas Floramar Hotel in Menorca.

Discover the complete collection of wedding musicians in Spain.

Contact The Menorca Saxophonist 💬

From this refined foundation, he brings to your celebration an extraordinary sense of showmanship and an impeccable mastery of musical genres—from Dance Music, Deep House, Disco and Funk to Jazz, Bossa Nova, and every exquisite nuance between. Whether enchanting a cocktail hour or igniting the dance floor, The Menorca Saxophonist remains the most sought-after wedding saxophonist in Menorca. What elevates him above all others is his energetic, bespoke performances and on-demand remixes, crafted exclusively for your occasion.

blissful-beats-skiathos-greece.intro_html:
About Blissful Beats – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, based in Skiathos, Greece

Blissful Beats is a refined, Skiathos-based entertainment collective, curating impeccable musical experiences for weddings and exclusive private celebrations across the Sporades Islands and Central Greece since 2011.

With years of bespoke performance at the most distinguished weddings and events, they offer a meticulously selected repertoire of jazz, rock, funk, Motown, disco, and rock 'n' roll—performed live to polished backing tracks. Whether as an elegant backdrop to your dinner, a bespoke ceremonial feature with a violinist or saxophonist, or an electrifying live party band inspiring an unforgettable dancefloor, every moment is crafted for sophistication.

Blissful Beats also provides their own state-of-the-art PA system, ensuring the highest calibre of sound quality for your exceptional occasion.

Contact Blissful Beats
blissful-beats-skiathos-greece.description_html:
Elevate your celebration with a curated DJ set—our DJ’s professional expertise guarantees an impeccable selection of music that commands the floor.

Share your personal playlist of cherished songs, and the DJ will seamlessly integrate them into the evening’s refined soundscape.

Our bespoke packages offer a spectrum of entertainment possibilities, designed to suit every discerning taste and vision.

From your first enquiry to your final toast, you will receive exclusive, individual attention from a dedicated member of our team, guiding you to create a day as beautiful and memorable as it deserves to be.

Curated Line-Up Options

  • Solo Guitarist-Singer / Saxophonist / Violinist
  • Band Option 1: Guitarist-Singer and Saxophonist or Violinist (An Intimate Duet)

  • Band Option 2: Guitarist-Singer, Saxophonist or Violinist, and Female Singer (A Refined Trio)

  • DJ Option 1: DJ Only

  • DJ Option 2: DJ & Saxophone

adriatic-strings-hvar-croatia.intro_html:
Adriatic Strings – An Exquisite String Quartet, Based in Hvar, Croatia

Each member of this impeccably curated ensemble brings years of international concert experience, performing together as a refined quartet at weddings and exclusive private events for several seasons. Their expansive repertoire, a bespoke collection of over 150 pieces ranging from classical masterpieces to jazz, pop, rock, and cinematic scores, ensures a sophisticated soundtrack for every discerning occasion.

Contact Adriatic Strings

Beyond their distinguished public performances with renowned orchestras, Adriatic Strings now specialise in the art of private entertainment, dedicating their craft primarily to weddings and corporate celebrations. The quartet performs acoustically, offering unparalleled flexibility; they require no additional sound equipment, allowing them to create an elegant atmosphere in the most exclusive of settings, even those without electricity.

Their setup and soundcheck is a seamless affair of approximately 15 minutes, though they arrive at the venue at least one hour prior to their performance, ensuring every detail is impeccably prepared. For an additional bespoke fee, Adriatic Strings are delighted to arrange, learn, and rehearse a special song request beyond their current repertoire, transforming a ceremony or first dance into an unforgettable, personalised moment.

Should you wish to infuse your wedding in Croatia with an air of refined elegance, or elevate your event with the timeless sophistication of classical music, we invite you to contact Adriatic Strings for further details and pricing.
