Bright Hours Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble, Based in Montpellier, France

Since their inception in 2013, Bright Hours Duo has embodied the refined synergy of two exceptionally gifted musicians. This curated partnership brings an energetic yet sophisticated presence to every performance.

Discover the full collection of bespoke wedding musicians in France.

With a profound affinity for acoustic and jazz, Bright Hours Duo reimagines your most cherished melodies through impeccably crafted, vibrant arrangements—transforming any occasion into an unforgettable affair.

Their extensive and eclectic repertoire spans from the timeless elegance of My Cherie Amour to the irresistible energy of Thriller, ensuring a selection that captivates every discerning guest.

Explore the finest wedding bands on the French Riviera.

This distinguished duo is regularly engaged for exclusive weddings and events at the most prestigious venues, including Villa La Coste in Provence, Abbaye Saint-Eusèbe in Saignon, and Château Canet in Rustiques, France.

Inquire About Bright Hours Duo 💬

View our complete selection of acoustic duos in France ➡️

Having performed extensively across France, the duo brings a wealth of international experience to every engagement—from intimate weddings and private soirées to grand festivals and exclusive corporate events.

Browse the full portfolio of luxury wedding bands on the French Riviera.

Below are just a few of the exquisite locations where clients have secured their services through FixTheMusic:

  • Château Canet, Rustiques
  • Abbaye Saint-Eusèbe, Saignon

We are charismatic, impeccably polished musicians, masterfully curating an evening that keeps your guests immersed in rhythm and revelry until the final note.

Discover our curated 2025 SET LIST 🎵

We are frequently engaged for bespoke celebrations at Château de Sannes, Château de Saint-Martory, and the Parc des Expositions et Centre de Conventions & Congrès de Toulouse Métropole.

Enquire with Athena Acoustic Band
wedding-band-montpellier-france-athena.description_html:
Athena Acoustic Band is an ensemble of distinguished musicians, specialising in acoustic artistry for weddings and exclusive events. They bring forth an unparalleled blend of talent, elegance, and authenticity, joyfully orchestrating the most exquisite moments of your cherished day.

Explore our complete collection of France-based wedding bands ➡️

Immerse yourself in the performances of Athena Acoustic Band and extend an invitation to grace your celebration.

Whether upon the stage, within a manicured park, or beneath an elegant indoor setting, this trio refines its delivery to match your celebration, ensuring their vocal and instrumental performance weaves seamlessly through the most refined and moving chapters of your festive day.

We invite you to consult with them regarding the bespoke packages best suited to your event, travel possibilities, and the details of their modern repertoire—a curated selection of pop, rock, and soul covers.

Below are just a few of the prestigious venues where we have been booked by discerning clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events...

  • Château de Sannes

Ces artistes riment avec talent, élégance, et authenticité. C’est avec une joie raffinée qu’ils mettront en musique les instants les plus exquis de votre grand jour.

wedding-band-montpellier-france-athena.faq_html:
<details><summary>What services are included in the wedding package?</summary>Music for the ceremony, music for the reception.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance should I contact you?</summary>In advance if possible, but if necessary at the last moment depending on availability.



</details><details><summary>Group size?</summary>Small (2-3 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertoire?</summary>Avicii, Bill Withers, Bob Marley, Bruno Mars, Coldplay, Corinne Bailey Rae, Daft Punk, David Guetta, Gnarls Barkley, Incubus, Jack Johnson, James Morrisson, Jamie Lidell, Jason Mraz, Limp Bizkit...



</details><details><summary>Is it possible to request a song that is not in the repertoire?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>We have extensive experience in events. We have been professional musicians for many years.



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Do you need specific equipment or special conditions to be able to work?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Do you charge for travel?</summary>Yes, beyond 50 km.



</details><details><summary>Do you cover more than one wedding per day?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>How long does the performance last?</summary>The performance lasts about 2 hours.



</details><details><summary>How much preparation time do you need?</summary>1 hour for unloading and installation.



</details><details><summary>Do you perform outdoors?</summary>Yes, provided we have adequate cover from the elements.



</details><details><summary>Quels sont les services inclus dans le forfait mariage?</summary>Musique pour la cérémonie, musique pour le vin d'honneur.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps à l'avance dois-je vous contacter?</summary>A l'avance si possible, mais si besoin au dernier moment selon les disponibilités.



</details><details><summary>Taille du groupe?</summary>Petit (2-3 musiciens).



</details><details><summary>Répertoire?</summary>Avicii, Bill Withers, Bob Marley, Bruno Mars, Coldplay, Corinne Bailey Rae, Daft Punk, David Guetta, Gnarls Barkley, Incubus, Jack Johnson, James Morrisson, Jamie Lidell, Jason Mraz, Limp Bizkit...



</details><details><summary>Est-il possible de demander une chanson qui ne figure pas dans le répertoire?</summary>Oui.



</details><details><summary>Expérience?</summary>Nous avons une grande expérience dans l'événementiel. Nous sommes musiciens professionnels depuis de nombreuses années.



</details><details><summary>Disposez-vous de votre propre matériel?</summary>Oui.



</details><details><summary>Avez-vous besoin de matériel spécifique ou de conditions particulières pour pouvoir travailler?</summary>Non.



</details><details><summary>Pouvez-vous vous déplacer?</summary>Oui.



</details><details><summary>Facturez-vous les déplacements?</summary>Oui, au-delà de 50 km.



</details><details><summary>Couvrez-vous plus d'un mariage par jour?</summary>Non.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps dure la prestation?</summary>La prestation dure environ 2h00.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps de préparation avez-vous besoin?</summary>1H00 (déchargement, installation et balances).



</details><details><summary>Acceptez-vous de travailler en plein air?</summary>Oui.</details>

montpellier-jazz-band-france.intro_html:
The Montpellier Jazz Band — An Exquisite Ensemble of Refined Jazz & Swing, Based in Montpellier, France

The Montpellier Jazz Band delivers an unparalleled and immersive jazz experience through a meticulously curated repertoire that, while honouring the timeless traditions of classic jazz, radiates an unmistakable and refined originality. This distinguished sextet is in exceptional demand for bespoke performances at weddings, corporate soirées, and private celebrations throughout Montpellier and the surrounding enclaves of southern France, with a particular prominence in the enchanting region of Provence.

Discover our complete collection of jazz bands in France ➡️

We are consistently engaged to perform at the most prestigious venues, including Château de Robernier in Montfort-sur-Argens and Domaine du Clos d'Hullias in Saint-Christol-de-Rodières, France — each event an impeccably orchestrated affair.

Enquire with The Montpellier Jazz Band
montpellier-jazz-band-france.description_html:
This exquisite sextet draws its inspiration from the timeless allure of vintage jazz from the 1920s, reviving the repertoire through original arrangements that seamlessly weave the subtleties of melodic refinement with the spontaneous artistry of improvisation.

Explore our full selection of jazz bands in France ➡️

The uncommon orchestration, evocative of the string bands of that golden era, combined with the vocal quartet’s harmonised passages, bestows upon the ensemble a uniquely captivating and sophisticated sound.

Having graced hundreds of weddings, festivals, private events, and concerts over the past seven years, The Montpellier Jazz Band has become a celebrated name across Provence, the French Riviera, and throughout the south of France.

The journey began in the charming streets of Montpellier, where the band was born — and where we still delight in returning. We honed our craft by transmitting an irresistible energy and a deep reverence for this music, which continues to enchant audiences of every generation and provenance.

Below is a selection of the prestigious locations where clients on FixTheMusic have commissioned us for their weddings and events...

  • Château de Robernier
  • Domaine du Clos d'Hullias
  • Brasserie du Corum, Montpellier
  • Chateau de Fontarèches
  • Château Saint-Victor-la-Coste
  • Saint-Jurs, France
  • La Ciotat, Provence
  • Callian, France

An Impeccable Jazz Ensemble for Weddings

The Montpellier Jazz Band is the quintessential choice for weddings in the south of France. We offer a bespoke selection of refined, light jazz for your wedding breakfast or cocktail reception, alongside spirited, effervescent Dixieland jazz for your evening celebration — guaranteed to inspire your guests to the dance floor with effortless grace.

We perform as a vintage jazz band at weddings in Montpellier, Marseille, Cannes, Nice, Monaco, along the luminous French Riviera (Côte d'Azur), Provence, and beyond in the south of France.

Our Distinguished Ensemble

The Montpellier Jazz Band comprises Joseph (banjo, vocalist, and arranger), Pierre (clarinet, bass clarinet, and vocalist), Heykel (violin and vocalist), Alexis (guitar and vocalist), Gildas (double bass and vocalist), and Simon (drums).

If you seek to secure the most refined jazz band that Montpellier, France, has to offer for your wedding or distinguished event, we invite you to make contact.

groove-machine-barcelona-spain.intro_html:
Groove Machine – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble, Based in Barcelona, Spain

Groove Machine stands as Barcelona’s most refined wedding and party band, offering a bespoke musical experience of impeccable quality. Discover the full collection of curated wedding bands in Barcelona. For those seeking a more intimate affair, an exquisite solo singer option is available—perfectly suited for ceremonies, cocktail receptions, intimate dinners, or exclusive soirées. Their repertoire is a meticulously curated selection, spanning the latest pop sensations, electrifying rock anthems, and timeless Motown classics, alongside sophisticated jazz, funk, and disco. We are proudly featured on FixTheMusic’s definitive guide to the best wedding bands in Barcelona. This ensemble is frequently engaged for distinguished celebrations at venues such as Santa Romana Apartments in Caldes d’Estrac and Gran Villa Rosa in Barcelona, Spain. Inquire About Groove Machine 💬
groove-machine-barcelona-spain.description_html:
Whether your vision calls for spirited dance anthems, refined ambient melodies, or acoustically pure sets, Groove Machine artfully tailors each performance to the unique character of your event.

Curated Line-Up Options

  • Solo Female Singer – An intimate, singular voice for moments of profound elegance.
  • 3-Piece/Trio: Lead Vocals, Backing Vocals (x2), Guitar & Bass.
  • 4-Piece Band: Lead Vocals, Backing Vocals (x2), Guitar, Bass & Drummer.
  • 5-Piece Band: Lead Vocals, Backing Vocals (x2), Guitar, Bass, Drummer & Keyboardist—adding harmonic richness and melodic depth.
  • 6-Piece Band: Lead Vocals, Backing Vocals (x2), Guitar, Bass, Drummer, Keyboardist & Saxophonist—infusing the performance with dynamic energy and a soulful, refined edge.

These bespoke configurations allow you to tailor the ensemble precisely to your event’s atmosphere. View the complete array of exquisite wedding bands in Spain.

We provide impeccably curated music for every chapter of your wedding day:

Ceremony Music
Duration: 4–5 specially selected songs, crafted to create a deeply personal and emotionally resonant ambiance.
Line-up: Trio (Lead Vocalist, Bass Player, Guitarist)
Style: Soulful, intimate, and elegant—fully bespoke to your preferences.

Aperitif / Cocktail Hour Music
Duration: 2 x 45-minute sets with a 15-minute interlude.
Line-up: Trio (Lead Vocalist, Bass Player, Guitarist + 2 Backing Vocalists)
Style: Choose from relaxed jazzy vibes, soulful ballads, or an effervescent, upbeat mix.

After-Dinner Party Band
Duration: 1.5 hours of high-energy, uninterrupted music to keep the dance floor resplendent.
Line-up: Quartet or Quintet (Lead Vocalist, 2 Backing Vocalists, Bass, Guitar, Drummer)
Saxophone available as an optional, luxurious add-on.
Style: Crowd-pleasing hits from Pop and R&B, late '90s to present, designed to captivate every guest.

Customisation Options:
To elevate the experience further, you may add additional musicians—such as Saxophone, Trumpet, Keyboard, or Trombone—for an even more opulent sound.

Extend the Celebration – Music for Day 2 or the Day Before the Wedding
Whether planning a pre-wedding gathering or a serene post-wedding recovery, we offer two additional, refined formats:

  • Electronic Trio: Vocals, Bass, Guitar & Electronic Beats – A cool, modern sound, perfect for rooftop soirées or stylish evening events.
  • Chill Jazzy Pop Trio: Vocals, Bass & Guitar – A relaxed, organic sound, live and beat-free, with jazzy, soulful, and pop-infused tones.

Duration: 2 x 45-minute sets with a 15-minute interlude.

We are also listed on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the best wedding bands in Spain.

Our Bespoke Quotes Generally Include:

  • Early arrival for a full, meticulous soundcheck
  • Travel expenses (vehicle, fuel)
  • Full-day musician compensation

Please note:
- Sound equipment is not included and is quoted separately.
- Groove Machine can provide sound for the ceremony and aperitif, but not for the after-dinner party.

For the evening celebration, we strongly recommend engaging a professional sound company to ensure exceptional quality and seamless execution.

Additional Refinements

We are delighted to accept song requests for all parts of the event, kindly requesting them at least 60 days in advance. It is our privilege to collaborate closely with each couple, ensuring the music is a flawless reflection of your unique story and radiant energy.

samba-luz-brasilian-nice-france.intro_html:
Samba Luz — An impeccably curated French-Brazilian ensemble, based in the refined enclave of Nice on the French Riviera.

Since their inception in 2016, Samba Luz has been captivating discerning audiences with an authentically vibrant Latin ambiance. Their bespoke repertoire is a masterful fusion of rhythmic percussion and smooth melodies, elegantly traversing the sophisticated landscapes of Bossa Nova and Brazilian Jazz before rising into the exhilarating energy of Samba, Salsa, and Pagode.

Enquire About This Exclusive Ensemble
samba-luz-brasilian-nice-france.description_html:
The impeccably balanced lineup comprises a virtuoso drummer and percussionist, a captivating vocalist, a refined bassist, and either a pianist or accordionist—delivering a complete and joyous celebration of Latin musical artistry. Their performances are expertly curated into a seamless two-hour journey of sound, maintaining an atmosphere of euphoric elegance from the first note to the last.

For events along the Côte d'Azur and in Monaco, Samba Luz provides their own state-of-the-art sound equipment, arriving three hours prior to execute an impeccable setup and sound check, typically completed within an hour. They graciously accommodate bespoke song requests to ensure a uniquely personal experience and require a performance area of approximately six by eight metres.

Entirely at home in exquisite outdoor settings—from pristine beaches to majestic open-air venues—Samba Luz transforms any location into a luxurious and vibrant celebration.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆.

party-band-london-upshots.description_html:

View the most sought-after function bands in the UK.

Select from a refined 5-piece, 7-piece, or 9-piece configuration—or any bespoke arrangement in between.

We are proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆.

party-band-london-upshots.faq_html:
<details><summary>What events do The Upshots play at?</summary>The band have played at all sorts of events, the most common are: Corporate events, weddings, birthdays, awards ceremonies, Bar Mitzvahs, Jewish weddings, PR events, trade shows, charity balls, Christmas parties, celebrity events, TV wrap shows, New Year's Eve celebrations  

</details><details><summary>Can we see The Upshots perform?</summary>The majority of The Upshots' performances are at private events, and the band rarely hold public showcases. However, please speak to the band's manager about any upcoming events which guests can attend.   

</details><details><summary>How do we check availability and make a booking?</summary>Just send us an enquiry on FixTheMusic and we'll be in touch with you asap.

</details><details><summary>What line-ups are available?</summary>5-piece to 9-piece band + DJ.

</details><details><summary>Do The Upshots supply sound, lighting & stage production?</summary>For events up-to 200 guests, The Upshots provide all sound equipment which is included in our quote for the band’s service. Over 200 guests we send our technical rider for an external production company to supply all sound equipment required.   

We do not provide sound or lighting production for overseas events. It is the responsibility of the client, venue or planner to source the equipment that we require in accordance with the event's technical rider.



</details><details><summary>Can you provide a DJ?</summary>Included when you book the band are DJ playlists before, between and after the band sets – which is picked to suit the occasion. A separate manned DJ taking requests is available as an add-on.   



</details><details><summary>Can we choose what songs the band play?</summary>Trust must be placed in the band to write the setlist as they deem fit and will read the crowd and make changes as the set progresses live.

What you see in our videos is what you will get at your event – soul, funk, pop and all big hits! Furthermore, the band will always offer to learn and perform a couple’s first dance (if playing at a wedding).   



</details><details><summary>Finishing after midnight?</summary>This is rarely a problem but should be agreed on booking. Our standard quotation is for a midnight finish.   



</details><details><summary>What are the band's set times?</summary>The Upshots play a 120-minute party set, which can be either performed straight, in 2 x 60 minutes or 3 x 40 minutes sets. 



</details><details><summary>How far have do you travel?</summary>Worldwide.



</details><details><summary>Do you need a stage?</summary>To get the most out of the band we always recommend a raised stage (minimum dimensions 3m X 2m).



</details><details><summary>Do The Upshots have any personal requirements?</summary>We are not a picky bunch but ask for a green room area and a hot meal with drinks for each musician.



</details><details><summary>How long do you need to setup?</summary>We ask for 1 - 2 hours for setting up and a soundcheck.</details>

mojo-cover-band-london.intro_html:
MOJO – The Quintessential London Ensemble for Exquisite Destination Weddings Across Europe & the Middle East

What discerning clientele cherish most about MOJO: An electrifying, impeccably curated performance defined by standout vocals, seamless crowd engagement, flawless planning, perpetually full dance floors, bespoke setlists, and an optional DJ experience for an uninterrupted celebration.

Step into the refined world of MOJO, the most distinguished band on London’s wedding and private event circuit.

We have masterfully fused breathtaking vocals with an exceptionally tight rhythm section and razor-sharp horns to craft the ultimate ensemble for any occasion.

Proudly featured on FixTheMusic’s 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆

From Stevie Wonder’s soulful masterpieces and James Brown’s timeless funk to modern anthems by Daft Punk and Bruno Mars, MOJO ensures your dance floor remains exquisitely animated throughout the evening.

We also present our highly sought-after DJ Live experience, meticulously designed to evoke the luminous energy of Ibiza’s most celebrated summer nights... MOJO Club Live.

Our artistry has been celebrated in Vogue following a bespoke performance at a destination wedding on the Amalfi Coast, Italy.

Additionally, we are honoured to be listed on FixTheMusic’s 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆

Our calendar is regularly adorned with bookings at Château Rigaud in France, Villa Cora and Ca' P'a Casa Privata in Italy, Son Berga in Mallorca, Stadtwaldhaus Krefeld in Germany, and Lulworth Castle in Dorset, UK.

Enquire with MOJO 💬
mojo-cover-band-london.description_html:
MOJO’s distinguished performance credits include collaborations with Heaven 17, Beverley Knight, Jamiroquai, The Divine Comedy, Ed Sheeran, Kwabs, Jools Holland, the National Theatre, NYJO, the RSC, and numerous West End productions.

Explore our curated selection of the UK’s finest soul & Motown ensembles ➡️

Equipped with a premium P.A. system and a stunning light show, MOJO delivers an awe-inspiring performance from the first note to the last.

For every booking, we craft an inspirational playlist tailored exclusively for each couple—elevating their celebration to new heights of joy.

From timeless sixties and seventies classics to the most coveted contemporary wedding anthems, MOJO transforms your reception into an unforgettable affair. We also offer a refined selection of musical options to accompany other moments of your day.

Our exceptionally versatile and experienced musicians can provide exquisite background music earlier in the day, whether through delicate acoustic sets or sophisticated jazz arrangements—just two examples of the bespoke experiences we curate for you.

wedding-band-toulouse-france-whiskey-boy.description_html:
What discerning clients cherish most about The Whiskey Boys: an impeccably curated live band, a dance floor alive with energy throughout the evening, masterful crowd intuition, consummate professionalism, and an unwavering dedication to a warm, bespoke experience.

The Whiskey Boys present a dynamic and sophisticated repertoire of pop and rock covers, curated for those who demand the finest in musical entertainment.

Their services are in exceptional demand for weddings and exclusive celebrations throughout Toulouse and the refined landscapes of the South of France.

Explore our complete collection of France-based wedding bands ➡️

Should you seek to secure the most distinguished wedding band Toulouse (France) has to offer, an introduction to The Whiskey Boys is an essential indulgence.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic's 24 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆.

Our presence is regularly requested for weddings and exclusive events at the illustrious Château De La Valouze in La Roche-Chalais and the enchanting Chateau de Brametourte in Lautrec, France.

Enquire with The Whiskey Boys 💬

Engage the artistry of The Whiskey Boys — these supremely talented musicians will orchestrate the musical tapestry of your reception with an atmosphere of effortless elegance and refined warmth.

View all of our France-based wedding bands ➡️

The Whiskey Boys are, above all, a collective of musicians who have earned a professional degree from the distinguished Music Halle school of contemporary music in Toulouse.

With impeccable experience in the event industry, they now dedicate their entire savoir-faire and passionate enthusiasm to the service of your most beautiful day.

Curate an atmosphere of vibrant sophistication within your reception space, and entice your guests to dance until the final, memorable note. Their exquisitely varied repertoire — a seamless journey through soul, funk, pop, and rock — is designed to captivate both the young and the young at heart.

wedding-band-toulouse-france-whiskey-boy.faq_html:
<details><summary>What services are included in the wedding package?</summary>2 hour service, arrival 1.5 hours before the start of the service.



</details><details><summary>How far in advance should I contact you?</summary>Ideally 1 month.



</details><details><summary>Group size?</summary>Small (2-3 musicians).



</details><details><summary>Repertore?</summary>Varied...pop, rock, soul and funk repertoire from Amy Winehouse to the Beatles, via Ray LaMontagne and Chuck Berry.



</details><details><summary>Is it possible to request a song that is not in the repertoire?</summary>It is certainly possible to order songs that are not in the repertoire.



</details><details><summary>Experience?</summary>All three performers from the degree course of Music Halle in Toulouse, great experience of the stage and performance.



</details><details><summary>Do you have your own equipment?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Can you travel?</summary>Yes, in the Occitanie region of the South of France.



</details><details><summary>Do you charge for travel?</summary>Yes, the price of petrol per kilometer.



</details><details><summary>How long does your performance last?</summary>The service is variable from 1 hour to 3 hours.



</details><details><summary>How much preparation time do you need?</summary>We arrive 1.5 hours before the start of the service for installation and preparation.



</details><details><summary>Can you perform outdoors?</summary>Yes.



</details><details><summary>Quels sont les services inclus dans le forfait mariage?</summary>Prestation de 2 h, arrivée 1h30 avant le début de la prestation ; repas et défraiement pour le trajet (essence) non inclus.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps à l'avance dois-je vous contacter?</summary>Idéalement 1 mois.



</details><details><summary>Taille du groupe?</summary>Petit (2-3 musiciens).



</details><details><summary>Répertoire?</summary>Répertoire folk / pop / rock varié : d'Amy Winehouse aux Beatles, en passant par Ray LaMontagne ou Chuck Berry...



</details><details><summary>Est-il possible de demander une chanson qui ne figure pas dans le répertoire?</summary>Il est évidemment possible de commander des chansons qui ne sont pas dans le répertoire.



</details><details><summary>Expérience?</summary>Tous trois issue du cycle long de Music Halle à Toulouse, grande expérience de la scène et de l'animation.



</details><details><summary>Disposez-vous de votre propre matériel?</summary>Oui.



</details><details><summary>Pouvez-vous vous déplacer?</summary>Oui, en région Occitanie.



</details><details><summary>Facturez-vous les déplacements?</summary>Oui, le prix de l’essence au kilomètre.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps dure la prestation?</summary>La prestation est variable de 1 heure à 3 heures.



</details><details><summary>Combien de temps de préparation avez-vous besoin?</summary>Nous arrivons 1h30 avant le début de la prestation (installation, préparation).



</details><details><summary>Acceptez-vous de travailler en plein air?</summary>Oui.</details>

sax-dj-prague.intro_html:
About The Prague Sax DJ – an exquisite wedding saxophonist based in Prague, Czech Republic

The Prague Sax DJ is a refined fusion of DJ, saxophonist, and host—an impeccably curated presence delivering high-energy, feel-good performances that elevate weddings and celebrations across Europe.

A full-time musician since 2014, he graces over 200 events annually, from intimate soirées to exuberant dance floors, bringing unparalleled experience, versatility, and an innate connection with discerning guests to every occasion.

His signature style seamlessly weaves bespoke DJ sets with live saxophone, creating a fluid musical narrative that builds atmosphere and keeps guests captivated from the first note to the final encore.

View more DJ & sax players in Prague

Whether offering smooth, ambient melodies, poignant moments, or exuberant celebration, he reads the room with impeccable intuition, delivering the perfect sound at the perfect moment.

Contact The Prague Sax DJ 💬
sax-dj-prague.description_html:
With international experience cultivated over years performing aboard luxury cruise ships, he is exceptionally adept at enchanting diverse audiences and adapting to any refined setting.

His performances range from a complete DJ, sax, and hosting experience to standalone saxophone showcases—each adding an unforgettable live dimension to any event.

From modern dance music—house and commercial hits—to timeless classics across genres, his repertoire is meticulously curated to suit every sophisticated crowd.

Fully equipped with professional sound and lighting for gatherings of up to 150 guests, he offers a flawless, stress-free musical solution.

Performing on soprano, alto, and tenor saxophone, equally at home as a solo act or collaborating with fellow musicians, he brings both technical mastery and commanding stage presence to every performance.

Polished, effortlessly engaging, and supremely refined, The Prague Sax DJ creates unforgettable musical moments that sustain elevated energy and keep the dance floor resplendent all night long.

dj-clap-brighton-london-barcelona.intro_html:
DJ Clap – An Exquisite Curated Experience for Discerning Celebrations

An impeccable presence in the world of refined entertainment, DJ Clap offers a bespoke musical journey from his refined bases in Brighton, London, and Barcelona. Since the age of twenty-one, he has dedicated himself exclusively to crafting extraordinary parties for those who seek the exceptional—creative, imaginative, and adventurous souls who truly embrace life.

His curated repertoire spans from intimate alpine soirées at the world’s most prestigious ski resorts to exhilarating Pro Surf competition gatherings, Brighton beachfront galas, and private events for Olympians and luminaries. He has graced Roman villas, French châteaux, stadiums across the Czech Republic, alpine peaks, and the remote isles of Scotland—each performance a testament to his artistry and versatility.

Enquire About DJ Clap

Closer to the heart of Europe, his refined craft has been commissioned for the Royal Albert Hall, Babington House, Brighton’s shoreline, and Blenheim Palace. These impeccable credentials, combined with his innate ability to orchestrate unforgettable evenings, have earned him the highest recommendations from the UK’s finest event curators, international wedding planners, and an illustrious array of venues across Britain and the Continent.

Should you wish to invite him to compose your own bespoke celebration, please reach out—and discover the glowing testimony of those who have already experienced his exquisite artistry.

steel-band-france.intro_html:
About The France Steel Band – An Artisan Ensemble of Refined Steelpan Virtuosity, Based in Montpellier, France

The France Steel Band represents an exquisite assembly of the most accomplished steelpan musicians in the South of France. This bespoke ensemble, headquartered near Montpellier, performs with impeccable frequency across the nation at an exclusive array of private and public occasions—from nuptial celebrations to curated festivals. Their repertoire, meticulously curated across eras and genres, encompasses the refined rhythms of Calypso, the grandeur of classical compositions, the soulful depths of reggae, and the polished pop interpretations of icons such as Stevie Wonder and The Beatles.

Enquire with The France Steel Band

The band offers a fully customisable line‑up, ensuring an impeccable fit for every distinguished event. Choose from an intimate solo performance, a refined trio, a harmonious quartet, or a full ensemble of up to twelve pannists—each configuration delivering a signature level of exclusivity and sonic refinement. With decades of combined industry experience, the band guarantees a performance that is both virtuosic and impeccably professional, elevating your occasion into an unforgettable luxury experience. Their entirely acoustic setup ensures seamless adaptation to both indoor soirées and alfresco celebrations, and they are delighted to travel to your chosen destination. For those seeking to engage one of France’s most distinguished steel bands, look no further than The France Steel Band—contact us today to begin your bespoke journey.

This bespoke, fully functional instrument—remarkably portable—has been engineered to captivate with its refined aesthetic, serving as the luminous centrepiece of Panache’s breathtaking performances.

Beyond its core duo configuration, Panache effortlessly expands into a trio or quartet, welcoming additional instruments such as saxophone, percussion, and drums. This versatility ensures an unparalleled live experience, tailored to the most exclusive celebrations.

The masterminds behind this duo have devoted over five years to perfecting live performances at distinguished events, earning a reputation for sophistication and artistry.

About Bops & Beats – an exquisite wedding & party ensemble, based in the refined city of Toulouse, France

👏 What discerning clients treasure most about Bops & Beats: Impeccably high energy and sophisticated fun, a dance floor alive all evening, effortless professionalism, bespoke flexibility, and a curated, versatile repertoire.

Bops & Beats is an exceptional wedding band, devoted to delivering the most refined musical artistry for occasions of every calibre. Their performances are an unparalleled fusion of solid groove, impeccably polished harmonies, and a wholly live, authentic approach.

Comprising a drummer, bassist, guitarist & vocalist, and a lead singer, this ensemble offers an extraordinarily broad, hand-selected repertoire from which you may curate the perfect soundtrack. For a more intimate atmosphere—ideal for afternoon cocktail receptions—they also present their acoustic duo, Jennifer & Jérémy.

Their songbook spans both English and French compositions, making them the quintessential choice for those planning a destination celebration in the breathtaking south of France. The band is regularly engaged to perform at prestigious venues such as Château Les Carrasses in Quarante and MGallery La Cour des Consuls Hotel & Spa in Toulouse.

Enquire about Bops & Beats 💬

wedding-party-band-toulouse-bops-beats.faq_html:
<details><summary>How much do you charge?</summary>The price depends on the length and type of performance. Get in touch for an accurate quote!



</details><details><summary>How far do you travel?</summary>We are based in South West France but we perform across the country as well as internationally. 



</details><details><summary>What happens if a band member is ill on the day of our event?</summary>We have many connections within the musical community in Toulouse so it would be easy for us to find a replacement musician that we have experience performing with and who knows our setlist. 



</details><details><summary>How long can you play for?</summary>Typically, we limit our performances to 4 hours maximum (including two sets of 2 hours). But we can discuss this in more detail with you.



</details><details><summary>How long does it take you to set up?</summary>This is pretty dependent on the situation and line-up. On average our set-up takes between 2-4 hours depending on the sound and lighting equipment needed.



</details><details><summary>Is it possible to meet you before my event?</summary>Sure! We're always happy to organize meetings in advance, so we can discuss your event and answer all of your questions!



</details><details><summary>Is all the sound equipment included in the quote?</summary>Yes! Our quotes always include sound and lighting equipment.</details>

En Español

Bonita Duo es un dúo a dos voces (femenina y masculina) y guitarra que ha creado un repertorio con la mejor música de la década de los 80 hasta la actualidad para interpretar en bodas y eventos.

Además, también tienen en cuenta vuestras peticiones para que suenen vuestras canciones preferidas durante la celebración.

Ambos componentes de Bonita Duo poseen una larga trayectoria musical y cuentan con el respaldo de innumerables conciertos que les han brindado soltura, adaptabilidad y sensibilidad en sus actuaciones.

Bonita Duo os ofrece interpretar música durante el cóctel o banquete y/o durante la ceremonia.

Creando un ambiente acogedor y emotivo, al son de las mejores canciones escogidas del repertorio e incluso alguna de vuestras peticiones, perfecto para la ocasión.

Síguenos en Facebook e Instagram 📸

acoustic-duo-northern-spain-bonita.faq_html:
<details><summary>¿Qué incluye el pack de boda?</summary>Incluye un repertorio de una hora y media a dos horas, más el equipo de música y el desplazamiento. Existe la opción de realizar el aperitivo o la ceremonia e incluso ambas.



</details><details><summary>¿Con cuánta antelación debo ponerme en contacto contigo?</summary>Como mínimo, un mes de antelación



</details><details><summary>¿Tamaño de la formación?</summary>Pequeña (2-3 músicos)



</details><details><summary>¿Repertorio?</summary>James Morrison, Ronan Keating, Ed Sheeran, Eric Clapton, Alicia Keys, U2, Elvis Presley, Bruno Mars, Daft Punk, Queen, The Police, Amy Winehouse, Leonard Cohen, Marvin Gave, Avicii, etcétera.



</details><details><summary>¿Existe algún problema o impedimento si solicito un tema que no está en el repertorio?</summary>No habrá ningún problema si el tema no está en el repertorio. Podemos adaptar canciones a nuestro estilo si se nos pide previamente.



</details><details><summary>¿Experiencia?</summary>La larga trayectoria y experiencia musical a nivel vocal e instrumental se ve reflejada en la calidad de la composición y expresión musical de las canciones. Se han hecho más de 100 conciertos al año.



</details><details><summary>¿Dispones de equipo propio?</summary>Sí



</details><details><summary>¿Necesitas algún material en concreto o condiciones específicas para poder ofrecer tus servicios?</summary>Sí, una toma de corriente para conectar el equipo (1000W), y a ser posible que no esté conectada a neveras, ya que pueden dañar el equipo.



</details><details><summary>¿Tienes posibilidad de desplazarte?</summary>Sí, en toda España.



</details><details><summary>¿Existe algún cargo por desplazamiento?</summary>Sí, depende del kilometraje a recorrer



</details><details><summary>¿Cubres más de una boda al día?</summary>Sí.



</details><details><summary>¿Trabajas solo o cuentas con un equipo de profesionales?</summary>Somos un equipo.



</details><details><summary>¿Cuánto tiempo dura la actuación?</summary>De una hora y media a dos horas de actuación



</details><details><summary>¿Cuánto tiempo necesitas para preparar la actuación?</summary>Mínimo, una hora antes de la actuación.



</details><details><summary>¿Realizas actuaciones al aire libre?</summary>Sí</details>

salonika-swing-jazz-thessaloniki-greece.intro_html:
Salonika Swing – an impeccably refined Jazz & Swing ensemble, curated exclusively for the most discerning clientele across Greece and Cyprus.

Born within the rich artistic tapestry of Thessaloniki, Greece, in 2017, Salonika Swing embodies the timeless elegance of a bygone era.

Discover the full collection of bespoke wedding bands in Greece

This ensemble delivers the exquisite charm of Swing music, offering a richly acoustic interpretation steeped in history and tradition. Drawing inspiration from the illustrious 1930s and 1940s, Salonika Swing breathes new life into the genre, presenting its evolution through a uniquely bespoke Gypsy Jazz lens.

We are proud to be featured on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest wedding bands in Greece

Our artistry is regularly requested for weddings and exclusive events at Ble Pavillon and Ble Azure in Athens, Greece.

Arrange a private consultation with Salonika Swing
salonika-swing-jazz-thessaloniki-greece.description_html:
This singular perspective imparts a distinctive flavour, enriched by the diverse musical heritage of Europe. At the heart of every performance lies an exquisite orchestration crafted for two violins—a refined arrangement that elevates each melody to an art form. With masterful skill and impeccable creativity, they revitalise treasured compositions from the Gypsy Jazz and Swing tradition.

Beyond exceptional talent and pure entertainment, Salonika Swing’s music resonates profoundly with audiences across Greece, gracing an array of prestigious venues—from elegant restaurants and intimate social gatherings to lavish festivals. Their performances evoke a sense of nostalgic beauty while igniting an effervescent joy, ensuring an unforgettable experience for all fortunate enough to witness their artistry.

Curated Line‑Up Options:

  • Duet – two violins
  • Trio – two violins + guitar
  • Trio – two violins + accordion
  • Quartet – two violins + guitar + double bass
  • Quartet – two violins + guitar + voice
  • Quartet – two violins + accordion + voice
  • Quintet – two violins + guitar + double bass + voice

swing-thieves-band-toulouse.intro_html:
Swing Thieves – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Toulouse, France

What discerning clients cherish most about Swing Thieves: impeccable professionalism and effortless collaboration, masterful musicianship, refined sound quality, remarkable versatility, an atmosphere of effortless elegance, guests enraptured, an unequivocal recommendation.

Swing Thieves is a refined jazz & swing ensemble, rooted in Toulouse, that invites you to share in their profound devotion to the smooth, sophisticated sounds of jazz, bossa nova, and swing.

Explore FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest jazz bands in France.

For weddings and events throughout France, we also present pop and soul covers, reimagined in our signature, groovy style – an experience both familiar and utterly bespoke.

An ensemble that performs as a duo, trio, quartet, quintet, or sextet, Swing Thieves embodies inherent flexibility, ensuring that your occasion is catered to with impeccable precision and elegance.

Discover all of our jazz bands in France ➡️

The duo or trio is the perfect choice for intimate, exclusive gatherings, while the quartet, quintet, and sextet deliver a high-impact performance that commands the attention of a larger, distinguished crowd.

We are regularly engaged for weddings and events at the most prestigious venues: Château de Puissentut in Homps, Château de Pujolet, Château Queille in Saint-Quentin-la-Tour, and Château de Lartigolle in Pessan, France.

Inquire About Swing Thieves 💬
swing-thieves-band-toulouse.description_html:
Swing Thieves are true originals – taking classic, timeless sounds and invigorating them with a youthful, vibrant energy. Their exquisite repertoire, spanning from Ella Fitzgerald to Frank Sinatra, is a testament to their deep love and reverence for the music of this golden era.

With over 500 concerts, events, and festivals to their name, Swing Thieves has become a beloved and cherished treasure among French musical ensembles.

The band takes profound pride in its musical diversity – offering a rich, curated set list performed in English, French, Italian, Spanish, and Brazilian. This remarkable breadth allows Swing Thieves to guide the audience on a true journey, presenting the transformative, ever-evolving beauty of jazz and swing in its full splendour.

Their original, innovative arrangements of vintage jazz standards transport listeners around the Mediterranean – weaving together Italian, Greek, French, and American songs from the 1930s into an unforgettable, bespoke soundscape.

This expansive repertoire enchants guests of every generation and is ideally suited for cocktails, weddings, private parties, and corporate events of the highest calibre.

Below is a selection of the exclusive locations where Swing Thieves has been booked by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events…

sabres-wedding-band-toulouse-france.intro_html:
The Sabres – An Exquisite Pop & Rock Covers Ensemble, Rooted in Toulouse

The Sabres present an impeccably curated formula for weddings and private celebrations, seamlessly blending live musicianship with a bespoke DJ performance.

Explore our full collection of refined wedding bands across France.

The Sabres are a distinguished trio of pop and rock covers, boasting extensive experience in curating music for exclusive private parties and international weddings. Their refined artistry has graced exceptional venues such as Château de Mauriac, Castle Lartigolle, Château de Larroque, Château de Cazenac, as well as corporate galas, sporting events, and prestigious international gatherings from London to Marrakech.

Discover FixTheMusic’s selection of the most sought-after wedding bands in France.

We are regularly engaged to perform for weddings and events at Château de Saint-Martory in Haute-Garonne, Château de Brametourte in Lautrec, and Château La Durantie in Lanouaille, France.

Enquire About The Sabres
sabres-wedding-band-toulouse-france.description_html:
The repertoire is an exquisite collection of international rock anthems, meticulously arranged to inspire joyful movement on the dance floor. Artists include Bruno Mars, Daft Punk, The Beatles, Kings of Leon, The Killers, Pharrell Williams, Maroon 5, Queen, Red Hot Chili Peppers, Coldplay, Gorillaz, Robbie Williams, The Clash, U2, Muse, Depeche Mode, and many more.

View all of our bespoke France-based wedding bands ➡️

The Sabres DJ service further elevates the experience, offering a refined selection of musical styles spanning the 1960s to the present day.

Equipped with a premium Yamaha sound system delivering 6300 watts of impeccable clarity, an electronic drum kit that allows nuanced volume control, a wireless microphone for eloquent speeches, an RGB laser, a smoke machine, two sophisticated light effects, and two high-power LED pars, the ensemble is entirely self-sufficient—ensuring every event unfolds with seamless sophistication.

If you seek to engage the finest wedding band Toulouse has to offer, we invite you to connect with The Sabres.

En français

Le groupe The Sabres vous propose une formule idéale d’animation pour un mariage ou une soirée privée, alliant une prestation live raffinée et un service DJ sur mesure.

The Sabres est un trio de reprises pop rock d’excellence. Ce groupe bénéficie d’une longue expérience dans l’animation de soirées privées et de mariages anglo-saxons, avec à son actif de nombreux événements organisés dans des lieux d’exception : Château de Mauriac, Château de Lartigolle, Château de Larroque, Château de Cazenac, des soirées d’entreprise, des événements sportifs ainsi que des prestations à l’étranger (Londres, Marrakech, etc.).

Le répertoire s’articule autour de morceaux anglophones à tendance rock, conçus pour envoûter et faire danser un maximum de convives.

Le groupe reprend des chansons d’artistes internationaux pop rock tels que Bruno Mars, Daft Punk, The Beatles, Kings of Leon, The Killers, Pharrell Williams, Maroon 5, Queen, Red Hot Chili Peppers, Coldplay, Gorillaz, Robbie Williams, The Clash, U2, Muse, Depeche Mode, etc.

The Sabres propose également une prestation DJ, avec un vaste choix de styles musicaux, des années 60 à nos jours.

Équipé notamment d’un système de sonorisation Yamaha de grande qualité d’une puissance de 6300 watts, d’une batterie électronique permettant d’ajuster le volume sonore au contexte, d’un micro sans fil pour d’éventuels discours, d’un laser RGB, d’une machine à fumée, de deux effets lumineux et de deux pars LED haute puissance, le groupe est autonome pour assurer de nombreux événements avec une élégance impeccable.

You shall be immersed in the ambiance of the Swing Era, thanks to the musical complicity of four consummate professionals.

Whether during a refined cocktail reception or the evening ball (or both, for the most devoted enthusiasts), this curated performance animates your ceremony, allowing your loved ones to dance and to savour music of exceptional quality.

Live, the sets may be artfully divided across different moments of the day, with durations tailored to your vision.

The musicians listen attentively to your expectations, adapt seamlessly to the programme of your event, and respond with grace to the requests of your guests.

There, he earned a diploma in musical studies in classical guitar and chamber music.

It was after a concert by the group Latcho Drom that he became impassioned by the music of Django.

He formed the ensemble “Wild Camping” and performed on many esteemed stages across France and Navarre.

In parallel, he taught guitar for more than fifteen years at the EEA Tournefeuille, began a collaboration with the theatre troupe “Grenier de Toulouse,” and appeared on prestigious stages such as “L’Escale” and “Le Capitol Theater.”

In 2012, he hosted a gypsy jam session at the café “La Maison Blanche,” meeting numerous musicians from the Toulouse scene—including those of The Toulouse Gypsy Jazz Band, which he joined in 2016.

Originally from Limousin, he began his professional career in 2003 with the group “Latcho Divès,” with whom he traversed stages and festivals for more than a decade. Arriving in Toulouse in 2012, he joined several ensembles.

Highly active in the Toulouse music scene, he also multiplies collaborations with many jazz and swing bands as a sideman.

Benjamin, the guitarist, was first captivated in his adolescence by the electric bass and contemporary music genres such as rock and funk.

At the age of fifteen, he fell under the spell of Django Reinhardt’s music and began his apprenticeship in gypsy guitar. He founded several projects, including the Oihana Quartet.

The group performed on many illustrious stages (Paris Jazz Festival, Jazz Festival of Tournai in Belgium, Niglo Festival in Toulouse, Novela Festival Toulouse, Baisé Salé…) and earned acclaim from critics (Jazz Magazine, Django Station…).

In 2007, he entered the Jazz Musicology class at Université Toulouse Jean Jaurès, earning a licence in Jazz Musicology and subsequently a Master’s degree in Musicology with highest honours. His academic work was published in Cahiers du Jazz (Éditions Outre Mesure) and Presses Universitaires du Mirail.

The group rapidly achieved notable success throughout the great South, performing on numerous stages (Festival Éclats d’Émail Jazz Limoges, Jazz au Mercure in Toulouse, Jazz in Oloron, Jazz en Mars in Tarnos, Jazz in Saint Sat’, Clari’Jazz Festival, Music Festival on the Way, Jazz in Comminges…).

In 2018, he signed with Label Laborie Jazz for the recording of his first album under the name Benjamin Bobenrieth Trio “TRAVELS”!

He also joined, in 2018, The Toulouse Gypsy Jazz Band and collaborates with many Toulouse-based and national artists.

Mashup Kings – An Exquisite Luxury Wedding Band, Founded in Bristol & London

What discerning clients cherish most: an electrifying ensemble that commands the dancefloor throughout the evening, delivering impeccably crafted mashups, superlative crowd engagement, and seamless, curated planning from first inquiry to final bow.

The Mashup Kings are the epitome of refined celebration—a truly unique, bespoke musical experience. Masters of the mashup, they orchestrate a custom setlist tailored to each occasion, whether a wedding, an exclusive party, a corporate gala, or an award ceremony, anywhere in the world.

Explore the most prestigious wedding bands for hire on FixTheMusic.

From an acoustic serenade during an afternoon aperitivo to an immersive, interactive atmosphere at dinner, culminating in a high-energy evening soirée—every moment is an exquisite journey. The Mashup Kings have been engaged for weddings and events at iconic estates such as Ktima Xatzi in Greece, Abbazia di San Galgano in Italy, Château de Lerse in France, Kempinski Hotel San Lawrenz in Malta, Finca Comassema in Mallorca, and Hampton Court Palace in Surrey.

Proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆

The ensemble specialises in weaving together the finest anthems from an era or artist, fusing them into audacious mashups that delight and surprise. Each cover is reimagined—rarely resembling the original—emerging as something entirely fresh, original, and utterly refined.

Discover our curated selection of the UK’s finest R&B wedding bands ➡️

Bound by a decade of friendship, the Mashup Kings have built their artistry from a shared passion for music—both listening and performing. This devotion radiates from the stage, transforming every set into an unforgettable encounter.

Enquire with Mashup Kings 💬

Hours upon hours are spent in joyous travel, sharing melodies and anticipating the next exquisite event, always primed to ignite the celebration. Every booking includes a complimentary DJ service.

The band’s wanderlust extends beyond the UK, with extensive experience performing across France, Spain, Italy, Portugal, Cyprus, and Greece. This international pedigree provides an impeccable understanding of overseas wedding logistics and cultivated connections that ensure a supremely smooth planning process.

Featured on FixTheMusic’s 19 Best Roaming Bands in the UK 🏆

Should a desired song not appear in their repertoire, simply request it during your inquiry. The Mashup Kings are also fluent in traditional Jewish and Greek wedding melodies and dances.

For more intimate gatherings or varied budgets, they offer a refined smaller ensemble: Acoustic Royale, available for weddings and events in the UK and worldwide.

Punctuality and perfection are paramount; the band arrives well in advance to ensure an impeccable setup, and a dedicated member remains available to answer any questions before, during, and after your occasion.

View our list of the UK's best R&B wedding bands ➡️

Every member possesses an unwavering passion for performance and a shared taste for music that simply sounds sublime. The standard performance structure offers two one-hour sets or three forty-minute sets. During intervals, the band’s professional PA system can play selected MP3s or your preferred playlist. They provide their own state-of-the-art sound and lighting equipment.

Following the live set, an extended DJ service ensures the dancefloor remains vibrant into the early hours.

Pride is taken in exceeding expectations—whether learning a special song for a wedding, crafting a bespoke setlist from their repertoire, offering a DJ service, or any other request to guarantee an immaculate event.

Listed on FixTheMusic’s 21 Best Wedding Bands in Bristol 🏆

Collectively, Mashup Kings bring decades of experience, from touring the UK and Europe to performing on the hallowed stages of Glastonbury Festival and The Royal Albert Hall, alongside countless other prestigious events and festivals.

Yet above all, they simply revel in coming together to play music and share joy—a genuine delight that resonates in every performance.

If you seek to engage one of the finest luxury wedding bands the UK has to offer, do not hesitate to contact Mashup Kings.

duo-elegance-athens-greece.intro_html:
About Duo Elegance – an exquisite acoustic duo, impeccably based in Athens, Greece

Duo Elegance is a refined, internationally celebrated ensemble, curated exclusively for the most discerning clientele. They perform regularly at opulent weddings, private soirées, corporate galas, six-star cruise ships, and five-star luxury hotels.

Their bespoke repertoire spans jazz, swing, pop, blues, Latin jazz, soul, funk, disco, rock, and rock ’n’ roll—delivered with impeccable artistry in multiple languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish, and Portuguese.

Such versatility allows them to adapt effortlessly to the most sophisticated audiences, venues, and event formats.

Enquire About Duo Elegance
duo-elegance-athens-greece.description_html:
They have cultivated a distinctive sound—an elegant fusion of jazz, pop, and soul—offering performances that range from refined ambient melodies to spirited, up-tempo sets.

Each show features powerful, dynamic vocals supported by full, masterful guitar arrangements and pristine sound quality.

The duo is ideally suited for weddings, corporate affairs, exclusive parties, fine-dining restaurants, cruise ship entertainment, and prestigious hotel venues.

Depending on the occasion, Duo Elegance can present a curated selection of two to four sets, each of 45 minutes. For these sets, they bring their own instruments. Sound equipment and a sound engineer (when required) must be provided by the venue or a hired sound company.

To ensure an impeccably seamless performance, the duo arrives at least two hours before the performance time for setup and soundcheck.

With their vast, refined repertoire, Duo Elegance graciously accommodates song requests and can also learn new pieces outside their existing collection.

Their stage requires a small space of approximately three by three metres, though this adapts to the venue's dimensions and availability. Flexibility is always extended.

Duo Elegance is delighted to perform outdoors provided that both the artists and their instruments are sheltered from direct sunlight during the warmer summer months.

wedding-band-vienna-gate-26.intro_html:
About Gate 26 – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Vienna, Austria

Gate 26 is a refined wedding and party ensemble, proudly based in Vienna, Austria, whose impeccable artistry has been curated through years of performing across Europe’s most distinguished venues. The band’s profound joy in collaborative musicianship manifests in every performance, delivering an energy that is at once exuberant and exquisitely polished. With a bespoke repertoire of beloved classics and contemporary favourites, Gate 26 ensures every occasion becomes an unforgettable celebration of rhythm and elegance.

Enquire about Gate 26

A supremely versatile ensemble, Gate 26 offers a range of configurations—from an intimate, refined formation to a grand, full-scale presentation—tailored impeccably to your event’s unique vision. Drawing on years of distinguished industry experience, the band curates a seamless musical journey: from sophisticated dinner sets that whisper under conversation, to high-energy dance anthems that ignite the night. Their dedicated team provides bespoke setlist guidance, ensuring every selection is perfectly suited to you and your guests for an occasion of unparalleled refinement.

Their signature identity is a refined fusion of effervescent energy, fresh sophistication, and timeless allure—drawing inspiration from the 80s, 90s, 00s, and the present day.

Specialising in an expertly curated repertoire of Pop, Dance, R&B, and Synth, with a subtle yet captivating nod to the iconic 80s aesthetic, they are poised to redefine your musical journey with unparalleled elegance.

sonic-cocktail-athens-greece.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Our normal set is 2-hours long usually 2 X 60-minute sets

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Our different line-up options are 10 members and 8 members

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- We can only provide our own backline equipment but not any sound or light equipment (PA systems, robotic lights etc)

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Our arrival at the venue to set up depends on the event, the venue and the time we are performing

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We usually need 3-hours to set up and have our soundcheck

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- We can take a request for a first dance as long as it is early communicated so that we have ample time to practice

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Our stage can be 16 – 20 m2

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- As we are not organising the events we are hired for, we do not offer Public Liability Insurance for the crowd. Our musicians and crew are always insured through our record label, so we are liable for our team members.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- We feel comfortable performing outdoors and in unusual settings as long as we know beforehand and we can prepare for it.</details>

About The Top Dollars – an exquisite wedding and party ensemble based in Paris, France

The Top Dollars presents an impeccable wedding and party experience, curated from their distinguished base in Paris. Specialising in refined renditions of Pop, Soul, and Dance favourites, this ensemble offers a bespoke repertoire performed in both French and English, spanning eras and genres with sophisticated ease.

Discover our curated selection of the finest wedding bands in Paris ➡️

The Top Dollars deliver a masterful collection of music’s most celebrated hits, from Pop, funk, and soul to disco, dance, and sixties classics—every note impeccably executed. We are honoured to be listed on FixTheMusic’s 20 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆, a testament to our refined artistry and exclusivity.

The ensemble travels with ease, performing across Paris and France for weddings, private soirées, and corporate events of the highest calibre. Regular engagements include the prestigious Hyatt Regency Paris Étoile on Place du Général Kœnig and the illustrious LE DIAMANT II Bateaux Parisiens.

Enquire about The Top Dollars

This talented band’s curated repertoire includes bespoke interpretations of ABBA, Aretha Franklin, Michael Jackson, Bruno Mars, Justin Timberlake, Bob Marley, Pink, Rihanna, Maroon 5, Shakira, Daft Punk, Sia, Beyoncé, Rihanna, Robin Thicke, Katy Perry, alongside a selection of timeless standards and French chansons.

Explore our refined list of the best wedding bands in Paris ➡️

With years of combined industry experience, the musicians of The Top Dollars are seasoned professionals who dedicate themselves to ensuring your occasion is nothing less than perfect. They have graced some of France’s most prestigious venues and esteemed companies, including Pavillon Gabriel – Potel and Chabot 75008 Paris, Plage du Majestic in Cannes, Christian Dior Couture Saint-Tropez, Paris Airport, Groupama Assurance, BNP Paribas, French Rugby Federation FFR, Bouygues Immobiliers, Printemps, and Orangina (International meeting).

Should you seek to engage one of Paris’s most refined wedding and party bands, look no further than The Top Dollars. Reach out today to begin an extraordinary collaboration.

los-chicos-barcelona-spain.intro_html:
Los Chicos — An Exquisite Spanish & Latin Cover Ensemble, Based in Barcelona

What discerning clients most adore about Los Chicos: an effervescent Spanish live band, a bespoke blend of Spanish and English repertoire, impeccable musicianship and an atmosphere of refined energy, masterfully inspiring every guest to dance — an unequivocal recommendation for weddings and celebrations.

Los Chicos is a singularly curated Spanish and Latin party band, founded in Barcelona and available for weddings, galas, private festivities, corporate entertainment, and exclusive events throughout Spain and across Europe.

We are proudly featured on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the finest wedding bands in Spain.

Under the charismatic leadership of Javier—whose voice and guitar define the ensemble—the band performs a refined repertoire of Spanish and Latin American music: from soulful Spanish rumba and classic Cuban “son” to irresistibly danceable Latin hits that keep the celebration moving without pause.

Explore the complete collection of pre-eminent wedding bands in Spain.

Los Chicos are regularly commissioned for weddings and high-profile events at Masia Cabellut in Rodonyà, Orsett Hall Hotel in Essex, and Homme House in Ledbury.

Enquire about Los Chicos 💬
los-chicos-barcelona-spain.description_html:
We present ourselves as a duo, trio, or four-piece band, each configuration meticulously tailored to the occasion. The duo—Javier on guitar and vocals, complemented by bass or a second guitar—and the trio—Javier with bass and percussion—are ideally suited for intimate gatherings of up to approximately sixty guests, such as reception drinks, the wedding breakfast, summer soirées, barbecues, or any corporate affair where refined live music is desired within a confined space.

The four-piece ensemble—Javier, Spanish guitar, bass, and percussion—is recommended for more expansive celebrations.

We are also listed on FixTheMusic’s exclusive guide to Barcelona’s finest wedding bands.

A favoured arrangement is our romantic, relaxed set performed while guests savour their cuisine and champagne, followed by a later set that seamlessly elevates the evening into a spirited dance affair.

We provide a professional, impeccably engineered sound system and are delighted to offer seamlessly curated iPod interludes between live performances.

We are frequently asked to incorporate English covers into our repertoire—an effortless addition we embrace with elegance.

We also accommodate bespoke song requests; previous examples range from The Doobie Brothers’ “Long Train Running” to Rudimental’s “Feel the Love,” from Sinatra classics to Rihanna’s modern anthems.

Should you wish to engage the most refined Spanish & Latin wedding band that Spain has to offer, we invite you to connect with Los Chicos.

helios-piano-athens-greece.intro_html:
Helios Piano – An Exquisite Pianist for Bespoke Weddings & Exclusive Events, Based in Athens, Greece

Helios Piano is a refined pianist of exceptional calibre, specializing in the most distinguished weddings, private soirees, and luxury hospitality settings throughout Greece. His performances are meticulously curated to craft an atmosphere of unparalleled elegance, seamlessly blending with each exquisite moment of your celebration. With a foundation in classical mastery and a versatile artistic lineage, he traverses effortlessly through jazz, cinematic compositions, pop, and contemporary repertoire—each selection thoughtfully tailored for a sophisticated international clientele. Whether performing at a sunset reception, an exclusive villa, or a premium event, his approach is singularly focused upon delivering an impeccably elevated and unforgettable musical experience.

Arrange a Consultation with Helios Piano
helios-piano-athens-greece.description_html: The resulting sound is both timeless and modern—an inviting, warmly resonant ambiance that captivates every discerning audience. An artist of profound accomplishment, Helios Piano brings years of experience across concert performances, orchestras, theatre, and the world’s finest hospitality venues, uniting technical brilliance with an authentic devotion to his craft. A rich musical education and continuous artistic evolution have shaped a style that is deeply expressive and intimately attuned to the emotion of each piece. Performances typically span up to three hours, offering a seamless and luxurious musical journey throughout your event. For added depth, the option to collaborate with an accomplished vocalist is available, while bespoke song requests may be prepared in advance to imbue your most cherished moments with a personal, heartfelt touch. Professional, supremely adaptable, and at ease in environments ranging from open-air settings to extraordinary venues, Helios Piano focuses on delivering a flawless and memorable live music experience. Wherever possible, he favours the grandeur of a concert piano—elevating both sound and setting into a truly refined auditory affair.

saxophonist-paris-france.intro_html:
About Paris Saxophonist – an exclusive wedding saxophonist & DJ based in Paris, curating refined musical experiences for events and celebrations throughout France

Introducing Paris Saxophonist, an exceptionally talented saxophonist from France, celebrated within the most discerning circles of luxury events and bespoke experiences. Though his atelier is in Paris, he is available to travel across the country—particularly to the exquisite south-west, including Biarritz—as well as throughout Europe and beyond, for engagements that demand impeccable artistry.

Elevate your occasion with the enchanting allure of a live saxophone performance. Transform your event into a spectacle of sophistication, where captivating melodies infuse an air of glamour and bespoke charm. Every gathering becomes an unforgettable affair, rendered with elegance and finesse. Paris Saxophonist is regularly booked for weddings and events at Château Soulac in Juillac and Château de Courtomer in Normandy, France.

Contact Paris Saxophonist
saxophonist-paris-france.description_html:
From luxury brand galas and corporate functions to fashion extravaganzas and exclusive venues, Paris Saxophonist crafts extraordinary live experiences tailored to perfection. His refined performances transcend borders, gracing stages both within France and internationally—delivering unparalleled musical excellence without geographical limitation.

With over two decades of international experience, Paris Saxophonist is committed to ensuring absolute satisfaction. He masterfully navigates diverse musical genres, from the sultry allure of Jazzy Chic to the vibrant beats of the Dancefloor, with a passion that resonates with audiences worldwide. Embracing the saxophone as a universal instrument, he demonstrates seamless integration across musical landscapes, past and present.

Paris Saxophonist has performed for corporate events on behalf of several notable clients, including:

electro-dj-sax-uk.intro_html:
About Electro Sax & DJ – an exquisite saxophonist and DJ ensemble based in Margate, UK

What discerning clients cherish most: a seamlessly integrated DJ & sax experience, impeccably curated playlists, a packed dance floor, intuitive crowd reading, an interactive sax performance, boundless energy, stress‑free planning, and a truly professional setup.

Electro Sax & DJ is a refined musical partnership offering the rare fusion of a live saxophonist and a DJ, operating from the UK.

Explore the complete portfolio of bespoke DJ Live bands across the United Kingdom.

The ensemble comprises a peripatetic saxophonist commanding a wireless microphone on a striking Black and Gold Tenor Saxophone, alongside an accomplished female DJ wielding professional Pioneer decks and portable powered PA speakers. Together, they orchestrate an unforgettable auditory experience.

Discover our curated selection of the UK’s most distinguished sax & DJ groups ➡️

Their repertoire is exquisitely versatile: Classical masterpieces for wedding ceremonies, Traditional Jazz for cocktail hours, uplifting House Music for club settings, and the ambient allure of Cafe Del Mar for a beach‑themed corporate soirée.

In 2024 alone, Electro Sax & DJ graced exclusive venues across Africa (Malawi), Greece, Italy, Jersey, Australia, and throughout the UK.

Preview their 2026 Set List – a bespoke journey through sound 🎵

We also offer custom‑printed branding for the DJ booth and frequently collaborate with dancers for choreographed routines, elevating every celebration to an art form.

We are regularly commissioned for weddings and events at such prestigious locations as Château de Garibondy in France, Andaz Hyatt Hotel in London, Longueville Manor in Jersey, Nizels Golf & Country Club in Kent, Salcombe Harbour Hotel in Devon, and The Norfolk Mead Hotel in Norwich.

swing-band-paris-pont-neuf.intro_html: Le Pont-Neuf Swing Band — an exquisite ensemble of refined musicians, offering bespoke swing and jazz performances from their esteemed base in Paris, France.
swing-band-paris-pont-neuf.description_html:
This impeccable orchestra is in屡high demand for weddings, corporate gatherings, and private soirées across France and throughout Europe. Le Pont-Neuf Swing Band is proudly featured on FixTheMusic's curated selection of the finest jazz bands in France.

Their vast, meticulously curated repertoire spans the golden eras of swing and jazz, enriched by blues, pop covers, and gypsy jazz. For those seeking to secure one of the most distinguished swing ensembles Paris has to offer for their wedding or event, an invitation to connect is warmly extended.

Discover our complete collection of jazz bands in France ➡️

Le Pont-Neuf Swing Band is regularly engaged for weddings and events at the most prestigious venues, including the Monaco Yacht Club, The Ritz Hotel in Paris, Chateau De Mairy in Champagne, and Château Lagorce in Gironde, France.

Inquire with Le Pont-Neuf Swing Band 💬

Pont-Neuf Swing Band is a refined jazz orchestra for weddings and receptions throughout Paris and Île-de-France.

The ensemble was born from the confluence of five exceptional musicians residing in Paris, each having studied jazz at the conservatory or within esteemed private institutions. These five artists formed their initial jazz collective before evolving into the distinguished Pont-Neuf Swing Band — years that have honed their artistry to an impeccable standard.

The orchestra has graced an array of exclusive settings: weddings, works councils, private receptions, intimate jazz cocktail parties, the town hall of the 11th arrondissement, and, most recently, in Tremblay-en-France as part of Sustainable Development Week.

To infuse your evening with a retro allure, we offer a curated journey through time to the golden age of swing and jazz, accompanied by the Pont-Neuf Swing Band jazz orchestra.

Explore FixTheMusic's selection of the finest wedding bands in Paris.

Whether for an intimate cocktail reception or an evening of dancing to a modern, festive, and rhythmic soul/pop repertoire, we adapt seamlessly to your desires and your budget — from the composition of the orchestra and number of musicians to the bespoke repertoire.

For themed celebrations and private events — weddings, works councils, bar mitzvot, or any distinguished occasion — we invite you to reach out. Select the composition of your orchestra with your vocalist, and indicate if you wish for a DJ to complete the ambiance; we shall present a bespoke proposal.

Below are just a few of the illustrious venues where clients on FixTheMusic have booked us for weddings and events:

  • Ritz Paris, Place Vendôme
  • Monaco Yacht Club

En français

Le Pont-Neuf Swing Band est un groupe de jazz d'exception pour les mariages et réceptions sur Paris et Île de France.

Pont-Neuf Swing Band est d'abord la rencontre de cinq musiciens vivant à Paris et ayant étudié le Jazz, que ce soit au conservatoire ou dans des écoles privées.

Ces cinq étudiants ont formé leur premier groupe de jazz avant de changer définitivement de nom pour devenir Pont-Neuf Swing Band. Ces années nous ont aguerris sur le plan professionnel et musical.

L'orchestre de jazz s'est produit dans différents contextes prestigieux : mariages, comités d'entreprise, réceptions privées, cocktail jazz chez un particulier, à la mairie du 11ᵉ arrondissement, et récemment en banlieue à Tremblay-en-France dans le cadre de la Semaine du Développement Durable.

Pour donner une saveur rétro à vos soirées, nous vous proposons un véritable voyage dans le temps vers l'âge d'or du swing et du jazz, accompagnés par l'orchestre Pont-Neuf Swing Band.

Pour un cocktail cosy ou pour danser sur un répertoire soul/pop moderne, festif et rythmé, nous nous adaptons à vos envies et à votre budget — choix de l'orchestre, nombre de musiciens, répertoire, etc.

Pour vos soirées à thèmes et vos événements privés — mariages, comités d'entreprise, bar mitzvot ou toute autre occasion — contactez-nous. Choisissez la composition de votre orchestre avec votre chanteuse et faites-nous savoir si vous souhaitez un DJ pour compléter l'animation. Nous vous proposerons un devis sur mesure.

Suivez-nous sur Facebook et Instagram 📸

Visitez notre site web pour plus d'informations.

Nuevo Duo presents a refined duet of violin and guitar, performing exclusively at weddings, corporate events, and intimate soirées throughout Northern Spain. Their extensive repertoire may be presented in either an acoustic or electric configuration, ensuring an impeccable ambiance tailored to each occasion.

Proudly distinguished by FixTheMusic as one of the 22 Best Wedding Bands in Spain.

En español

Su exquisito repertorio se fundamenta en la refinada combinación de violín y guitarra, ya sea en formato acústico o eléctrico. Interpretan temas clásicos, de jazz y modernos, y además pueden preparar temas a vuestra elección. Nuevo Duo es un dueto a violín y guitarra con una apuesta exclusiva, moderna y elegante.

Sus versiones abarcan desde los temas más actuales de grupos como Coldplay o Bruno Mars hasta la música clásica, por lo que cuentan con un extenso y variado repertorio que hará las delicias de vuestros invitados. Os ofrecerán la amenización de vuestro gran día con la posibilidad de tocar en directo durante Ceremonia (religiosa o civil) & aperitivo.

Podréis elegir entre su repertorio de más de 100 temas, y os asesorarán de forma totalmente personalizada para que podáis elegir aquello que mejor se adapte a vuestros gustos, estilo y temática de celebración. Disponen de un potente equipo de sonido capaz de cubrir cualquier espacio.

Nuevo Duo se desplaza en función de vuestra ubicación por toda la región española. Contactad con ellos y pedid presupuesto sin compromiso.
