nuevo-duo-barcelona-spain.faq_html:
<details><summary>¿Cuál es el precio de tu servicio?</summary>Desde €750.



</details><details><summary>¿Qué incluye el pack de boda?</summary>Reunión previa, gestión y asesoramiento musical, actuación en directo, equipo de sonido e instalación.



</details><details><summary>¿Con cuánta antelación debo ponerme en contacto contigo?</summary>Mínimo un mes antes del evento.



</details><details><summary>¿Tamaño de la formación?</summary>Pequeña (2-3 músicos).



</details><details><summary>¿Repertorio?</summary>Tocamos todos los estilos de música. Enviamos un pdf con más de 100 temas de todos los estilos musicales y épocas para poder elegir libremente.



</details><details><summary>¿Existe algún problema o impedimento si solicito un tema que no está en el repertorio?</summary>¡Ningún problema! Los novios son completamente libres a la hora de elegir.



</details><details><summary>¿Experiencia?</summary>Somos músicos profesionales con amplia experiencia en amenizar todo tipo de ceremonias y eventos, y más de 15 años de experiencia tocando el violín y la guitarra.



</details><details><summary>¿Dispones de equipo propio?</summary>Sí.



</details><details><summary>¿Necesitas algún material en concreto o condiciones específicas para poder ofrecer tus servicios?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>¿Tienes posibilidad de desplazarte?</summary>Sí, a nivel nacional e internacional.



</details><details><summary>¿Existe algún cargo por desplazamiento?</summary>Sí, primeros 100 kilómetros incluidos en el precio, después de éstos, se calcula kilometraje.



</details><details><summary>¿Cubres más de una boda al día?</summary>Sí.



</details><details><summary>¿Trabajas solo o cuentas con un equipo de profesionales?</summary>Solo.



</details><details><summary>¿Cuánto tiempo dura la actuación?</summary>Según las necesidades del cliente y según opción elegida.



</details><details><summary>¿Cuánto tiempo necesitas para preparar la actuación?</summary>Aproximadamente una hora.



</details><details><summary>¿Realizas actuaciones al aire libre?</summary>Sí.</details>

About Deluxe Showband – an exquisite luxury ensemble based in Paris, France

For over fifteen years, the narrative of Deluxe Showband has been composed by the masterful hands of our virtuoso performers. With configurations ranging from six to eighteen artists, we conceive bespoke, tailor-made experiences for weddings, soirées, corporate galas, and every conceivable occasion. Every performance is a curated spectacle—impeccably refined to fill dance floors across Europe, the Middle East, and beyond.

Contact Deluxe Showband

Since its inception more than fifteen years ago, the score of Deluxe Showband has been written by the expert hands and discerning counsel of our artists and artistic directors. Our ensemble—evolving from six to eighteen performers—cultivates a bespoke vision on stage, paired with meticulous accompaniment and artistic direction. Whether presenting an opulent XL show or an intimate showcase, from technical reconnaissance to the final performance, every facet of your event is enveloped in the professionalism and vibrant energy of our team.

With a wealth of international experience, Deluxe Showband has developed an inimitable group sound, placed at the service of a repertoire that marries modern, traditional, and contemporary elegance. Our musical palette is entirely devoted to your desires. The artistic direction of the stage may be custom-crafted or proposed as an original creation from Deluxe Showband. Our teams are at your service at every moment—aesthetic refinement lies at the heart of our standards for your realised visions. From technical site surveys to stage conception and assembly, our production managers ensure complete, seamless stewardship, delivering a show of impeccable quality that surpasses your highest expectations.

mediterranean-sax.intro_html:
Mediterranean Sax – An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist, Based in Palma de Mallorca, Spain

Mediterranean Sax is a refined saxophonist and musical composer, residing in the exclusive enclave of Palma de Mallorca.

Born into a distinguished lineage of musicians and artists, she was immersed in the world of sound from her earliest years, her artistry cultivated by an impeccable familial heritage.

From a tender age, her passion for music was matched only by a profound affinity for musical composition—a talent refined through a lifetime of dedication.

She is regularly commissioned for bespoke wedding performances and elite events at the prestigious Almiral de la Font in Barcelona.

Contact Mediterranean Sax 💬
mediterranean-sax.description_html:
Her heart was captivated by the saxophone, the allure of jazz, and the liberating elegance of improvisation.

She discovered an instrument that perfectly complements her spirit—one she would never forsake, such was its resonance with her soul.

Composition had always been her calling, and with the saxophone she found the ultimate medium to deliver her curated melodies to discerning listeners.

Thanks to her extensive musical journey, she offers a curated repertoire of exquisite styles: Jazz, Blues, Bossa Nova, R&B, Soul, Lounge, Chill Out, Pop Hits, and House—each performance impeccably tailored to elevate your celebration.

An Exquisite Ensemble – The Tribe Trio

Based in the refined city of Toulouse, France, The Tribe Trio presents an unparalleled musical experience for the most discerning celebrations. This impeccably curated band is celebrated for transporting guests into the soulful, golden eras of the 1970s and 1980s.

They are a favoured choice for exclusive weddings and bespoke events at the distinguished MEETT Parc des Expositions in Toulouse.

Enquire About The Tribe Trio
tribe-trio-toulouse-france.description_html: Comprising a virtuoso pianist, a masterful bassist, and a captivating singer-guitarist, the trio revives the infectious grooves of funk and soul with impeccable artistry. Their bespoke repertoire features timeless classics from icons such as Bill Withers, Al Green, and Stevie Wonder, alongside electrifying hits from legends like Michael Jackson and Prince. Every performance is a curated journey, with refined renditions of funk rhythms from bands like Maze and Kool and the Gang—ensuring each event is infused with an atmosphere of joyous sophistication.

About Cool Cats Jazz – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Curated from Toulouse, France

Two refined tenets: Love and Swing.

Hailing from Toulouse—the rose-hued Pink City in the South of France—this bespoke ensemble offers an unparalleled journey through the golden age of jazz and swing.

An impeccable repertoire of the warmest, most authentic standards, each performance sprinkled with an air of enchantment.

Enquire About Cool Cats Jazz
cool-cats-jazz-band-toulouse-france.description_html:
Cool Cats Jazz brings its vibrant energy to every performance with an intimacy and colour that is nothing short of unforgettable. Each musician is a seasoned professional, delivering live music with generosity and passion, ensuring a refined auditory experience.

Whether you desire an intimate soirée or a festive celebration, the ensemble’s line-up—from number of performers to instruments and repertoire—is entirely bespoke, tailored impeccably to your wishes.

We are delighted to provide our curated sounds for ceremonies, receptions, and any occasion of distinction; our ethos is one of openness and collaboration.

Requests for repertoire are welcomed, provided they are discussed in advance, so that every detail may be perfected for you.
cool-cats-jazz-band-toulouse-france.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Usually 2 x 60min sets

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes. We can play trio (Double-bass, guitar, voice), quartet (add a guitar for more manouche jazz style, or a drummer for more swing jazz style) or more (add horn section). 


</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- We provide sound equipment (in general we include it in the total price when we send an estimate price) but not light. Light will have to be organized separately.


</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- We can play a playlist on our sound system in between sets, before and after. 

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- We arrive 2 hours before performance time for setup and soundcheck.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- For weddings we always take 2 to 3 song requests if asked in advance :) and we are used to accompany ceremonies, as well as cocktail hours. 

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- This depends on the line-up chosen by the client.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes we're comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings</details>

acoustic-duo-france-jennifer-jeremy.faq_html:
<details><summary>How much do you charge?</summary>The price depends on the performance type, the number of musicians (duo or trio) and the length of the performance. Get in touch for an accurate quote!



</details><details><summary>How far do you travel?</summary>We are based in South West France but we perform across the country as well as internationally. 



</details><details><summary>What happen if one of you is ill on the day of our event?</summary>In over seven years of performing, this has never happened. But in the unlikely event one of our performers falls ill, we have many musician connections that we can rely on to fill in.



</details><details><summary>How long can you play for?</summary>Our set list includes more than 250 songs so we can play for many hours. Typically, we limit our performances to 4 hours maximum. 



</details><details><summary>How long does it take you to set up?</summary>This is slightly dependent on the location and line-up, but on average our set-up is under two hours. 



</details><details><summary>Is it possible to meet you before my event?</summary>Sure! We're always happy to organize meetings in advance, so we can discuss your event and answer all of your questions!



</details><details><summary>Is all the sound equipment included in the quote?</summary>Yes! Our quotes always include sound and lighting equipment.</details>

wedding-band-bordeaux-funky-fresh.intro_html:
About Funky Fresh – An Exquisite Soul & Funk Wedding Ensemble, Based in Bordeaux, Curating Unforgettable Celebrations Across France

👏 What discerning clients cherish most about Funky Fresh: A powerhouse of funk and soul, an impeccable live band delivering nonstop anthems, electrified dance floors, flawless vocal artistry, a refined roster of professional musicians, bespoke crowd-pleasing sets, and the optional addition of a DJ + saxophone.

Funky Fresh is an exceptional wedding and party ensemble, hailing from Bordeaux, devoted to orchestrating premium entertainment for both intimate private affairs and grand public functions. They are revered as France’s finest curated funk, Motown, and soul wedding band.

View the complete collection of wedding bands in France

This celebrated seven-piece ensemble performs across France and Europe with effortless grace, and will be delighted to travel to your chosen venue. Seasoned entertainers of the highest calibre, Funky Fresh consider themselves artisans of the wedding experience, offering a bespoke performance of unparalleled refinement.

We are proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s 24 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆

Clients who have inquired with Funky Fresh also explored these exquisite ensembles on FixTheMusic:

  1. Funk Mode

  2. Hyperfunk

  3. The Bordeaux Soul & Funk Band

  4. Electric Boulevard

Their vast and meticulously curated repertoire—from the iconic James Brown and Otis Redding to the timeless Stevie Wonder and The Temptations—will have every guest effortlessly swept onto the dance floor.

We are regularly engaged for weddings and events at the distinguished Château Rigaud in Mouliets-et-Villemartin, Château Destinée in Saint-Seurin-de-Prats, and Chateau Lagorce in Gironde, France.

Contact Funky Fresh 💬

Funky Fresh is inherently flexible, capable of performing in multiple refined formations to perfectly suit your vision. As standard, the group presents as a seven-piece band with saxophone and trumpet, yet will gracefully add or subtract elements to align with your desires. For grander affairs, the ensemble may be expanded with additional vocalists and instruments—such as a larger brass section. Funky Fresh also offers an impeccable DJ service, complete with superior sound and lighting equipment, available for an additional fee. Sets are bespoke and can be tailored upon request (from two one-hour sets, one two-hour set, to three forty-minute sets with a fifteen-minute interlude).

Here are just some of the exquisite locations where we have been booked by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events…

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸

Please explore our website for further refined details.

Funky Fresh operates using a very small, exclusive pool of no-compromise musicians—the finest in France for this show, at the zenith of their craft. This may occasionally result in the act not featuring all members shown in promotional footage. The set list is indicative only and will vary according to the singer.

party-band-london-scintillate.intro_html:
Scintillate – An Exquisite International Showband, London-Based, Curated for Destination Weddings of Distinction

“High-energy, immensely gifted – a party band that delivers impeccable vocals, refined crowd engagement, and a dance floor brimming all evening. Professional, flexible, and profoundly impressive.” — this is the resounding praise from discerning clients.

Scintillate is a luxury function band of unparalleled refinement, an ensemble unlike any other.

We are the preferred musical accompaniment for celebrities, VIPs, and those who seek to astonish their guests and orchestrate an atmosphere of sheer perfection.

Our performances grace weddings, corporate galas, and private soirées across the globe.

From the curation of repertoire and bespoke arrangements to stage presence and attire, every facet of Scintillate exudes class and meticulous professionalism.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆

Our mission is to elevate your event by crafting an extraordinary ambience, delivered with utmost elegance and sophistication.

For an added touch of grandeur, Scintillate offers an expanded lineup that includes a full horn section, perfect for weddings and celebrations that demand a truly magnificent wow factor.

Follow our journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸

We are also listed on FixTheMusic’s 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆

Our calendar regularly features performances at legendary venues such as Beldi Country Club in Morocco, Rocabella Hotel in Santorini, Borgo Stomennano in Italy, Castell de Sant Marçal in Spain, Château Prieuré Marquet in France, Kilkea Castle Hotel & Golf Resort in Ireland, and The Savoy Hotel in London.

Enquire with Scintillate 💬
party-band-london-scintillate.description_html:
We live for the celebration. Music is our passion, and Scintillate is wholly dedicated to helping you create an event that lingers in memory forever.

We perform exquisite renditions of the most iconic hits across a vast spectrum of genres, spending countless hours in the studio perfecting our own interpretations.

Our repertoire is meticulously curated, encompassing Chart, Soul, Funk, Motown, R&B, Hip Hop, Garage, and Swing — ensuring every musical taste is catered for with refined sophistication.

Scintillate is predominantly the same ensemble at every engagement, though we maintain a pool of exceptional, like-for-like musicians to ensure seamless continuity. Our lead vocalist is Iddy, widely recognised as one of the UK’s preeminent wedding singers.

All quotations are bespoke, tailored to performance duration, travel distance, and any special requirements.

For a precise proposal, we invite you to reach out. We would be delighted to discuss a package crafted exclusively for your vision.

Weddings

As a luxury wedding band, Scintillate collaborates with you to customise our set to your exact desires. Different lineups can be commissioned for the ceremony, canapés, wedding breakfast, first dance, and evening reception.

We achieve the perfect equilibrium, setting a tone and ambience that resonates with every generation of your guests.

party-band-london-scintillate.faq_html:
<details><summary>What kind of events do you perform at?</summary>We perform at a wide variety of events, including weddings, corporate events, product launches, birthday parties, charity functions and festivals.



</details><details><summary>Will there be more than one singer in the band?</summary>Our lead singer is Iddy Awan...he's in all the videos of the band above. You can certainly add a female singer, which can work really well, especially with a larger band set up. We know several outstanding female singers who could join us. If Iddy is unavailable for your event, we also work with a fantastic young male vocalist called Stefan.



</details><details><summary>What musical instruments will be in the band?</summary>The standard line-up will include male singer, guitar, bass guitar, drums and keyboards. Additional instruments include a horn or brass section made up of trumpet, saxophone or trombone.



</details><details><summary>What kind of songs will Scintillate band perform?</summary>The band perform a range of classic soul and funk hits to more modern pop covers. Examples of artists we cover include Stevie Wonder, Marvin Gaye, Aretha Franklin, Kool And The Gang, Jackie Wilson, Luther Vandross, Curtis Mayfield, Chic, Chaka Khan, Earth, Wind & Fire, James Brown, The Supremes and The Four Tops. We also perform modern pop, Garage and R&B covers from the likes of Pharrell, Craig David, Justin Timberlake, Bruno Mars, Amy Winehouse and Bruno Mars. Add to that some swing, Rat Pack and jazz standards!



</details><details><summary>How much does it cost to hire Scintillate band?</summary>We tend be more expensive than the average pop or rock covers band. Our starting price is £8,000. Our lead singer, Iddy Awan, can also be booked as a solo singer if the full band is over budget. Please enquire for more details.



</details><details><summary>How long do we perform for?</summary>As is standard for wedding or corporate entertainment, we will provide around 2 hours of live music. This is often split into 2 x 60 minute sets, or 3 x 40 minute sets. We provide background music (a "laptop DJ service") in between the live music. We arrive at the venue at around 5pm and expect to finish by 12 midnight.



</details><details><summary>Is it possible to see the band live before I book?</summary>It's often not possible to see Scintillate perform live before you book them for your wedding or event. Most professional wedding bands rarely perform at public gigs, as most of their bookings are at private events such as weddings and corporate events. It is possible from time to time though, so feel free to ask and we'll let you know if we have any public gigs coming up.</details>

in-cahoots-toulouse-france.intro_html:
About In Cahoots – An Ensemble of Distinction, based in Toulouse, France

Envelop your distinguished guests in an atmosphere of sophisticated revelry with the incomparable In Cahoots.

In Cahoots is a meticulously curated ensemble, breathing exquisite life into the golden era of funk, soul, and rock from the illustrious 1960s and 1970s.

The ensemble is driven by an impeccably refined vocalist—a voice of both commanding power and delicate sensitivity. Its timbre evokes the warm, smoky depths of the blues, the effortless elegance of jazz, and the vibrant, unbridled energy of soul and rock.

This virtuoso performance is anchored by a bespoke rhythm section of electric keyboard, guitar, and drums, delivering a foundation of flawless precision and dynamic artistry.

Inquire About the In Cahoots Experience
in-cahoots-toulouse-france.description_html:
This ensemble is exquisitely suited for the most discerning cocktail receptions, bespoke wedding celebrations, and exclusive private soirées.

They skillfully curate a seamless journey through iconic tracks and genres, transforming the evening into an unforgettable narrative and ensuring the dance floor remains the heart of the affair.

Their meticulously curated repertoire spans the legendary catalogues of James Brown, Stevie Wonder, Aretha Franklin, Amy Winehouse, Marvin Gaye, Otis Redding, and beyond—an anthology of anthems designed to captivate every guest.

Their standard arrangements include the following refined details:

  • A 2-hour performance set (typically presented in two segments, though completely adaptable to the evening's flow).
  • All requisite backline instrumentation and a high-fidelity PA system (the esteemed QSC system), ensuring pristine acoustics.
  • Travel and logistics from their atelier in Toulouse.

The ensemble arrives a gracious two to three hours prior to the commencement of the performance, allowing ample time for an impeccable setup and a meticulous soundcheck.

mixology-sax-dj-bordeaux-france.intro_html:
Mixology Sax & DJ – An exquisite saxophone and DJ duo, meticulously curated and based in the heart of Bordeaux, France.

What discerning clients cherish most about Mixology: An impeccably high-energy performance blending saxophone, DJ, and bongos. They effortlessly curate packed dance floors, demonstrating a refined ability to read the room, delivering a seamless and sophisticated musical journey that guests adore.

Mixology embodies the pinnacle of bespoke musical entertainment—an exquisite pairing of a virtuoso saxophonist and an elite DJ. They are regularly engaged for the most prestigious weddings, corporate soirées, and private celebrations in Bordeaux and throughout France.

We are honored to be featured on FixTheMusic's 24 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆 and have secured the coveted #1 position on their list of the 11 Best Wedding Bands in Bordeaux 🏆.

We invite you to peruse our curated PDF Guide for further insight into our refined artistry.

Driven by a profound, lifelong devotion to sonic excellence, Mixology orchestrates an impeccable journey through the refined genres of Funk, Disco, Pop, House, and Soul.

View our complete collection of DJs in France ➡️

Mixology is a recommended purveyor of musical excellence at an exclusive selection of France's most luxurious wedding venues, including Chateau Lagorce, Chateau La Durantie, Château De Saint-Martory, Château de Lisse, and many more distinguished estates.

View the complete range of wedding bands in France

Discriminating clients who have engaged Mixology have also expressed interest in the following esteemed artists on FixTheMusic:

  1. Chaz On Sax
  2. Fusion Girls
  3. DJ Chris
  4. Peter Beck
  5. Party Sax & DJ
  6. DJ George Jonathan

Contact Mixology Sax & DJ 💬

Mixing unexpected rarities with forgotten classics and contemporary remixes, their curated sets are designed to satisfy the most demanding ears and the most insatiable dancers.

View all of our DJs in France ➡️

The concept is entirely fluid. An impeccable performance can be augmented with percussion, trumpet, keyboard, guitarist, and vocalist, tailored to the specific ambiance required. Whether a solo DJ set or a full live show, every detail is bespoke.

Mixology is the perfect accompaniment to weddings, charity galas, private receptions, and corporate events. The act is particularly coveted by patrons seeking to recreate the sun-drenched euphoria of Ibiza summers or the chic, elevated energy of apres-ski destinations like Folie Douce.

Mixology is often booked as a solo DJ, so please be sure to request whether you wish to hire the DJ exclusively or the full ensemble with additional instrumentalists.

The group has been distinguished by the prestigious Festival Brides blog after their performance at Lucy & Harry's wedding at La Léotardie in the Dordogne, southwest France.

island-soul-duo-mallorca-spain.intro_html:
Island Soul Duo – An Exquisite Wedding Band Based in Mallorca, Spain

Island Soul Duo is a refined musical pairing rooted in Mallorca, offering an impeccably curated soulful ambience for weddings and exclusive events across the island.

Chri, a Swiss-born vocalist, has cultivated her artistry since childhood. With over three decades of performing and living in Mallorca, she has graced the island’s most distinguished venues and events, including the prestigious Jazz Wee Ibiza and the Festival de Jazz de Palma de Mallorca in 2023. Her natural ability to captivate an audience is paired with an extraordinary mastery of the harmonica, lending an exquisite layer to every performance.

Enquire About Island Soul Duo

Fab, born in Paris, relocated to Mallorca a few years ago and swiftly earned acclaim for his distinctive groove, impeccable loop-station command, and rare musicality. His bespoke style has positioned him as one of the most sought-after guitarists on the island. The duo’s profound connection is palpable in every note, an unspoken synergy that elevates each set.

Beyond their core formation, Island Soul Duo can be refined into a trio or a four-piece ensemble by adding drums, saxophone, or a bass player—a bespoke flexibility that ensures the perfect complement to any celebration.

Performance sets are typically arranged as two curated segments of 45 minutes each, though this can be personalised during the booking consultation. The quoted price encompasses all sound equipment, including seamless background music during intermissions, delivered through the same impeccable system.

magnus-on-sax-dj-mallorca-spain.intro_html:
Magnus on Sax – An Exquisite Fusion of Refined Saxophone & Bespoke DJ Artistry

Based in the idyllic enclave of Mallorca, Spain, Magnus on Sax is an internationally acclaimed saxophonist whose performances are a hallmark of unparalleled sophistication. He holds a coveted residency at a prestigious Mallorca beach club and an exclusive English nightclub, curating an atmosphere of effortless elegance.

His impeccable artistry has graced the most discerning events, including private soirées for Liverpool FC’s coach, the home of Claudia Schiffer, the opulent Hotel Castillo Son Vida, and many other distinguished venues. He frequently collaborates with DJ Angelo, offering a bespoke Ibiza-style fusion of live saxophone and refined mixing. His calendar consistently features weddings and elite celebrations at Son Sant Andreu Agroturismo in Mallorca, Bell Recó in Mataró, and Castell de Tamarit in Tarragona, Spain.

Enquire About Magnus on Sax

In 2023, his refined presence has been showcased across Switzerland, Germany, and Spain. He warmly welcomes bespoke live requests, continually expanding his curated repertoire—an exquisite selection of Jazz Standards, timeless party classics, and contemporary blockbusters. He is most frequently engaged for weddings, intimate hen parties, corporate galas, and exclusive pool parties. His standard offering is an impeccably crafted performance lasting approximately one and a half to two hours, seamlessly accompanying the DJ throughout the celebration.

acoustic-duo-paris-france-montage.intro_html:
The Montage Duo – An Exquisite Acoustic Ensemble Based in Paris, France

The Montage acoustic duo, based in the heart of Paris, presents a meticulously curated selection of options and repertoire, tailored to the unique character of your forthcoming celebration.

We are sought after to perform at weddings, soirées, and corporate affairs throughout France and across Europe.

Discover our complete collection of wedding musicians in Paris ➡️

The Montage Duo brings a warm yet refined musical sensibility to every event, impeccably suited to all audiences: corporate galas, wedding receptions, birthday celebrations, intimate dinners, and anniversary gatherings.

We are regularly engaged to perform at weddings and events held at Domaine du Château de Mairy in Marne and Hôtel Marignan Champs-Élysées in Paris, France.

Inquire with The Montage Duo
acoustic-duo-paris-france-montage.description_html:
We have designed several bespoke configurations to assist you in selecting the ideal entertainment for your occasion: a duo of singer and pianist, or a trio of singer, pianist, and drummer.

The refined character of our repertoire contributes an air of sophistication to your atmosphere, whether it be an intimate gathering or a more spirited festivity. From 1960s jazz standards to contemporary pop selections, we reimagine beloved English and French songs through a piano-and-voice presentation, perfectly suited to an elegant environment.

Discreet yet gracious, we integrate seamlessly into your event, tailoring our service to your desires and constraints with impeccable attention.

Wedding Ceremonies

Our piano-and-vocals duo lends an elegant and celebratory musical presence to your wedding ceremony, whether religious or secular.

For every moment of the ceremony—celebration or meditation—we guide you in striking the perfect balance between emotion and conviviality, while honouring the celebrant as the master of the ceremony and accompanying him with deference.

We listen attentively to your wishes, ensuring your ceremony unfolds with flawless success. Our repertoire includes gospel, liturgical, and lyric compositions, as well as more contemporary pop songs.

Thereafter, you compose your ceremony alongside your celebrant. We remain at your disposal to advise and assist throughout the entire preparation of your event.

Original and unique, our musical offerings surprise and unite your guests for a magical and deeply moving ceremony.

Should you seek the finest wedding singer Paris (France) has to offer, we invite you to connect with The Montage Duo.

French Classics

With grace and elegance, our duo or trio performs a repertoire of classic French songs from the 1930s, 1940s, and 1950s.

Alternately realistic, romantic, or humorous, these songs recount the extraordinary stories of a France from another era. This bespoke repertoire is ideally suited to concerts, recitals, themed events, and ‘French’ parties.

View all of our wedding musicians in Paris ➡️

Our ensemble revisits the most exquisite French classics—those that inspire dance, laughter, tears, and dreams. Piaf, Montand, Fréhel, Vian: an opportunity to discover or rediscover timeless musical treasures, delivered in an enjoyable and resolutely modern manner.

Travel through time with us, and allow the moment to pause, ever so briefly.

The Barcelona String Quartet — an ensemble of consummate artistry, based in Barcelona and revered for its refined interpretations. Each member is a distinguished pedagogue at Catalonia’s foremost conservatories, while also performing with celebrated orchestras such as the OBC, the Symphony Orchestra of Vallès, the Camera Musicae Orchestra, and the Camerata XXI Orchestra.

With over a decade of impeccable experience curating exquisite musical atmospheres for ceremonies and events across Catalonia, the quartet offers a bespoke repertoire tailored to every occasion. Their performances are in exceptional demand for weddings throughout Barcelona and Spain.

For those who seek only the most exquisite string quartet Spain can offer — a symbol of exclusivity and uncompromising quality — we invite you to connect.

Enquire about The Barcelona String Quartet
barcelona-string-quartet.description_html: A curated ensemble of supremely talented female instrumentalists and vocalists, each holding advanced degrees, who present chamber groups — duos, trios, quartets — and orchestras of the highest calibre. Bona música presents collectives that are not merely performed, but experienced — a hallmark of sophistication for any distinguished event.

four-jazz-montrouge-paris-france.intro_html:
Four Jazz – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Paris, France

Four Jazz presents the impeccable musical accompaniment for life’s most refined occasions—weddings, galas, and corporate celebrations.

Our ensemble brings together exceptionally talented musicians from diverse artistic backgrounds, each lending a distinct nuance to every curated performance.

Guests are invited on a bespoke journey through time, where timeless jazz and bossa nova melodies—cherished for generations—are woven together by a shared, passionate devotion to music.

At the helm stands Tansy, our Franco-Irish vocalist, whose sweetly toneful voice bestows an air of effortless elegance upon every event.

We are regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive affairs at the Château de Vallery and the Chalet des Îles in Paris, France.

Inquire with Four Jazz 💬
four-jazz-montrouge-paris-france.description_html:
This refined collective of accomplished jazz artists—including guitarist Tiphaine and cellist Yannick—captivates guests with sultry rhythms and exquisitely crafted melodies.

A performance by Four Jazz transcends mere music; it is an immersive experience that transforms any gathering into an unforgettable celebration.

Whether you desire a whisper of bossa nova at a corporate soirée, vibrant swing at a cocktail reception, or a supremely elegant ambience for a wedding banquet, Four Jazz delivers with flair, grace, and impeccable sophistication.

For further details, we warmly invite you to reach out. A curated selection of packages is available, from an intimate duo to a full quintet.

We are delighted to offer one hour of refined French jazz standards and two hours of swing and bossa nova classics. Our standard ensemble comprises four musicians—vocalist, guitar, double bass/cello, and drums—yet we also perform as a trio (without drums) or as a duo (singer and guitarist).

About Barca Sax & DJ – An Exquisite Duo of Professional Saxophonist & DJ, Curated from Barcelona, Spain

Barca Sax & DJ is an impeccably refined Barcelona-based duo, offering a bespoke fusion of live saxophone and masterfully curated DJ beats for weddings and exclusive celebrations.

With over five years of experience within the city’s most sophisticated music scene, this duo has crafted unforgettable moments—from intimate cocktail hours to exuberant dance floors—by weaving together blues, jazz, funk, and contemporary party sounds with flawless artistry.

Whether orchestrating a serene ambiance for the ceremony and cocktails or igniting the evening with an electrifying after-party, they provide a seamless, full-day musical journey—or, if preferred, a precisely tailored performance for the moments that matter most to you.

Contact Barca Sax & DJ
barca-sax-dj-barcelona-spain.description_html:
While their signature presentation is the saxophone and DJ duo, they also offer a selection of refined configurations: saxophone with piano or guitar, an elegant smooth jazz trio, or even a complete five-piece blues ensemble—each option curated to elevate your celebration.

Every performance is supported by state-of-the-art sound and lighting equipment, a dedicated microphone for toasts and speeches, and a bespoke playlist to maintain an impeccable atmosphere between live sets.

The duo’s professionalism is absolute: they arrive one hour prior to the first set and complete setup within thirty to forty-five minutes, requiring only a modest 2x2 metre performance space.

They gracefully accommodate special requests—including a first dance—and are equally adept indoors, outdoors, or within uniquely evocative settings such as rustic barns or seaside shores.

Fully insured and equipped with the finest instruments, Barca Sax & DJ delivers a stylish, reliable, and utterly luxurious live music experience—one that infuses every celebration with an unmistakable touch of elegance.

freshmen-band-paris-france.faq_html:
<details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- We need between 2h and 2h30 to set up and do the sound check.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- We can learn song request, we already did it for many weddings 😊 if it’s decided a few weeks/month before the day, we can work on these songs to be played on stage.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>-  We need at least 6x4m space area for our performance.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- We have public liability insurance and our equipment are certified digital equipment (no amp, except for the bassist but it’s a SVT pro, we play on KEMPER and our mix table is a digital SOUNDCRAFT UI24R. All the rest is certified too (microphone, cable, electricity, etc…)

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, we are comfortable to performing outdoors, and in unusual settings it depend if the ground is enough clean to put a drum and all our equioment but it’s possible 😅</details>

vitality-wedding-band-paris-france.intro_html:
Vitality – An Exquisite Professional Ensemble Based in Paris, France

Vitality is a refined, high-calibre band hailing from Paris, curating an impeccable selection of music spanning the 1960s to the present day, each piece reimagined with vibrant, bespoke arrangements. A captivating vocal performance, intoxicating rhythms, and musicians in perfect synergy form the foundation of an exclusive repertoire encompassing Rock, Pop, Soul, Funk, and beyond—an unforgettable experience for your most distinguished celebrations.

This ensemble is regularly engaged for weddings and events at the Four Seasons Hotel George V in Paris, Château Bouffémont in Val-d'Oise, and Le Domaine d'Essendiéras in Saint-Médard-d'Excideuil, France—venues synonymous with luxury and prestige.

Enquire with Vitality

Vitality unites a group of supremely talented artists whose extensive experience spans high-end performances and illustrious events. Their musicians have accompanied luminaries such as Daniel Powter and Chris Isaak, and each member devotes their entire skill set and passion to serving your occasion with absolute dedication.

Discover all of our France-based wedding bands ➡️

Their professionalism ensures a seamless planning process, delivering impeccable entertainment for any affair—from weddings and milestone birthdays to cocktail receptions, corporate galas, seminars, concerts, and cultural celebrations. Every event is treated with the utmost care to create a stress-free, luminous experience.

Below are just a few of the distinguished venues where clients have booked Vitality through FixTheMusic for weddings and events:

  • Le Domaine d'Essendiéras
  • Château Bouffémont, Île-de-France
  • Château du Grand Lucé
  • 16e Arrondissement, Paris

If you seek the finest wedding band Paris has to offer, a partnership with Vitality promises an evening of unparalleled elegance.

En français

Vitality est une formation haut de gamme composée de musiciens professionnels de talent.

Tous les membres de l’équipe sont diplômés d’écoles de musique et surtout, ont une longue expérience de la scène, que ce soit en groupes ou en accompagnements d’artistes tels que Daniel Powter, Juliette, Chimène Badi et bien d’autres.

Vitality, c’est aussi une équipe de passionnés qui aime la musique et qui aime surtout la partager en live. Nous nous engageons à 100 % dans chaque évènement et nous serons ravis de vous accompagner dans votre projet.

Vitality est un orchestre de variété internationale, avec un répertoire large et varié. Nous interprétons des chansons de styles et périodes très différents.

R’N’B, Pop, Rock, chanson française, Funk, tous les styles sont représentés dans notre répertoire. Nous interprétons les chansons d’artistes aussi différents que Ed Sheeran, Edith Piaf, Sia ou Rihanna.

Avec plus de 250 titres au répertoire, Vitality est capable de s’adapter au thème de votre soirée d’entreprise ou de votre séminaire. Grace à sa diversité, c’est aussi une animation idéale pour un mariage.

party-band-bordeaux-keep-grooving.intro_html:
Keep Grooving — An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble from Bordeaux, Curating Unforgettable Celebrations Across France

Keep Grooving is a supremely refined cover band, hailing from the elegant city of Bordeaux, dedicated to delivering impeccable musical entertainment. Composed of four virtuoso musicians, this fresh and enchanting ensemble brings a touch of bespoke magic to every event. A high-energy pop and rock cover band for hire, featuring captivating female vocals.

Proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s 20 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆, Keep Grooving stands among the most sought-after talents in the nation. Clients who have enquired with Keep Grooving also explored these distinguished ensembles on FixTheMusic:

  1. The Earthshakers
  2. The Dallas Class
  3. Funky Fresh
  4. Rock Empire
  5. Mixology Sax & DJ

Based in Bordeaux, Keep Grooving regularly performs at weddings and exclusive soirées across the south of France and beyond. Their artistry is frequently showcased at the magnificent Château de Seguin in Lignan-de-Bordeaux and the resplendent Castelnau des Fieumarcon in Lagarde, France. To secure this premium experience, Contact Keep Grooving.

With a wealth of experience meticulously curated over many years, Keep Grooving possesses a vast and varied repertoire spanning pop, soul, rock, and disco—each performance an impeccably crafted journey through eras and genres. The band is profoundly professional and remarkably flexible, delighted to travel to your chosen venue. Upon request, they are pleased to learn new songs, ensuring a truly bespoke soundtrack for your momentous day.

View all of our France-based wedding bands ➡️

If you seek to hire one of Bordeaux’s most distinguished wedding and party bands, look no further than Keep Grooving. Enquire today for an experience of unparalleled elegance.

dj-sax-drums-fusion-girls.intro_html: Fusion Girls – An Exquisite Trio of DJ, Sax & Percussion, Curated from the UK
dj-sax-drums-fusion-girls.description_html:
✨ What our discerning clientele cherish most: Electrifying performances, impeccably full dance floors, refined audience engagement, sophisticated yet spirited artistry, consummate professionalism, and a bespoke approach to every request.

A Bespoke Musical Experience

Fusion Girls is an all-female ensemble of exceptional calibre, comprising a DJ, a roaming saxophonist, a percussionist on bongos, an electric violinist, and a vocalist—each artist a master of their craft.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic's esteemed 22 Best Sax & DJ Groups in the UK and their curated 30 Best Wedding Bands in London—a testament to our refined artistry.

Our ensemble commands dance floors at the world's most prestigious venues, offering a curated repertoire of beloved anthems and a distinctly festival-inspired elegance.

These high-energy, impeccably choreographed performances are the perfect accompaniment to weddings, corporate galas, and exclusive club soirées.

When the artists venture into the audience to deliver an interactive, immersive live experience, the atmosphere ascends to an unparalleled level of sophistication and joy.

Discover the UK's most refined DJ & saxophone groups for hire.

Clients who have reserved Fusion Girls have also expressed interest in these exquisite ensembles on FixTheMusic:

  1. PYT
  2. Trapstars
  3. Aptitude Club Live
  4. Voxxy & DJ

An International Presence at the Finest Destinations

We are regularly engaged to perform at weddings and exclusive events in the most coveted locations worldwide: the Bulgari Resort in Dubai, Beach Club Hvar in Croatia, Santorini Gem in Greece, Shangri-La Paris in France, Borgo Stomennano in Italy, Tivoli Marina Vilamoura Resort in Portugal, This Must Be The Place (Mas Casamitjana) in Spain, Ktima Alassos in Cyprus, and The Steel Yard Nightclub in London.

Enquire for an Exclusive Consultation

For those seeking a more tranquil ambience, the ensemble also delights in performing soulful, acoustic-style covers at pool parties, lounge events, and wedding ceremonies—an exquisite complement to any refined gathering.

Explore the finest saxophone & DJ groups in the UK.

A Storied Legacy of Excellence

Fusion Girls have captivated audiences in London, Ibiza, Dubai, Monaco, The Philippines, and countless other illustrious destinations. We have been privileged to perform for luxury brands of the highest standing, including Land Rover, Manchester City Football Club, Four Seasons Hotels, Vogue, Ibiza Rocks, Mini, Boohoo, and Ministry of Sound.

Our reputation for delivering performances of the utmost calibre has attracted a clientele that includes some of the world's most celebrated figures: Sir David Attenborough, Coleen Rooney, and Steven Gerrard, among others.

Fusion Girls bestow upon every event an extra dimension of sparkle and radiance. These artists possess an innate mastery of the celebratory arts.

The Artistry Behind the Sound

Fusion Girls present a singular trio configuration: a DJ's impeccable mixing, a luminous saxophone, and refined percussion—available for events across the United Kingdom and throughout the world.

Their distinctive fusion of funky, soulful house mixes, interlaced with jazzy saxophone grooves and an effortlessly cool percussive beat, creates a sound unlike any other—an auditory experience that compels guests to dance with undeniable elegance.

View FixTheMusic's curated list of the finest wedding bands in the United Kingdom.

Each member of Fusion Girls has led an extraordinary career, performing on global stages from Glastonbury to Ibiza, Parklife to Hideout Festival, and even opening for the legendary Jools Holland—to mention but a few of their storied achievements.

For Your Most Precious Occasion

If your celebration—be it a wedding, private party, or corporate affair—demands something truly unique, an exquisite fusion of saxophone, DJ, and drums, we invite you to contact Fusion Girls.

The ensemble offers a meticulously crafted saxophone and DJ wedding package, optionally enhanced with percussion (bongos or full drum kit) and vocals. A more intimate saxophone and bongos package is also available for those seeking understated elegance.

Service Areas & Availability

Fusion Girls are available for events throughout Europe, including alpine soirées in the ski resorts of the Alps, romantic weddings in the French countryside, and luxury celebrations across Italy. Within the United Kingdom, we are in especially high demand in the North West (Manchester, Liverpool, Cheshire), as well as Yorkshire, Leeds, Essex, and London.

Fusion Girls are frequently engaged for corporate events, retail conferences, and awards ceremonies of distinction, including the Women's Recognition Awards, the W Series Gala, and for corporate clients such as Three and Samsung.

The group is also proud to be featured as a premier wedding band in Essex on FixTheMusic's exclusive list.

An Illustrious Portfolio of Venues

Listed below are just some of the distinguished locations where we have been commissioned by clients through FixTheMusic for weddings and events of the highest order:

  • Santorini Gem, Greece
  • Island Art & Taste, Athens

kat-the-players-paris-france.intro_html:
Kat & The Players — A Curated Ensemble of Jazz & Live DJ Artistry, Based in Paris, France & California, USA

The exquisite French-American vocalist Kat draws inspiration from a refined spectrum of musical traditions—French classics, jazz, gospel, American rock, and opera—each rendered with impeccable artistry.

Kat honed her craft at Oklahoma City University’s Bass School of Music, where she immersed herself in composition and operatic studies.

Her operatic prowess earned the prestigious young artist prize from the La Jolla Symphony for a sublime interpretation of Mozart’s Queen of the Night from The Magic Flute.

Inquire for Kat & The Players 💬
kat-the-players-paris-france.description_html:
Effortlessly bridging continents, Kat performs bespoke live sets across the United States and Europe.

Her voice has graced Disney recordings, illuminated hundreds of stages worldwide, and featured in television series spanning Pop, Dance, Jazz, and beyond—each composition and lyric curated with sophistication.

At a celebration of French culture and history in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, hosted by the French Consulate, Kat unveiled selections from her then-unfinished French Bossa Nova album, transporting guests with its seamless elegance.

In 2024, she received an exclusive second invitation to perform at Jeddah’s inaugural jazz festival, Jazz in Jeddah 2024—a testament to her refined artistry.

Her latest record, a luminous fusion of Brazilian Bossa Nova and French jazz, invites the listener into the streets of the City of Light, every note an exquisite journey.

barcelona-sax-weddings-spain.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- I'm flexible in terms of set length but normally I do 45 min so that I can have a 15 min break every hour. If I'm working with a DJ I can go for longer because I space my interventions so that I don't get exhausted. When working like that I can do 3 hours-long sets and even longer.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- I have different line up options. My basic service is just me playing over backing music or alongside the DJ that the client has already hired. I also work with my own DJs. Finally, I have a Duo with a Singer to which we can add a few musicians to turn into a three or four piece band.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- I do provide sound and lightning equipment but it is not included in my basic quote, It has to be requested separately and the equipment varies depending on the size of the event. I work with top sound providers in Barcelona and other parts of Spain.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- I do provide a laptop playlist in between my sets but I personally don't DJ. After I'm done with my performance I leave so for music after my performance there will be an extra charge.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- I normally arrive one hour prior to my performance.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- If it is just me in 30 minutes I'm ready to start. If I'm going with a DJ or a singer then we'll be ready in one hour or even one hour and a half.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- I learn new songs every day, that's just what I do. I love all music and love to comply with my clients requests

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- I don't need much space because I use a wireless microphone which allows me to move around even in between the people. What I do need is a table to set up my equipment.

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- I do have PLI and PAT tested my equipment.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- I use a wireless microphone which grants me the possibility of playing basically anywhere as long as it's not wet or risky.</details>

light-blues-band-toulouse-france.intro_html:
Light Blues – An Exquisite Blues & Jazz Ensemble, Based in Toulouse, France

Light Blues is a refined quartet that invites you to wander through the storied lineage of the Mississippi Delta. Formed by four multi-instrumentalists of exceptional calibre, the ensemble explores the full spectrum of blues traditions with impeccable artistry. Their curated performance traverses Work Songs and Gospel, with sophisticated detours through Swing and Rock & Roll. The evening begins with four voices in sublime harmony, as tuba and double bass waltz through a bespoke homage to New Orleans. Light Blues is regularly engaged for weddings and exclusive events at the esteemed Château De Sibra in Lagarde, France.

Enquire About Light Blues

The vocalist’s warm, dynamic instrument bridges the legacies of Louis Armstrong, Elvis Presley, and the Golden Gate Quartet with effortless sophistication. The pianist showcases the richness of cross-cultural music through improvised solos of exquisite nuance, while the snare drum imparts vitality and rhythmic precision to the ensemble’s refined sound. In 2013, these four artists converged at Music’Halle, the School of Lively Musics in Toulouse—a serendipitous encounter that would yield something truly extraordinary. Select a pianist from Marciac and the Wec family; recruit a double bassist from the Power Manouche of Turbo Niglo Trio; combine a drummer from Normandy, steeped in the New Orleans Groove of the Fanflures Brass Band; and finish with a vocalist who is the spiritual heir to Little Richard and Etta James. The result is Light Blues—a bespoke journey that carries you back in time with impeccable grace. For larger affairs, Light Blues may also add saxophone, trumpet, or guitar to their principal lineup.

Parisian Swing is a Paris-based ensemble, led by the refined vocalist Aude, presenting an impeccable interpretation of swing’s golden era. jules-guitarist-costa-brava-spain.intro_html:
About Jules – An Exquisite Singer-Guitarist, Based in the Enchanted Costa Brava, Spain

Of Argentinian origin, Jules now resides along the refined shores of Costa Brava. For over two decades, his artistry has traversed the globe, gracing prestigious venues across the United States, China, the Maldives, and the world’s most distinguished cruise lines—Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, Carnival, and Holland America. These voyages have cultivated not only an impeccable musicianship but also a profound, intuitive connection with discerning audiences from every culture.

Contact Jules
jules-guitarist-costa-brava-spain.description_html:
Jules’s musical odyssey began in earliest childhood, awakened by the classic rock records his parents lovingly played at home. He embraced singing and drumming at seven, later mastering guitar and bass during adolescence, before refining his craft at a conservatory in Buenos Aires, where he studied Jazz and Popular Music. Over time, he has forged a distinctive style—a bespoke fusion of soul, jazz, folk, Latin, blues, and pop—inspired by luminaries such as Sting, John Mayer, Djavan, Pat Metheny, and Punch Brothers. Improvisation, emotional depth, and seamless genre blending lie at the heart of every performance he creates.

More recently, his focus has turned to the healing power of music. Jules leads curated guided meditations with guitar, voice, and original compositions—immersive experiences designed to cultivate calm, presence, and connection. His original work continues to evolve as an authentic, refined reflection of his personal and artistic journey.

Today, he performs as a solo artist for weddings and exclusive events, collaborates in select duo, trio, and quartet ensembles, and plays bass in a Joaquín Sabina tribute band—all while composing new pieces that bridge styles and draw listeners closer to themselves.

jules-guitarist-costa-brava-spain.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 1.5hrs set or 2 hours with a short break in between sets.

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Solo or Duo

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Sound included with option to add lights for an additional cost.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- At least an hour before performance starts.

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 40 minutes

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- 1 Free song included with at least 1 week notice in advance. Can learn up to an additional 3 songs for an extra cost.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Approx. 2m x 2m

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, as long as there's a plan B for bad weather.</details>

female-dj-london-ibiza-pd.intro_html:
DJ PD – An Exquisite Curator of Sound, Based Between London & Ibiza

British virtuoso DJ PD stands among London’s most sought-after artists of the moment, having spent the past decade enchanting audiences worldwide with her impeccably refined and spirited sonic signature.

Her curated performances have graced the most exclusive occasions imaginable—fashion presentations, sporting events, product unveilings, award ceremonies, cinematic premieres, private yacht soirees, celebrity nuptials, and even affairs attended by royalty.

In 2011, DJ PD was appointed an official resident DJ for the prestigious global nightlife institution Hed Kandi, touring internationally, hosting a weekly radio broadcast, and contributing to some of their most acclaimed compilation releases.

Having presided over several hundred engagements across more than forty countries, she now divides her time between the United Kingdom and Ibiza—the luminous island where her profound passion for dance music first ignited.

Enquire About DJ PD

She currently holds an exclusive residency at the legendary Café Mambo Ibiza, where throughout the summer season she performs alongside dance music luminaries including Martin Solveig, Armand Van Helden, MK, Kungs, and Jax Jones—a testament to her standing among the finest in the industry.

A perennial favourite within the most elite party circles, she delivers bespoke, meticulously curated soundtracks for the planet’s most extraordinary celebrations.

In addition to commanding the decks for iconic club brands such as Pacha, Ministry of Sound, Creamfields, Ultra Europe, and Space Ibiza, DJ PD was recently selected as the distinguished warm-up act for the legendary Nile Rodgers and Chic at their exclusive Hewlett Packard event in Madrid—an honour reserved for artists of the highest calibre.

As an accomplished wedding DJ available for hire, DJ PD brings her unparalleled vitality, consummate professionalism, and innate ability to read an audience—crafting unforgettable, luminous moments for your most cherished day.

Should you wish to engage one of the United Kingdom’s—indeed, the world’s—most exceptional female DJs, you need look no further. Contact DJ PD today and begin curating your perfect celebration.

johnny-barcelona-and-the-swing-lovers-ba.intro_html:
Johnny Barcelona & The Swing Lovers – An Exquisite Jazz & Swing Ensemble, Based in Barcelona, Spain

Johnny Barcelona & The Swing Lovers present an impeccably refined and charismatic jazz and swing experience, available for hire throughout the illustrious regions of Northern Spain. Their performances are a curated celebration of exuberance and elegance, perfectly suited for weddings, corporate soirées, private gatherings, and any occasion demanding the spirited allure of swing.

This distinguished ensemble is a cherished presence at such esteemed venues as MAS TORROELLA in Palafrugell and Castell de Sant Marçal in Cerdanyola del Vallès, where their bespoke artistry elevates every event into an unforgettable affair.

Enquire About This Bespoke Ensemble
johnny-barcelona-and-the-swing-lovers-ba.description_html:
At the helm is Axel—a vocalist and guitarist of disparate lineage (United States, Holland, the Caribbean, and Brazil), now gracefully settled in Barcelona. His voice, impeccably clean, and his refined touch evoke the golden age of jazz from the 1940s and 1950s, while seamlessly embracing the soul-jazz and bossa nova rhythms of the 1960s.

Discover our curated collection of Spain's most distinguished jazz bands ➡️

Specializing in the American Song Book, Axel’s repertoire comprises timeless masterpieces popularized by Frank Sinatra, the Rat Pack, Nat King Cole, Louis Armstrong, and Duke Ellington, alongside soul-jazz treasures from George Benson, Stevie Wonder, and Al Greene, as well as bossa nova classics by Antonio Carlos Jobim. Each performance is an exquisite journey through impeccable melodies.

En español

Axel es un cantante y guitarrista de raíces dispares (Estados Unidos, Holanda, Caribe y Brasil) afincado en Barcelona. Especializado en el American Song Book, su voz limpia y toque depurado nos transportan a los años dorados del jazz de los años 40 y 50, sin olvidar los ritmos jazz-soul y bossa nova de los 60.

Su repertorio comprende grandes éxitos de Broadway popularizados por Frank Sinatra y el Rat Pack, Nat King Cole, Louis Armstrong y Duke Ellington, además de canciones de autores estadounidenses de soul-jazz como George Benson, Stevie Wonder o Al Greene, y de bossa nova como Antonio Carlos Jobim.

Axel interpreta su repertorio en formatos que van desde el solo íntimo hasta el quinteto completo—siempre acompañado de los músicos más selectos de la escena del swing y el jazz. Cada concierto es dinámico y cautivador, con toques de humor refinado en las presentaciones de las canciones.

Algunos títulos del repertorio: I’ve Got You Under My Skin, I’ve Got the World on a String, Route 66, Smile, Without a Song, Cheek to Cheek, Have You Met Miss Jones, Moondance, Via con Me, Just Friends, Ain’t Nothing but the Blues, The Nearness of You, Fly Me to the Moon, On Broadway, etc.

gypsy-jazz-band-paris-france-pantheon.intro_html:
Panthéon Gypsy Jazz Band – An Exquisite Gypsy Jazz Ensemble from Paris, France

What discerning clients most admire: impeccable talent, effortless professionalism, seamless communication, remarkable adaptability, an enchanting atmosphere, and guests utterly captivated.

Panthéon Gypsy Jazz Band is revered as one of the most refined Parisian jazz ensembles, a curated collective of virtuoso musicians whose artistry elevates every occasion.

This dynamic and youthful ensemble is in exceptional demand across France, gracing weddings, exclusive soirées, and high-end corporate events with their bespoke performances.

Discover the full selection of exquisite jazz bands in Paris.

They are regularly commissioned for weddings and events at the legendary Ritz Hotel, the Four Seasons Hotel George V in Paris, and the sublime Villa La Coste in Le Puy-Sainte-Réparade—venues that epitomize luxury.

Inquire About Panthéon Gypsy Jazz Band 💬
gypsy-jazz-band-paris-france-pantheon.description_html:
The ensemble comprises two guitars, double bass, drums, vocalist, and a solo instrument (trumpet, saxophone, clarinet, piano, accordion…), allowing for impeccable versatility.

  • Trio Django gypsy jazz: 2 guitars + double bass
  • Trio Jazzy: guitar + double bass + sax/clarinet
  • Quartet gypsy, jazz & swing: 2 guitars + double bass + sax/clarinet (or violin)
  • Quartet with singer: guitar + double bass + sax/clarinet + vocalist
  • Quintet gypsy, jazz & swing: 2 guitars + double bass + sax/clarinet + violin or trumpet
  • Quintet with singer: guitar + drums + double bass + sax/clarinet + vocalist
  • Sextet gypsy, jazz & swing: 2 guitars + double bass + sax + clarinet + violin
  • Sextet with singer: guitar + drums + double bass + sax/clarinet + trumpet + vocalist

For quartets and larger formations, the second guitar may be replaced by piano, though ideally the piano is provided on site.

View our complete collection of jazz bands in France ➡️

An accordionist may also be added for a distinctly Parisian touch.

The musicians possess an innate ability to tailor their repertoire to suit any desired ambiance, ensuring a performance of impeccable refinement.

Originally rooted in traditional Gypsy Swing and American Jazz, the ensemble has gracefully expanded into innovative rearrangements of French classics and folkloric styles from Spain, Russia, Italy, and beyond.

A tapestry of diverse rhythms—swing, waltz, boleros, tangos—rendered with energy, symbiotic artistry, and masterful execution, Panthéon Gypsy Jazz Band guarantees an authentically exquisite musical experience.

We offer our bespoke musical performances for an array of exclusive events...

  • Weddings, Bar Mitzvahs, Receptions
  • Cocktails, Business Luncheons
  • Private Parties
  • Birthdays
  • Hotels, Restaurants...

Should you seek to engage the finest gypsy jazz ensemble that Paris, France has to offer for your wedding or event, we invite you to connect with Panthéon Gypsy Jazz Band.

Below are just a selection of the distinguished venues where we have been engaged by clients through FixTheMusic for weddings and events...

  • Ritz Paris, Place Vendôme
  • Château du Grand Val, Combourg
  • Château de Merville, France

  • Chateau Naudou, Puymirol

  • Universite Paris Descartes, Paris
  • Château d'Esclimont, Paris
  • Gray, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté
  • Montmartre, Paris, France
  • Talus-Saint-Prix, France
  • Villefranche-sur-Mer, France
  • Brussels, Belgium

En français

Panthéon Gypsy Jazz Band est un orchestre de jazz manouche composé de musiciens professionnels d'exception.

Avec plus de 10 ans d'expérience et des centaines de concerts (mariages, soirées privées, événementiels) à leur actif, vous bénéficiez d'une garantie de moments magiques et inoubliables pour vos invités.

Services proposés

Les musiciens s'adapteront sur mesure à vos désirs musicaux pour créer un répertoire unique, à votre image, selon l'ambiance souhaitée, avec un raffinement incomparable.

Depuis ses débuts fidèles aux standards du jazz manouche (Django Reinhardt, Stephane Grapelli) et du swing américain (Louis Armstrong, Fats Waller, Ella Fitzgerald...), Panthéon Gypsy Jazz Band a intégré des versions innovantes de la chanson française (Brassens, Trenet, Piaf, Aznavour, Brel, Gainsbourg) et des musiques traditionnelles (espagnoles, russes, yiddish) avec une élégance rare.

Des rythmes endiablés et vivants (swings, valses, boléros, tangos) interprétés avec énergie et entrain sauront pleinement satisfaire vos oreilles et votre sensibilité la plus exigeante.

Il ne vous reste plus qu'à choisir votre formule : du duo guitares au sextet avec contrebasse, chanteuse, violon, clarinette ou saxophone... c'est vous qui décidez, dans une optique de luxe sur mesure.

N'hésitez pas à visionner les vidéos pour vous imprégner de l'atmosphère et surtout échanger avec le responsable de Panthéon Gypsy Jazz Band, qui saura vous orienter avec une expertise impeccable.

Une fois réservé, vous ne vous occupez de rien ni avant ni le jour J. L'orchestre est totalement autonome, pour une sérénité absolue.

Zone d'activité

Retrouvez ces artistes dans le 20ème arrondissement de la capitale, où ils se produisent régulièrement dans des cafés et restaurants d'exception.

Pour votre mariage, ils se déplaceront où que vous soyez en France. Si vous avez besoin de renseignements complémentaires, n'hésitez pas à les contacter ; ils se feront un plaisir de vous répondre avec la plus grande courtoisie.

montpellier-jazz-collective-france.intro_html:
The Montpellier Jazz Collective – An Ensemble of Distinction

Based in the culturally rich city of Montpellier, France, The Montpellier Jazz Collective represents a gathering of exceptionally talented, professional musicians. Their repertoire is a meticulously curated selection of the world's most exquisite jazz standards, the rhythmic allure of bossa nova, and the timeless elegance of refined French chansons.

Explore our complete collection of premium jazz ensembles in France ➡️

The Montpellier Jazz Collective has had the privilege of lending its refined sound to a distinguished clientele across the south of France, impeccably orchestrating the perfect ambiance for weddings, cocktail receptions, vins d'honneur, and other exclusive celebrations.

Their artistry has graced the hallowed grounds of Château Canet in Rustiques, the Carlton Cannes Regent Hotel, Chateau de Paraza in Narbonne, and Le Tresor Cache in Bonnieux, among a constellation of other prestigious venues.

Inquire About The Montpellier Jazz Collective
montpellier-jazz-collective-france.description_html:
For several years, The Montpellier Jazz Collective has been the chosen accompaniment for a vast array of high-profile events throughout the south of France – from opulent weddings and sophisticated cocktail receptions to exclusive birthday celebrations and village festivals.

View all of our jazz bands in France ➡️

To ensure seamless continuity throughout your event, the collective employs a discreet, high-fidelity PA system capable of integrating your personal playlist during intermissions, effectively offering a bespoke DJ service should the occasion require it.

Understanding that each celebration is unique, The Montpellier Jazz Collective is delighted to accommodate bespoke song requests. Kindly submit these in advance to allow for meticulous arrangement and rehearsal.

Among the distinguished locales that have hosted the collective's performances are:

  • Château Canet, Rustiques
  • Carlton Cannes Regent Hotel
  • Chateau de Paraza, Narbonne
  • Chateau de Puissentut
  • Chateau Martinay, Provence
  • Château de Boulogne
  • La Bastide de Laurence
  • Hotel Le Vieux Castillon
  • Château Les Carrasses
  • Domaine du Clos d'Hullias
  • Le Tresor Cache, Bonnieux
  • La Bastide de Marie, Ménerbes
  • Callian, France
  • Nîmes, France
  • Châteauneuf-du-Pape, France

The ensemble possesses a unique ability to roam gracefully among guests, transforming the musical experience into an immersive, live phenomenon that adds an unparalleled dimension to any refined gathering.

As consummate professionals, the musicians are perpetually courteous, impeccably discreet, and elegantly attired. Every performance is 100% live, crafted without the artifice of backing tracks, ensuring an authentic and pristine auditory experience.

Whether intended for a grand wedding ceremony, an intimate drinks reception, or a celebratory banquet, The Montpellier Jazz Collective is dedicated to bestowing an unforgettable magical touch upon your most special day.

Opting for a jazz duo offers an atmosphere of profound intimacy and controlled acoustics. Furthermore, the ensemble's compact configuration allows for swift adaptation to any environment, gracefully accommodating unforeseen changes such as inclement weather.

The collective’s service area encompasses the entirety of France, with a particular concentration in the Languedoc-Roussillon region, including the esteemed departments of Hérault, Gard, Bouche du Rhône, Aude, Pyrénées Orientales, Tarn, Saint Christol de Rodières, Aveyron Vaucluse, and the glamorous cities of Nîmes, Perpignan, Marseille, Montpellier, Toulouse, Montagnac, Pézenas, Sète, Béziers, Avignon, Alès, and the illustrious French Riviera.

If your discerning taste leads you to seek the finest jazz ensemble Montpellier has to offer for your wedding or exclusive event, we invite you to make an inquiry with The Montpellier Jazz Collective.

En français

Le Montpellier Jazz Collective vous propose une prestation d'exception pour sublimer votre mariage.

Ces musiciens chevronnés se sont réunis pour interpréter les plus grands standards du jazz, la variété française revisitée avec élégance, et les rythmes envoûtants de la bossa-nova.

Leur talent s'allie pour composer un concert romantique et raffiné, parfaitement adapté à l'atmosphère de votre heureux événement.

Plusieurs formules sur mesure sont proposées pour enchanter votre réception privée et animer votre journée de noces :

  • Duo : guitare / saxophone
  • Duo : guitare / chant
  • Trio : contrebasse / guitare / saxophone
  • Trio : contrebasse / guitare / chant
  • Quatuor : batterie / contrebasse / guitare / saxophone
  • Quatuor : batterie / contrebasse / guitare / chant

Idéale pour le vin d'honneur, la conclusion d'un discours émouvant ou l'ouverture du bal, cette prestation artistique s'intègre avec une perfection naturelle à votre grand jour.

N'hésitez pas à confier vos envies les plus spécifiques au Montpellier Jazz Collective. Habitués à intervenir lors de cérémonies de mariage d'exception, ils adaptent leurs services à vos exigences les plus hautes. Vous pouvez ainsi leur demander de préparer à l'avance quelques morceaux exclusifs pour une festivité qui vous ressemble.

Ensembles Connexes

Les clients ayant sollicité le Montpellier Jazz Collective ont également manifesté un vif intérêt pour les formations suivantes sur FixTheMusic :

  1. The Montpellier Jazz Band
  2. The Montpellier Swing Band
  3. Swing Thieves
  4. The Lyon Jazz Band
  5. The Toulouse Gypsy Jazz Band

Découvrez notre sélection complète des orchestres de jazz d'exception en France.

violinist-paris-angeline-strings.intro_html:
About Angeline Strings – An Exquisite Wedding Violinist, Based in Paris, France

Angeline Strings is a refined violinist, based in the heart of Paris, whose artistry elevates every occasion. She curates an impeccable musical experience, specializing in bespoke entertainment for discerning events.

With years of mastery, Angeline Strings delivers a performance of unparalleled elegance, seamlessly weaving through a meticulously crafted repertoire spanning from Classical to House music. Her vast and varied selections ensure that every guest finds a moment of resonance, making each celebration truly unforgettable.

She is regularly engaged for exclusive weddings and events at the prestigious Château de Rochefort in France.

Contact Angeline Strings
violinist-paris-angeline-strings.description_html:
Always dressed impeccably, Angeline infuses your event with an air of luxury, ensuring that your occasion is nothing short of exquisite. She performs on a collection of exceptional violins, including a bespoke LED butterfly violin that adds a luminous, otherworldly touch.

Complementing her illuminated instrument, Angeline can also adorn herself in stunning fiber-optic dresses, which, when lit, create breathtaking patterns of light across the stage.

If you seek to engage one of Paris’s most distinguished violinists, look no further than Angeline Strings. Inquire today to secure this refined experience.

About Sundown Notes – an exquisite Voice & Piano Duo, based in Paris, France

Nestled within the refined heart of Paris, Sundown Notes emerges as a distinguished duo, celebrated for their impeccably curated performances at weddings and exclusive events around the world.

Guided by the extraordinary artistry of Chloé and Benjamin, their harmonious collaboration delivers an unforgettable musical experience—defined by seamless communication and refined adaptability.

They are regularly engaged to perform at weddings and bespoke occasions at the Eiffel Tower in Paris.

Contact Sundown Notes

Chloé’s emotive vocals, brimming with passion, intertwine effortlessly with Benjamin’s masterful piano melodies, painting a canvas of elegance and sophistication.

Guests are transported into a world of enchantment as they bask in the exquisite atmosphere woven by Sundown Notes.

For couples seeking to infuse their special day with a touch of romance—or event organisers aiming to elevate the ambiance with unparalleled musicality—Sundown Notes stands as the epitome of excellence.

With their international acclaim and unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional performances, Chloé and Benjamin guarantee an experience that lingers in the memories of all who attend.

Deeply inspired by American musical heritage, their repertoire spans blues and folk through rock, jazz, and soul—each piece delivered with elegant sophistication.

This bespoke four-piece formation commands a vast and varied collection, a testament to their ability to elevate any occasion with seamless versatility.

Enquire About The Editions
acoustic-band-paris-editions.description_html:

Discover all of our curated France-based wedding bands ➡️

With a character of effortless adaptability and warm professionalism, The Editions ensure every detail of your event unfolds with flawless grace.

For those seeking to engage one of France’s most refined acoustic bands for weddings and parties, look no further than The Editions—and initiate a conversation today.

wedding-band-bordeaux-soul-funk.intro_html: The Bordeaux Soul & Funk Band — an ensemble of consummate professionals, offering an unparalleled musical experience for weddings and celebratory gatherings. Based in the heart of Bordeaux, France, this refined collective curates an atmosphere of effortless sophistication.
wedding-band-bordeaux-soul-funk.description_html:
Comprising six exceptionally gifted musicians, The Bordeaux Soul & Funk Band delivers exquisite renditions of the most celebrated tracks in modern musical history. Their meticulously curated repertoire ensures that every guest—regardless of age—finds a moment of connection, delight, and elegance on the dance floor.

View FixTheMusic's curated selection of the finest wedding bands in Bordeaux

This ensemble is a frequent and sought-after presence at distinguished venues, including the enchanting Château Barayre in Laussou and the iconic Fort La Prée on Île de Ré, France.

Enquire about The Bordeaux Soul & Funk Band 💬

Offering a bespoke range of configurations to suit every occasion:

  • Trio for the Drinks Reception — Voice, guitar, and piano. An impeccably refined 2.5-hour set of jazz and soul, tailored exclusively for weddings and corporate functions, lending an air of polished elegance to the early proceedings.
  • Bespoke Ceremony — Five songs personally selected by the couple, meticulously learned and performed by the trio. The ensemble also provides microphones and speakers for family and guest speeches, ensuring every word is delivered with clarity and grace.
  • Full Band — Two guitars, bass, drums, piano, and vocals. An exhilarating 2.5-hour performance designed for the heart of the celebration. Drawing from a sweeping spectrum of eras and genres, the band delivers an exuberant dance set that is both sophisticated and irresistible.

Upon request, the band may also provide a seamless DJ service, extending the evening’s enchantment without interruption.

For those who seek nothing less than Bordeaux’s most distinguished soul and funk wedding band, The Bordeaux Soul & Funk Band offers an experience that is truly without equal.
