party-parade-mallorca-spain.intro_html:
Party Parade – An Exquisite Roaming Ensemble Based in Mallorca, Spain

Party Parade presents a bespoke roaming-band experience that places impeccable live music at the very heart of your celebration. Entirely wireless, the ensemble moves gracefully among your guests, transforming each moment into an intimate, shared sonic journey. There is no stage, no distance—only refined artistry and sweeping energy.

Discover more curated wedding bands in Mallorca

Composed of four vocalists—two gentlemen and two ladies—alongside saxophone, trumpet, and guitar, the group crafts a versatile, luminous sound that seamlessly adapts to every phase of your event.

Enquire with Party Parade 💬
party-parade-mallorca-spain.description_html:
Every musician in this curated ensemble possesses extensive international pedigree, having performed at weddings, private gatherings, and exclusive soirées across Europe for guests from around the globe. This refined global perspective enables an effortless connection with diverse audiences, cultivating an atmosphere where every individual feels an integral part of the occasion.

The repertoire is a meticulously selected collection of classic funk, pop, and soul, interwoven with universally beloved international hits—songs that inspire spontaneous sing-along and naturally elevate the celebration. During cocktail hour and dinner, the ensemble offers a softer, more romantic selection, weaving a warm and elegant ambiance while keeping the magic of live music intimately close to the guests. As evening unfolds, the energy crescendos; the band moves through the crowd, engaging each guest with spontaneity and joy, following the pulse of the moment.

The result is an impeccably personal, effervescent live-music experience—moments that linger in memory long after the final note has faded.

disco-fever-toulouse-france.intro_html:
Disco Fever – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Toulouse, France

Curated from the heart of Toulouse, Disco Fever offers a bespoke musical concoction for the most refined wedding or celebration. Upon a solid foundation of groove, they artfully blend the powerful allure of timeless Disco and Funk classics with the vibrant freshness of contemporary pop, yielding an impeccably balanced setlist that resonates across every generation. This ensemble is frequently engaged for exclusive events at the esteemed Domaine Le Castelet in Castres.

Inquire with Disco Fever
disco-fever-toulouse-france.description_html:
Performing with unparalleled style, soul, and years of experience within the luxury wedding sector, Disco Fever possesses an innate ability to keep guests on the dancefloor throughout the evening. No occasion is too intimate or too grand; they ensure every disco rhythm is transmitted directly into the feet of the crowd with refined precision.

For weddings and private events, the offering typically includes a one-hour set for the cocktail reception, a one-and-a-half-hour set (or divided into two bespoke sets) for the main celebration, followed by a five-hour DJ set. Every element is fully customisable to suit the unique rhythm of each event. A duo option is also available for an especially intimate cocktails or reception performance.

The price encompasses an impeccable sound system, capable of gracefully accommodating up to two hundred guests, along with carefully curated ambient lighting. During intervals, silence is never permitted; instead, a seamless musical playback from a high‑quality source continues the refined atmosphere. Watch the promotional videos and submit an enquiry for a bespoke quotation or further details.

Short Circuit is a curated collective of refined musicians and kindred spirits, who artfully reimagine pop, rock, and soul masterpieces from iconic artists such as David Bowie, Creedence Clearwater Revival, The Beatles, Led Zeppelin, and others of impeccable pedigree. Enquire About Short Circuit
short-circuit-paris-france.description_html:
Alongside their distinguished careers alongside celebrated artists including Yodelice, Her, and Clara Luciani, these musicians have united to share their profound reverence for this trans-generational repertoire. Their effortless camaraderie and seasoned stage presence resonate in every exquisitely executed note. palma-strum-mallorca-spain.intro_html:
An Introduction to Palma Strum – An Exquisite Acoustic Guitarist, Curated for the Most Refined Celebrations, Based in Mallorca, Spain

Palma Strum is a Brazilian guitarist and sound engineer of impeccable artistry, who has called Mallorca home for nearly a decade. With over ten years of experience performing at weddings and private events of the highest calibre, he brings a refined, bespoke sensibility to every occasion.

He has been the solo acoustic guitarist at more than 250 weddings across Mallorca and throughout Europe, each performance a testament to his mastery and exclusivity.

Explore further preeminent wedding musicians in Mallorca

His curated repertoire encompasses bossa nova, pop, swing, jazz, and classical—a sophisticated palette designed to elevate any atmosphere.

Arrange a Private Consultation with Palma Strum 💬
palma-strum-mallorca-spain.description_html:
Palma Strum’s style is a seamless fusion of classic and contemporary, crafted to evoke an elegant, intimate ambience tailored precisely to each unique celebration. With a genuine passion for forging connections through music, his singular objective is to enrich every event with a performance that feels profoundly personal and unforgettable.

Typically, he offers two exquisite 45-minute sets as a solo artist, though his setup is entirely adaptable to the nuances of your occasion. He provides his own state-of-the-art sound equipment for a modest additional fee, and can also curate a seamless playlist between and after his live sets to ensure an uninterrupted flow of refined music.

He arrives approximately two hours before the performance, allowing an hour for a meticulous setup and soundcheck. Special song requests—such as a first dance—are always welcomed and executed with the utmost care.

Palma Strum requires only about two metres of performance space and is equally at home indoors or outdoors, including enchanting settings such as rustic barns or pristine beaches.

akti-duo-athens-greece.intro_html:
About Akti Duo – An Exquisite Singer & Piano Duo, Based in Athens, Greece

Curated for the most refined celebrations, Akti Duo brings together a vocalist and pianist whose careers span over a decade of impeccable live performance. From exclusive weddings and bespoke private events to distinguished session work—recording and performing alongside celebrated artists, theatrical productions, cruise engagements, and luxury hotel entertainment—their artistry embodies sophistication and versatility.

The vocalist cultivated her craft over ten years in the United Kingdom, where she flourished as a sought‑after session singer. Among her most distinguished achievements are touring with number‑one recording artist Lukas Graham in 2017 and 2018, collaborating with major artists such as Matt and Luke Goss, KT Tunstall, Los Angeles hip‑hop artist Ill Camille (Kendrick Lamar), and soul‑chart‑topping vocalist SEL Soul (SoulII Soul, Alicia Keys). She has backed MOBO Award‑winning R&B ensemble Big Brovaz, was cast in Alice Oswald’s Memorial at the Barbican Centre, and performed with the UK’s finest gospel choirs, including IDMC and the Kingdom Choir.

Contact Akti Duo

Her voice has graced the stages of Wembley Arena, the Barbican Centre, Glasgow Royal Concert Hall, The Jazz Cafe, KOKO, Indigo at The O2, Hackney Empire, and the London Palladium, to name only a few. She has also provided vocal artistry for productions such as The X Factor, The Michael McIntyre Big Show on BBC, BBC’s Songs of Praise, and Sing: Ultimate Acapella.

For the past four years, she has been based in Greece, performing at an exquisite array of events, bars, restaurants, theatrical productions, and concerts, while also teaching at Athens’ most prestigious conservatoires, including Nakas Conservatory and Art Music School Fakanas.

The pianist brings over twenty years of experience as a solo performer, accompanist, composer, and educator in Greece. His refined artistry has encompassed theatre and musicals (Rent, Spamalot), touring theatrical productions in Cyprus and the UK, and an array of bands and jazz quartets, establishing an unparalleled presence in the Greek music scene.

He composes original scores for theatre (Mikros Kerameikos Theatre, 2024) and for numerous songwriters. His studies were guided by some of Greece’s foremost jazz piano masters—Pantelis Benetatos and Stavros Lantsias—and he currently collaborates with Greek theatrical writer, songwriter, and vocalist Eustathia. His regular performances grace the ambiance of exclusive restaurants, bars, and private events.

United as Akti Duo, they have performed at some of Greece’s most prestigious venues, including the iconic Athenee Athens and the five‑star resort and spa Euphoria Retreat. Each performance is meticulously curated to deliver a bespoke, unforgettable experience.

Line‑up Options:
- Acoustic Duo (piano, vocal)
- Pop & Jazz Trio (piano, vocal, percussion or saxophone)
- Quartet (piano, vocal, percussion, double bass)
- Five‑Piece Band (piano/keyboards, vocal, guitar, bass, drums)

barca-duo-barcelona-spain.intro_html:
The Barca Duo – An Exquisite Electric & Acoustic Ensemble, Based in Barcelona, Spain

Hailing from the refined coastal metropolis of Barcelona, The Barca Duo presents a captivating pop‑rock experience, artfully composed of a powerful vocalist‑guitarist and a dynamic drummer, all impeccably supported by high‑fidelity backing tracks. Their sound is a curated blend of vibrant energy and modern sophistication—exquisitely crafted to elevate any soirée. With a bespoke setlist of iconic anthems by Dua Lipa, Billie Eilish, Bruno Mars, and The Killers, they conjure an atmosphere that is at once exhilarating, familiar, and irresistibly uplifting.

Contact The Barca Duo 💬

Their live presentation unfolds over an impeccably timed hour and forty‑five minutes, offering a seamless journey of dance‑worthy melodies and refined energy from the first note to the last. The duo arrives two hours prior to your event, dedicating approximately ninety minutes to a meticulous setup and soundcheck, ensuring every sonic detail is flawless. They can also curate a pre‑show and interlude playlist, maintaining an uninterrupted ambiance of sophistication.

Performing with their own premium sound system, The Barca Duo requires a modest three‑by‑three‑metre performance space and adapts gracefully to both indoor and outdoor settings—provided a level surface and, for sunlit occasions, a shaded area. While bespoke song requests and custom lighting are not offered, the duo delivers a polished, high‑energy experience of the utmost quality. For weddings, parties, and exclusive celebrations that demand a burst of exhilarating live artistry and crowd‑pleasing hits, The Barca Duo ensures an impeccable resonance every time.

Palma & Me — An Exquisite Duo & Trio, Curated for the Most Refined Celebrations

Based in the luminous enclave of Mallorca, Spain, Palma & Me is a bespoke musical project centred upon the artistry of guitar and female vocals. For over eight years, this impeccably refined ensemble has graced weddings and exclusive events across Mallorca and Europe, crafting an atmosphere of unmatched elegance.

View the complete range of wedding musicians in Spain

With warm, soulful vocal delivery and the rich, layered textures of guitar and loopers, the duo weaves an ambiance that is both supremely elegant and imbued with vibrant, positive energy. Every performance is a curated journey through timeless pop classics, smooth bossa nova, soulful jazz, romantic ballads, and evocative Spanish songs—a repertoire designed to resonate across generations.

View the complete range of acoustic duos in Spain

Often, the experience is elevated further as the ensemble becomes a roaming act, moving gracefully through the crowd to infuse the celebration with a spontaneous, intimate touch. After all, the cocktail hour should be anything but ordinary.

Palma & Me is regularly engaged for weddings and events at the prestigious Son Formet in Menorca.

Contact Palma & Me 💬
palma-me-duo-mallorca-spain.description_html:
Typically, our performances span an exquisite 90 minutes, though we are delighted to extend our sets should the celebration demand a more prolonged musical tapestry. While the duo remains our primary configuration, we can expand into a trio with the addition of saxophone or percussion—adding an extra layer of opulence.

For couples seeking a fully immersive sonic environment, we offer a comprehensive sound and lighting package at a modest additional cost, along with a curated playlist service to maintain the refined atmosphere before or after our live sets.

We arrive no less than two hours prior to the event to set up, dedicating approximately one hour to an impeccable soundcheck that ensures every detail is flawless. Our footprint is remarkably discreet—requiring only four square metres—allowing us to perform with equal grace in intimate corners or grander spaces.

Requests are warmly welcomed, whether for a cherished first dance or a personal favourite that holds special meaning.

Performing outdoors or in uniquely characterful settings is a particular pleasure. From sun-drenched beaches to rustic barns, we have embraced a myriad of venues, each lending its own distinctive ambience to the occasion.

At its heart, Palma & Me is dedicated to creating unforgettable moments through music—an impeccable soundtrack that elevates every celebration and lingers in memory long after the final note has faded.

jazz-singer-france-marie.description_html:
Impeccably reviewed for their enchanting versatility, this refined group captivates audiences with beautiful multilingual vocals, bespoke song selections, and flawless communication. Whether summoning an air of relaxed elegance or vibrant energy, Marie & Her Band curates an unforgettable auditory experience for weddings and distinguished events across France.

Hailing from the cultural heart of Bordeaux, Marie is an exquisite jazz vocalist of extraordinary calibre, offering bespoke musical entertainment for the most prestigious occasions. Her refined artistry is sought after throughout France, with frequent engagements in the luminous salons of Paris.

Marie's curated repertoire is a masterful homage to the luminaries of jazz's golden era—from the sublime artistry of Billie Holiday and Ella Fitzgerald to the genius of Gershwin and Monk—interwoven with the soulful rhythms of Brazilian masters such as Antonio Carlos Jobim and Djavan. solara-barcelona-spain.intro_html:
About Solara – An Exquisite Soul & Lounge Ensemble, Based in Barcelona, Spain

Solara is fronted by a Nigeria-born, Barcelona-based vocalist, songwriter, guitarist, and recording artist whose vocal artistry is remarkably versatile. His distinct, refined tone and impeccable vocal range breathe life into every performance, crafting moments of extraordinary elegance. His immersive style is characterized by a bespoke engagement with the audience, ensuring each gathering becomes a curated, memorable experience. Solara offers a selection of exclusive line-up configurations: Solo Acoustic, Duo, Trio, Full Band, and a String Band.

Contact Solara

The refined ensemble typically features Voice, Guitar, Bass, Drums, and Keyboard for the band; for the string band, the instrumentation includes Bass, Drums, Cello, Violin, and Keyboard, with Saxophone added for special, elevated occasions. For clients with discerning tastes, bespoke formats can be meticulously curated, incorporating a tailored selection of instruments to suit their event’s unique character.

Solara’s musical style is richly dynamic, encompassing a sophisticated repertoire of Ballads, R&B/Soul, Funk, Blues, Pop, and Reggae. The setlist is a masterfully woven mix of these genres, and the ensemble’s exceptional ability to read the room—playing pieces that perfectly match the ambience—sets them apart as a truly distinguished act.

With over thirteen years of impeccable experience as a singer and performer, Attih Soul has graced concerts and events across an exclusive array of countries: France, Norway, Albania, South Africa, Spain, Nigeria, Russia, Germany, and Portugal.

Curated Line-Up Options:
- Solo Acoustic
- Duo (Voice and Guitar or Keyboard)
- Trio (Voice, Guitar/Keyboard, and Drums)
- Quartet (Voice, Guitar, Bass, and Drums)
- Quintet (Voice, Guitar, Bass, Drums, Keyboard or Saxophone)
- Full Band (Voice, Guitar, Drums, Bass, Keyboard, Saxophone, Backing Vocals, Percussion)
- Simple String Band Format (Voice, Keyboard, Violin, Cello, and Drums)
- Normal String Band Format (Voice, Keyboard, Cello, Violin, Bass, Drums, and Guitar)

solara-barcelona-spain.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 1 hour 30 minutes to 2 hours 30 minutes

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes as mentioned above

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes I have my own equipment and I could provide them if it's within Catalonia within Spain

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>Yes I could, if required but this will be charged as a separate service

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 2-3 hours before commencement

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 30-45 minutes. Sometimes 1 hour, depending on the band size

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes we can

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Just enough to have our equipment and for the band to move around freely

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes I'm comfortable performing outdoors</details>

bordeaux-wedding-string-quartet-france.intro_html:
The Bordeaux String Quartet – An Exquisite String Ensemble Based in Bordeaux, France

What discerning clients cherish most: Impeccable musicianship, an atmosphere of refined elegance, seamless professionalism and flexibility, bespoke requests gracefully learned, flawless communication, guests utterly captivated, perfect for ceremonies and cocktail receptions, a curated blend of classical and contemporary compositions.

Celebrated for their luminous performances at candlelight concerts, the Bordeaux String Quartet offers an unparalleled opportunity to infuse your wedding ceremony and cocktail hour with the sophisticated ambience of a Bridgerton tableau.

Established in 2019, this ensemble comprises four exceptional musicians whose collective mastery and passion converge to craft an atmosphere that is at once intimate and unforgettable.

What distinguishes the Bordeaux String Quartet is its meticulously curated repertoire—a hallmark of their artistry.

They are regularly engaged to perform at prestigious weddings and events held at Château Gassies in Latresne, the Hyatt Hôtel Du Palais in Biarritz, and Château Rigaud in Mouliets-et-Villemartin, France.

Inquire About The Bordeaux String Quartet

As the official quartet for the Candlelight concerts, they present inspired renditions of beloved works by ABBA, Coldplay, Queen, Taylor Swift, and countless others.

Their vast musical versatility enables them to tailor each wedding—whether an intimate affair or a grand celebration—with bespoke precision.

Beyond their extraordinary talent, they offer a truly personalised experience, honouring the couple’s favourite songs upon request.

Their sensitivity, adaptability, and unwavering dedication to fulfilling every desire of the happy couple render them indispensable for those seeking a musical touch that is both beautiful and refined.

Both the bride and groom and their guests can be assured that the quartet’s presence will evoke an occasion of indelible grace.

Ensemble Configurations

  • Quartet
  • Trio
  • Duo
  • Solo

strings-athens-violinist-greece.intro_html:
Strings of Athens – An Exquisite Violinist, Curated for Discerning Events in Athens, Greece

The violin entered her world at the age of six — a childhood fascination that swiftly blossomed into an enduring, refined passion.

Today, with two decades of impeccable professional experience and hundreds of performances to her name, she devotes herself to bringing the timeless elegance of music to life, crafting each note with bespoke artistry.

Discover more exquisite string musicians in Greece

Her repertoire is a curated fusion of modern favourites, classical sophistication, and improvisational collaborations with DJs — there is no limit to the sonic landscapes Strings of Athens can compose for you.

She performs with either a classical or an electric violin, bestowing each event with its own distinctive identity and a character perfectly suited to the occasion.

Enquire about Strings of Athens 💬
strings-athens-violinist-greece.description_html:
By attentively focusing on the host’s vision and the atmosphere of the celebration, her aim is not merely to deliver beautiful music, but to orchestrate an experience that resonates profoundly with you and your esteemed guests.

Possessing perfect pitch, Strings of Athens eschews sheet music and rigid playlists — she allows her violin to find its effortless place within the flowing tapestry of sound that surrounds her.

This refined ability to improvise and adapt ensures that every performance is an original, crafted in real time by you and your guests, especially when improvising alongside the DJ.

Moreover, whether it is a timeless classical masterpiece, a chart-topping contemporary hit, or a deeply personal melody that holds a cherished place in your heart, she can bring any song request to life with exquisite precision.

Her ultimate ambition is to create music that does not simply fill the room — it touches the soul. Permit her to bring this impeccable passion to your next event.

lunaria-jazz-barcelona-spain.intro_html:
About Lunaria – An Exquisite Instrumental Jazz Ensemble, Based in Barcelona, Spain

Lunaria is a refined instrumental jazz ensemble, curated from the cultural heart of Barcelona. Led by an exceptionally gifted multi-instrumentalist and vocalist, whose impeccable mastery of the violin and saxophone imbues every performance with an elegant, bespoke sound.

With a foundation deeply rooted in the jazz tradition—yet elevated by a spirit of innovation—Lunaria captures the timeless allure of swing while exploring the sumptuous textures of bossa nova, samba, and Cuban boleros.

View more jazz bands in Barcelona

Having performed across Spain, Switzerland, France, Italy, and beyond, the ensemble has cultivated a reputation for delivering performances of exceptional warmth, sophistication, and artistry.

We are regularly engaged for the most distinguished weddings and events at Torre Melina in Barcelona, Spain.

Contact Lunaria 💬
lunaria-jazz-barcelona-spain.description_html:
Whether as an intimate duo or a full quartet, Lunaria orchestrates an atmosphere that melds classic jazz with Mediterranean soul—a sound that feels both nostalgic and effortlessly modern.

Performing sets of up to three hours, the ensemble adapts perfectly to elegant occasions, from exclusive private gatherings to the finest jazz clubs.

Every performance is meticulously tailored to the occasion, with an unwavering emphasis on emotion, musicality, and a deep, resonant connection.

Lunaria’s music transcends borders and styles, offering a journey through the golden eras of jazz—reimagined with a fresh, modern voice born from Barcelona’s vibrant, sophisticated music scene.

Line-up options:

  • Duo: Violin/Saxophone + Guitar, Piano, or Double Bass
  • Trio: Violin/Saxophone + Guitar/Piano and Double Bass
  • Quartet: Violin/Saxophone + Guitar/Piano, Double Bass, and Drums

jazz-party-band-paris-the-calm.intro_html:
The Calm – An Exquisite Parisian Ensemble for Refined Celebrations

Hailing from the heart of Paris, The Calm is an impeccably curated wedding and party band that specialises in bespoke jazz and swing interpretations of beloved songs. Their artistry transforms contemporary melodies into timeless, sophisticated renditions, evoking the elegance of a bygone era.

Drawing inspiration from classic jazz and swing traditions, The Calm crafts remarkable adaptations of modern hits, alongside revered standards. From the iconic energy of Nirvana’s Smells Like Teen Spirit to the emotive depth of Michael Jackson’s Earth Song, their vast repertoire spans genres and decades—an exquisite selection designed to captivate every discerning guest.

Enquire About The Calm

Based in Paris yet performing throughout France, The Calm lends their refined artistry to private soirées, weddings, and exclusive events. Their distinguished clientele includes Le Fouquet’s, Louis Vuitton, 3M, the Jazz Swing Festival, and La péniche de Paris—a testament to their unparalleled prestige.

With a swift and seamless setup, The Calm is the perfect choice for any luxurious occasion, from destination weddings to corporate galas. Discerning hosts seeking one of Paris’s most sought-after jazz-inspired ensembles need look no further. Allow the soothing, impeccable sound of The Calm to elevate your celebration—contact them today.

parisian-caravan-gypsy-jazz-paris-france.intro_html:
Parisian Caravan – An Exquisite Gypsy Jazz Ensemble from the Heart of Paris

With over fifteen years of impeccable experience, Parisian Caravan stands as a refined purveyor of gypsy jazz, deeply rooted in the sumptuous musical heritage of France. Composed of virtuoso Parisian musicians, we have enchanted discerning audiences across France and Europe with our authentic interpretations of Gypsy and French jazz. Our line-up may be bespoke-curated to your exact preferences, including the option of a male and/or female vocalist. Our journey began in the intimate, artful jam sessions of Paris, where we honed our craft and forged an enduring camaraderie—a connection that resonates in every performance, where the sheer joy of music leaves an indelible smile upon every listener.

Enquire with Parisian Caravan

We are impassioned to deliver the rich essence of French jazz at your most distinguished celebrations. Our repertoire encompasses not only classic gypsy jazz but also beloved jazz and swing standards, alongside a selection of cherished French treasures from icons such as Édith Piaf and Serge Gainsbourg—each piece reimagined with our signature, jazzy elegance. We invite you to preview our performances through our curated videos. Renowned for our adaptability, we tailor our setlist to the unique ambience of your event. For an authentic musical experience with masterful musicians who embody their art, we welcome your enquiry.

Our accomplished female vocalist may be incorporated into any of these configurations.

saxophonist-prague-danny-mercury.intro_html:
About Danny Mercury Sax – an exquisite saxophonist based in Prague, Czech Republic

Danny Mercury is a refined international live saxophone performer, collaborating seamlessly with DJs or commanding the stage as a soloist. His artistry graces the most prestigious club scenes, while he also appears as a bespoke guest star at exclusive corporate events, within the curated ambiance of distinguished hotel resorts, and at impeccably private celebrations. Widely regarded as one of the most renowned club saxophonists in the Czech Republic and Slovakia, his presence elevates any affair to a truly luxurious experience.

Contact Danny Mercury Sax

Born in Havířov, Czech Republic, Danny Mercury has been mastering the saxophone since 2002. His journey began at the elementary art school, where he refined his craft in the local orchestra and his beloved jazz band for many years, later earning a university degree in system engineering. Officially performing as Danny Mercury since 2011, he first curated his sound across his homeland and then Slovakia. In 2013, his first international engagements took him to the capitals of Austria and Poland for Oracle, one of the world’s foremost IT corporations—an impeccable debut on the global stage.

In 2017, Danny spent the summer season in Ibiza, where he rose from the very foundation of its vibrant scene. By June, he had earned an extraordinary collection of references and regular residencies at sixteen exquisite venues—beach clubs, restaurants, cocktail bars, and hotels. His performances adorned distinguished hotel chains such as Barceló Hotels, MELIÁ Hotels, and Iberostar Hotels (including the SeaSoul Beach Club). He also graced the iconic Nikki Beach Ibiza and the legendary Km5 club, performing during the pinnacle of their 23rd anniversary celebration.

The following summer of 2018 found him based on the French Riviera, holding residencies at the Eden Plage St. Tropez and Long Beach Cannes—two of the most refined beach clubs on the coast. His private performances have included an exclusive soirée at Nikki Beach St. Tropez. One of his most intriguing engagements took him to Saudi Arabia, where he performed over several days at the Perfume and Roses Festival in Jeddah, sponsored by the General Entertainment Authority in February 2018. He was also invited to perform live on the Saudia Radio, broadcast nationwide.

In May 2018, Danny was an integral part of the season-opening party at the magnificent Candy Club Malia on the Greek island of Crete. Summer 2016 saw him performing on boat parties with VVIP Zante and Rum & Raybans, as well as at Pure Beachclub, one of Greece’s most celebrated beach clubs. He also lent his impeccable artistry to the prestigious ELEON Grand Hotel—part of the Atlantica Hotels chain—for a Swedish wedding celebration. Winter 2016/17 he spent over six months in Cape Verde, performing exclusively for the world-renowned MELIÁ Hotels International, as well as at the local TUI Sensimar and the archipelago’s most luxurious venue, Bikini Beach Club. There, on New Year’s Eve 2017, he shared the set with famed American producer Sandy Rivera.

His repertoire extends to bespoke private parties, including weddings and other celebrations across the globe. He has performed in England, Belgium, Nantes and St. Tropez in France, and at a wedding in Latvia. His very first Ibiza engagement was a two-day affair at a lavish private villa. In Zakynthos, Greece, he played for a Swedish wedding and occasionally joins mountain parties in the Austrian Alps. Danny Mercury Sax also boasts notable television experience: in 2012, he competed in the international talent show Czech & Slovakia’s Got Talent, advancing to the semi-finals. In September 2017, he performed as a guest star at the Miss Face Czech Republic 2017 beauty contest, live-streamed on national Óčko TV.

If you seek to engage the finest saxophonist Prague (Czech Republic) can offer for your wedding or event—an experience defined by impeccable taste and exclusive artistry—get in touch with Danny Mercury Sax.

serenata-singer-duo-band-barcelona-spain.intro_html:
An Introduction to Serenata – Exquisite Wedding Vocalist, Barcelona

Born in Málaga in 1984, the refined voice and creative force behind Serenata embarked upon an artistic journey at the age of eighteen, relocating alone to Barcelona. She holds a distinguished degree in higher musical studies, specialising in flamenco modality from the esteemed Taller de Músics, and has collaborated with an impeccable roster of pop luminaries including Santiago Auserón, Rosalía, Hugo, Maika Makovski, and Frank Diago.

Discover the full collection of bespoke wedding musicians in Spain.

Within the flamenco genre, she has performed alongside acclaimed artists such as Arcángel, Kiki Morente, and Argentina, and contributed to exclusive projects including the Cuban Sound Project under Demetrio Muñiz—musical director of the legendary Buenavista Social Club—as well as the symphonic orchestra of Galicia, Spain, among others.

Explore FixTheMusic's curated list of the finest wedding bands in Spain.

Serenata is regularly booked for the most distinguished weddings and events at La Baronia in Barcelona and Finca Monasterio in Montenegral Alto, Spain, where her emotive presence elevates each celebration.

Contact Serenata 💬
serenata-singer-duo-band-barcelona-spain.description_html:
Serenata has graced national and international festivals on tours with Lenacay (founded by the creators of Ojos de Brujo) and Patáx, performing across Greece, South Korea, the United Kingdom, Sweden, France, Italy, and Lithuania—to name but a few exclusive destinations. Her television appearances on premier programmes such as La marató de Tv3, Tu cara no me suena todavía (2017), El hormiguero, and The Voice (2019), alongside her didactic YouTube tutorial, have brought her multifaceted artistry to a discerning national audience.

Currently, she serves as a private singing teacher, records studio choirs for prestigious advertising and television projects (including Tu cara me suena and Operación Triunfo), and has lent her exquisite vocals to songs by artists such as Rebeka Brown, Cris Juanico, Antonio José, and Il Divo. She is also the distinguished voice of the Andalucía tourism campaign for 2021–2023 and has released several albums with the various musical ensembles she has been part of, contributing her own original compositions to two of these projects: Lenacay and Aire.

Her remarkable versatility enables her to adapt seamlessly to any occasion, with ceremonies representing the pinnacle of her performances—imbued with an emotional resonance that is truly unparalleled.

She delivers impeccable interpretations across jazz, soul, and international pop (in English) as well as boleros, flamenco pop, and rumba (in Spanish) in a refined flamenco style.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Solo singer – an intimate, singular presence
  • Duo format – singer accompanied by guitar or keyboard
  • Trio format – adds a percussionist for a richer texture
  • Quartet format – exclusively for rumba style, offering a fuller ensemble

Their performances transcend the typical cover set—guests often describe them as bespoke concerts, where the ensemble intuitively knows every cherished song.

Inquire About The Prague Experience

From elegant weddings ensconced within hidden European castles to high-energy corporate galas and luxurious soirées across the Emirates and the United States, their every appearance is crafted with a singular purpose: to forge a moment of lasting splendor. The band’s powerful live sound is no accident—the frontman, a masterful music producer, ensures each performance is refined with studio-level precision and deliberate energy. The Prague Experience performs as a full trio, yet can be scaled to an intimate solo looping presentation for settings that demand a more personal touch. Regardless of configuration or audience size, their music fills every space with impeccable resonance, leaving guests yearning for one more note.

prague-experience-czech-republic.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- Typically up to 2-3 sets of 40-60 minutes but longer is possible if arranged ahead of time

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- We are a core trio with a huge sound but we can add a pianist for the right occasion

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes for up to 60 guests if in driving distance from Prague

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes. We offer between set playlists and can recommend a DJ

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- At least 2.5 hours before showtime depending on the situation

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 90 minutes

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- Minimum 4m x 3m

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes</details>

mallorca-strollers-roaming-band-spain.description_html:

pop-district-shropshire.intro_html:
Pop District – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Shropshire, UK & Mallorca, Spain

Pop District presents a refined, sun‑kissed musical experience for weddings and celebrations across Europe. With its principal bases in Shropshire and Mallorca, the ensemble carries an impeccably curated inventory of equipment, ensuring seamless performances throughout the United Kingdom and the Balearic Islands.

Discover more bespoke wedding bands in Shropshire

Inspired by Spanish heritage and a passion for both contemporary pop and timeless classics, their sound artfully fuses beloved favourites with Mediterranean rhythms that elevate every atmosphere, transforming each moment into an exquisite celebration.

Every performance is crafted to forge an authentic connection with the audience.

Inquire with Pop District

Two accomplished vocalists lead the stage, supported by a warm, guitar‑centred arrangement. The ensemble transitions effortlessly from intimate, relaxed interludes to spirited sing‑alongs that captivate every guest.

Guests can anticipate a meticulously curated repertoire spanning pop, classics, R&B, country, and Spanish influences—including flamenco and rumba—all delivered with an organic energy that feels profoundly personal to each event.

Pop District offers flexible configurations, from an intimate duo to a full five‑piece ensemble, incorporating drums, saxophone, or bass to build a richer, more dynamic sound as the celebration unfolds—whether for a ceremony, cocktail reception, or evening soirée, the music is tailored to the occasion and the crowd.

Live sets are typically presented as two 45‑minute or two 60‑minute performances, with an optional full‑day package for complete, uninterrupted coverage. An impeccable sound and lighting system, alongside a curated playlist service between sets, ensures a flawless flow from start to finish.

The band is also available for hire as a wedding band in Mallorca, offering the same refined artistry in the Mediterranean.

Effortlessly adaptable to any venue and always focused on cultivating an impeccable ambiance, Pop District delivers a unique fusion of warmth, rhythm, and energy that transforms every event into an unforgettable luxury experience.

wedding-saxophonist-malta.intro_html:
Malta Sax — An Exquisite Wedding Saxophonist from the Mediterranean

Hailing from the sun-drenched shores of Malta, Malta Sax brings an air of refined elegance to every performance.

As an internationally celebrated saxophonist, he is a true master of his art.

With more than a decade of impeccable experience, Malta Sax has established himself as a luminary in the world of music, captivating discerning audiences both on his native island and across the globe.

His performances have graced some of the world’s most coveted destinations — the Caribbean, Ibiza, Santorini, Malta, Turkey, Germany, Italy, the United Kingdom, and Spain, among others.

Beyond private soirées and weddings, Malta Sax has been the chosen artist for an elite roster of luxury brands and institutions, including Rolls-Royce, Trustpilot, Warner Brothers, the Malta High Commission, The Law Society, and Cas’ Mila Restaurant in Ibiza.

Born and raised in Malta — an island steeped in cultural heritage and musical tradition — Malta Sax cultivated an unwavering devotion to the saxophone from an early age. His artistry was forged through rigorous training and an unrelenting pursuit of excellence, earning him a reputation for virtuosic performances and unparalleled musicality.

He also collaborates with Party Sax & DJ, one of Italy’s most sought-after DJ, Sax & Drums ensembles for weddings and corporate events.

Malta Sax is a regular fixture at the exquisite Essence Restaurant at Radisson Blu Golden Sands in Mellieħa, Malta, where he performs for weddings and exclusive events.

Enquire About Malta Sax
wedding-saxophonist-malta.description_html:
Versatility is among Malta Sax’s most refined attributes, enabling him to move effortlessly between genres and settings. His curated repertoire spans jazz, pop, soul, funk, and beyond — each performance imbued with a bespoke elegance. With a gift for improvisation and the ability to conjure enchanting melodies in the moment, he is a coveted collaborator for DJs and live bands alike.

For over a decade, Malta Sax has been an essential presence at countless weddings, infusing each celebration with sophistication and grace. Whether woven alongside a DJ’s electronic textures, adding a soulful layer to the rhythm, or harmonising with a live ensemble, his saxophone melodies have become synonymous with love, joy, and refined celebration. His artistry has carried him to exquisite venues and far-flung locales, marking him as a truly globetrotting performer.

His magnetic stage presence, paired with technical brilliance, leaves audiences utterly captivated. Each performance is a testament to his dedication — an emotional journey that transcends language and culture, leaving an enduring impression on all who are privileged to witness it.

With a growing following and an ever-expanding repertoire, Malta Sax continues to explore new artistic frontiers. His unwavering commitment to his craft — combined with innate talent and boundless energy — ensures he remains at the forefront of the international music scene.

Whether enchanting guests in his beloved Malta or illuminating stages around the world, Malta Sax is a genuine musical luminary, leaving an indelible mark wherever he performs. As he continues to evolve and inspire with his mesmerising saxophone, the world awaits the next chapter of his illustrious journey.

singer-guitarist-france-anna.intro_html:
Anna Sings – An Exquisite Wedding Vocalist & Guitarist, Based in Dordogne, France

What discerning clients most cherished about Anna Sings: an impeccable voice, flawlessly curated ceremony music, an innate ability to elevate the atmosphere, refined professionalism, effortless communication, graceful flexibility with requests—a truly coveted experience.

Anna’s soulful vocals and masterful guitar artistry provide a sublime complement to your wedding ceremony or cocktail reception. Her stripped-back acoustic style, meticulously refined, lends itself exquisitely to these intimate settings—offering a bespoke setlist spanning soul, pop, folk, blues, and even laid-back rock covers, artfully appealing to every generation and musical sensibility.

View the complete collection of wedding musicians in France

Covered artists include Fleetwood Mac, The Beatles, Sting, Bob Marley, Jack Johnson, Amy Winehouse, Ed Sheeran, John Legend, Marvin Gaye, Michael Jackson, Stevie Wonder, Maroon 5, Bill Withers, Bruno Mars, John Mayer, and more.

Anna is regularly engaged as a wedding singer in France at the esteemed Château de Lisse in Lot-et-Garonne, Château Destinée in Saint-Seurin-de-Prats, and Château de la Valouze in La Roche-Chalais, France.

Enquire with Anna Sings 💬

This extraordinarily talented vocalist brings over a decade of experience curating weddings and prestigious events, complemented by professional tours with musical theatre productions, celebrated artists, television broadcasts, and festivals as a guitarist and bassist of impeccable skill.

For the wedding ceremony, Anna presents a selection of refined, laid-back acoustic songs—an elegant sonic tapestry as guests arrive and take their seats. A cherished song request is included (that special melody for the aisle, for instance), performed live or played via her premium PA system. Anna can also deliver the performance in French, should you desire.

For the drinks reception, Anna offers either serene background music, subtly more vibrant cover songs, or a bespoke blend of both—tailoring her set to the atmosphere with polished intuition.

Thus, should you seek to engage one of France’s finest wedding vocalists, do not hesitate to connect with Anna Sings today.

Wedding Ceremony

  • Up to one hour of live, expertly curated music
  • A selection of refined acoustic songs providing graceful ambient accompaniment as guests arrive and are seated
  • One song request included (e.g., the aisle melody), performed live or played through the PA system
  • Optional performance in French, upon request

Drinks Reception

  • Two sets of 45 minutes of live, impeccably performed music
  • iPod-curated music during intermissions
  • Choose between serene background ambiance, slightly more upbeat covers, or a bespoke fusion—entirely tailored to the atmosphere

Additional Services:

  • Aisle Song Recording – a professionally recorded rendition of your chosen aisle song, crafted as a bespoke keepsake.

  • Custom Wedding Song – an entirely personalised composition written and recorded from your narrative, offered as an exclusive, one-of-a-kind memento of your celebration.

Since 1998, we have curated impeccable musical experiences for weddings across Greece, refining our offering since 2004 with bespoke sound and lighting solutions. Our ensemble delivers a meticulously crafted suite of services, including DJ sets of the highest order, premium sound coverage, dance floor party lighting, decorative illumination (fairy lights, patio lights, and chandeliers), marquee letters, and fireworks—each element chosen to elevate your celebration.

Contact DJ Athens

Our team comprises Greek citizens who converse with effortless fluency in both English and Italian, ensuring no nuance is lost in translation. We specialize exclusively in destination weddings, having performed across the Greek islands for years, catering to a refined international clientele.

Kudos Band – An Impeccable Wedding Band, Based in Athens, Greece

Renowned as Greece’s most distinguished wedding ensemble, Kudos Band has curated an exquisite legacy across several hundred exclusive nuptial celebrations in recent years.

Beyond weddings, their refined artistry is coveted for bespoke corporate soirées, private galas, and premier functions of the highest calibre.

Their impeccable performances are regularly commissioned for destination weddings across the most sought‑after Greek Isles — Santorini, Crete, Mykonos, Zakynthos, and Corfu — each event a masterpiece of elegance and energy.

Contact Kudos Band
wedding-band-athens-greece-kudos.description_html:
Illuminate your celebration with the finest live party music, meticulously curated to define an unforgettable evening. This Athens‑based wedding band transforms your event into an opulent fiesta, radiating infectious energy and vibrant artistry that captivates every guest.

Their impeccably curated repertoire spans the golden eras of the 70s, 80s, 90s, and 00s through to today’s chart‑topping anthems — each selection bespoke to your discerning taste. Under the direction of a charismatic vocalist, this refined Greek cover band delivers a spellbinding fusion of national and international pop, R&B, and disco masterpieces.

For those who demand a fully personalised live experience, Kudos Band offers a bespoke set list tailored exclusively to your celebration. Our musicians are committed to working intimately with you, ensuring every note reflects your vision.

Able to perform with equal elegance in both Greek and English, our lead singer delights audiences with a sublime blend of local and global hits. The live repertoire features an extraordinary curation of artists, including:

Thus, if you are seeking the finest wedding band Santorini can offer, do not hesitate to engage Kudos Band for an experience of unparalleled refinement.

jazz-band-paris-france-silver-moon.intro_html:
Silver Moon Jazz Band – An Ensemble of Unrivalled Refinement, Based in Paris

For over a decade, the virtuosos of Silver Moon Jazz Band have curated an impeccable atmosphere for a discerning clientele across Paris, Hauts-de-Seine, and Normandy, gracing milestone celebrations, nuptials, and exclusive private soirées with their exquisite artistry.

We are privileged to be featured among the finest in France, recognised for our distinctive elegance and vibrant, sophisticated energy.

Elevated by the exceptional artistry of our vocalists, Silver Moon presents a masterful blend of classic sophistication and spirited charm.

Our ensemble is a perennial favourite for bespoke celebrations at the most distinguished estates and palaces, including Hôtel Le Marois, Château du Raysse, and Chateau de Paraza.
jazz-band-paris-france-silver-moon.description_html:
Whether envisioned as an intimate piano and voice duo, a refined trio, or a resplendent quartet, the formation is meticulously tailored to your vision. Recognising that each occasion is inherently unique, the Silver Moon experience is entirely bespoke—from the ensemble’s composition to the carefully curated repertoire—ensuring an unforgettable, cherished evening for hosts and guests alike.

For connoisseurs seeking an authentically original jazz ensemble in Hauts-de-Seine or Normandy, Silver Moon offers an unparalleled proposition. Comprising four consummate professionals, the band transports its audience to a resolutely retro yet entirely distinctive universe, masterfully reimagining the timeless classics of jazz.

From the exhilarating swing of the 1920s to the refined standards of contemporary pop, every piece in their repertoire is infused with an exquisite jazzy palette, evoking the hushed, intimate ambience of legendary New York clubs. The timeless appeal of vintage jazz and the Roaring Twenties is celebrated through the greatest anthems of the genre—pieces that traverse epochs and remain perpetually stylish.

Paying homage to luminaries from Louis Armstrong to Etta James, the band honours the iconic legacies of jazz. Yet, true distinction lies in the unexpected. Silver Moon offers an ingenious reinterpretation of your guests’ contemporary favourites, each piece meticulously rearranged to yield a singular, utterly exclusive auditory experience that is certain to captivate.

Below are just a few of the prestigious venues where our clients have invited us to curate their most memorable events:

  • Hôtel Le Marois, Paris
  • Château du Raysse, Cazoulès
  • Chateau de Paraza, France
  • Rodin Museum, Paris
  • Hotel Belles Rives, Antibes
  • Domaine de Valmouriane, France
  • Port Debilly, Paris, France
  • Château du Feÿ, Villecien
  • Château Saint-Martin-du-Tertre
  • Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat, France
  • Château Martinay, Carpentras
  • Hôtel Plaza Athénée, Paris
  • Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco
  • Galería de las Esculturas
  • Château d'Estoublon, Provence
  • Château de Champlâtreux
  • Château Villette, Condécourt
  • Chateau de Varennes
  • Château du Pujolet
  • Voyage Samaritaine, Paris
  • Hôtel Crillon le Brave, Provence
  • Château de Méridon, Chevreuse
  • LES DOMAINES DE PATRAS, Solérieux
  • Avenue Kléber, Paris, France
  • Domaine de Sarson, Grignan
  • Beaune, France
  • Sarrians, France
  • Mougins, France
  • La Colle-sur-Loup, France
  • Gargas, France

From the classic piano and voice duet to the full quartet, Silver Moon adapts to each of your desires for events that are always more personalised and intimately aligned with your expectations. The group therefore offers different formations where jazz reigns supreme, ensuring every celebration is an unforgettable, opulent moment for you and your guests.

The Duo – An Intimate Serenade

Exquisitely suited for exclusive cocktail receptions and intimate gatherings, this configuration imparts a warm, intimately curated ambience. The piano and voice duet revisits the great jazz standards in the purest tradition of a New York supper club, allowing the music to blend seamlessly with the surroundings, crafting an atmosphere that is both enchanting and effortlessly chic.

The Trio – Elevated Dynamism

The beloved trio format enhances the core piano and voice duo with the resonant depth of the masterful Adrien Prochasson on double bass. This dynamic arrangement provides a richer, more vibrant soundscape, ideal for medium-sized receptions and providing sophisticated evening dance music. The double bass, an instrument as imposing as it is refined, adds a compelling layer of texture and undeniable presence, captivating your guests with its powerful yet elegant resonance.

The Quartet – A Grand Celebration

The full Silver Moon experience. Our vocalist, pianist, and double bassist are joined by the brilliant percussionist, Pablo Ramirez, offering the ensemble’s most majestic formation. Surrender to the powerful, groove-laden rhythms that will inspire effortless revelry, accompanied by the warm, captivating voice at its most commanding. For those who desire an energetic, fully immersive jazz experience, this grooving ensemble is your perfect accompaniment. Designed for lavish celebrations and grand festivities, the quartet delivers an unprecedented sonic and visual presence, creating an atmosphere of energetic joy and refined jubilation.

En Français

Depuis plus d'une décennie, les virtuoses du Silver Moon Jazz Band orchestrent avec une élégance rare les célébrations les plus raffinées à Paris, dans les Hauts-de-Seine et en Normandie. Le groupe se distingue par son élégance exquise et son énergie pure et sophistiquée.

Duo piano-voix intimiste, trio raffiné ou quartet majestueux, la formation s'adapte à vos désirs avec une précision sur mesure. Chaque occasion étant unique, l'expérience Silver Moon est entièrement conçue sur mesure, de la composition de l'ensemble au répertoire interprété, chaque détail étant pensé pour faire de votre soirée un souvenir précieux et inoubliable.

Pour les connaisseurs en quête d'un ensemble de jazz d'exception dans les Hauts-de-Seine ou la Normandie, Silver Moon est une proposition sans égale. Composé de quatre musiciens d'exception, l'ensemble vous transporte dans un univers résolument rétro et pourtant infiniment moderne, réinterprétant les classiques intemporels du jazz avec une maîtrise consommée.

Du swing enivrant des années folles aux standards sophistiqués de la pop moderne, chaque morceau se pare d'une couleur jazzy, évoquant l'atmosphère feutrée et élégante des clubs new-yorkais. Le charme intemporel du jazz vintage et des Années Folles opère toujours, à travers les plus grands classiques du genre, ceux qui traversent les époques et restent indémodables.

Rendant hommage aux légendes, de Louis Armstrong à Etta James, le groupe propose une réinterprétation ingénieuse de vos morceaux contemporains préférés, chaque titre étant méticuleusement réarrangé pour un résultat exclusif.

Formule Duo – Une Sérénade Intime – Parfait pour les cocktails privés, le duo piano-voix revisite les grands standards du jazz dans la plus pure tradition des clubs new-yorkais, créant une ambiance à la fois magique et légère.

Formule Trio – Un Dynamisme Élevé – Le trio adoré enrichit le duo piano-voix de la contrebasse magistrale d'Adrien Prochasson. Cette composition dynamique offre une présence sonore riche et vibrante, idéale pour les réceptions de taille moyenne et les soirées dansantes.

Formule Quartet – Une Grande Célébration – La formation complète du Silver Moon, avec la chanteuse, le pianiste, le contrebassiste et le brillant batteur Pablo Ramirez, délivre une expérience sonore et scénique inégalée. Idéal pour les grands événements festifs, le quartet procure une ambiance énergique et pleine d'entrain, apportant joie et bonne humeur à coup sûr

tarragona-rock-band-spain.faq_html:
<details><summary>¿Qué incluye el pack de boda?</summary>Concierto de 2 horas (posibilidad de horas extra). Suplemento de equipo de sonido completo, con dos opciones de diferente potencia. Suplemento de equipo de luces y máquina de humo.



</details><details><summary>¿Con cuánta antelación debo ponerme en contacto contigo?</summary>2 semanas como máximo.



</details><details><summary>¿Tamaño de la formación?</summary>Mediana (4-6 músicos).



</details><details><summary>¿Repertorio?</summary>AC/DC, Guns'n'Roses, Bon Jovi, Roy Orbison, Creedence Clearwater Revival, M-Clan, Queen, The Eagles, Lynyrd Skynyrd, Loquillo, Red Hot Chilli Peppers, Status Quo, The Police, U2...



</details><details><summary>¿Existe algún problema o impedimento si solicito un tema que no está en el repertorio?</summary>Debería avisarse con, al menos, 3 meses de antelación, y se cobrará como un suplemento.



</details><details><summary>¿Experiencia?</summary>Más de 7 años sobre los escenarios tanto en grupos de temas propios como de versiones. Con The Tarragona Rock Band, más de 60 conciertos en el último año, muchos de ellos en bodas, nos avalan.



</details><details><summary>¿Dispones de equipo propio?</summary>Sí.



</details><details><summary>¿Necesitas algún material en concreto o condiciones específicas para poder ofrecer tus servicios?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>¿Tienes posibilidad de desplazarte?</summary>Sí, a cualquier punto donde se requiera.



</details><details><summary>¿Existe algún cargo por desplazamiento?</summary>Sí, dependiendo de la distancia. El cargo es de 0,25€/km. A más de 100 km de Tarragona ciudad, a ese coste se le añaden 90€ en concepto de vehículo.



</details><details><summary>¿Cubres más de una boda al día?</summary>Sí.



</details><details><summary>¿Trabajas solo o cuentas con un equipo de profesionales?</summary>Solo.



</details><details><summary>¿Cuánto tiempo dura la actuación?</summary>Negociable. Puede ir desde 1 hora si así se requiere, como hasta un máximo de 4.



</details><details><summary>¿Cuánto tiempo necesitas para preparar la actuación?</summary>Si tenemos que montar equipo, 1 hora 30 minutos (montar + sonorizar). Si solo es sonorizar, 45-50 minutos.



</details><details><summary>¿Realizas actuaciones al aire libre?</summary>Sí.</details>

saxelle-female-saxophonist-berlin-german.intro_html:
About Saxelle – An Exquisite Female Saxophonist, Based in Berlin, Germany

Saxelle is a Berlin-based female saxophonist renowned for her impeccably refined stage presence, captivating performances, and a warm, signature sound that is nothing short of exquisite.

With over twelve years of international experience, she has graced the most distinguished settings—from luxury resorts and exclusive private soirées to packed clubs, bespoke weddings, gala evenings, and premier live stages—infusing every occasion with an aura of vibrant sophistication.

Seamlessly blending Pop, House, Electro, Funk, Jazz, and timeless party classics into dynamic live sets, Saxelle transitions effortlessly between serene lounge ambiences and exhilarating dancefloor crescendos.

Contact Saxelle
saxelle-female-saxophonist-berlin-german.description_html:
Her performances are meticulously curated to feel immersive, emotive, and deeply grooved, striking an impeccable balance between refined elegance, electrifying excitement, and an authentic connection with her audience.

Available as a solo saxophonist, alongside a select DJ, or as part of a full live band, Saxelle offers bespoke configurations tailored to the distinct character of each celebration.

Whether she performs during a sun-drenched aperitivo, an exquisite cocktail hour, or a late-night party set, she adapts with natural grace to the prevailing mood and energy of the occasion.

Equally at home in luxury hotels, alfresco garden settings, and uniquely curated event spaces, Saxelle brings a polished professionalism and a flawless live experience to every engagement.

She also seamlessly provides curated DJ music between and after sets, and is delighted to accommodate special song requests, ensuring each event feels distinctly personal and memorably exceptional.

wedding-band-bordeaux-roses.intro_html:
The Roses – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in Bordeaux, France

The Roses represents a refined, highly sought-after collective dedicated to delivering impeccably curated entertainment for the most discerning occasions.

Their extensive and meticulously crafted repertoire spans a rich tapestry of eras and genres—from disco and funk to soul and jazz—ensuring a bespoke musical journey for every guest.

With an effortlessly eclectic style, the ensemble is equally at home providing a subdued elegance for an intimate cocktail hour or an exuberant, full-scale performance for a grand celebration.

We invite you to preview their extraordinary artistry in the exclusive video gallery below.

Contact The Roses
wedding-band-bordeaux-roses.description_html:
Based in the enchanting city of Bordeaux, The Roses grace events throughout the region—from exclusive weddings and private soirées to prestigious corporate galas.

Masters of bespoke arrangement, the band excels at reimagining and tailoring each piece to the unique atmosphere of your occasion, working intimately with you to realise your vision with impeccable precision.

Beyond their captivating live performances, The Roses offer a refined DJ service, seamlessly extending the celebration into the night with an expertly curated selection.

For those seeking one of Bordeaux’s most exclusive wedding bands, look no further than The Roses. We invite you to reach out and begin crafting your unforgettable evening.

catalonia-djs-spain.intro_html:
Catalonia DJs – Purveyors of Exquisite Musical Curation, Based in Catalonia, Spain

Catalonia DJs are a refined collective of mobile disco and audio artisans, dedicated exclusively to weddings, private celebrations, and corporate events across Spain and beyond.

With years of impeccable expertise, their lead DJ possesses an innate ability to read the room, curating the musical journey to seamlessly align with the day’s narrative—whether setting an enchanting tone during cocktails, providing a sophisticated backdrop for dinner, or igniting the dance floor with irresistible energy into the small hours.

Every affair with Catalonia DJs is meticulously bespoke, tailored to the unique vision of their clients.

Inquire with Catalonia DJs
catalonia-djs-spain.description_html:
They offer an extensive portfolio of sound and lighting configurations, from intimate, compact systems for refined gatherings to grand-scale productions featuring stage lighting, atmospheric effects, and optional enhancements such as smoke, cold spark fountains, or confetti cannons.

For those desiring a live dimension, line-up additions may include saxophone, percussion, or even a dedicated lighting technician, ensuring a truly spectacular ambiance.

Their performances gracefully encompass every segment of the celebration—from ceremony and dinner to the culminating festivities—delivering up to three hours of high-energy DJ sets that sustain the night’s vitality.

Between sets, the music continues without interruption; seamless playlists maintain an effortless flow from the first moment to the last.

For setup, the team typically arrives approximately three hours prior to the event, requiring between 1.5 and 2 hours for installation and soundcheck. Their full configuration necessitates a space of up to 6 meters by 2 meters, though they can adeptly adapt to accommodate more intimate venues.

They hold comprehensive Public Liability Insurance and operate exclusively with PAT-tested equipment, affording clients absolute peace of mind regarding technical excellence.

Special song requests are always warmly welcomed—from the first dance to deeply personal melodies—as Catalonia DJs pride themselves on tailoring every note to the couple or event. They are also highly experienced in performing outdoors and in unique settings, from rustic barns to seaside celebrations, ensuring each occasion becomes an unforgettable masterpiece.

aquarius-strings.intro_html:
Aquarius Strings – An Exquisite Ensemble of Refined Female Musicians, Based in the UK, Curated for the World’s Most Exclusive Celebrations

Aquarius Strings presents a truly bespoke offering, with an ensemble that gracefully scales from an intimate soloist to a magnificent assembly of twenty musicians. Comprising vibrant female artists who master both electric and acoustic instrumentation, this refined group is coveted for private soirées and distinguished corporate gatherings across the United Kingdom and beyond.

Discover our curated selection of the UK's most distinguished string quartets ➡️

The ensemble may also be seamlessly complemented by additional artists—a DJ, a saxophonist, percussionists—to elevate the atmosphere to the sublime.

Follow our journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸

We are privileged to be frequently featured on the most influential wedding editorials, including La mariée aux pieds nus – Un mariage à l’Hôtel Du Cap Ferrat 👰

Our calendar is consistently adorned with bookings at the world's most coveted destinations: Belmond Villa San Michele in Italy, Casa Dos Penedos in Portugal, Requesens Castle in Spain, Château De La Valouze in France, and The Ned in London, UK.

Enquire with Aquarius Strings 💬

Spanning an impeccable range of musical genres—from beloved classics to iconic film scores, timeless pop, and celebrated musicals—every performance is meticulously tailored to the client’s singular vision. The ensemble is proudly featured on FixTheMusic's curated compendium of the finest string quartets in London.

Each artist is a vibrant, modern virtuoso, having honed their craft at the United Kingdom's most prestigious conservatoires. With choreographed movements, an innate sense of style, and a captivating stage presence, we enchant audiences of every generation across the globe. By day, we offer pure acoustic elegance; by night, we transform into a luminous electric spectacle—whatever atmosphere you wish to conjure, we deliver with impeccable precision.

As a contemporary string quartet, our dynamic interpretations of pop and rock anthems have drawn comparison to the revered Vitamin String Quartet and the all-female ESCALA. We also specialize in the refined, classical-meets-modern style celebrated in the Netflix phenomenon Bridgerton, reimagining hits by Ariana Grande and Taylor Swift with exquisite orchestral sophistication. For those seeking inspiration, we invite you to peruse our guide to the most enchanting Bridgerton wedding songs for string quartet.

The ensemble also possesses a rare expertise in Bollywood repertoire, adding an extra layer of distinction to our offerings. We are regarded as one of the most sought-after all-female electric string quartets for weddings and celebrations throughout Europe. Our performances have graced beachside nuptials in Ibiza, romantic proposals in the lavender fields of Provence, wedding receptions in Italy, corporate events in Spain, and the most lavish private parties in Monaco.

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸

Please explore our website for further discerning details.

aptitude-party-band-london.intro_html:
About Aptitude – An Exquisite Party Band, Based in London

Aptitude is no ordinary party band. Their stage presence is unparalleled, their ever-expanding repertoire now exceeds five hundred meticulously curated songs, and their ensemble features five exceptional lead vocalists. Offering a refined selection of configurations to suit your occasion, they grace the most prestigious private and corporate celebrations across the globe.

View the complete collection of UK wedding bands

Whatever the scale of your gathering, Aptitude delivers a live music experience of impeccable sophistication.

Please discover our 2026 Set List

We are proud to be featured on FixTheMusic's 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆

Our engagements regularly include the Four Seasons Hotel in Amman, Borgo Stomennano and Villa Cetinale in Italy, Château Plombis in France, and The Andaz Hotel in London.

Enquire with Aptitude 💬
aptitude-party-band-london.description_html:
Fifteen years since its inception, Aptitude stands as the United Kingdom’s most distinguished band for hire in London. They have cultivated an unrivalled sound and stage presentation, with the majority of their engagements arising from personal recommendations. Aptitude takes pride in being among the busiest party bands in Europe.

Explore our selection of the UK's finest showbands ➡️

With extensive experience across every conceivable event—from refined function band to exquisite wedding ensemble—Aptitude's singular focus is the art of entertainment. They have performed over one thousand engagements in the past five years alone and have shared the stage with some of the most illustrious names in the industry, cementing their status as the ultimate party band for hire in London.

Along the way, members of Aptitude have performed "Forget You" with Cee Lo Green, "Let Me Entertain You" with Robbie Williams, "Jai Ho" with Nicole Scherzinger, and, with delightful candour, "Is This the Way to Amarillo" with Tony Christie. They have appeared alongside such eminent acts as Labyrinth, Bonnie Tyler, and Soul II Soul, and have graced Europe's most iconic venues, including the Royal Albert Hall, Birmingham's N.E.C., and Wembley Arena.

Below are just a few of the exceptional venues where clients have engaged us through FixTheMusic for weddings and bespoke events…

  • Four Seasons Hotel, Amman
  • Borgo Stomennano, Italy
  • Château Plombis, France
  • Villa Cetinale, Tuscany, Italy

And do discover Aptitude's new sister ensemble, Aptitude Club Live—London's most refined fusion of DJ artistry and live instrumentation.

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸

Please visit our website for further details.

Core Ensemble (Six Pieces)

Led by the accomplished frontman Craig and supported by London's most sought-after session musicians, this intimate ensemble produces a remarkably grand sound. With harmonies of exquisite richness and precision, a vast repertoire of five hundred songs, and a selection of distinct vocalists who bring the ideal voice to every piece, this unrivalled live party band recreates original recordings with a fidelity unmatched by any other act.

By seamlessly blending two sensational female vocalists, complex six-part harmonies, and unparalleled audience engagement, Aptitude has set the benchmark for live entertainment since its founding in 1998. Offering an impeccable sound, ingenious song mash-ups that leave guests spellbound, and soulful vocals of profound depth, this six-piece party band for hire in London is the perfect accompaniment to any private or corporate affair.

Three, Four, and Five-Piece Configurations

With hundreds of bookings annually and a portfolio spanning more than two decades—including collaborations with Westlife, Labyrinth, and Robbie Williams—this is no ordinary party band. Aptitude may be engaged as a three-piece ensemble featuring bass, drums, and guitar, or expanded with keyboards for a four-piece arrangement, and further elevated with female vocals for the full five-piece experience.

Should you desire a more intimate yet supremely refined three, four, or five-piece party band for hire—one defined by masterful crowd connection and extensive experience across every event category, where cool meets quality—look no further.

The Aptitude Showband

Regularly commissioned to perform for British royalty and high-end corporate occasions, this is not merely a party band; it is a complete entertainment extravaganza. Offering a dazzling array of configurations—from a three-piece rock ensemble to a breathtaking twelve-piece showband complete with a formidable repertoire of five hundred songs—it guarantees to leave your guests clamouring for more and keep the dance floor exquisitely full throughout the evening.

Fresh from international tours and renowned for spectacular performances, a polished aesthetic, and awe-inspiring live music, this extraordinary live party band is ideally suited to any event, whether intimate or grand. Blending floor-filling anthems with remarkable energy and a powerful five-piece brass section comprising two saxophones, two trumpets, and a trombone, they have become one of the most coveted bands for hire on the planet.

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸

Please visit our website for further details.

mallorca-serenade-spain.intro_html:
Mallorca Serenade – An Exquisite Solo Vocalist & Guitarist, Based in Mallorca, Spain

From his origins in Sweden to his current residence in Mallorca, Mallorca Serenade’s refined artistry has captivated audiences across the globe. His impeccable journey began in the French Alps of Chamonix in 2003, where he first graced the stage as a vocalist. Over the past two decades, he has headlined some of the most exclusive cruise ships traversing the seven seas, performed at an array of bespoke weddings throughout Europe, and curated private functions for distinguished clientele including BMW, Marks & Spencer, and Ferrari.

Enquire About Mallorca Serenade
mallorca-serenade-spain.description_html: As an internationally acclaimed singer and guitarist, Mallorca Serenade orchestrates elegant, atmospheric live music for the most luxurious weddings and events. His curated repertoire—a seamless blend of timeless classics and modern favourites—delivers a sophisticated performance suited to every occasion, from the ceremony to the cocktail hour.

mallorca-serenade-spain.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 1hr set

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- No

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, for local events in Mallorca

About She Grooves – An Exquisite Singer-Pianist, Curated from Athens, Greece

She Grooves presents a singular, refined artistry—a bespoke one-woman performance. As both an impeccable vocalist and pianist, her repertoire spans an exquisite selection from the late 1960s through to today’s most celebrated hits.

From soft, acoustic melodies for an intimate dinner to the refined energy of the main celebration, her set transitions seamlessly into pop dance. This is elevated by a sophisticated looper with pre-programmed bass and choir loops, ensuring an impeccably curated party atmosphere.

Contact She Grooves
she-grooves-singer-athens-greece.description_html:

A professional musician of superlative experience, she has graced private and corporate events, weddings, luxury hotel residencies, and everything between with her refined presence.

Her performance comprises a two-and-a-half-hour set, yet this exquisite duration is entirely bespoke—customisable at the client’s request, and can be divided into two segments with a brief interlude. To further elevate the experience, a saxophonist or an additional vocalist may be included, adding layers of sonic sophistication.

The base fee includes all essential backline equipment: keyboard, microphone, looper, and pedals. For a truly impeccable atmosphere, a premium sound system and lighting can be arranged at an additional cost, or provided by the venue or client. She Grooves is pleased to perform at any location, whether indoors or outdoors, transforming any setting into a sanctuary of sound.

If you seek to engage one of the finest female vocalists in Greece, an encounter with She Grooves is an invitation to the extraordinary.
