beats-of-mykonos-greece.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- I usually perform 4 x 20-minute sets. Typically, I split them as 2 sets during the cocktail and 2 during the party. However, this can be flexible depending on the client’s wishes (for example, 3 party sets and 1 cocktail set, or all cocktail / all party). The most common setup is 2 cocktail sets and 2 party sets.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- I can provide professional sound and lighting equipment if requested by the client, and this is added on top of the saxophone performance fee. The equipment includes two powerful 15’’ speakers with subwoofer, a DJ booth, Pioneer RX3, and lighting suitable for a small to medium event. For very small events, such as a yacht party with 5–10 people or a cocktail with up to 15 people, I usually provide just one speaker at no extra cost along with the saxophone. For weddings and larger events, the equipment is always quoted separately as an additional service. For very large events, I collaborate with a leading event production company on the island that can provide full technical support of any scale.

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- I always provide a DJ service in between and after my live sets. If not by myself, then by a professional DJ partner who is based on the island.

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- For weddings, I usually arrive 1–2 hours before the event. Setup time depends on the requirements, ranging from 30 minutes to 2 hours.

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- I often receive requests for first dances and I am happy to learn them. Ideally, I would like to receive the request 1–2 months in advance, but I can also accommodate last-minute requests.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- I don’t need much space, as I am always within the crowd with the guests to create the right vibe.

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- I perform exclusively in outdoor venues on the island, as there are no indoor venues. I regularly play at villas, venues, yachts, beaches, and even for proposals – essentially anywhere clients wish.</details>

swing-heels.intro_html:
Swing & Heels – An Exquisite Parisian Swing & Jazz Tap Dance Ensemble

Nestled in the heart of Paris, Swing & Heels is a refined swing and jazz ensemble that revives the glamour of a bygone era with an impeccable tap-dance flourish.

Masterfully weaving the charm of French chansons, the effervescent energy of New York swing, and the warmth of Latin rhythms, the group curates performances that are as elegant as they are electrifying.

From bespoke cocktail receptions to opulent gala evenings and exclusive celebrations, Swing & Heels transforms any occasion into a rhythmic experience defined by sparkle, style, and sophistication.

Contact Swing & Heels
swing-heels.description_html:
The seamless interplay of live jazz and tap dance creates a visual and musical dialogue that captivates discerning audiences from the first note to the final step.

The ensemble is available in a variety of meticulously tailored line-ups: from an intimate trio—featuring vocals, piano, and a tap dancer—to an expanded show with drums, horns, saxophone, and additional dancers.

Every performance is bespoke, adapting to the setting to achieve an impeccable balance between energy and elegance.

Swing & Heels typically presents 25–45 minute sets, with a swift setup of approximately 30 minutes and flexible arrival coordinated around the event schedule.

They can provide refined sound for smaller occasions upon request and even offer curated background music between sets.

Song requests are warmly welcomed, and performances are beautifully adaptable to both indoor and outdoor venues.

Whether orchestrating an intimate private soirée, a lavish festival, or a black‑tie affair, Swing & Heels delivers a vibrant homage to swing, jazz, and dance—a nod to the golden age of Parisian cabaret infused with a modern, rhythmic pulse.

swing-damour-paris-france.intro_html:
About Swing D’Amour – an exquisite jazz & rock ’n’ roll ensemble based in Paris, France

An unparalleled ensemble of refined artistry, Swing D’Amour offers a bespoke musical experience of impeccable sophistication. Headlined by the most captivating and dynamic vocalist one could encounter—Paddy, the quintessentially Parisian Irishman whose charm is utterly inimitable. Frequently joined by Ellen, the esteemed Swedish vocalist whose presence adds a layer of feminine elegance and allure, the duo commands the stage with a magnetic interplay that is nothing short of extraordinary. Their collaboration is a curated harmony of immense charisma and flawless execution, elevating every event into a luxurious affair.

Enquire about Swing D’Amour
swing-damour-paris-france.description_html: Their repertoire is a meticulously curated selection of the greatest 20th-century crooners and classic swing anthems, infused with a vibrant dash of 21st-century Parisian flair. From the electrifying energy of Brian Setzer and Louis Prima to the timeless elegance of Frank Sinatra and Louis Armstrong, and onward to the rebellious spirit of the Stray Cats and contemporary neo-swing, every note is delivered with exquisite precision. Swing D’Amour also masterfully interprets Motown, Soul, Funk, and Rock ’n’ Roll, seamlessly weaving in modern treasures such as Daft Punk and Bruno Mars. For the ultimate luxury, this refined ensemble is available to travel to any destination across the globe. Should you wish to engage them beyond France, they always journey the day prior to any overseas performance—ensuring no flight cancellations or tardy arrivals. Rest assured, they will be present, poised, and impeccably ready to perform for your occasion, regardless of circumstance.

party-academics-duo-london.intro_html:
Party Academics – An Exquisite Wedding & Event Duo, Based in London, UK

What discerning clients cherish most about Party Academics: an impeccably packed dance floor, electrifying energy, sublime vocals, curated medleys, a refined repertoire, seamless professionalism, effortless collaboration, and guests utterly captivated.

The refined fusion of live instrumentation and masterful DJing by this dynamic musical duo orchestrates an electrifying auditory experience, ensuring guests remain enraptured on the dance floor throughout the evening.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆.

Allow them to guide you through an exquisite evening of powerful medleys, until you find yourself dancing as though you possess a doctorate in celebration.

Party Academics began their academic journey together at Oxford University, where both were members of a globally acclaimed a-cappella ensemble.

We are also listed on FixTheMusic’s refined catalogue of the 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆.

We are regularly commissioned for weddings and events at esteemed venues such as Antico Borgo San Lorenzo in Italy, Almiral de la Font in Barcelona, and Middleton Lodge Estate in Richmond.

Enquire About Party Academics 💬

Through their viral hits, this gifted ensemble caught the attention of Shakira, who recognised their talent and propelled them to the Britain’s Got Talent semi-finals.

Following their graduation from Oxford, Party Academics competed in the live finals of The X Factor UK.

Below are just a selection of the bespoke locations where clients have booked us on FixTheMusic for weddings and events…

  • Almiral de la Font, Spain
  • Antico Borgo San Lorenzo
  • Madrid, Spain
  • Château du Grand Val, France
  • San Pietro Sopra Le Acque Resort
  • Siena, Italy
  • Gigi’s Hoxton, London
  • Dedham Vale Vineyard, Colchester
  • Signature Brew Haggerston
  • Fidelio Cafe, Farringdon
  • Two Woods Estate, Pulborough
  • Nedging Hall, Ipswich
  • Amazónico, Berkeley Square
  • Wasing Park, Reading
  • Mortimer House, London
  • Middleton Lodge Estate
  • Ashmolean Museum, Oxford
  • The Crown, Chislehurst
  • Stadium Way, Reading
  • Kimbolton, UK

After their respective achievements, Party Academics chose to unite their talents and craft something truly exceptional: the ultimate medley wedding band.

The duo’s impeccably produced medleys showcase their outstanding vocals and instrumental mastery—expect pulsating guitar, thrilling synthesisers, and lush live saxophone as they transition seamlessly from one timeless melody to the next.

These seasoned professionals possess an innate ability to engage an audience, tailoring each performance to the occasion with refined precision.

View the complete collection of exquisite wedding bands in the UK.

Party Academics typically perform two live sets of evening music (45 minutes each), and may also offer bespoke DJ sets or acoustic performances as an elegant supplement.

In addition to their live stage sets, they can also present a roaming set as an exclusive enhancement to their original configuration.

So, prepare to surrender to the irresistible rhythms, unleash your spirit on the dance floor, and create memories that will linger with impeccable grace.

Follow us on Facebook

catalan-duo-barcelona-catalonia-spain.intro_html:
The Catalan Duo — An Exquisite Musical Alliance for Weddings & Celebrations, Based in Catalonia, Spain

Hailing from the refined city of Barcelona, this exceptional duo unites a remarkable depth of individual artistry to forge a truly captivating collaboration. Since their inception, they have graced over 500 distinguished events, performing at some of Barcelona’s most prestigious venues, including Jamboree Jazz Club, Harlem Jazz Club, and Milano Cocktail Bar. Their illustrious portfolio further boasts appearances at more than 30 celebrated festivals, among them the Vitoria Jazz Festival, Tolos & Blues Festival, Benicassim Blues Festival, and the Cerdanyola International Blues Festival.

Inquire About The Catalan Duo
catalan-duo-barcelona-catalonia-spain.description_html: Prestigious global brands—including Mercedes Benz, Mango, Audi, Rolls Royce, Rabat, Omega, Intel, and Baxi—have entrusted The Catalan Duo to elevate their corporate events with performances of impeccable refinement. Within the wedding industry, the duo has cultivated an enviable reputation, entertaining at over fifty nuptial celebrations each year. They lend their artistry to ceremonies, cocktail hours, and receptions, collaborating seamlessly with the nation’s most sought-after wedding planners. The Catalan Duo delivers an acoustic concert experience of elegant sophistication, meticulously curating their repertoire to complement each occasion with bespoke precision. Their song selection encompasses approximately two hundred tracks, spanning timeless classics and contemporary masterpieces across the genres of pop, rock, soul, and jazz.

catalan-duo-barcelona-catalonia-spain.faq_html:
<details><summary>What are your normal set lengths?</summary>- 2 x 45 minute sets

</details><details><summary>Do you have different line-up options?</summary>- Yes, we can offer 4 different singers

</details><details><summary>Do you provide your own sound & lighting equipment? What is it or what's included in the price?</summary>- Yes, all included

</details><details><summary>Do you provide a laptop playlist / DJ service in between and after your live sets?</summary>- Yes we do, free of charge

</details><details><summary>What time do you normally arrive at the venue to set up?</summary>- 2 hours before

</details><details><summary>How long does it take for you to set up, sound check etc?</summary>- 20 minutes

</details><details><summary>Can you learn song requests (e.g. a first dance)?</summary>- Yes we do, up to 2 songs. If there's more than 2 songs we can do so for an extra cost.

</details><details><summary>How much space do you need for your performance area?</summary>- 3m x 3m

</details><details><summary>Do you have Public Liability Insurance and PAT-tested equipment?</summary>- Yes

</details><details><summary>Are you comfortable performing outdoors or in unusual settings (e.g. barns, beaches)?</summary>- Yes, we play everywhere ☺️</details>

juan-loops-singer-ibiza.intro_html:
About Juan Loops – An Exquisite Wedding Singer & Guitarist Based in Ibiza

Born in Argentina, Juan Loops is a consummate musician of rare refinement, celebrated for his impeccable guitar mastery and captivating vocal artistry.

With over a decade of professional distinction and more than 1,000 meticulously curated performances—spanning exclusive festivals, bespoke weddings, and private soirées—he has established himself as a highly sought-after presence in the industry.

A multi-instrumentalist of exceptional versatility, Juan Loops earned his reputation through unwavering dedication and was recognised as a semi-finalist on The Voice, further attesting to his extraordinary talent.

His musical journey also led him to Dubai, where he enriched his repertoire by embracing sophisticated cultural influences, refining his already exquisite craft.

In recent years, his time has been elegantly divided between Europe and Dubai, performing on prestigious stages and creating original compositions within his own Ibiza studio.

He is regularly engaged to elevate weddings and events at the esteemed El Mirador de Can Cases in Barcelona, Spain.

Enquire About Juan Loops
juan-loops-singer-ibiza.description_html:
His bespoke sets range from intimate acoustic interludes for ceremonies to effortlessly chic, uplifting ambiences for cocktails and soirées—each performance meticulously tailored to the occasion.

For an unforgettable experience, he also offers a hybrid DJ + live looping set, seamlessly blending modern energy with live artistry.

Exclusive Offer:
Book a complete DJ + Live Music experience (up to six hours)—including four hours of refined DJ sets and two hours of live performance for your ceremony or cocktail hour—and receive a specially discounted rate.

This all-in-one solution ensures an impeccable flow of emotion and energy, from the most poignant moments to the pinnacle of celebration.

Juan’s performance timings can be elegantly arranged as three 45-minute sets or two 60-minute sets, according to your preference.

A sophisticated sound system and lighting setup can also be provided by Juan Loops, with pricing tailored to the venue’s requirements and the desired level of grandeur.

Beyond his curated repertoire, Juan Loops will learn a special song for your wedding or event—ideal for a first dance or ceremonial entrance—ensuring every detail is bespoke.

Public liability insurance and PAT-tested equipment are included, and performances are accommodated both indoors and outdoors, at any location you prefer.

He continues to compose his own music, collaborate with fellow artists, and orchestrate events, consistently showcasing his multifaceted brilliance. His unwavering devotion to his craft and ability to weave diverse influences have rendered him a respected luminary in the industry.

Line-up Options:

  • Solo Artist (Singer-Guitarist with Loop Station)
  • Duo with another musician (saxophone, percussion, or DJ)

wedding-showband-london-luna.intro_html:
About Luna Showband – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble Based in London, UK

Luna Showband represents the pinnacle of refined entertainment—a meticulously curated wedding and party ensemble devoted to delivering an impeccably luxurious experience for every occasion.

A formidable collective of extraordinary musicians and vocalists, Luna Showband assembles only the finest talent, ensuring a performance of unparalleled distinction and sophistication.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic's 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆

The ensemble comprises some of the United Kingdom's most accomplished performers, each having trained at the nation's most prestigious music conservatoires.

With multiple bespoke line-ups available, these exceptional artists offer remarkable adaptability, crafting the perfect musical ambience for your most cherished event.

Explore our selection of the UK's finest showbands ➡️

Masters of genre and style, they traverse an extensive and varied repertoire, ensuring every guest discovers a moment of musical resonance.

We are regularly engaged for weddings and celebrations at Villa Eva in Italy, Dromoland Castle in Ireland, and Nonsuch Mansion in Surrey, UK.

Inquire with Luna Showband 💬

The ensemble delights in travelling and performs extensively across the UK and beyond. Luna Showband's members possess a wealth of experience, having honed their craft at the Royal Academy of Music, Birmingham Conservatoire, and Trinity School of Music.

Discover our array of the UK's premier showbands ➡️

They have shared the stage with luminaries such as Elton John, Craig David, Alexandra Burke, Misteeq, The Sugababes, Jay Sean, Kelly Rowland, Kelis, The BBC Concert Orchestra, and Andrea Bocelli.

You may also have witnessed their artistry in West End productions and across the UK in acclaimed shows including Motown the Musical, Les Misérables, Sister Act, Saturday Night Fever, Miss Saigon, and The Lion King.

Below are just a few of the exquisite venues where we have been engaged by clients through FixTheMusic for weddings and events…

  • Villa Eva, Ravello, Italy
  • Bell Recó, Argentona, Spain
  • Villa Clerici, Milan, Italy
  • Mallorca, Spain
  • Lisbon, Portugal
  • The Sandy Cove Hotel
  • Nonsuch Mansion, Sutton, UK
  • Micklefield Hall, Rickmansworth
  • Dromoland Castle, Ireland
  • Glenapp Castle, Ballantrae
  • Wasing Park, Reading, UK
  • Hedsor House, Taplow
  • Hampton Court House, Surrey
  • Buckhurst Park, Withyham
  • Elmore Court, Gloucester, UK
  • Loft Studios, London, UK

Should you wish to engage one of the United Kingdom's most distinguished wedding and party ensembles, look no further than Luna Showband—do reach out today.

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸

Luna Showband is overseen by vocalist, saxophonist, and band manager Joe, who also curates the following ensembles:

  • The Legends Collective

  • Jupiter Funk

  • Night Magic

  • Bring The Club

  • Beats & Strings

  • London Sax DJ

  • 3Cover

  • On The Rocks Jazz Band

Luna Showband is proudly featured within FixTheMusic's curated collection of the finest wedding bands in the UK.

singer-paris-tennessee.intro_html:
About Tennessee – An Exquisite Vocalist Based in Paris, France

A refined presence on the Parisian music scene, Tennessee is a Folk and Rock artisan whose work draws upon the rich traditions of North American and British soundscapes, interwoven with the poetry of French lyricism.

His profound command of language informs every composition, yielding dynamic, impeccably curated performances that elevate the art of the cover to something wholly bespoke.

With years of experience commanding stages across France, Tennessee is a sought-after talent for weddings, private soirées, and exclusive corporate events, where his presence transforms each occasion into an unforgettable experience.

Enquire About Tennessee

Tennessee began his artistic journey performing alongside street musicians, yet his extraordinary demand soon carried him to the most distinguished venues across Europe and North America. He commands an array of instruments—guitar, drums, tambourine, and harmonica—with equal mastery, his voice the unifying thread.

His repertoire is an extensive, carefully curated collection spanning eras and genres, ensuring that every guest encounters a song that resonates deeply.

For those seeking to engage one of Paris’s most distinguished vocalists, an introduction to Tennessee is but a note away.

From an acoustic duo to a spectacular 19-piece showband, this talented collective presents the perfect arrangement for your distinctive event. Based in London, Jaguar Soul has graced venues across the nation and beyond—bringing its signature elegance to weddings, private soirées, and exclusive corporate affairs.

The group’s repertoire is vast and artfully varied, delivering beloved soul and R&B anthems with an unmistakable flair. Always impeccably attired, Jaguar Soul bestows the element of sophistication and grace that every occasion deserves.

Their curated line-ups include:

les-annees-folles-band-paris-france.intro_html:
Les Années Folles – une ensemble de musique de mariage d’exception, basée à Paris, France.

Vous aspirez à orchestrer un événement d’une originalité rare, une fête « années folles », une soirée Gatsby ? Souhaitez-vous ressusciter l’esprit insouciant et décadent de cette époque légendaire, recréer l’une de ces fêtes mythiques ?

Certes, la décoration, les costumes et les accessoires sont des éléments indispensables pour composer une soirée thématique inoubliable… mais la musique en est le souffle vital.

Tirée tout droit des années folles, notre atmosphère musicale plonge immédiatement vos invités dans une ambiance envoûtante. Venez partager un moment d’exclusivité sonore, un voyage dans le temps aux côtés des Années Folles pour une nuit d’exception.

Contacter Les Années Folles
les-annees-folles-band-paris-france.description_html:
Notre ensemble, Les Années Folles, s’inspire de la musique des années 1920 et vous propose un divertissement musical sur mesure, d’une élégance intemporelle.

Découvrez l’intégralité de nos formations de mariage basées en France ➡️

Joyeux et raffiné, notre répertoire se compose de standards du jazz, réinventés dans un esprit résolument rétro. Notre configuration à quatre musiciens est idéale pour ouvrir la soirée avec grâce, avant qu’un DJ ne prenne le relais (ou l’une de vos playlists soigneusement choisies).

N’hésitez pas à nous contacter afin d’échanger sur votre événement et de concevoir ensemble une expérience musicale aussi exclusive que mémorable.

En français

Vous souhaitez organiser un événement original, une soirée « années folles », une Gatsby party ? Vous désirez revisiter cette époque insouciante et décadente, reproduire l’une de ces fêtes mythiques ?

Bien sûr, la décoration, les tenues et les accessoires sont des éléments obligatoires pour organiser une soirée à thème inoubliable… mais la musique est également primordiale !

Directement venue des années folles, notre ambiance musicale mettra immédiatement tous vos invités dans l’ambiance. Venez partager un moment de musique unique, un voyage dans le temps qui vous emmènera vous amuser avec Les Années Folles le temps d’une soirée.

Notre groupe Les Années Folles s’inspire de la musique des années 20, et vous propose une animation musicale sur mesure.

Joyeux et festif, notre répertoire est constitué de standards de jazz, revisités dans un esprit rétro. Notre formule à quatre musiciens est idéale pour commencer la soirée par exemple, avant qu’un DJ prenne le relais (ou l’une de vos playlists).

N’hésitez pas à nous contacter pour que nous discutions ensemble de votre événement !

jazz-latin-society-ibiza.intro_html:
Ibiza Jazz Society – An Exquisite Bespoke Jazz & Latin Ensemble, Curated on the Shores of Ibiza

Conceived in 2019 by the refined musicians Samuel and Aaron, Ibiza Jazz Society is more than a band—it is a meticulously curated music collective and event production company. Rooted in the unparalleled elegance of Ibiza, this ensemble specialises in live music crafted exclusively for the most distinguished gatherings: private villas, impeccably styled weddings, intimate soirées, and luxury yachts. Their signature sound is an exquisite fusion of jazz and Latin jazz, yet their repertoire extends to pop, commercial music, traditional Cuban melodies, and the timeless grace of bossa-nova—each selection bespoke to the occasion.

Enquire with Ibiza Jazz Society
jazz-latin-society-ibiza.description_html:
We are devoted musicians by vocation, driven by a passion that honours Ibiza—the island of music, revelry, and refined celebration. Our concerts resonate with the artistry of Sting, Michael Jackson, Stevie Wonder, Queen, Adele, David Guetta, Calvin Harris, and Ed Sheeran, among countless others, yet we remain dedicated to our own distinctive signature. Each performance is a bespoke creation: a Prince melody may be reimagined as a jazz standard, a tender ballad transformed into a joyous dance. We believe profoundly in the alchemy of cultures and musical styles—every note tailored to our client’s vision. Entrust us with your aspirations for your event. We shall propose inspired concepts and guide you toward the impeccable arrangement for your day.

Curated Line-Up Options:

  • Jazz-Latin Jazz-Pop Instrumental Trio: Piano, double bass & drums.

  • Jazz-Latin Jazz-Pop Vocal Quartet: Vocal, piano, double bass & drums.

  • Jazz-Latin Jazz-Pop Instrumental Quartet: Trumpet/violin, piano, double bass & drums.

  • Jazz-Latin Jazz-Pop Vocal Quintet: Trumpet/violin, piano, double bass, congas & drums.

  • Jazz-Latin Jazz-Pop Vocal Septet: Vocal, piano, double bass, trombone, sax, congas & drums.

  • Pop-Commercial Music Wedding Piano & Vocal Duo: Piano & vocalist.

  • Piano Solo Performance.

  • Additional Bespoke Ensembles: Vocal Trio (vocal, piano, double bass/drums), Piano & Double Bass Duo, Piano & Violin Duo, Solo Vocalist (with backing tracks), and more.

brasilia-samba-band-dancers-paris-france.intro_html:
About Brasilia – The Epitome of Brazilian Artistry, Based in Paris, France

Brasilia stands as an impeccably refined Brazilian show company, coveted for exclusive performances across France and throughout Europe. Allow yourself to be enveloped by the exquisite allure of a Brazilian atmosphere—featuring breathtaking dancers, capoeira, acrobatics, dynamism, sensuality, and the flawless mastery of authentic Samba. Should you seek the most distinguished Brazilian samba dancers Paris has to offer for your corporate celebration or wedding, we invite you to connect with us.

Contact Brasilia
brasilia-samba-band-dancers-paris-france.description_html:
For every occasion, regardless of the season—be it through our curated revue on stage, a street carnival, or an intimate performance—we transform your venue into a bespoke rendezvous with Brazil. The Carnaval of Brazil unfolds in all its vivid splendor, a celebration of the world’s most magnificent festival. Every artist is a recognized professional within the Brazilian spectacle milieu, distinguished by their quality, originality, and authenticity. A rising triumph: the company frequently graces French television—M6, France Télévision, Bein Sports, Canal Plus. With an unwavering capacity for innovation and adaptation, Brasilia has proven its excellence over the years. Thus, we have long presented our spectacles across France and abroad, delivering a savoir-faire and professionalism that ensure your event becomes an unparalleled success. If you desire a dynamic and warm ensemble, reflecting the very soul of Brazil, search no more. Brasilia offers a tailor-made show that marries quality, beauty, and a profound sense of escape. You have understood: Brasilia is the essence of refinement.

Curated Options

Spectacle Brésilien — An Exquisite Brazilian Show

Discover our vibrant Spectacle Brésilien formula, a kaleidoscope of color and elegance.

  • Interactive animations with the audience, ensuring an impeccably lively ambiance.
  • A spectacular show, radiant with color—performed with or without a stage.
  • Multiple appearances by our exquisite dancers.
  • A series of choreographies designed for a guaranteed escape.
  • Breathtaking, ever-changing costumes that dazzle the senses.
  • We also offer several bespoke musical formations, featuring Brazilian musicians of the highest artistry, under the refined direction of our maestro and artistic director.

Revue Copacabana — The Brazilian Cabaret Reimagined

A revisited cabaret experience of unparalleled elegance. A dazzling 75-minute spectacle: at least ten distinct tableaux, weaving tradition and modernity, energy and sensuality—feathers, rhinestones, sequins, flawless forms, radiant smiles, and a rainbow of colors. Allow yourself to be carried away on a curated journey across Brazil.

Carnaval de Rue — Street Carnival Extravaganza

Outdoor parades inspired by the very essence of Rio. Exclusive open-air animations for intimate proximity and interaction with the audience. Dancers, capoeira, stilt walkers, and batucada—a surging, electrifying atmosphere.

Batucada Formula — The Heartbeat of Rio’s Carnival

Discover our Batucada formula, moving to the tempo of Rio’s Carnival. The batucada is the very heart of the Samba School—a refined orchestra formed exclusively of percussion instruments, where the marriage of deep and bright tones enriches the music with extraordinary depth.

wedding-singer-france-true-troubadour.intro_html:
About True Troubadour – An Exquisite Wedding Vocalist Based in La Rochelle, France

True Troubadour is an impeccably refined wedding singer and acoustic guitarist, devoted to curating superlative musical experiences for the most discerning celebrations.

View the complete range of wedding singers in France

Over the past decade, this remarkable artist has traversed the globe, delivering performances in more than 25 countries—from prestigious concert halls to intimate courtyards.

From his refined residence on the French Atlantic Coast in La Rochelle, True Troubadour regularly embarks to grace weddings, corporate affairs, and festivals across Europe with his bespoke artistry.

A passionate linguist fluent in English, French, and German, he is the consummate choice for destination celebrations where the ultimate ambition is to envelop an international gathering in an atmosphere of effortless belonging.

View the complete range of wedding musicians in France

He is frequently engaged for ceremonies and events at Château Sainte Cécile in Saint-Thibéry, Château de Goudourville in Tarn-et-Garonne, Chateau du Puits Es Pratx in Ginestas, and Château Allure du Lac in Grez-Neuville, France.

Contact True Troubadour 💬
wedding-singer-france-true-troubadour.description_html:
With every mile of his journey, he has perfected his craft, ceaselessly seeking the most exquisite melodies to narrate the encounters and moments collected along the road. These compositions—distilled into an inspiring repertoire accompanied by guitar—reach the listener’s depths, stirring heart and soul alike, and perhaps kindling a desire to explore one’s own inner nomad.

For celebrations staged in the most adventurous locales, True Troubadour arrives impeccably prepared: equipped with a battery-powered setup, he is willing to conquer mountains, traverse deserts, and navigate jungles so that you may unite in the remote sanctuary of your most extravagant dreams. “The sky is the limit”—though performing from a hot‑air balloon remains on his personal aspiration list.

With a curated selection of over 280 Jazz, Folk, and Pop songs—spanning timeless 1940s classics to contemporary hits—he orchestrates an atmosphere where every guest dances and sings along to cherished favourites. His repertoire is 80% English, 10% French, and 10% drawn from diverse cultures around the world.

Link to True Troubadour – Repertoire PDF

Wedding Package Includes:

To ensure a seamless, refined musical journey from the guests’ arrival through dinner, he offers a bespoke wedding package that includes:

  • Welcoming the guests (20 minutes)
  • The ceremony (3–4 songs), including one custom song
  • Cocktail hour with a 2‑hour acoustic set

For speeches during the ceremony, he provides two wireless handheld microphones and impeccable sound quality throughout. This discerning setup often eliminates the need for a DJ until the dinner service.

His entire sound system—suitable for up to 140 guests outdoors—is battery‑powered and fully mobile, making it perfect for performances on a beach, in a vineyard, or atop a mountain.

Optional Add‑Ons:

These exclusive enhancements may be added closer to the wedding day:

  • First Dance – Live accompaniment for the first dance, followed by a spirited 20‑minute acoustic set to transition gracefully to the DJ.

  • Extra Show – An additional 2‑hour acoustic set to set the mood the day before the wedding, or to sustain the celebration with a brunch, BBQ, or pool party the following day. Particularly popular for intercultural events.

  • Evening DJ Set – To continue the celebration into the night, True Troubadour can also provide a 4‑hour DJ set, meticulously curated with the couple in advance. Drawing on his experience performing at over 150 weddings, he crafts a personalised playlist based on your favourite styles, key songs, and special requests, adapting live to the energy on the dance floor. For couples wishing to elevate the evening further, this can be combined with a live saxophonist during the opening part of the party—creating a vibrant DJ & Sax show where live performance seamlessly blends with the DJ set.

If you seek to engage one of France’s finest wedding vocalists, look no further than True Troubadour and enquire today.

the-barcelona-choir-spain.intro_html:
About The Barcelona Choir – an impeccably refined choral ensemble based in Barcelona, Spain

Conceived in the spring of 2014, The Barcelona Choir was born from an exquisite vision of artistic ambition. United by a shared desire for growth, we immediately set forth curated goals that would define our journey.

Today, we grace the stages of prestigious festivals, elevate high-end corporate events, and curate bespoke wedding experiences across Barcelona and beyond—an internationally celebrated presence.

Enquire about The Barcelona Choir
the-barcelona-choir-spain.description_html:
Our narrative began with a triumphant appearance at the casting of a second-season televised competition of esteemed renown—unexpectedly, we emerged as victors.

Discover our selection of Spain's most distinguished wedding bands ➡️

This milestone ignited our musical history. We introduced ourselves to the world with a debut album, embarking on an extraordinary tour of Catalonia, the Balearic Islands, and Europe—more than fifty concerts, including the illustrious Cap Roig Festival and the Festival Grec of Barcelona.

Our second spectacle arrived in the winter of 2015, accompanied by the Chamber Orchestra of Granollers—a singular concert uniting over twenty-five musicians on stage, later immortalised as a refined musical DVD in 2016.

Within merely three years, we achieved far more than we ever imagined. Yet we never pause: innovation, transcendence, and creativity remain the impeccable engines propelling us forward.

If you seek to engage the most sophisticated choral ensemble Spain has to offer for your wedding or event, do contact The Barcelona Choir.

Follow our journey on Instagram 📸

En español

In Crescendo va néixer la primavera del 2014. Units per la il·lusió i les ganes de créixer, de seguida vam plantejar-nos objectius.

Així va arrencar la història musical del grup.

Ens vam presentar al món amb el nostre primer disc que ens va portar de gira a Catalunya, Balears i Europa en més de cinquanta concerts, passant per cartells com el del Festival de Cap Roig i el Festival Grec de Barcelona.

El segon espectacle va arribar a l'hivern de 2015, acompanyats de l'Orquestra de Cambra de Granollers. Un concert especial que reunia més de 25 músics sobre l'escenari i que al 2016 va prendre forma de DVD musical.

Amb només tres anys de vida podem explicar moltes més coses de les que mai havíem imaginat. Però no ens aturem: la innovació, la superació i la creativitat són els motors que ens fan avançar.

roaming-band-london-wandering-three.intro_html:
About Wandering Three – An Exquisite Acoustic Roaming Ensemble Based in London

Wandering Three represents London’s most refined and dynamic acoustic roaming band, curated for those who demand nothing less than impeccable artistry. Whether gracing an intimate soirée or a grand celebration, this ensemble delivers a bespoke repertoire of timeless classics and contemporary chart hits, all reimagined through their signature three-part vocal harmonies, masterful acoustic guitars, and virtuosic fiddling—an auditory experience of rare sophistication.

Discerning clients who have engaged Wandering Three have also sought the services of the following similar bands on FixTheMusic.

Proudly featured on FixTheMusic’s 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆

Clients who enquired with Wandering Three also enquired with the following similar bands on FixTheMusic:

  1. NOMAD
  2. The London Roaming Band
  3. Roaming Beats
  4. The Roaming Folks
  5. The Ferrymen

This exclusive ensemble is a perennial choice for weddings and events at some of the world’s most prestigious venues, including Hotel La Perla in Italy, Tivoli Carvoeiro Algarve Resort in Portugal, Hotel Croatia Cavtat in Dubrovnik, Château Rigaud in France, and Hedsor House in Buckinghamshire, UK.

Also listed on FixTheMusic’s 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆

Contact Wandering Three 💬

Requiring no PA system, Wandering Three glides effortlessly into any setting—no setup, no delay. They may wander among guests, enchanting smaller groups with bespoke requests, or command a stage with a performance of such energy and precision that it leaves no heart untouched. Wherever they appear, the atmosphere is transformed.

View our complete list of UK roaming bands ➡️

With a global pedigree unmatched, this ensemble’s members have performed across six continents—from the French Alps to the Yasawa Islands in Fiji, and from Blackpool to Bournemouth, gracing the hallowed stages of the Royal Albert Hall, Shakespeare’s Globe, Walt Disney Hall in Los Angeles, and Carnegie Hall in New York City. They have shared the spotlight with Sting, McFly, Bill Bailey, Elbow, Björk, Dizzee Rascal, James Morrison, and Calvin Harris, and have lent their artistry to West End productions including Mamma Mia!, Dirty Dancing, Jersey Boys, Motown, and School of Rock.

Listed on FixTheMusic’s 19 Best Roaming Bands in the UK 🏆

Their excellence has been celebrated on prime-time television competitions in the UK and France (Stars in Their Eyes and Le Cover), and they have appeared at the BBC Proms and Classical Brit Awards. Corporate clients include Microsoft, Merrill Lynch Bank of America, and Amstel—each receiving a performance of unparalleled refinement.

Wandering Three was recently booked on FixTheMusic to entertain guests at a Facebook event at BOZAR in Brussels, Belgium.

Below is a curated selection of prestigious locations where this ensemble has been commissioned for weddings and events through FixTheMusic:

forever-diamonds-wedding-showband-uk.intro_html:
About Forever Diamonds Showband – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebratory Ensemble, Based in London

What discerning clients most cherish about Forever Diamonds Showband: an impeccable, high-energy performance; consummate professionalism; seamless communication and adaptability; a dance floor perpetually alive; refined showmanship; guests utterly captivated; universally recommended.

Conceived in 2020 and unveiled in 2021, this meticulously curated live music act has redefined the pinnacle of luxury event entertainment across the globe.

Adorned with instruments and lighting encased in sparkling crystals, Forever Diamonds commands a stage presence of unparalleled refinement—a spectacle that is truly one of a kind.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆

Envision your guests stepping into the event space, greeted by a stage that shimmers from edge to edge.

Explore our curated selection of the UK’s finest showbands ➡️

With every flicker of light casting its own bespoke, glittering dance across these exquisite instruments, the stage show begins its narrative long before the musicians take their positions.

Forever Diamonds’ remarkable promotional videos offer a glimpse into the band’s extraordinary talent and skill, yet the true enchantment unfolds in their live, in-person performances—an experience that must be witnessed to be believed.

We are also distinguished on FixTheMusic’s 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆

We performed to resounding acclaim at the FIFA World Cup Fan Festival Qatar.

Our ensemble is regularly commissioned for weddings and exclusive events at Belmond Caruso Hotel on the Amalfi Coast in Italy, Hotel President Luxury Collection Hotel in Geneva, Quinta da Nasce Agua in Portugal, Château de Bouthonvilliers in France, and Carlowrie Castle in Kirkliston, Scotland.

Inquire About Forever Diamonds Showband 💬
forever-diamonds-wedding-showband-uk.description_html:
Each lineup is a handpicked assembly of refined professional musicians and accomplished vocalists. The band’s exceptional roster of men and women has performed alongside luminaries including One Direction, Leona Lewis, Kelly Clarkson, Rag’n’Bone Man, Boyz II Men, John Newman, Ed Sheeran, Little Mix, and many more.

Whatever your musical passion, you may rest assured that the band curates the perfect repertoire—spanning Jazz, Swing, Rock, Pop, R&B, Hip-hop, Motown, Soul, Rap, Garage, and House—covering every genre with impeccable artistry.

Such is the bespoke nature of the lineup options: Forever Diamonds tailors the ensemble to your every desire, whether incorporating a rapper or a featured vocalist specializing in the style you adore.

Discover the UK’s premier showbands here ➡️

Many clients choose to blend the evening’s journey, commencing with a refined swing set as guests warm their dancing feet, before unleashing the full showband—a force capable of traversing the ages and genres we all treasure. The band offers something for every taste and is delighted to learn new tracks and requests with sufficient notice.

Forever Diamonds also boasts an extensive repertoire of Israeli music for all Jewish celebrations. For such occasions, we add professional vocalists who specialize in performing all traditional songs and dances with exquisite authenticity.

carcassonne-string-quartet-france.intro_html:
The Carcassonne String Quartet – An Exquisite Wedding String Quartet, Based in the Enchanting South of France

Comprising four virtuosic musicians, this ensemble reimagines the finest pop anthems through bespoke arrangements for string quartet. Their curated repertoire spans from exquisite pop covers, smooth jazz, and cinematic masterpieces to timeless classical compositions and the soulful melodies of Jewish Klezmer.

Discover more on our Facebook page.

Sought after for the most exclusive weddings and corporate soirées across the South of France and throughout Europe, this quartet delivers an unforgettable auditory experience. Frequently commissioned through FixTheMusic, they grace prestigious venues such as Château de Roquelune in Pézenas and Château de Brametourte in Lautrec, France.

For those who seek the finest string quartet the South of France has to offer, an enquiry is invited.

Inquire with The Carcassonne String Quartet

Alexia – violin

A graduate of the CRR in Perpignan, she earned unanimous first prizes in violin and chamber music under the tutelage of Jean Lenert. Further refinement came in Paris with Amy Flammer. Since 2004, she has imparted her artistry as a state-certified violin teacher at the Regional Conservatory of Perpignan. As principal second violin of the Perpignan Méditerranée Symphony Orchestra and solo violin of the Collegium Instrumental, Barock Orchestra (with singer Cali), and the Atelier Lyrique under the direction of Daniel Tosi, her performances span Spain and Corsica. She is a founding member of the Alzina Trio and first violin of the Euterpe Quartet.

Marie Camille – violin

Her musical studies began at the CNR in Perpignan, where she obtained a first prize in violin and chamber music in 2004. She then refined her technique in Bordeaux with Vladimir Nemtanu, Nathalie Descamps, and Alexis Galpérine, earning the State Diploma of Violin Teacher in 2008. A member of the Collegium Instrumental Méditerranée since 2003 and the Perpignan Méditerranée Symphony Orchestra since 2007, she also performs with ensembles such as the Barock Orchestra with Cali. Since 2008, she has been teaching violin at the CRR in Perpignan.

Pauline – viola

She began the violin at age six. In 2007, she received her award with highest honors from the Conservatoire de Lyon. She then joined Jean Lenert's class at the Schola Cantorum in Paris, serving as solo violin of the Schola Chamber Orchestra for two years. In 2010, she won the 2nd Prize of Excellence at the Léopold Bellan International Music Competition. Drawn to chamber music and orchestral work, she became a member of the Alta Bassa Quintet, as well as the Pastel and Euterpe Quartets. She shares her passion through the DEMOS educational project in Paris, teaching young musicians chamber music and orchestral fundamentals. Since 2011, Pauline Guénichon has also mastered the viola, refining her craft with Christophe Gaugué, principal viola of the Orchestre Philharmonique de Radio France. She is a member of the Mozart Orchestra and serves as an additional violist for the Orchestre National du Capitole de Toulouse and the Orchestre de Chambre de Toulouse.

Delphine – cello

She began the cello at the Perpignan Conservatory and devoted herself fully to the instrument at age 19 after completing literature studies. She earned a first prize in cello and chamber music, along with an improvement prize at the CNR of Versailles. Her artistry was further refined under Erwan Fauré, Henri Demarquette, Yvan Chiffoleau, and Patrick Gabard, alongside advanced chamber music training at the Conservatoire Supérieur de Musique in Geneva and the CNSM in Lyon. A state graduate, she has taught cello at the CRR in Perpignan since 2004. She is a member of the Perpignan Méditerranée Symphony Orchestra and performs with various orchestras and chamber ensembles across the region, Spain, and Corsica. She is a founding member of the Alzina Piano Trio and the Euterpe Quartet.

Follow us on Facebook.

En français

Alexia – violon

Elle étudie au CRR de Perpignan où elle obtient un premier prix de violon à l’unanimité en master class chez Jean Lenert très jeune, ainsi qu’en musique de chambre. Puis elle se perfectionne sur Paris auprès d’Amy Flammer. Depuis 2004, elle enseigne le violon au Conservatoire à rayonnement régional de Perpignan, dont elle est diplômée d’État. Elle est chef d’attaque des 2èmes violons au sein de l’Orchestre Symphonique Perpignan Méditerranée, ainsi que violon solo du Collegium Instrumental, du Barock Orchestra avec le chanteur Cali, et de l’Atelier Lyrique sous la direction de Daniel Tosi. Elle se produit également en Espagne et en Corse avec des orchestres de chambre, en soliste et en musique de chambre. Elle est membre du Trio Alzina avec piano et 1er violon du Quatuor Euterpe.

Marie Camille – violon

Elle fait ses études musicales au CNR de Perpignan. Elle obtient en 2004 un 1er Prix de Violon et de Musique de chambre. Elle se perfectionne à Bordeaux auprès de Vladimir Nemtanu, Nathalie Descamps et Alexis Galpérine et obtient en 2008 le Diplôme d'État de Professeur de Violon. Membre du Collegium Instrumental Méditerranée depuis 2003 et de l'Orchestre Symphonique Perpignan Méditerranée depuis 2007, elle se produit également dans divers ensembles instrumentaux tels que le Barock Orchestra avec le chanteur Cali sous la direction de Daniel Tosi. Elle enseigne le violon au CRR de Perpignan depuis 2008.

Pauline – alto

Elle débute le violon à l’âge de six ans. En 2007, elle obtient son prix mention très bien avec les félicitations du jury au Conservatoire de Lyon. Elle intègre alors la classe de Jean Lenert à la Schola Cantorum de Paris et devient membre du Schola Chamber Orchestra dont elle occupera le poste de violon solo durant deux ans. Elle remporte en 2010 le 2ème Prix d’Excellence du Concours International de Musique Léopold Bellan. The Earthshakers – An Exquisite Wedding & Celebration Ensemble Based in Bordeaux, France

Hailing from the refined city of Bordeaux, The Earthshakers present an impeccably curated repertoire of pop and rock classics, reimagined with vibrant energy across a diverse spectrum of eras.

Comprising five exceptional musicians, this ensemble delivers an eclectic and sophisticated performance, seamlessly traversing from the timeless sophistication of The Beatles to the contemporary allure of Maroon 5.

The formation is exquisitely refined: a commanding vocalist, a masterful guitarist, a dynamic drummer, and an accomplished keyboardist, each bringing unparalleled artistry to the stage.

We are privileged to be a recurring presence at some of France’s most distinguished estates, including the Chateau de la Ligne in Bordeaux and the majestic Chateau Forge du Roy in Mauzens-et-Miremont, curating unforgettable ambiance for discerning celebrations.

Enquire About The Earthshakers Experience
earthshakers-wedding-band-bordeaux-franc.description_html:

Every performance is an impeccable tribute, rendered with palpable devotion and vibrant artistry, ensuring that each note resonates with authenticity and elegance.

Their meticulously diverse set list is designed to captivate guests of all generations, an irresistible invitation to celebrate that will undoubtedly elevate the atmosphere of any refined gathering.

The Earthshakers perform an extensive repertoire with flawless bilingual proficiency, offering selections in both French and English to suit the international sensibilities of a distinguished clientele.

Their curated playlist is a masterful blend of timeless icons and modern stars—featuring the enduring genius of The Beatles, Michael Jackson, Earth, Wind & Fire, and Bob Marley, alongside the contemporary magnetism of Coldplay, Phone, Bruno Mars, and Maroon 5.

His artistry transforms château weddings into effortlessly curated experiences, where the evening unfolds from relaxed daytime elegance to an exuberant dancefloor—timed with impeccable precision.

For couples seeking a wedding DJ in France who tailors each set to their unique vision, DJ Sam’s open-hearted approach and sophisticated hip-hop roots offer an exclusive, bespoke journey.

Contact DJ Sam
dj-sam-bordeaux-france.description_html:
Expect a masterful blend of chic classics—80s, 90s, 2000s favourites—interwoven with pop, EDM, house, R&B, and international party sounds, every selection curated to sustain a natural, flowing energy. No forced moments; only the right music at the perfect moment.

With extensive experience in international weddings and bilingual gatherings, DJ Sam possesses an innate understanding of how to orchestrate the day’s rhythm, collaborating seamlessly with planners, venues, and caterers to ensure every detail behind the scenes is flawlessly executed.

Fully equipped and exceptionally flexible, he presents a clean, discreet setup—ideal for château settings—with the option to elevate the experience further by adding a live saxophone for an extra layer of wow.

Reliable, effortlessly collaborative, and devoted to the dancefloor, DJ Sam delivers an unforgettable soirée that lingers in the memory long after the final note fades.

trois-jazz-trio-paris-france.intro_html:
About Trois – An Exquisite Jazz Trio, Based in Paris, France

Trois is a Parisian jazz ensemble that delivers impeccably refined, studio-quality live music for the most discerning corporate events and exclusive private occasions.

Helmed by the consummate vocalist and guitarist Tam, the trio orchestrates a sophisticated atmosphere tailored for client dinners, product launches, cocktail receptions, and gala evenings—merging sublime musical artistry with seamless, understated professionalism.

Trusted by an elite roster of international brands including Deloitte, KLM, Hove, Van der Valk, and The Peninsula Paris, Trois is celebrated for its polished sound and discreet, elegant presence.

Inquire About Trois
trois-jazz-trio-paris-france.description_html:
The repertoire is meticulously curated—a bespoke blend of Jazz, Soul, and Bossa Nova woven into an effortlessly stylish performance that elevates any setting without ever overwhelming it.

Classically trained at the renowned Royal Conservatory of The Hague and the Wisseloord Academy, Tam has been a professional recording and performing artist since 2020. Her album The Ocean Knows and EP Dreams embody a distinctive musical identity, adding an exclusive layer of artistry to every appearance.

Beyond live performance, she brings unparalleled expertise in bespoke songwriting and music production, infusing the project with depth and originality.

Trois offers supremely flexible line-up configurations—from an intimate solo voice and guitar, to a duo with guitar or double bass, to an expanded trio or quartet with additional instruments—ensuring a truly curated experience for every occasion.

Performances are typically structured as refined 45-minute sets, with the capacity for up to four sets per event.

The ensemble provides a professional, plug-and-play setup complete with all essential equipment, optional sound reinforcement, and thoughtfully curated laptop playlists between sets, guaranteeing an uninterrupted and elegant musical flow.

Adaptable to an array of venues—including outdoor and unconventional spaces—Trois combines exquisite elegance, immense flexibility, and musical perfection to create a truly elevated live experience in Paris and beyond.

DJ Nadia represents the pinnacle of sonic artistry—a professional DJ of impeccable calibre, currently based in Bordeaux, whose bespoke performances travel across the nation. Her sets are meticulously curated, blending high-energy dance rhythms with exquisite pop, funk, and disco selections that exude vibrancy and sophistication.

A trained vocalist, Nadia elevates her craft by seamlessly weaving her own voice into each performance, offering a uniquely dynamic and refined edge. For those seeking the most exclusive DJ experience that Bordeaux, France, has to offer, an audience with DJ Nadia is an invitation to unparalleled luxury.

Enquire About DJ Nadia
female-dj-bordeaux-nadia.description_html:
With over a decade of industry mastery, DJ Nadia commands a distinguished presence in Bordeaux, performing regularly at the city’s most prestigious bars and clubs. Her loyal following is a testament to her refined artistry and consistent excellence.

Discover our complete collection of DJs in France ➡️

Nadia possesses an extraordinary versatility, honed through years of performing in both private, intimate venues and grand public spaces. Her impeccable understanding of an audience’s desires ensures every event is a bespoke experience. A consummate professional, she arrives with a pristine, effortless setup, granting you absolute peace of mind on your most important day.

Expect nothing less than a transcendent evening—Nadia’s exuberant, curated sets will inspire your guests to dance until the dawn’s first light.

athens-groove-society-greece.intro_html:
Athens Groove Society – An Exquisite Jazz, Swing & Postmodern Ensemble from Athens, Greece

The Athens Groove Society curates an impeccably refined live music experience, where swing soul, retro pop, and cinematic jazz converge into a sound of effortless sophistication and timeless allure.

With silken grooves, opulent arrangements, and an elegant stage presence, the ensemble orchestrates the perfect ambiance for weddings, private soirées, luxury hotels, and bespoke celebrations.

Drawing inspiration from the charm of classic jazz salons and the verve of modern live entertainment, their performances flow seamlessly from languid cocktail reveries to soulful cadences and spirited retro revelations, enchanting guests throughout the evening.

Inquire About Athens Groove Society

Every set is meticulously crafted to infuse warmth, character, and a whisper of vintage glamour into the occasion.

Offered in refined configurations—from an intimate duo to a full five-piece ensemble—the Athens Groove Society adapts exquisitely to diverse venues, event aesthetics, and discerning audiences.

Whether performing during an elegant aperitivo, a sophisticated dinner reception, or a spirited evening gala, the band ensures a seamlessly flowing musical journey from the first note to the last.

Beyond live performance, they provide professional sound and lighting, alongside curated DJ-style interludes between and after sets, sustaining the impeccable atmosphere throughout the event.

bordeaux-brass-band-france.intro_html:
An Exquisite Presentation of The Bordeaux Brass Band – a refined professional jazz & swing ensemble, based in the captivating city of Bordeaux, France.

This bespoke collective of musicians embodies a spirit of festivity, affection, creativity, communication, and activism, curated to perfection. With a demeanor that alternates between relaxed elegance and vibrant energy, they command both streets and stages, offering original performances and impeccable covers spanning jazz, swing, mambo, reggae, ska, funk, traditional melodies, and slow ballads.

Contact The Bordeaux Brass Band
bordeaux-brass-band-france.description_html:
Heralded as a big band of the century since 2001, this ensemble seamlessly blends a modern brass band sensibility with the nostalgic charm of the 1930s. It unites approximately fifteen accomplished musicians, each an intimate collaborator, to ignite surprise and vibrant energy at the most exclusive jazz festivals.

Their presence graces a curated selection of venues: from intimate street performances and elegant music parades to refined cultural events, prestigious arts centers, historic castles, lush parks, iconic town squares, and sophisticated markets.

They have embarked upon an exquisite tour of the Canal du Midi by private barge, and have performed at Gallic feasts and exclusive Apéros Fanfares along the Garonne, each occasion a bespoke affair.

city-lights-showband.intro_html:
About City Lights Showband – an exquisite wedding band based in London, available for discerning clients worldwide

Ensemble configurations range from an intimate seven-piece to a grand fifteen-piece assembly, performing a meticulously curated repertoire of Funk, Soul, Motown and Pop dance-floor classics. Each performance becomes an impeccably refined musical journey, tailored for occasions of the highest calibre.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s curated selection of the UK’s finest wedding bands.

City Lights Showband is available for weddings, corporate galas, exclusive launch parties, Jewish celebrations, charity balls and any other bespoke event imaginable.

Discover our 2026 Set List — a testament to our ever-evolving elegance.

We are regularly engaged to perform at the world’s most prestigious venues, including the Branco Hotel in Mykonos, Belmond Caruso Amalfi Hotel in Italy, Park Orsula Visnjica in Croatia and Dewsall Court in Hereford, UK.

Our reputation is further distinguished by our inclusion in FixTheMusic’s 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆.

Enquire about City Lights Showband 💬
city-lights-showband.description_html:
City Lights Showband’s bespoke approach to each event ensures every conceivable requirement is met, crafting seamless and unforgettable entertainment for the client and their distinguished guests.

Explore our list of the UK’s most refined showbands ➡️

Over recent years, City Lights Showband has cultivated an unparalleled reputation as the consummate party ensemble, flawlessly enchanting audiences and clients throughout the UK, Europe and beyond.

Every musician is active within the upper echelons of the session world, and City Lights Showband now brings this extraordinary calibre to your event at an exceptionally accessible price.

We are also proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s guide to the finest Jewish wedding bands.

The gentlemen and ladies of City Lights Showband have performed alongside luminaries such as Adele, Taio Cruz, Maxi Priest, Shalamar, Plan B, Larry Graham, Eliza Doolittle, Sam Sparro, Terence Trent D’Arby, Mike Skinner, Jools Holland’s Big Band and the Miles Davis band, to name but a few.

As a collective, the band has appeared on BBC One Television and has entertained an elite roster of past clients, including the Moroccan Royal Family, Manchester City Football Club, the Ambassador of Azerbaijan, as well as delivering exquisite destination weddings across Europe and performances at luxury five-star hotels in the Middle East.

The profound experience and talent within the ensemble have yielded an extensive, ever-expanding repertoire, ensuring each live set is both diverse and refreshingly original. City Lights Showband excels at performing iconic dance-floor classics from classic funk, soul, disco and Motown, as well as modern tracks from the acid jazz, R&B and pop spheres.

The musicians understand the paramount importance of selecting the perfect music for each occasion; it is the cornerstone of a triumphant celebration, and this band has mastered the art of offering something for every discerning guest.

City Lights Showband is entirely self-sufficient, providing your event with a premium PA system and sophisticated lighting rig accompanied by dedicated technical engineers, seamless transport, curated mixed-party music played before, between and after live sets, and the option of both formal and informal stage attire.

Radio microphones are provided as standard, always available for speeches, auctions or toastmasters. Standard set times comprise two one-hour live performances, with the option of an additional thirty-minute or one-hour extension at an extra fee.

City Lights Showband stands at the pinnacle of live event entertainment. The band sounds impeccable, presents with effortless elegance, and is the ideal choice for any occasion — if you desire an extraordinary party atmosphere and a dance floor resplendent with guests all evening.

Below are just a selection of the exquisite locations where we have been booked by clients on FixTheMusic for weddings and events…

  • Belmond Caruso Hotel, Italy
  • Forte da Cruz, Estoril, Portugal
  • Castello Di Celsa, Siena
  • Villa Gamberaia, Firenze, Italy
  • Branco Hotel, Mykonos, Greece
  • Park Orsula Visnjica, Croatia
  • Cashel Palace Hotel, Ireland
  • Dewsall Court, Hereford, UK
  • Rushton Hall Hotel and Spa
  • Dromoland, County Clare, Ireland
  • Derry, Londonderry

Follow us on Facebook for a glimpse of our refined world.

We invite you to view our live performances and read our testimonials to judge for yourself.

Bespoke Band Line-Up Options

  • 6 Piece – Male Vocals, Female Vocals, Drums, Guitar, Bass and Keyboards
  • 7 Piece – Male Vocals, Female Vocals, Drums, Guitar, Bass, Keyboards and Saxophone
  • 8 Piece – Male Vocals, Female Vocals, Drums, Guitar, Bass, Keyboards, Saxophone and Trumpet

  • 10 Piece – Add Baritone Sax
  • 11 Piece – Add 2nd Male Vocal
  • 12 Piece – Add Percussion
  • 13 Piece – Add additional singer (Male or Female) and 4th brass section player
  • 14 Piece – Add additional singer (Male or Female)
  • 15 Piece – Add additional singer (Male or Female)

Jewish Weddings – An Exquisite Tradition

We are often asked what the “usual” format of a Jewish wedding entails. The refined answer is that there is no single template.

Every wedding is a bespoke affair, designed to honour the wishes of the bride and groom as they unite on their momentous day — and a Jewish wedding is no exception.

Your Jewish wedding may be as traditional or as contemporary as you desire. We are privileged to help you weave together time-honoured Jewish dances with modern choreography and secular music.

You, as the couple, should choose what to include in your celebration based on the degree of tradition you wish to embrace.

Modern couples often choose to dedicate a portion of their Jewish wedding reception to partaking in classic traditional dances.

This decision frequently rests upon the couple’s own inclinations, family requests, or the number of guests familiar with traditional Jewish wedding dances.

Should you share your wishes and feelings with us, we will guide you toward the perfect format for your Jewish wedding — an experience both seamless and sublime.

Music for the Chuppah Ceremony

For the Chuppah ceremony, many clients desire live, traditional music, usually performed by an intimate duo or trio.

Traditionally this ensemble comprises clarinet, accordion and double bass. The curation of music for the Chuppah is paramount, and our repertoire is selected with impeccable care.

City Lights Showband’s specialist Klezmer Trio — a traditional Jewish music ensemble — can perform for 15 to 20 minutes as your guests arrive and take their seats.

They may play throughout the ceremony upon request, and continue as guests adjourn to the drinks reception.

The trio is entirely acoustic and therefore mobile, allowing them to lead guests into the reception room and then seamlessly transition into a Simcha set of music.

Bar and Bat Mitzvah Celebrations

As an experienced party band, we provide the perfect blend of music and entertainment for your Bar or Bat Mitzvah.

We are proficient in performing a vast selection of traditional Israeli music for dancing and can supply written testimonials from previous clients confirming our expertise in the formalities of Jewish events.

We deliver an evening of effervescent joy, with songs to captivate the younger generation, while maintaining a refined balance so that you, your family and your friends may also revel in the occasion.

Our versatility allows us to perform not only Jewish music but songs from the 1950s to today’s

mallorca-weddings-videographer-spain.intro_html:
About Mallorca Weddings Videographer – a distinguished purveyor of cinematic artistry, based in Mallorca, Spain

I am a German filmmaker, residing in the sun-drenched enclave of Mallorca, and available for commissions across Spain, Germany, and the breadth of Europe. My craft is the creation of exquisite, documentary-style films for weddings, live music events, and private celebrations—each a bespoke narrative that captures the energy, emotion, and authentic moments that render every occasion truly exceptional.

I operate with a refined, unobtrusive approach, allowing the day to unfold naturally, uninterrupted. My philosophy is elegantly simple: to tell your story with honesty, through impeccably composed visuals and an editorial rhythm that evokes the intimacy of a short film.

Enquire with Mallorca Weddings Videographer

I frequently collaborate with esteemed partners, producing music-video-style edits that seamlessly interweave live performance with atmosphere and narrative. Whether it is an intimate wedding nestled in the Mallorcan hills or a high-energy celebration in Berlin, I work closely with couples, bands, and planners to curate something timeless and deeply personal.

Curated Offerings:

  • Wedding films – artfully refined
  • Corporate and private event videography
  • Music-video-style edits, notably in collaboration with Forever Fiesta
  • Social media teasers and short-form content
  • Full post-production and bespoke colour grading

My Aesthetic:

Rooted in documentary filmmaking, my style is raw yet inherently cinematic. I am drawn to movement, natural light, and genuine emotion, favouring handheld shots and ambient audio to preserve an intimate, living quality. Every project is approached as a short film: structured, emotive, and built around your unique narrative.

Reach:

Based in Mallorca. Available across Germany, mainland Spain, and throughout Europe.

Languages:

English | German | Español

#1 HIGHLIGHT VIDEO – The Essence of Your Day

  • Eight hours of dedicated filming
  • Exquisite capture of every unforgettable moment
  • A cinematic highlight film of three to eight minutes
  • Includes curated highlights of your speeches. Each film is uniquely tailored, its duration determined by the story that unfolds—never merely by the clock.
  • Instagram Reel – three refined highlight reels, perfectly suited for sharing on social media.
  • Music Selection – If you have a cherished song in mind, simply share it. Otherwise, I will select a royalty-free track, fully licensed and impeccable for worldwide sharing.

#2 FULL CINEMATIC VIDEO – The Complete Narrative

  • Full wedding coverage, from preparation to one hour after your first dance—every moment captured with precision.
  • Cinematic highlight film of eight to twenty-five minutes, a beautifully edited tapestry featuring the most emotional moments of your day, including key portions of your speeches.
  • A ninety-second trailer – a succinct, shareable best of film for friends and family.
  • Instagram Reel Package – five carefully crafted highlight reels, ready for social media.
  • Finest Music Selection – Share a song you adore before editing begins, or allow me to select a royalty-free track that is perfect for sharing with the world.

#3 JUST SOCIAL MEDIA – The Vivid Impression

  • Ideal for couples seeking a spirited, shareable memory of their wedding day. This package focuses on capturing energy and atmosphere, curated for social media highlights:
  • Four hours of filming
  • Party vibes, candid moments, and all the delightful details. No sound or speeches are recorded.
  • A forty-five-second trailer – a fast-paced, vibrant highlight in vertical format, impeccable for social media.
  • Up to fifteen reels – ten- to thirty-second Instagram-ready videos, all in vertical format.
  • This package is all about the vibe—short, sweet, vertical, and perfectly shareable online.

#MUSIC VIDEO ADD-ON – Bespoke Cinematic Flourish
Capture the energy of your favourite song from your band, DJ, or live moment in a standalone music-video format, and become the star of your own day.

  • Includes: one hour of additional filming (during soundcheck, performance, or a stylised shoot)
  • Dedicated sound capture or synchronisation with live/studio audio
  • A separate two- to three-minute edited music video
  • Graded, rhythmically cut—ideal for promotional use or sharing

MORE ADD-ONS – Enhancing Your Bespoke Experience
These options may be booked only in addition to one of the main packages above.

  • Extra hour of filming
  • Second shooter
  • Speech edit – a separate, full-length audio-synced video of the ceremony or speeches

millionaire-showband-london.intro_html:
The Millionaire Showband — An Exquisite, International Wedding Band Based in London

“An unparalleled showband distinguished by exquisite vocal prowess, bespoke musical curation, and impeccably orchestrated performances. An absolute highlight of our event.” — Discerning clients

The Millionaire Showband stands as the UK’s most distinguished international showband. A multi-award-winning ensemble of 8 to 21 virtuosos, we are celebrated for our dynamic yet refined live performances, curated exclusively for the world’s most opulent celebrations.

Comprising an elite collective of the industry’s finest musicians, The Millionaire Showband traverses the globe to grace the most prestigious venues and private estates. We have lent our impeccable sound to landmark events at the Golden Tulip Taj Sultan Resort in Tunisia, the enchanting Finca Son Mir in Mallorca, the regal Hotel D’Angleterre in Copenhagen, and the historic Gleneagles Hotel in Scotland, among others.

Discover our curated selection of exceptional wedding bands.

We are proud to be featured on FixTheMusic’s prestigious list of the 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK.

We are regularly booked to perform for sophisticated weddings and events at Golden Tulip Taj Sultan Resort in Tunisia, Finca Son Mir in Mallorca, Hotel D’Angleterre in Copenhagen, Birdsall House in North Yorkshire and Gleneagles Hotel in Auchterarder, Scotland.

Enquire about The Millionaire Showband
millionaire-showband-london.description_html:
This incomparable international showband is renowned globally for an unwavering dedication to delivering an utterly refined live music experience, elevating every celebration into an unforgettable affair.

Explore our hand-picked compilation of the UK’s finest showbands.

Equally accomplished performing as an opulent Jewish wedding ensemble, a sophisticated party band, or a vibrant Indian wedding orchestra, these sensational musicians possess a rare versatility. They are masters in orchestrating legendary soirées that linger in the memory long after the final note.

Fronted by four world-class vocalists—two gentlemen and two ladies, each possessing a uniquely captivating timbre—the band delivers breathtaking renditions of iconic anthems. From the timeless genius of Stevie Wonder, Tina Turner, and Michael Jackson to the contemporary brilliance of Beyoncé, Justin Timberlake, Amy Winehouse, and Bruno Mars, The Millionaire Showband’s meticulously curated setlist of astonishing medleys captivates guests across every generation and culture.

View our refined selection of London’s premier wedding bands.

The Millionaire Showband offers far more than a mere performance; we present an immersive spectacle. Every detail is meticulously orchestrated, from powerful musicianship and sizzling choreography to bespoke, tailor-made costumes that exude elegance.

Supported by an elite rhythm section, our fierce vocalists, blazing horns, and refined strings weave seamlessly through your guests. They descend from the stage to interact, drawing everyone into an atmosphere of pure, unadulterated joy—an ambiance that must be experienced to be believed. Simply put, no one hosts a celebration quite like The Millionaire Showband.

We have had the privilege of performing at the following exquisite destinations for our discerning clientele:

  • Golden Tulip Resort, Tunisia
  • Hotel D'Angleterre, Copenhagen
  • Prague, Czech Republic
  • Vienna, Austria
  • Son Mir, Palma, Mallorca, Spain
  • Gibraltar
  • Gleneagles Hotel, Scotland
  • Birdsall House, North Yorkshire
  • Middleton Lodge Estate, Richmond
  • Hampshire, UK

Follow our journey on Facebook.

The Legends Collective — An Exquisite Wedding & Event Ensemble Based in London

This impeccably curated ensemble, comprising 5 to 15 virtuoso musicians, delivers a world-class spectacle that enchants the most discerning audiences from the very first note.

Week after week, they perform a refined repertoire that flows with the seamless elegance of a masterfully orchestrated DJ set, while resonating with the commanding presence of a premier live band.

We are honoured to be featured among the elite on FixTheMusic's 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆

Their extensive anthology of over 200 meticulously selected compositions traverses genres with effortless sophistication—from timeless R&B and classic Garage to Ibiza anthems, old-school Soul, and Motown treasures.

Follow our journey on Facebook and Instagram 📸

We are also privileged to be included in FixTheMusic's distinguished 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆

strings-attached-belgrade-serbia.intro_html:
Strings Attached – An Exquisite All-Female String Quartet, Based in Belgrade, Serbia

Conceived in 2000 with a refined vision to seamlessly unite classical and contemporary music, Strings Attached was born to elevate classical artistry for discerning audiences. Over two decades, our ensembles and repertoire have been meticulously curated, evolving with each passing year to attain ever-greater heights of sophistication.

Today, we are honoured to count more than thirty exceptional professional string musicians within our exclusive collective.

Contact Strings Attached

Having performed at thousands of bespoke events, we have garnered impeccable feedback from clients who appreciate only the finest. Our engagements span from opulent high-profile client celebrations to exquisitely styled rock 'n' roll weddings—we orchestrate every atmosphere with elegance.

We offer a curated selection of line-ups, from an intimate solo violinist to a full chamber orchestra, each arrangement fully personalised to realise the exact composition of your dreams.

Our repertoire is versatile and breathtakingly wide-ranging, performed by an astounding assembly of professional musicians—members of symphonic and chamber orchestras with decades of experience in concerts and live performances across Serbia and abroad. The collection includes refined classical masterpieces, tango, jazz, evergreen melodies, Latino rhythms, celebrated film scores, ethno traditions, stunning rock and pop string arrangements, as well as wedding-specific repertoires and original author pieces.

Bespoke Line-Up Options:

  • String Quartet
  • String Quartet & Percussion
  • String Quartet, Bass Guitar & Percussion
  • String Trio
  • Violin, Guitar & Cello Trio
  • Violin & Cello
  • Violin & Guitar
  • Solo Violin with Backing Track

zafira-duo-duo-paris-france.intro_html:
Zafira – An Exquisite Parisian Duo

Zafira is a refined French–Australian ensemble, based in Paris, France, built upon two voices, two guitars, and a sound that is at once intimate and exquisitely expressive, suffused with warmth. Blending pop, folk, rock, and indie influences, they curate a live experience that effortlessly captivates, transforming any setting into something both deeply personal and vibrantly alive.

At the heart of Zafira lies their signature acoustic duo format—a bespoke offering impeccably suited to weddings, cocktail receptions, rooftop soirées, corporate events, and private celebrations. For moments that call for enhanced rhythm and uplift, the lineup may expand into a trio with drums or percussion, adding subtle drive while preserving their naturally stripped-back identity.

Contact Zafira
zafira-duo-duo-paris-france.description_html:
Their performances typically unfold over one to two hours, allowing the atmosphere to build with gentle, organic refinement. From elegant background music to more spirited interludes, every set is carefully shaped to match the event’s mood, ensuring a seamless, impeccably paced journey from beginning to end.

Zafira presents a curated selection of timeless pop, folk, and rock classics, delivered with a soulful, honest touch. Their style carries a distinguished Anglo-Saxon influence, yet remains fresh, modern, and emotionally resonant—an exquisite balance of heritage and contemporary grace.

Professional, effortlessly adaptable, and a pleasure to collaborate with, they arrive approximately one hour before the event, their streamlined setup complete within an hour. They provide their own refined sound system and are comfortable performing in a wide range of environments, including outdoor and uniquely picturesque venues.

Song requests may be prepared upon request, and their flexible configuration fits gracefully into spaces of every dimension—making them an ideal choice for both intimate gatherings and larger celebrations. The result is a live performance that feels natural, stylish, and quietly unforgettable.
