The Barcelona Jazz Band is a supremely refined ensemble, curating bespoke live music for weddings, private celebrations, and corporate events with impeccable sophistication.

Founded in 2022 and built upon decades of collective stage experience, the band crafts elegant soundscapes that unfold seamlessly through every moment of an occasion—from ceremony to cocktail hour to evening celebration.

Discover more jazz bands in Spain

Each performance balances refined warmth with musical energy, bestowing upon every event a distinctive atmosphere tailored to its setting and distinguished guests.

Enquire about The Barcelona Jazz Band
barcelona-jazz-band-spain.description_html:
The ensemble offers flexible formations, from an intimate duo to a full octet, allowing them to match both the scale and style of any occasion with effortless precision. Their standard performance formats include either two elegantly timed 40-minute sets or a continuous 1-hour-20-minute set, and they readily adapt timing and structure to suit the schedule. They can perform acoustically or provide sound equipment when required, and also supply a curated background playlist before and between sets to maintain a seamless ambience.

The Barcelona Jazz Band typically arrives one to two hours before the start time, with setup and soundcheck taking approximately one hour depending on the lineup. They are delighted to learn special requests—such as first dances—when arranged in advance, and can adjust their setup to fit virtually any performance space. Meeting professional safety standards and comfortable performing indoors or outdoors when conditions allow, the band delivers a polished, impeccably reliable, and musically rich experience designed to elevate every event.

wedding-band-dordogne-honeys.intro_html:
About The Honeys – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Dordogne, France

Established in 2015, The Honeys are a refined trio of female vocalists who bring an unparalleled level of artistry to weddings and events across France and Europe.

The ensemble possesses a wealth of impeccably curated experience, having performed as soloists, within distinguished bands, and upon the stages of musical theatre for over four decades collectively.

They are, without question, seasoned professionals whose live performances reflect years of masterful refinement.

Today, they captivate discerning audiences throughout France and beyond—including Spain, Italy, the United Kingdom, and Switzerland—with their signature elegance.

In a remarkably short time, The Honeys have cultivated a reputation for their exquisite harmonies, delivering a bespoke selection of the greatest hits that will fill your dance floor with effortless grace.

Enquire About The Honeys
wedding-band-dordogne-honeys.description_html:
The Honeys present two distinct yet perfectly complementary curated sets, each an experience in itself:

Their Fabulously Vintage Cocktail set is smooth and subtle—a shamelessly vintage affair, layered with classic Motown harmonies and a few contemporary surprises. Complete with refined vintage styling, the group remains impeccably professional, never intrusive, and utterly exquisite. It is the ideal accompaniment for an afternoon reception, a tea party, pre-dinner cocktails, or a French Vin d’Honneur.

In exquisite contrast, the Disco Diva Dance Party is a high-energy spectacle, brimming with dance-floor fillers, sequins, and glamour. The set features the biggest hits from Motown, Soul, and Disco, with a sprinkling of Swinging Sixties and current contemporary favourites—music that audiences universally adore. The Honeys also employ a sophisticated range of lights and lasers to elevate the atmosphere to something truly unforgettable.

This highly sought-after set, with its internationally beloved repertoire, effortlessly spans generations, making it an impeccable choice for any wedding celebration.

If the sound of The Honeys and their vibrant, bespoke sets resonates with you, and you wish to engage one of France’s most distinguished wedding and party bands, we invite you to make an enquiry today.

Their collective pedigree encompasses extensive experience performing at the most elegant weddings and exclusive events, as well as touring and recording alongside the industry’s most illustrious artists. From the hallowed stages of Glastonbury Festival to your private celebration — this is refined entertainment of the highest order.

Our ensemble of seven exceptional musicians is available in any curated configuration of three, four, or five pieces, each arrangement delivering an exquisite repertoire of classic indie, pop, and rock selections tailored to complement your event's atmosphere with impeccable precision.

santorini-percussionist-greece.intro_html:
About The Santorini Percussionist – A Distinguished Percussionist Based in Santorini, Greece

The Santorini Percussionist brings an exquisite rhythm and refined energy to every celebration, transforming each occasion into an unparalleled sensory experience.

Nestled on the enchanting island of Santorini, this exclusive act is led by a seasoned percussionist of impeccable talent, with years of experience gracing prestigious festivals, intimate concerts, and curated events across Greece and beyond.

Cultivated from a profound passion for rhythm that began in earliest youth and refined through bespoke training at a private music conservatory in Athens, every performance is executed with impeccable precision, exquisite creativity, and an infectious enthusiasm that captivates discerning audiences.

Contact The Santorini Percussionist
santorini-percussionist-greece.description_html:
The Santorini Percussionist offers an exquisitely flexible selection of set durations, curated from one to three hours, and adapts effortlessly to any distinguished setting—from the most refined beachfront nuptials to exuberant soirées.

Setup is remarkably swift and discreet, requiring a mere twenty minutes, and a bespoke sound system may be arranged upon request for an immaculate auditory experience.

Personalized song requests are graciously accommodated, and the act is entirely at ease in outdoor or unconventional venues, provided a modest 2x2 metre performance space is available.

Clients may entrust their curated playlist to The Santorini Percussionist, who will breathe life into each note with rhythmic sophistication and the very soul of the island—a sublime synthesis destined to craft an unforgettable atmosphere for the most exclusive events.

female-dj-london-lenny.intro_html:
DJ Lenny – An Exquisite, Bespoke Female Wedding DJ, Curated for Discerning Celebrations Across the UK & Europe

DJ Lenny is a refined, impeccably talented professional whose artistry transcends borders. A paragon of musical elegance, she is sought after for weddings, private soirées, and corporate galas alike, performing at the most prestigious venues — from Château de Puissentut in France to Wasing Park in Berkshire.

Consistently ranked among the UK’s top 10 DJs since 2017, DJ Lenny orchestrates each event as a curated luxury experience, tailored exclusively to you.

Discover the UK’s most exceptional wedding DJs ➡️

Her calendar is graced by the finest estates and yachts, including a coveted residency at The Yacht London, where she transforms the Thames into a stage of pure opulence.

Inquire about DJ Lenny 💬
female-dj-london-lenny.description_html:
With a meticulously crafted portfolio of mixes, DJ Lenny demonstrates an exquisite versatility, effortlessly weaving any requested style into her performance. She arrives with a bespoke sound system and high-end lighting, impeccably engineered for gatherings of up to 300 guests.

The Hallmarks of Refinement

  • Impeccable female DJ, celebrated for her artistry and professionalism
  • Consistently ranked among the UK’s top 10 DJs since 2017
  • Resident DJ at the distinguished Yacht London
  • Ideal for weddings, private parties & corporate functions, with over 150 curated performances each year
  • Based in London/Essex, globally available for the most exclusive destinations
  • Master of any musical style, bespoke to your vision

A Gallery of Illumination

📸 DJ Lenny – Signature Lighting

📸 DJ Lenny – Enhanced Disco Illumination (2x)

📸 DJ Lenny – Supreme Disco Illumination (4x)

📸 DJ Lenny – Elegant Uplighters

As the most sought-after female wedding DJ in the UK and one of London’s most refined musical curators, DJ Lenny brings an impeccable pedigree. Originally from Holland, she commands the latest high-tech equipment — a full sound system, Pioneer DJ decks, and a sophisticated lighting array with moving luminaries — to craft an atmosphere of pure splendor.

Her repertoire is an exquisite tapestry: chart & pop, 60s–90s, R&B, hip hop, house, Motown, funk, soul, garage, drum & bass, and beyond.

She has graced London’s most distinguished venues — One Aldwych, the Hilton, the ME Hotel, the Balmoral, Hedsor House, and Hever Castle — as well as festivals, corporate galas for elite brands, and private affairs for luminaries such as Tulisa from the X-Factor and the owner of Champneys. Her global journey includes performances in Miami, Mallorca, La Palma, Italy, and France.

Her residency aboard the Yacht London, the capital’s premier events vessel, is a testament to her refined presence and ability to elevate any celebration.

DJ Lenny is renowned for her intuitive ability to read an audience, delivering a stunning, energetic performance that feels both intimate and grand. She frequently collaborates with virtuoso saxophonists, bongo players, and vocalists, adding layers of bespoke artistry.

Always receptive to requests, she offers a curated library of over 20,000 songs, encompassing a vast spectrum of genres and eras — the perfect accompaniment for weddings, private birthday celebrations, corporate functions, festivals, and exclusive clubs.

Her setup is complemented by all necessary certifications, including Public Liability Insurance and fully PAT-tested equipment, ensuring impeccable peace of mind.

The Apparatus of Excellence

Her curated equipment array includes:

  • Pioneer DDJ SX2 Controller / Laptop
  • DJ Booth with star-cloth
  • Lighting (2x JB Systems Invaders, 2x Lightmaxx Meteor)

soul-flight-band-london.intro_html:
Soul Flight – An Exquisite London-Based Wedding Ensemble

What discerning clients cherish about Soul Flight: an impeccably curated dance floor that remains vibrant through the night, outstanding musicianship and refined vocals, high-energy soul and funk sets, seamless communication and organisation, professional yet engaging presence, and guests who are utterly captivated.

Soul Flight reimagines Funk, Soul and Disco for the 21st century—eschewing the commonplace in favour of the most refined grooves, ensuring a packed dance floor from dusk until dawn.

Based in London, Soul Flight ranks among the UK’s pre-eminent funk and soul ensembles, having graced hundreds of weddings and corporate events across Britain and Europe. The band is proudly listed on FixTheMusic’s 23 Best Soul Bands in the UK.

Clients who have enquired with Soul Flight also consider these distinguished soul and funk wedding bands on FixTheMusic:

  1. Soul Destiny
  2. Supersoul
  3. Groove Addiction
  4. The Scottish Soul Collective
  5. Jupiter Funk
  6. Urban Dynamite
  7. Full House

Soul Flight is regularly engaged to perform at esteemed venues such as the Kimpton Fitzroy Hotel in London and Wasing Park in Reading, UK.

Enquire with Soul Flight

The most intimate configuration is the 5-piece ensemble—featuring female vocal, guitar, bass, drums, and keyboards—ideal for smaller venues and occasions where space is at a premium.

Discover our curated selection of the UK’s finest soul and Motown bands

Our female vocalists rank among London’s most accomplished, possessing an innate ability to coax guests from their seats onto the dance floor with impeccable grace.

For a truly immersive experience, we recommend a minimum of the 7-piece wedding band—identical to the 5-piece, elevated with male vocal and saxophone. Our male vocalist exudes soulful sophistication, ensuring your guests are thoroughly enchanted. The dynamic of a male and female duo at the forefront creates a captivating stage presence, enabling the band to engage the audience with unparalleled finesse.

Our saxophonist is among the finest in the industry; when his moment arrives, prepare for your guests to be spellbound by the most enthralling melodies. Should fortune favour you, he may even descend from the stage to join you and your guests on the dance floor.

Should funk be your chosen aesthetic, we warmly recommend adding a trumpet. Nothing compares to the resonance of a full brass section—that rich, fat funk sound. Two horns working in harmony allow the band to perform brass-heavy classics such as “Move On Up” by Curtis Mayfield.

For a touch of tropical allure, consider enriching the arrangement with percussion. Bongos and congas are hallmarks of disco and house music, yet are rarely seen on stage today. A live bongo or conga player delights guests and imparts the band with an authentic disco flavour.

For those seeking the ultimate configuration, the band can be completed with an additional female vocalist. Three vocalists enable lush harmonies, stage choreography, and an unmatched ability to command the dance floor.

Anticipate hearing your favourite Funk, Soul, Motown and Disco classics by Aretha Franklin, James Brown, Stevie Wonder, Chic, Earth Wind & Fire, Chaka Khan, Prince, and Michael Jackson. Moreover, Soul Flight brings you up to date with contemporary hits inspired by these legends—Beyoncé, Bruno Mars, Pharrell Williams, and many more.

For those with a taste for the extraordinary, Soul Flight also performs an array of rare groove, funk, and acid jazz tracks, delighting even the most discerning listener. All presented in the bespoke Soul Flight style—imbued with glitz, glamour, flair, and energy—ensuring a spectacular evening you and your guests will never forget.

Soul Flight has performed at numerous renowned venues, including Blenheim Palace, Emirates Stadium, Madame Tussauds, The London Science Museum, Bush Hall, The Savoy, The Ritz, The Hilton, and hundreds of smaller wedding venues across the country.

The most popular configuration is the 7-piece—the smallest line-up featuring the perfect combination of male and female vocals, guitar, bass, drums, keyboards, and saxophone. Each vocalist is at the peak of their craft, knowing precisely how to animate your guests. The male and female vocal duo creates a magnificent on-stage dynamic, allowing the band to traverse a wide variety of genres.

If live horns are essential, we strongly recommend adding the trumpet. The sound of a live horn section is incomparable for that full, fat funk texture. Two horns working together enable performances of brass-heavy numbers that require more than one brass musician.

For a tropical edge, consider adding percussion. Bongos and congas are staples of disco and house music, yet rarely seen on stage today. A live conga player will surely delight your guests, lending the band an authentic disco sound.

For the ultimate line-up, an additional female vocalist completes the ensemble. Three vocalists create luscious vocal harmonies, choreographed stage performances, and an unparalleled ability to work the dance floor.

You may also choose extra acoustic performances as a duo or trio in addition to the full band—a popular option during the wedding ceremony, drinks reception, or dinner before the party begins.

Included within the price is a professional sound system suitable for up to 200 guests, complemented by stage lighting and dance floor illumination. Soul Flight can also cater for larger events—prices available upon request. Background or party music can be provided between sets, and an iPod connection is available for custom playlists.

The band also offers a range of optional enhancements, including a wireless microphone for speeches, CD decks and turntables if you engage a DJ, a starcloth backdrop, and coloured uplighting around the room—all at preferential rates for those who book Soul Flight.

Whether you seek the ultimate Funk, Soul wedding band or entertainment for a private party or corporate event, you are guaranteed a spectacular performance that you and your guests will treasure forever.

If you wish to engage the finest showband London has to offer for your wedding or corporate event, please contact Soul Flight.

Refined Line-Up Options

  • 5-piece wedding band = Female vocal, guitar, bass, drums, keyboard (standard)
  • 6-piece wedding band = standard + male vocal
  • 7-piece wedding band = standard + male vocal and sax
  • 8-piece wedding band = standard + male vocal, sax, and trumpet
  • 9-piece wedding band = standard + male vocal, sax, trumpet, and percussion
  • 10-piece wedding band = standard + male and female vocal, sax, trumpet, percussion

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram

Similar Bands

Clients who enquired with Soul Flight also enquired with the following soul and funk wedding bands on FixTheMusic:

  1. Soul Destiny
  2. Supersoul
  3. Groove Addiction
  4. The Scottish Soul Collective

wedding-band-uk-gold-standard.intro_html:
Gold Standard – An Exquisite Luxury Wedding & Party Band, Based in London, UK

Gold Standard presents an impeccably curated ensemble – an exhilarating high-end party band distinguished by years of performance mastery and boundless artistry. Comprising some of the United Kingdom’s most sought-after musicians, many of whom grace the West End stage and accompany headline artists on international tours, the band embodies refined musical excellence.

Discover our curated selection of the UK’s finest showbands ➡️

Gold Standard’s repertoire spans an exquisite array of genres and musical styles, from the 1960s to the present day. Artists featured include Pharrell Williams, Michael Jackson, Amy Winehouse, and many more. This extraordinary ensemble delivers an impeccably professional service, meticulously tailored to your personal requirements, rendering them the consummate choice for wedding receptions, corporate events, birthday celebrations, private functions, charity galas, festivals, and beyond. We are regularly engaged to perform at the most prestigious venues, including Convento do Espinheiro in Portugal, Dewsall Court in Herefordshire, and Shuttleworth House in Biggleswade.

Contact Gold Standard
wedding-band-uk-gold-standard.description_html:
Gold Standard are true wedding connoisseurs, their extensive expertise ensuring a seamless, utterly stress-free occasion. Should your first dance not appear in our curated repertoire? No matter — they will learn your bespoke request, exclusively for you. The ensemble adapts effortlessly to any occasion — whether an intimately curated reception or a grand celebration, they present the perfect line-up to complement your vision.

Discover our curated selection of the UK’s finest showbands ➡️

As standard, the band arrives entirely self-contained, equipped with their own premium sound and lighting system and expert technicians at every event. This guarantees an impeccable live sound and a performance spectacle of flawless brilliance. Gold Standard offers a selection of exquisitely configured line-up options:

  • 14-piece: Three male and two female vocalists, a four-piece horn section (tenor sax, alto sax, trumpet, trombone), keyboards, guitar, bass, percussion, drums, state-of-the-art PA system and lighting, professional sound and lighting technicians, plus a laptop DJ playlist between sets.

  • 13-piece: Two male and two female vocalists, a four-piece horn section (tenor sax, alto sax, trumpet, trombone), keyboards, guitar, bass, percussion, drums, state-of-the-art PA system and lighting, professional sound and lighting technicians, plus a laptop DJ playlist between sets.

  • 12-piece: Two male and two female vocalists, a three-piece horn section (tenor sax, trumpet, trombone), keyboards, guitar, bass, percussion, drums, state-of-the-art PA system and lighting, professional sound and lighting technicians, plus a laptop DJ playlist between sets.

  • 10-piece: One male and two female vocalists, a three-piece horn section (tenor sax, trumpet, trombone), keyboards, guitar, bass, drums, state-of-the-art PA system and lighting, professional sound engineer, plus a laptop DJ playlist between sets.

  • 9-piece: One male and two female vocalists, a two-piece horn section (sax, trumpet), keyboards, guitar, bass, drums, state-of-the-art PA system and lighting, professional sound engineer, plus a laptop DJ playlist between sets.

  • 8-piece: Male and female vocalists, a two-piece horn section (sax, trumpet), keyboards, guitar, bass, drums, state-of-the-art PA system and lighting, professional sound engineer, plus a laptop DJ playlist between sets.

  • 7-piece: Male and female vocalists, sax, keyboards, guitar, bass, drums, state-of-the-art PA system and lighting, professional sound engineer, plus a laptop DJ playlist between sets.

  • 6-piece: Male and female vocalists, keyboards, guitar, bass, drums, state-of-the-art PA system and lighting, professional sound engineer, plus a laptop DJ playlist between sets.

  • DJ add-on: Professional DJ in-between sets and afterwards until midnight.

For the 12-, 13-, and 14-piece configurations, the full lighting spectacle as showcased in our videos is included — please note that setup times are significantly extended. For all other line-ups, the band still provides a superior sound system accompanied by more refined lighting: a stage wash and a couple of moving heads, requiring a two-hour setup.

Should you seek to engage one of London’s most distinguished luxury wedding and party bands, look no further than Gold Standard. Inquire today to secure an unforgettable experience.

party-band-london-nauticals.intro_html:
The Nauticals represent the pinnacle of refined entertainment—a distinguished four-piece ensemble based in London, available to discerning clients worldwide. Their signature sound is an exquisite tapestry of rock and pop, impeccably interpreted through the captivating duality of male and female lead vocals.

Recognised by FixTheMusic as one of the most exceptional wedding bands in London, The Nauticals meticulously curate bespoke performances for weddings, corporate galas, and exclusive private functions. They are discerningly regarded as one of the capital's finest purveyors of celebratory music.

Join their esteemed clientele by following Facebook and Instagram. The band’s captivating female lead also graces events as Sax 'n' Vox, an exquisite solo vocalist, saxophonist, and DJ.

Please note that The Nauticals are based in London and exclusively serve clients within London and its surrounding illustrious counties. This dedication to locality is paired with their prestigious placement on FixTheMusic's 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆.

Discriminating clients who have sought the bespoke services of The Nauticals have also expressed interest in these esteemed ensembles:

  1. Beats & Beyond
  2. Groove Addiction
  3. The Upshots
  4. PYT

The Nauticals are frequently engaged for landmark events at prestigious estates such as Castello Monaci in Italy, High Billinghurst Farm in Surrey, Wadhurst Castle in East Sussex, and 100 Barrington in London.

Inquire for an Exclusively Curated Proposal 💬

The Nauticals’ refined repertoire is meticulously designed to keep the dance floor exquisitely animated all evening. From the timeless allure of Elvis to the contemporary artistry of Ed Sheeran, every song is a curated gem. Their standard service includes either 2 x 60 minutes or 3 x 40 minutes of impeccable live music until midnight, with graceful extensions available upon request.

Discover the UK's most sought-after wedding bands featuring the saxophone ➡️

An impeccably curated DJ set is seamlessly woven between and after their live performances, ensuring a flawless sonic journey without the need for a separate DJ. The Nauticals arrive fully prepared with their own state-of-the-art PA and lighting system, requiring only the simplest of connections to transform a venue into a spectacular soundscape.

What elevates The Nauticals above other quartets is their extraordinary versatility. Their female lead vocalist is also an accomplished saxophonist, delivering breathtaking renditions of iconic sax solos without reliance on backing tracks. For those seeking an even more immersive experience, an exclusive saxophone club set is offered to extend the revelry deep into the night.

Further demonstrating their refined musicianship, their drummer is a supremely talented keys player, while their guitarist is equally proficient on the drums. This allows for exquisite bespoke arrangements, including a live first dance that transcends the standard lineup of guitar, drums, and bass.

The Nauticals have had the distinct privilege of performing at the world’s most prestigious venues, including The Queen Elizabeth Olympic Stadium, The Royal Albert Hall, NEC Birmingham, Leeds Castle, O2 Academies, VEGA Copenhagen, and Kensington Roof Gardens. Their impeccable reputation has also led to collaborations with celebrated artists such as Jahméne Douglas, Conor Maynard, Chas ‘n’ Dave, and Chris Kamara.

Performing at approximately 150 events annually is their full-time vocation—a testament to their unwavering dedication to their craft. They approach each commission with a solemn commitment to excellence, ensuring every client is wholly and profoundly satisfied, as evidenced by their extensive collection of testimonials.

While based in London, The Nauticals are accustomed to travelling across the UK, Europe, and the Middle East for their discerning clients. Their schedule is a refined itinerary of prestigious locations, from Liverpool to Dorset, and beyond.

This esteemed standing is further cemented by their inclusion in FixTheMusic's 30 Best Wedding Bands in London and the top wedding bands in Essex 🏆.

For those seeking to commission the finest party band London has to offer for a corporate event or wedding, an inquiry with The Nauticals is the first step towards an unforgettable evening.

Formed in 2010 and refined to its most formidable lineup in 2014, the band now boasts a calibre of musicians and entertainers that positions them in the top echelon of the industry. Their sole, unwavering objective is to curate an atmosphere so magnetic that the dance floor is unequivocally filled. The setlist is a living, breathing entity, chosen on the fly with the single-minded elegance of maximising guest engagement.

With a repertoire spanning four generations, there is an exquisite morsel for every guest, ensuring even the most venerable attendees find themselves gracefully swept onto the dance floor. Beyond the evening’s spectacular show, clients can opt for an intimate afternoon performance, offering a choice of a refined acoustic set or a solo saxophone recital.

The following prestigious venues number amongst the exclusive locations where The Nauticals have been commissioned for weddings and events:

party-band-london-nauticals.faq_html:
<details><summary>How much do you charge?</summary>Our fee varies depending on the day of the week, time of year and location of your event. Get in touch for an accurate quote!



</details><details><summary>How far do you travel?</summary>We travel both UK-wide and internationally.



</details><details><summary>Do you play any public gigs?</summary>Due to the nature of our work, we don't play many public gigs as all of the events we perform at tend to be private functions. We try to offset this situation by making sure we have plenty of promotional material which accurately represents our performance in a live scenario.



</details><details><summary>Are you insured?</summary>Yes we have Public Liability Insurance cover up to £10M and all of our equipment is professionally PAT tested yearly. We can send our certificates to you or your venue upon booking.



</details><details><summary>Do you have lights?</summary>Yes we have LED lighting which covers us and the dance floor for the ultimate light show during your event.



</details><details><summary>What happens if a band member is ill on the day of our event?</summary>In the unlikely event that a band member is ill on the day of your event, we have some of the best replacement musicians on standby to fill in.



</details><details><summary>How long do you play for?</summary>Our standard evening package includes 2 x 60 minutes of live music and DJ music before, in-between and after our live sets. As well as our evening band sets, we also offer some acoustic options, perfect for your ceremony, drinks reception or during your meal.



</details><details><summary>Do you have any specific requirements?</summary>All we ask is that you're able to provide us with soft drinks and food for the duration of our time at the venue. Usually we're included in the evening food/buffet.



</details><details><summary>How and when do I pay?</summary>We require a deposit to be paid securely via FixTheMusic to secure the booking and the remaining balance is due before the event.



</details><details><summary>How long does it take you to set up?</summary>It takes us approximately 1 hour to load in, set up, soundcheck and get changed ready to start the first song.



</details><details><summary>Are noise limiters an issue?</summary>We have a lot of experience performing at venues with sound limiters. Usually our drummer can use 'hot rod' sticks which is enough to bring our overall volume down. Unlike most bands, we also have an electric drum kit which we can also bring which allows us to have complete control over the entire band volume.



</details><details><summary>Do you play requests?</summary>When it comes to first dance songs, we are more than happy to consider learning it for you. It largely depends on whether the particular song fits our instrumental line up. For example, it would be difficult for us to pull off a Frank Sinatra song with a big orchestra. Upon booking, please let us know if there's a particular song you'd like us to consider learning so we have enough time to learn it well.</details>

Comprising four impeccably skilled musicians, Nebula curates a refined collection of pop and rock masterpieces spanning every era. Their performances are infused with an electric vibrancy, an undeniable joie de vivre, and a meticulously chosen repertoire—all driven by a shared devotion to transforming every gathering into an unforgettable celebration of movement and joy.

With decades of combined industry experience, this bespoke four-piece ensemble brings an unparalleled level of artistry and professionalism to every event, delivering a show that is nothing short of extraordinary. Nebula is regularly entrusted with weddings and exclusive celebrations at the esteemed Hotel Miramar in Barcelona and the distinguished Mas Palau Blanes in Girona, Spain.

Enquire About Nebula

Based in the luminous city of Barcelona, Nebula performs with equal grace across Spain and beyond—for weddings, private soirées, and corporate affairs of the highest order. Their eclectic repertoire, a carefully curated journey through genres and decades, ensures that every guest experiences a moment of refined delight.

If you seek to secure the services of one of Barcelona’s most sought-after wedding and party bands, look no further than Nebula. We invite you to reach out today and begin crafting an evening of unparalleled elegance.

barons-jazz-band-kent-uk.intro_html:
About Barons of Jazz – an exquisite Jazz & Swing ensemble based in Ramsgate, UK

For discerning clientele seeking impeccable entertainment, Barons of Jazz present a refined swing jazz experience from the heart of Kent. Their curated repertoire features timeless classics from the 1940s and 1950s, interpreted with panache—beloved standards made famous by the legendary Frank Sinatra, Sammy Davis Jr., Dean Martin, and Tony Bennett, alongside bespoke renditions of contemporary icons such as Michael Bublé, Robbie Williams, and Jamie Cullum.

Contact Barons of Jazz
barons-jazz-band-kent-uk.description_html:
A well-established ensemble of unparalleled pedigree, Barons of Jazz have graced hundreds of the most exclusive weddings and private functions across the United Kingdom. Every performance is supported by a full professional PA system, meticulously calibrated for venues of any dimension, PAT tested and fully covered by public liability insurance.

Bespoke Setup Details

  • 2,400-watt PA system
  • Spot lights & FX lighting for an ambient atmosphere
  • Curated background music during intermissions
  • Wireless microphone available for speeches upon request
  • First-dance songs not on our setlist can be learned on request—complimentary, as a gesture of refinement

Exquisite Line-up

  • Vocals
  • Piano (electric)
  • Saxophone
  • Double Bass
  • Drums

solstice-duo-bordeaux-france.intro_html:
About Solstice Duo – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Ensemble, Based in Bordeaux, France

Solstice Duo is a refined duo of musicians who reimagine the finest international and French pop/folk masterpieces from the 1980s, 1990s, and 2000s.

Their impeccably curated repertoire spans from ABBA to Jean-Jacques Goldman, with elegant diversions through Bruno Mars, France Gall, and the Bee Gees.

Alex lends her luminous voice and guitar, while Tom provides cajon, guitar, and bespoke backing vocals.

Their chemistry yields an on-stage alchemy that is both deeply heartwarming and electrifying.

What discerning audiences cherish most: their diverse repertoire and uniquely reimagined arrangements.

Inquire About Solstice Duo
solstice-duo-bordeaux-france.description_html:
This exquisite French duo travels throughout the West and Southwest of France, performing exclusive concerts across the nation.

With over 150 impeccable concerts to their name and fully self-sufficient in sound and lighting, Solstice Duo delivers a seamless two-hour live performance.

Equipped with premium speakers and four refined light arrays, they craft a unique and memorable atmosphere.

Though only two on stage, their energy and bespoke arrangements create the immersive presence of a full band.

To elevate your wedding into a truly unique and unforgettable celebration, Solstice Duo offers a musical experience suffused with emotion, designed to surprise and delight your guests.

Whether for the ceremony, cocktail hour, or to illuminate your evening soirée, they deliver a high-end, personalised performance.

With an acoustic guitar, percussion, and two voices, they guide you on a journey through the greatest international and French pop/folk classics from the 1980s, 1990s, and 2000s—guaranteed to inspire movement and feeling.

Please note that they also offer two distinct formulas: acoustic or electric.

Both are centred on the 1970s, 1980s, and 1990s top hits, but the electric option is more spirited and ideally suited for the after-dinner celebration.

They also present a special package for the wedding ceremony, featuring songs of your choice to highlight each key moment, making the occasion even more unforgettable.

The most coveted choices among couples are the “Tailor-made Ceremony (civil or religious) + Cocktail” package and the “Cocktail” package.

Every wedding is unique and exceptional, which is why Solstice Duo pours their entire heart into creating magical moments you and your guests will treasure forever.

ska-riders-band-bordeaux-france.intro_html:
An Offering of Ska Riders – An Exquisite Ensemble from Bordeaux, France

Step into the luminous world of Ska Riders—a refined five-piece ensemble that invites you to surrender to the rhythm and soul of traditional Jamaican Ska, Ska Jazz, and Reggae. This impeccably curated formation presents an irresistible fusion of instruments: the saxophone, guitar, double bass, trombone, and drums. Each musician brings a singular artistry, weaving a tapestry of sound that embodies the very essence of ska with sophistication and grace.

Together, they form a brotherhood of musical mastery, harmonising since 2010—a decade of exquisite camaraderie that resonates in every note. Based in the sun-drenched landscapes of the South of France, Ska Riders have captivated audiences at the most distinguished festivals, enchanting venues, and exclusive private events across the region.

Contact Ska Riders

Their performances are a celebration of life—an effervescent alchemy of infectious melodies and foot-tapping rhythms that transcend age, language, and culture, uniting guests in a collective, euphoric groove. With every chord and every beat, Ska Riders channel their profound love for the music, transforming any gathering into an unforgettable soirée. Their energy radiates from the stage, enveloping the audience in an irresistible allure that draws them to the dance floor, swaying to the intoxicating pulse of ska.

From intimate, candlelit affairs to grand festival stages, Ska Riders imbue each event with a magnetic charm that leaves every guest with an indelible smile. As the ultimate tribute to ska, the band honours the genre’s rich heritage while infusing it with a contemporary sophistication—striking a perfect balance between nostalgia and innovation. This refined approach captivates both seasoned aficionados and discerning newcomers alike.

Ska Riders have mastered the art of spreading joy through their bespoke performances. Their versatile repertoire ensures they are the quintessential choice for any occasion seeking a touch of musical magic. Their music becomes the heart and soul of your celebration, transforming gatherings into joyous fiestas echoing with laughter, dance, and pure bliss.

Whether you are orchestrating a bustling festival in the South of France or planning an intimate event that craves the vibrant sounds of ska, Ska Riders await the privilege of guiding you on a rhythmic journey you will cherish forever. Prepare to groove, dance, and revel in the magic of Ska Riders—the ultimate purveyors of ska and creators of everlasting memories.

pop-covers-wedding-band-london-the-power.intro_html:
An Exquisite Offering: The Power – A Bespoke Covers Band of Unparalleled Refinement, Based in London

An electrifying and interactive ensemble, The Power is available to grace every conceivable occasion with their impeccable artistry. Whether an intimate gathering or a grand celebration, they pride themselves on transforming any event into an unforgettable, uniquely curated affair.

Recently, The Power was engaged through FixTheMusic for an exclusive private sojourn at Borgo San Felice in Tuscany, Italy. Their presence has also been regularly coveted for weddings and distinguished events at the Caruso Belmond Amalfi Coast Hotel in Italy, the Corinthia Hotel in London, and Squerryes Court in Kent, UK.

We invite you to peruse our 2026 Set List — a meticulously curated repertoire for the most discerning clientele.

Contact The Power 💬

Their vast experience and remarkable versatility enable them to tailor each set with exquisite precision, harmonising flawless musicianship with flamboyant showmanship to craft a reputation that is second to none.

Discover our curated collection of the United Kingdom’s finest showbands ➡️

From a refined five-piece configuration to a lavish sixteen-piece ensemble replete with horns, multiple vocalists, and dancers, The Power can create a bespoke line-up perfectly suited to your event. For more intimate moments, they also offer exceptional DJs, jazz trios, and acoustic duos.

Their talented, professional personnel have graced stages and studios alongside some of the most luminary names in the music industry—including All Saints, Clean Bandit, Enrique Iglesias, Girls Aloud, Jennifer Lopez, Jessie J, Katherine Jenkins, Lana Del Rey, Leona Lewis, Kylie Minogue, Mary J Blige, Michael Kiwanuka, Muse, Professor Green, Rod Stewart, The Brand New Heavies, The Foundations, and The Human League.

If your vision is to secure the finest luxury band that London has to offer, we invite you to enter into conversation with The Power.

Below are but a select few of the prestigious locales where clients on FixTheMusic have reserved our services for weddings and events...

mermaid-trio-ibiza-singing-sirens.intro_html:
Introducing Singing Sirens – An Exquisite, Bespoke Musical Mermaid Ensemble from Ibiza, Spain

Infuse your celebration with an air of mythical enchantment and radiant elegance, courtesy of the refined allure of Singing Sirens. In ancient Greek lore, sirens were revered for luring sailors with their mesmerising melodies and ethereal voices. Today, Singing Sirens channel that same captivating spirit, delivering an impeccably curated performance that weaves a spellbinding tapestry of sound and spectacle, leaving guests with memories as timeless as the myths themselves. Rooted in the sun-drenched shores of Ibiza, this accomplished ensemble is available to travel globally, bringing an air of exclusivity to celebrations anywhere in the world.

Contact Singing Sirens
mermaid-trio-ibiza-singing-sirens.description_html: Beyond their trio performances, bespoke solo and duo configurations are also available, each meticulously tailored to suit a refined spectrum of musical preferences and ambiances. Their repertoire may be delivered in an intimate acoustic arrangement or elevated with DJ sets and carefully selected backing tracks — every option curated for impeccable sonic sophistication. For those seeking a truly immersive aquatic fantasy, collaborations with synchronised swimmers, fire dancers, and light artists can be arranged, creating a multi-sensory experience of unparalleled beauty. If your vision calls for one of Ibiza’s most distinguished and enchanting mermaid acts, we invite you to connect with Singing Sirens without delay.

gossip-girl-band-barcelona-spain.intro_html:
About Gossip Girl Band – An Exquisite Wedding & Party Band, Based in Barcelona, Spain

Gossip Girl Band is a Barcelona-based ensemble of refined musicians, curated for destination weddings, corporate galas, and private celebrations across Catalonia and beyond—from the sun-drenched Costa Brava to the Costa Daurada, and indeed for international events. The band’s repertoire weaves soul, R&B, funk, pop, blues, and jazz through a bespoke lineup that ranges from an intimate voice-and-guitar duo to an impeccable six-piece configuration featuring an electric violin.

Browse more Barcelona wedding bands

Every performance is entirely self-contained, backed by professional-grade audio equipment and a dedicated sound technician, ensuring an exquisite auditory experience from the first note.

Contact Gossip Girl Band
gossip-girl-band-barcelona-spain.description_html:
The band is fronted by a lead vocalist of competition-winning pedigree and extensive festival stage presence, supported by musicians with orchestral training and years of refined live-event expertise. The result is a genuine stage charisma and a sound that transitions seamlessly from ceremony to cocktail hour to evening reception—never feeling like three separate acts.

The lead singer brings specific experience with corporate clientele, including an understanding of data protection protocols and event documentation—a practical touch for planners seeking impeccable entertainment for corporate events in Spain.

Lineup options are curated from an intimate ceremony or cocktail duet through to a five- or six-piece ensemble with keyboard and electric violin. The band performs 1.5 hours of live music—either with a short interlude or as a continuous, uninterrupted set—and arrives one hour prior to the performance for a meticulous setup and soundcheck.

Recent venues include the distinguished Castell de Can Caramany, Mas Salvi, Tancat de Codorniu, Jardins de Pedralbes, Recinte Modernista de Sant Pau, and Mas La Boella.

Bespoke Line-up Options:

  • Intimate Duet: voice & guitar or keyboard, with backing vocals
  • Trio: a wealth of combinations featuring voice, guitar, keyboard, backing vocals, and a reduced drum kit
  • Band 4: voice, electric guitar or keyboard, bass, drums & backing vocals
  • Band 5: add a keyboard or an additional guitar
  • Band 6: elevate with an electronic violin
  • Ceremony Duet
  • Cocktail Intimate Duet
  • Cocktail Trio or Band Concert (limitless combinations—inquire for your custom arrangement)
  • Wedding Festival Opening Party Band
  • Corporate Events

Impeccable Services Generally Included:

  • 1.5 hours of live music (with a short break or as a continuous set)
  • Setup & Soundcheck (early arrival for flawless preparation)
  • Travel expenses
  • Top-quality audio equipment for cocktail ambience
  • Stage decoration, full setup & equipment preparation
  • Dedicated sound technician
  • Elegant stage decoration

Please Note:

  • For the Wedding Festival Opening Party, we strongly recommend engaging a professional sound & lighting company to ensure absolute quality—we are pleased to offer recommendations.
  • Lighting and smoke machine equipment are not included and will be arranged as an additional bespoke service.

bordeaux-gospel-choir-france.intro_html:
About The Bordeaux Gospel Choir – An Exquisite Professional Wedding Choir for Hire in Bordeaux, France

The Bordeaux Gospel Choir presents an impeccably curated ensemble of vocal artistry, performing both the most beloved contemporary standards and cherished traditional African-American gospel hymns. This refined ensemble brings an air of sublime sophistication to every performance.

Comprising three virtuosic vocalists and a masterful pianist, The Bordeaux Gospel Choir lends its breathtaking harmonies to public concerts, open-air festivals, sacred Christmas carols within historic churches, and—most exquisitely—as the bespoke gospel accompaniment for a wedding ceremony of unparalleled elegance.

Gospel music, by its very essence, is a celebration of life, joy, and spiritual exuberance. The atmosphere woven by the ensemble’s performance can range from effervescent jubilation to a more contemplative, reverent refinement—a truly bespoke emotional journey for each event.

For those seeking an even more lavish experience, the group may be engaged in several curated configurations, expanding to include additional singers and instrumentalists for an ensemble of up to fifteen extraordinary performers.

Should you wish to engage the finest gospel choir that Bordeaux, France has to offer for your wedding or distinguished event, we invite you to make contact with us.

Contact The Bordeaux Gospel Choir

A vocal gospel performance imbues an evening or ceremony with an indelible character, rendering it utterly unforgettable.

The Bordeaux Gospel Choir, possessing a wealth of experience in both exclusive events and prestigious concerts and festivals, is certain to surpass your expectations: the inauguration of the Promenade Sainte-Catherine in Bordeaux, animation of the FanZone for the Girondins de Bordeaux Football Club, the Night of the Cathedrals Festival, the Cathedra Festival, a concert at the sublime Saint-André Cathedral in Bordeaux, Christmas celebrations in the city of Mérignac, a gospel concert at the historic Saint-Vincent church, the Andernos Jazz Festival, the Mozaïk Jazz Festival, the first part for the legendary Ravi Coltrane, a concert at the illustrious Château Pape Clément, the Bernard Magrez Cultural Institute, and many more exquisite engagements.

En français

The Bordeaux Gospel Choir est un groupe de gospel de Bordeaux qui interprète les plus beaux standards et chants traditionnels gospel Afro-Américains, avec une élégance et une refinement incomparables.

Composé de trois chanteuses d'exception et d'un pianiste de talent, The Bordeaux Gospel Choir peut se produire pour des concerts publics, des festivals en plein air ou dans une église pour des chants de Noël, ou encore comme un groupe gospel pour une cérémonie de mariage d'une beauté inoubliable.

Les chants Gospel sont par nature festifs, pleins de vie et de joie. L'ambiance dégagée par les chants pourra être très joyeuse ou plus sobre dans l'esprit d'un accompagnement spirituel, selon l'atmosphère que vous désirez créer.

Le groupe peut se décliner selon plusieurs formules sur mesure, avec d'autres chanteurs et chanteuses ainsi que des musiciens supplémentaires, pour un ensemble pouvant compter jusqu'à quinze artistes.

Un Gospel vocal donne du cachet à une soirée ou une cérémonie et la rend inoubliable pour vos invités.

The Bordeaux Gospel Choir, grâce à une expérience riche et variée tant dans l'événementiel que dans les concerts et festivals, saura répondre à toutes vos attentes : inauguration de la Promenade Sainte-Catherine à Bordeaux, animation de la FanZone pour le Football club des Girondins de Bordeaux, Festival de la Nuit des Cathédrales, festival Cathedra, concert à la Cathédrale Saint-André de Bordeaux, Noël de la ville de Mérignac, concert Gospel à l’église Saint-Vincent, Festival de Jazz d’Andernos, Festival jazz Mozaïk, première partie de Ravi Coltrane, concert au château Pape Clément, Institut Culturel Bernard Magrez, et bien d'autres prestations d'exception.

Quality Control DJs – An Exquisite Musical Curation for Your Most Refined Wedding Celebration

Presenting Quality Control DJs, an impeccably curated ensemble of sound artisans based in Bordeaux, France, offering bespoke audio experiences for the most discerning private and public occasions. For those who seek an unparalleled sonic ambiance on the day of days, your journey begins here.

Since 2017, Quality Control DJs have been crafting original and sophisticated musical narratives for couples who desire a truly distinctive wedding atmosphere. Our artists deliver a refined artistic direction, meticulously personalised to ensure you remain the arbiter of your event’s elegant tone.

With Quality Control DJs, discard the commonplace—no clichéd wedding anthems, no intrusive microphone-wielding hosts, no egocentric DJs. Instead, embrace a discreet, passionate, and exquisitely tasteful presence that elevates every moment.

Enquire with Quality Control DJs
quality-control-djs-bordeaux-france.description_html:
An impeccable alternative for those who refuse to let their wedding soundtrack mirror the ordinary—seeking an ambiance that is both refined (yet never pretentious) and celebratory (yet never dated).

Our Artists: A Legacy of Curated Distinction

Having graced the finest clubs, bars, and festivals of South-West France—Garorock, IBOAT, Bordeaux Open Air, Isulia, Bien Public, Darwin, Motto, among others—and ventured to iconic international venues such as Le Bain and The Lot Radio in New York City, as well as London, Paris, and Berlin, our two founders transcend the conventional “wedding DJ” archetype.

Equally fluent in popular culture and the avant-garde, they infuse each event with technical mastery and a touch of original flair. By entrusting your celebration to Quality Control DJs, you place it in the hands of genuine musical connoisseurs who move far beyond a commercial approach.

Far removed from the stereotypes of DJing, our artists are discreet yet impassioned—reminiscent of the underground clubs of the 1970s through the 1990s in New York, Manchester, Ibiza, and Paris. Highly sought after, our founders select each DJ for your wedding with extraordinary discernment, mirroring the rigorous standard they apply to their own musical selections. Every artist emerges from a scene more alternative and cutting-edge than the typical wedding DJ circuit.

Our Impeccable Checklist:

  • English, French, and German fluency ✅
  • International cultural refinement ✅
  • Global performance experience (NYC, London, Paris, Berlin) ✅
  • Bespoke, tailor-made services ✅
  • Visual and sonic elegance (exclusive 100% homemade setup) ✅
  • Personalised artistic direction ✅
  • Responsiveness and uncompromising standards ✅
  • Alternative music culture (notably house, new-wave, italo, disco, jazz, and beyond) ✅

Our Curated Destinations:

  • South-West of France…
    Bordeaux, Cap-Ferret, Pyla, Arcachon, Saint-Émilion, Biarritz, Saint-Jean-de-Luz, Hossegor, Cognac—the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region abounds with magnificent settings that deserve nothing less than an exquisitely appropriate musical accompaniment.

  • …and Beyond
    We remain attentive to your projects both within France and abroad. The music we revere originates from Chicago, Rome, Paris, Detroit, Marrakech, London, Berlin, New York City—it is only natural that we journey to honour it.

Our Bespoke Follow-Up:

  • Step 1: Video consultation (an intimate introductory conversation)
  • Step 2: Quotation and contract (refined and transparent)
  • Step 3: Online questionnaire (to capture your precise vision)
  • Step 4: Precision appointment (fine-tuning every detail)
  • Step 5: Customised service (flawless execution)

Visually Elegant Equipment:
Quality Control DJs is wholly independent, travelling to each wedding with an exclusive collection of sound systems, turntables, mixing desks, microphones, lighting, and more—every element orchestrated so that you require but a single, impeccable vendor.

band-for-hire-london-beats-and-beyond.intro_html:
Beats & Beyond – an exquisite, bespoke wedding band available for hire in London, offering a curated experience of refined musical artistry and impeccable entertainment.

What discerning clients cherish most: a versatile ensemble delivering an acoustic prelude and an electrifying evening performance, distinguished by sublime vocals, a captivating saxophone, and a masterfully varied setlist that ensures the dance floor remains animated throughout the night.

For those seeking to engage a live band that delivers an authentically high-energy performance of unparalleled sophistication—one that guarantees you and your guests remain enthralled on the dance floor until the final note—Beats & Beyond represents the quintessential choice.

With over a decade of experience orchestrating luxury weddings, prestigious corporate galas, and exclusive private soirées, this ensemble has refined its craft to perfection.

The band presents an electrifying repertoire of live cover classics, elevated by a rock-infused horn section, blistering saxophone solos, and virtuosic guitar passages, all framed by sensational male and female vocals of the highest calibre.

We are honoured to be featured on FixTheMusic’s 31 Best Wedding Bands in the UK 🏆.

Beats & Beyond may be engaged as a 4- to 9-piece configuration, tailored to the grandeur of your event.

We are regularly commissioned to perform at esteemed venues such as 100 Barrington in London, Gate Street Barn in Guildford, Hedsor House in Bourne End, and Westerham Golf Club in Kent.

Enquire with Beats & Beyond 💬

Having orchestrated over 500 celebrated events across the globe—including destinations such as Dubai, Italy, Spain, Ireland, and France—Beats & Beyond has earned international acclaim.

We are also listed on FixTheMusic’s 30 Best Wedding Bands in London 🏆.

Our musicians have collaborated with some of the industry’s most illustrious names and have graced stages including the Hammersmith Apollo, Birmingham NIA, Cardiff Motorpoint Arena, the Isle of Wight Festival, and hundreds more of equal prestige.

Beats & Beyond has become one of the most sought-after wedding and corporate bands in the industry—an impeccable choice for luxury entertainment both in the United Kingdom and internationally.

For those who desire an even more opulent presentation, the band may be upgraded to a complete show band, featuring additional vocalists, percussion, and a string section.

The standard quotation includes a 5 pm arrival with a midnight finish, comprising two one-hour live sets with curated Spotify party music played between performances.

Additionally, the following bespoke enhancements are available:

  • Acoustic Duo for Drinks Reception — one hour of refined female vocals accompanied by acoustic guitar
  • Band Member–Manned DJ — seamless Spotify requests between and after the band’s sets
  • Wireless Microphone for Speeches — for impeccable clarity during toasts

Clients are kindly asked to provide a hot meal and soft drinks for the band. Alternatively, a rider buy-out can be arranged, allowing the band to provide their own sustenance. Please indicate your preference, and this will be incorporated into the quotation.

We invite you to select your ten preferred repertoire pieces, which will be woven into our proven set list. A first dance song is also performed at no additional charge, should you desire.

Once your booking is confirmed, a member of our team will reach out approximately three to four weeks before your wedding to finalise every exquisite detail.

If you seek the finest cover band to elevate your wedding or corporate event in London, we invite you to connect with Beats & Beyond.

Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸

Similar Bands

Clients who enquired with Beats & Beyond also expressed interest in the following ensembles on FixTheMusic:

• The Nauticals

• Groove Addiction

• Aptitude

• Soul Selection

• The Charmers

Browse our curated collection of the most popular wedding bands.
